Alongside improved vision and audio encoders for all model sizes, we propose a unified, encoder-free architecture for our 12B model, which ingests raw audio and image patches. Furthermore, we integrate a thinking mode, enabling Gemma models to generate reasoning traces prior to responding. We improve inference speed, memory, and compute efficiency, as well as long-context abilities through critical design choices. Gemma 4 establishes a leap in performance across STEM, multimodal, and long-context benchmarks, and rivals larger, frontier open models in human-rated tasks.

AI.tldr: Gemma 4 是 Gemma 系列新一代开源多模态大模型，涵盖 2.3B 至 31B 参数规模，采用稠密与 MoE 架构，配备增强的视觉/音频编码器及创新的无编码器原生多模态输入设计（12B 版本），并引入‘思考模式’以生成推理链；在计算效率、长上下文与多模态能力上显著提升，性能媲美更大规模的前沿开源模型。
AI.motivation: 提升计算效率与推理能力，推动开源多模态语言模型发展，解决现有模型在多模态输入处理、长上下文建模和推理可解释性方面的局限。
AI.method: 提出 Gemma 4 模型系列，包含稠密与 MoE 架构；改进视觉与音频编码器；为 12B 模型设计统一的 encoder-free 架构，直接接收原始图像块与音频片段；引入 thinking mode 支持推理链生成；优化推理速度、内存占用、计算效率与长上下文能力。
AI.result: 在 STEM、多模态及长上下文基准测试中实现性能跃升，在人类评估任务中媲美更大规模的前沿开源模型。
AI.conclusion: Gemma 4 标志着开源多模态大模型在效率、能力与架构创新上的重要进展，为高效、可解释、强泛化能力的多模态 AI 提供新范式。

title: Do Diabetic Foot Ulcer Segmentation Models Generalize? A Cross-Dataset Benchmark of CNN and Transformer Architectures
summary: Deep learning models for diabetic foot ulcer (DFU) segmentation routinely report high accuracy, but they are almost always trained and tested on the same dataset, leaving their behaviour on data from a different clinical source largely unmeasured. We benchmark three representative segmentation architectures -- U-Net and DeepLabV3+ (convolutional) and SegFormer-B2 (Transformer) -- under an identical, leakage-screened protocol: training on the combined FUSeg/AZH wound data and evaluating, without fine-tuning, on two independent external datasets (DFUC2022 and Medetec). All models achieve strong in-domain performance (Dice 0.80--0.83) but degrade substantially across datasets. The degradation is, however, architecture-dependent: SegFormer-B2 generalizes best on both external sets (DFUC2022 Dice 0.557, Medetec Dice 0.786), outperforming both convolutional models, while the more complex DeepLabV3+ generalizes worse than the simpler U-Net. Per-image failure analysis on 2,160 images across both external test sets confirms that SegFormer-B2 produces the fewest catastrophic failures on DFUC2022 (31.1%), compared with U-Net (38.5%) and DeepLabV3+ (43.0%). The consistent ranking across two independent external sources, confirmed by Wilcoxon signed-rank tests (p < 0.001 on both datasets), indicates that architecture family, not model complexity, drives cross-hospital generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了三种深度学习分割模型（U-Net、DeepLabV3+ 和 SegFormer-B2）在跨数据集场景下的泛化能力，发现基于Transformer的SegFormer-B2在两个外部数据集上表现最优，表明架构类型比模型复杂度更影响跨医院泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有糖尿病足溃疡（DFU）分割模型通常仅在单一数据集内验证，缺乏对跨临床来源数据泛化能力的系统评估。
AI.method: 在无数据泄露的统一协议下，使用FUSeg/AZH联合数据训练U-Net、DeepLabV3+和SegFormer-B2，并在两个独立外部数据集（DFUC2022和Medetec）上零样本评估；辅以每图像失败分析和Wilcoxon符号秩检验。
AI.result: 所有模型在源域Dice达0.80–0.83，但在外部数据集上显著下降；SegFormer-B2在DFUC2022（Dice 0.557）和Medetec（Dice 0.786）上均最优，且灾难性失败率最低（31.1%）；U-Net次之，DeepLabV3+最差；统计检验确认结果显著（p < 0.001）。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构（SegFormer-B2）比卷积架构更利于跨医院泛化，模型泛化能力主要由架构族决定，而非参数复杂度。

title: Federated Learning for Object Detection: Enabling Collaborative Drone Learning Without Centralizing Data
summary:
Object detection is a fundamental capability for AI-driven perception in safety-critical drone and edge-vision systems, including disaster response, operational security environments, infrastructure monitoring and defense applications. Robust model performance in such environments depends on large, continuously updated datasets. However, training high-performing detectors typically requires centralizing aerial imagery, which raises privacy, regulatory, storage, and bandwidth challenges. This is especially problematic in distributed drone deployments, where visual data is generated onboard and is often impractical or undesirable to transfer to a centralized infrastructure.
  In this work, we apply Federated Learning (FL) for object detection, enabling drones to improve a shared model while keeping image data local and private. We implement a federated object detection pipeline using the Sherpa.ai FL platform on the KIIT-MiTA dataset, and compare it with Single-drone and Centralized baselines using mean Average Precision (mAP) at IoU thresholds of 0.50 and 0.50-0.95. In our experiments, the proposed FL approach remains close to Centralized training while dramatically improving over Single-drone training, with the best lightweight model (YOLO26 nano), suitable for deployment even on very limited edge infrastructure, achieving relative gains of 52.89% and 67.80% in mAP@0.50 and mAP@0.50:0.95, respectively. These results show that FL enables scalable, high-performing, and privacy-preserving object detection across distributed drone fleets without data centralization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于联邦学习（FL）的无人机分布式目标检测方法，使无人机能在不上传原始图像数据的前提下协同训练共享检测模型，在保持隐私与降低带宽需求的同时，显著提升单机模型性能，接近集中式训练效果。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键型无人机和边缘视觉系统中，目标检测需要持续更新的大规模数据集，但集中式数据收集面临隐私、法规、存储和带宽等挑战，尤其在分布式无人机部署场景下更为突出。
AI.method: 采用联邦学习框架，在Sherpa.ai FL平台上构建面向无人机的联邦目标检测流程，并在KIIT-MiTA数据集上评估；对比单机训练与集中式训练基线，使用mAP@0.50和mAP@0.50:0.95作为评价指标。
AI.result: 所提FL方法性能接近集中式训练，显著优于单机训练；轻量级模型YOLO26 nano在mAP@0.50和mAP@0.50:0.95上分别获得52.89%和67.80%的相对提升。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习可实现可扩展、高性能且隐私保护的分布式无人机目标检测，无需数据集中化。

title: SwarmResearch: Orchestrating Coding Agents for Open-Ended Discovery
summary: Long-running coding agents such as autoresearch can persistently discover optimizations for open-ended problems. However, they tend to converge onto a single high-level approach, then proceed with low-level edits while missing other superior approaches to the problem. We hypothesize two harness-level design choices contribute to this behavior: accumulating context in a single long-running agent and only exposing a single program state to edit. We introduce SwarmResearch, an orchestrator-subagent harness in which a Shepherd Agent uses global context to steer a population of Search Agents, each operating with local context in their respective git branch. On open-ended optimization tasks, SwarmResearch discovers better or comparable solutions to state-of-the-art LLM-guided evolution and multi-agent techniques on 13/15 tasks, driven by higher-level exploration. Compared with fixed scaling of serial and parallel agents, SwarmResearch's orchestrator-guided scaling discovers better-performing solutions by adapting parallelism at different search depths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SwarmResearch框架，通过引入牧羊人代理（Shepherd Agent）协调多个搜索代理（Search Agents），每个代理在独立git分支中基于局部上下文工作，从而提升长周期编程代理在开放性优化任务中的高层探索能力与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有长运行编码代理（如autoresearch）易陷入单一高层策略，缺乏对其他潜在更优解法的探索，作者认为这是由于单代理累积上下文和仅暴露单一程序状态所致。
AI.method: 设计SwarmResearch架构：由全局视角的Shepherd Agent统筹调度多个具有局部上下文、各自维护独立git分支的Search Agents，实现分层并行搜索与动态并行度调整。
AI.result: 在15个开放性优化任务中，SwarmResearch在13个任务上达到或超越当前最优LLM引导进化与多代理方法；其优势源于更高层次的策略探索及根据搜索深度自适应调整并行规模的能力。
AI.conclusion: 分离全局与局部上下文、支持多分支并行探索的代理架构能显著提升长周期自动编程系统的探索广度与优化性能，为构建更鲁棒的自主研究代理提供新范式。

title: Provable Pruning for Efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting via Coresets
comment: 39 pages, 15 figures, including supplementary material. Code: https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-quality real-time novel-view synthesis, but practical scenes often contain millions of Gaussians, making compression essential for deployment on limited hardware. Existing reduction methods are effective but mostly heuristic: they provide no multiplicative approximation guarantee for the rendered objective, and thus rely heavily on costly post-pruning finetuning to recover quality. We ask a basic question: can a 3DGS scene be provably replaced by a much smaller weighted subset (coreset) while preserving the objective of interest? We first show that, in the unrestricted setting, no non-trivial multiplicative 3DGS coreset exists. We then show that multiplicative guarantees are not impossible, but resolution-dependent. For a prescribed rendering resolution, such as representative views or grids of views/rays, we provide the first weighted coreset construction theorem for 3DGS. The construction samples Gaussians by sensitivity: provable importance scores measuring each Gaussian's role in the full-scene objective. Finally, under explicit validity and log-transmittance stability assumptions, we turn this objective guarantee into a rendering guarantee. Empirically, our method is strongest where deployment needs it most: aggressive compression with no or minimal recovery compute. In prune-only and very short finetuning regimes, it achieves state-of-the-art performance, showing that principled importance estimation can be both theoretically meaningful and practically useful. Open-source code is available at https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）场景的可证明加权核心集（coreset）压缩方法，通过基于敏感度的采样，在指定渲染分辨率下提供乘性近似保证，并在无需或仅需极少微调的情况下实现高性能压缩。
AI.motivation: 3DGS虽能实现高质量实时新视角合成，但实际场景中高斯数量庞大，亟需压缩；现有方法缺乏理论保证，依赖昂贵的后剪枝微调。
AI.method: 提出分辨率依赖的核心集构造定理，基于敏感度（即每个高斯对整体渲染目标的贡献）进行加权采样，并在显式有效性与对数透射稳定性假设下将目标保证转化为渲染保证。
AI.result: 在激进压缩、无/极短微调场景下达到SOTA性能，验证了原理性重要性估计兼具理论意义与实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 证明了在受限（分辨率依赖）条件下存在可证明的3DGS加权核心集，为高效、可靠部署提供了理论基础与实用算法。

title: PiSAs: Benchmarking Contextual Integrity in Multi-User Agentic Systems
summary: As LLM agents evolve from single-user assistants into shared organizational infrastructure, new privacy risks emerge: inappropriate information may not only be exposed through outputs for external recipients, but also internally across users through inter-agent messages, shared memory and agents. These data spillage risks are not captured by existing privacy benchmarks grounded in contextual integrity (CI) as they focus primarily on either single-user settings or interactions between independently owned agents. We introducePiSAs (Privacy in Shared Agentic systems), a benchmark for assessing unintentional leaks with dual CI annotations: whether an information is appropriate for the task, and which users may legitimately access it. This enables direct measurement of cross-user spillage across agentic system components and interfaces, such as outputs, inter-agent communication, and memory. PiSAsis system-agnostic and supports evaluation across different agent topologies and memory regimes. We find that, although system design improves CI compliance, results are bottlenecked by incorrect LLM judgment calls: even state-of-the-art models fail to reliably filter inappropriate content or restrict transmission to authorized users. Our findings underscore the need for privacy-preserving strategies, beyond those studied in this work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PiSAs基准，用于评估共享式智能体系统中跨用户的信息泄露风险，强调现有隐私评估方法在多用户场景下的不足，并揭示LLM在隐私判断上的根本性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型智能体从单用户助手演变为组织级共享基础设施，内部跨用户的信息泄露（如通过智能体间通信、共享记忆等）成为新隐私风险，而现有基于情境完整性（CI）的隐私基准无法有效刻画此类风险。
AI.method: 提出PiSAs（Privacy in Shared Agentic systems）基准，引入双重CI标注：信息是否适于任务、哪些用户有权访问；支持系统无关的跨架构、跨记忆机制评估。
AI.result: 实验发现系统设计可提升CI合规性，但性能瓶颈在于LLM自身难以可靠判断信息适当性或授权访问范围，即使最先进模型也表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体系统缺乏内生隐私保障能力，亟需超越本文所探策略的新型隐私保护机制。

title: TRIAGE: Trustworthy Retrieval Instrumentation And Graph Evaluation
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) that underpin Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (Graph-RAG) are increasingly built automatically by LLM-driven extraction rather than curated by experts. Proper evaluation would require instrumenting all pertinent stages: extraction, graph construction, and inference, coherently enough to localize failures, so that a failure at one stage is not discovered as a wrong answer at the end. We introduce TRIAGE, a stage-aware instrumentation framework for automated, document-grounded graph-RAG that asks not only whether the underlying graph can be trusted but at what cost it can be queried. TRIAGE attaches stage-specific, independently interpretable metrics to three stages: the KG Implementation (triple confidence, source coverage, and schema and canonicalization checks), the KG Validation by expert (graph-level structural quality, with correctness and completeness computed only as offline calibration when a reference is available), and the KG Usage (retrieval coverage, faithfulness, and retrieval cost); the deployed metrics need no gold annotations, the gold-requiring ones serving only as offline calibration. At usage time these metrics form a diagnostic chain of necessary conditions whose first broken link localizes the failure, and the diagnosis maps to the stage levers that can remedy it: extraction, graph and schema, or retrieval. TRIAGE is a theoretical framework with a proof of concept and a reproducible evaluation protocol.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRIAGE框架，用于阶段感知的自动化图RAG评估，覆盖知识图谱构建与使用的全流程，通过无标注指标实现故障定位与可修复性诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有图RAG系统多依赖LLM自动构建知识图谱，但缺乏能准确定位各构建与推理阶段故障的统一评估框架。
AI.method: 提出TRIAGE阶段感知评估框架，将评估分为KG实现、KG验证（离线校准）、KG使用三阶段，分别定义可解释、可独立计算的指标（如三元组置信度、源覆盖率、检索成本等），并构建诊断链以定位首个失效环节。
AI.result: TRIAGE实现了无需黄金标注的在线诊断能力，支持将错误归因至提取、图结构/模式或检索任一阶段，并提供对应修复杠杆；已实现概念验证与可复现评估协议。
AI.conclusion: TRIAGE为自动化构建的知识图谱提供了可解释、可定位、可修复的评估范式，推动图RAG系统从‘黑箱输出’走向‘白盒诊断’。

title: CLEAR: Closed-Loop Reinforcement Learning at Scale for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving (E2E-AD) aims to directly map raw sensor information to driving actions. Recently, with the rapid advancement of multi-modal large language models (MLLMs), researchers have proposed the paradigm of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for E2E-AD, where it seeks to integrate visual perception, language understanding and action prediction within a single policy. However, existing VLA-based policies largely adopts imitation learning, where it only learns to drive by optimizing distance-based metrics w.r.t. logged expert trajectories. Such distribution shift between open-loop training and closed-loop inference leads to suboptimal performance in closed-loop planning. To close this gap, we present CLEAR, a system that enables closed-loop training using Reinforcement Learning (RL) at scale for E2E-AD. We propose to learn a novel residual waypoint policy around the waypoint prior from pretrained VLA policies, effectively harnessing the knowledge within. On another front, one of the key challenges to scale up RL for vision-based policies is the number of parallel simulation environments since RL is data hungry. To that end, we design a heterogeneous pipeline that places the simulator and the VLA learner on distinct compute groups, which allows us to dramatically increase the number of simulation environments running in parallel while avoiding resource contention and maintaining training stability. We show that with a simple reward, CLEAR significantly outperforms previous methods and sets new state-of-the-art performance on the challenging benchmarks of CARLA longest6 v2 and Bench2Drive.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLEAR系统，通过基于强化学习的闭环训练和异构计算管道，提升端到端自动驾驶中视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模仿学习的VLA模型在开环训练与闭环推理间存在分布偏移，导致闭环规划性能不佳。
AI.method: 提出残差航点策略，在预训练VLA策略基础上进行强化学习闭环训练；设计异构流水线，将仿真器与VLA学习器部署于不同计算组以扩展并行仿真规模。
AI.result: 在CARLA longest6 v2和Bench2Drive基准上显著超越先前方法，达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: CLEAR有效弥合了开环训练与闭环推理之间的鸿沟，验证了大规模强化学习在端到端自动驾驶中的可行性与优越性。

title: Seduced by the Narrative: Assessing Rule Adherence in Semi-Open Textual Sandboxes
summary: As LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous adjudicators in semi-open textual game environments, robust rule adherence becomes critical when user intent conflicts with system rules. However, these models are trained to be helpful and compliant, leaving them vulnerable to a class of attacks we term \textit{Rhetorical Injection}, where adversarial users exploit narrative framing techniques such as pseudo-logical reasoning and authoritative coercion to bypass adjudication logic. We present CoC-Seduce, a multi-agent adversarial benchmark built on Tabletop Role-Playing Game (TRPG) mechanics, an ideal instantiation of semi-open environments where rules are explicit for adjudication, yet interaction remains entirely in natural language. Three frontier models, i.e., GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.5 Flash, serve as adversarial generators producing 5,376 samples across 4 world settings and 16 skill categories. We then benchmark 20 target adjudicators against this corpus. Evaluation across 20 models reveals that neither model scale nor explicit reasoning mechanisms reliably confer adjudication robustness, with \textsc{Pseudo-Logic} emerging as the dominant attack vector and cross-cultural settings exposing systematic knowledge gaps across all evaluated families. Project page: https://github.com/answerrtx/CoC-Seduce

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Rhetorical Injection的新型攻击方法，利用叙事修辞技巧（如伪逻辑推理和权威胁迫）绕过大型语言模型在半开放文本游戏环境中的规则裁决机制，并构建了基于桌面角色扮演游戏（TRPG）机制的多智能体对抗基准CoC-Seduce进行实证评估。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型（LLMs）被用作半开放文本游戏环境中的自主裁决者，当用户意图与系统规则冲突时，确保其鲁棒的规则遵循能力变得至关重要；然而现有模型因训练目标是‘乐于助人’而易受修辞性注入攻击。
AI.method: 构建了基于桌面角色扮演游戏（TRPG）机制的多智能体对抗基准CoC-Seduce，使用GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.5 Flash作为对抗样本生成器，生成5376个样本，覆盖4种世界设定和16类技能；随后在20个目标裁决模型上进行评测。
AI.result: 评估显示模型规模和显式推理机制均不能可靠提升裁决鲁棒性；伪逻辑（Pseudo-Logic）是最主要的攻击向量；跨文化设定暴露出所有被测模型家族系统性的知识缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 当前前沿LLMs在自然语言驱动的规则裁决任务中存在根本性脆弱性，需专门设计面向规则一致性的训练与评估范式，尤其需关注修辞性欺骗与文化知识偏差问题。

title: How many labels do you need? A decision framework for cross-habitat marine species recognition
comment: 29 pages, 12 figures, 4 tables. Includes supplementary appendix
summary:
Automated image recognition is increasingly used to scale ecological monitoring beyond manual annotation, yet ecologists lack evidence-based guidance on how much labelling effort reliable deployment at new sites requires. We present a decision framework quantifying the trade-off between labelling effort and recognition accuracy when transferring vision systems across marine habitats. The benchmark spans five datasets, three oceans, and three taxonomic groups (fish, corals, invertebrates), from tropical reefs in the Great Barrier Reef and French Polynesia to a temperate Danish fjord. We evaluated four recognition models (DINOv2, CLIP, ResNet-50, EfficientNet-B4) under four adaptation strategies (linear probing, LoRA, Visual Prompt Tuning, full fine-tuning) across three protocols: within-habitat transfer across 20 reef sites (240 runs), cross-dataset geographic transfer along a difficulty gradient (40 runs), and few-shot adaptation curves with 0-100 labelled samples per class (648 runs). Frozen self-supervised foundation features (DINOv2 + linear classifier, 1,538 trainable parameters) generalised to unseen reef sites at least as well as fully fine-tuned convolutional baselines four orders of magnitude larger; they learned species-diagnostic, habitat-invariant representations, whereas baselines encoded habitat-specific shortcuts that fail at new sites. As few as 10-20 labelled images per species sufficed to deploy reliable recognition at a new site, cutting annotation effort by roughly an order of magnitude.
  Solution. Programmes expanding to new sites can deploy reliable recognition by pairing a frozen, open foundation model (DINOv2) with a simple linear classifier and annotating only 10-20 images per species - roughly 1-4 hours per site. The framework lets programmes budget labelling effort against expected accuracy across sites, ecosystems, and platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个决策框架，量化了在不同海洋生境间迁移视觉系统时标注工作量与识别准确率之间的权衡；发现冻结的自监督基础模型（DINOv2）加线性分类器仅需每物种10–20张标注图像即可实现跨站点可靠识别，大幅降低标注成本。
AI.motivation: 生态学家缺乏关于在新地点部署自动图像识别系统所需标注工作量的实证指导，亟需评估跨生境迁移时标注投入与性能之间的关系。
AI.method: 构建涵盖5个数据集、3个大洋、3个分类群的基准，评估4种模型（DINOv2、CLIP、ResNet-50、EfficientNet-B4）和4种适应策略（线性探测、LoRA、视觉提示调优、全微调），在三种协议下开展实验：同生境跨20个礁点迁移、跨数据集地理迁移、每类0–100样本的少样本适应曲线。
AI.result: 冻结的DINOv2+线性分类器（仅1538个可训练参数）在跨礁点泛化能力上不逊于大四个数量级的全微调卷积基线；其学习到物种特异性且生境不变的表征，而基线模型易捕获生境相关捷径特征导致新站点失效；仅需每物种10–20张标注图像即可实现可靠部署。
AI.conclusion: 生态监测项目扩展至新地点时，可采用冻结开源基础模型（DINOv2）加简单线性分类器方案，每物种仅标注10–20张图像（约1–4小时/站点），并利用该框架按精度目标合理预算标注投入。

title: Post-Generation Curation of Synthetic Images via Homogeneous-Heterogeneous Splitting
summary: Recent generative models can produce high-quality synthetic images, offering scalable training training data for data-hungry models. Existing approaches to exploiting this potential typically involve 1) training or fine-tuning generators, or 2) using lightweight post-hoc adaptation like prompt engineering or inference-time guidance, making them generator-specific and expertise-intensive. We study a complementary question: given a fixed pool of generated images, can downstream utility be improved purely by selecting an informative subset? The answer is yes. We show that effective selection must counter a structural bias of modern generators: they tend to over-produce canonical modes of each class while underrepresenting intra-class variation. Building on this insight, we split each real class into a canonical Homogeneous (HO) subset and a non-redundant Heterogeneous (HE) subset, then score synthetic images by a fidelity-diversity criterion that rewards semantic alignment while penalizing canonical redundancy. The method is generator-agnostic and requires no retraining. Across multiple benchmarks, it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art data selection baselines and matches the real-data performance with up to 40% fewer synthetic samples. The same criterion remains effective when applied on top of stronger task-tuned generators, with gains on both classification and segmentation tasks. Post-generation selection is therefore not a substitute for better generators, but a complementary mechanism for improving the utility of synthetic data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成器无关的后生成数据选择方法，通过将真实样本划分为同质（HO）和异质（HE）子集，并基于保真度-多样性准则筛选合成图像，在分类与分割任务中以更少样本达到接近真实数据的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有利用生成图像提升下游模型性能的方法要么需训练/微调生成器，要么依赖生成器特定的轻量适配（如提示工程），门槛高且不通用；作者探索在固定生成图像池前提下，仅通过子集选择能否提升下游效用。
AI.method: 识别出现代生成器存在‘类内模式过集中、多样性不足’的结构偏差；据此将每个真实类别划分为同质（HO）和异质（HE）子集；设计一个兼顾语义保真度与抑制冗余的评分准则，用于对合成图像进行无训练、生成器无关的选择。
AI.result: 在多个基准上持续超越现有数据选择基线；仅用最多60%的合成样本即可达到使用全部合成数据时的真实数据性能；该准则在更强的任务调优生成器上仍有效，提升分类与分割任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 后生成选择并非替代更好生成器的方案，而是与其互补、可即插即用的提升合成数据效用的新范式。

title: Object-Centric Environment Modeling for Agentic Tasks
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents can improve through accumulated experience, but free-form textual memories become difficult to maintain, validate, and reuse as interactions grow. Recent symbolic approaches learn executable skills or programmatic world models, yet often store local procedures or assume simplified dynamics. We propose Object-Centric Environment Modeling (OCM), which organizes experience into an executable object-centric environment model. OCM maintains two connected code bases: object knowledge, which defines environment entities and mechanisms as Python classes, and procedure knowledge, which records reusable interaction patterns that must import and use the object model. OCM works in an online setting: after each episode, OCM reflects on the trajectory, updates both knowledge bases, and verifies that all procedures execute against the updated object model. During future interaction, the agent uses progressive knowledge disclosure to inspect compact code signatures first and read source code only when needed. Experiments show that OCM achieves the best average rank across benchmarks and reduces invalid actions, demonstrating that agents can benefit from building object-centric environment models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Object-Centric Environment Modeling（OCM）的方法，通过将经验组织为可执行的、以对象为中心的环境模型，提升LLM智能体在长期交互中的记忆维护、验证与复用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体的记忆多为自由文本形式，难以随交互增长而有效维护、验证和复用；符号化方法虽能学习可执行技能或世界模型，但常局限于局部过程或简化动态假设。
AI.method: OCM构建两个相互关联的代码库：对象知识（定义环境实体与机制的Python类）与过程知识（记录需调用对象模型的可复用交互模式）；支持在线更新与执行验证，并采用渐进式知识披露机制优化推理时的知识访问。
AI.result: 实验表明OCM在多个基准测试中平均排名最优，并显著减少无效动作。
AI.conclusion: 构建以对象为中心的可执行环境模型，能有效提升LLM智能体的经验积累与决策质量。

title: Track the Noise, Move the World:3D-Grounded Motion-Consistent Noise for Controllable Video Generation
summary: Modern image-and-text-to-video diffusion models can synthesize highly realistic videos by iteratively denoising an initial Gaussian noise tensor conditioned on reference image and text inputs. However, existing approaches still lack precise and unified controllability over both object motion and camera motion within a single generation process. We present UniCaMo, a unified framework that enables simultaneous control of object trajectories and camera viewpoints by directly constructing the input noise of the diffusion model. Specifically, UniCaMo builds a shared 3D-grounded motion-consistent noise space across latent video frames. Sparse 3D point tracks are used to warp the Gaussian noise of the reference frame along desired object trajectories, while a virtual spherical noise representation provides globally consistent noise values for newly revealed scene regions under camera motion. By combining local track-guided noise warping with global sphere-based noise sampling, UniCaMo maintains geometric and temporal consistency under both object movement and viewpoint changes. Because UniCaMo modifies only the input noise, it requires no auxiliary adapters, control branches, or architectural changes to the underlying video diffusion model. With lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on large pretrained video diffusion models, including Wan 2.1 (14B), UniCaMo achieves state-of-the-art results in both video quality and motion controllability on standard controllable video generation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: UniCaMo提出一种统一框架，通过直接构造扩散模型的输入噪声，在不修改模型结构的前提下，同时实现对物体运动和摄像机运动的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本到视频扩散模型缺乏在单次生成过程中对物体运动和相机运动的统一、精确可控性。
AI.method: 构建共享的3D对齐、运动一致的噪声空间；利用稀疏3D点轨迹沿期望物体轨迹扭曲参考帧高斯噪声；采用虚拟球面噪声表示保证相机运动下新暴露区域的全局噪声一致性；结合局部轨迹引导噪声扭曲与全局球面采样。
AI.result: 在标准可控视频生成基准上达到SOTA效果，兼顾视频质量和运动可控性；仅需轻量LoRA微调（如Wan 2.1），无需额外适配器或架构改动。
AI.conclusion: UniCaMo通过纯噪声空间建模实现了高效、通用且即插即用的运动可控视频生成，为扩散模型的可控性提供了新范式。

title: Human-Centric Reflective Architecture for Human-AI Collaborative Decision-Making
summary: The use of Large Language Models (LLMs) across diverse areas of human activity-ranging from everyday tasks to safety-critical applications-aims to enhance decision-making effectiveness with minimal human feedback. Concurrently, it seeks to align decisions with human expectations, preferences, and needs while mitigating risks associated with AI non-determinism. However, humans frequently over- or under-rely on AI recommendations, and current AI systems remain poorly calibrated to human expectations. To address these challenges, we introduce a human-AI collaborative decision-making framework designed to augment human capabilities and align AI agents with human preferences and expectations. Specifically, this paper (a) formulates the collaborative decision-making task as a stochastic game between an AI agent and a human player, and (b) proposes the Human-Centric Reflective Architecture (HCRA), which integrates human-calibrated models with reinforcement learning agents that leverage linguistic feedback in an iterative, reflective process. Evaluation results demonstrate that HCRA enhances decision-making effectiveness and delivers high-quality recommendations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种人-AI协同决策框架HCRA，通过将任务建模为随机博弈，并结合人类校准模型与利用语言反馈的强化学习，在迭代反思过程中提升决策效果与人类期望对齐。
AI.motivation: 人类常对AI建议过度或不足依赖，现有AI系统难以准确校准人类期望；需增强决策有效性并降低AI非确定性风险。
AI.method: 将协同决策建模为AI与人类之间的随机博弈，并提出人类中心反思架构（HCRA），融合人类校准模型与基于语言反馈的强化学习代理，进行迭代反思。
AI.result: HCRA在评估中显著提升了决策有效性，并生成高质量推荐。
AI.conclusion: HCRA能有效增强人类能力，使AI更契合人类偏好与期望，为人-AI协同决策提供了可行框架。

title: SentAttack: A Sentence-Level Black-Box Adversarial Attack Method for Dense Retrieval Models
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems typically consist of a dense retrieval (DR) model for initial retrieval and a neural ranking model (NRM) for re-ranking.Existing robustness studies in RAG mainly focus on NRMs, while adversarial attacks on DR models are mostly limited to word-level perturbations.For low-ranked target documents that are irrelevant to the query, simple word-level attacks are insufficient to mislead DR models into substantially promoting their rankings.To solve these problems, we propose SentAttack, a sentence-level black-box adversarial attack method for DR models.SentAttack is designed as a two-stage method.In the first stage, SentAttack interacts with the black-box RAG system via iterative retrieval to collect ranked documents and ranking information for training a surrogate DR model.In the second stage, SentAttack uses the surrogate DR model to encode and cluster documents relevant to the target query, yielding multiple cluster centroids.These centroids are concatenated with the target document at the sentence level to form an initial set of adversarial candidates.SentAttack then optimizes these candidates using a query- and centroid-guided objective combined with gradient-guided beam search.Extensive experiments demonstrate that SentAttack outperforms existing adversarial attacks on DR models, with especially strong performance on low-ranked target documents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SentAttack，一种针对密集检索（DR）模型的句子级黑盒对抗攻击方法，通过两阶段策略（构建代理DR模型和基于查询与质心引导的优化）显著提升对低排名目标文档的攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统的鲁棒性研究主要集中在神经排序模型（NRM），而对密集检索（DR）模型的对抗攻击多限于词级扰动，难以有效误导DR模型大幅提升无关低排名文档的排名。
AI.method: SentAttack是句子级黑盒对抗攻击方法，分为两阶段：第一阶段通过迭代检索构建代理DR模型；第二阶段利用该模型对相关文档聚类生成质心，并将质心与目标文档在句子级拼接，再结合查询与质心引导目标及梯度引导束搜索优化对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明SentAttack在DR模型对抗攻击任务上优于现有方法，尤其在攻击低排名目标文档时效果显著。
AI.conclusion: SentAttack验证了句子级扰动在攻击DR模型上的有效性，为提升RAG系统鲁棒性提供了新思路和评估基准。

title: Differential Amplifier-Inspired AmpAttention for Multi-View Robotic Manipulation
summary: Multi-view robotic manipulation methods with the attention mechanism have recently achieved significant progress in both training efficiency and task performance. However, the inherent redundancy, occlusion, and viewpoint dependency in robotic view images often lead to severe attention drift. To address this challenge, we propose AmpAttention, a novel attention mechanism inspired by differential amplifiers in analog circuits. It aims to suppress attention noise and capture high signal-to-noise ratio signals for more reliable perception. Based on this, we introduce the RVAF model, which integrates task-guided intra-view and inter-view AmpAttention. Compared to previous state-of-the-art methods, RVAF achieves the optimal average success rate across 18 RLBench tasks (249 variations) while reducing training time by 33.3\%. RVAF also demonstrates strong potential in real-world high-precision tasks, exemplified by its ability to pick up a dart and accurately insert it into the red bullseye. Furthermore, we extend RVAF to RVAF++ by incorporating the SAM2 image encoder. RVAF++ achieves substantial gains on high-precision tasks, achieving a 91\% success rate on the `insert peg' task. More qualitative results are provided at the anonymous project website https://anonymous.4open.science/w/RVAF-Anonymization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AmpAttention注意力机制和RVAF模型，通过模拟模拟电路中的差分放大器来抑制多视角机器人操作中的注意力漂移问题，在RLBench任务上取得了最佳平均成功率并减少了33.3%训练时间；进一步扩展为RVAF++后，在高精度任务如'插入钉子'中达到91%成功率。
AI.motivation: 多视角机器人操作中存在图像冗余、遮挡和视角依赖性，导致注意力漂移严重，影响感知可靠性。
AI.method: 提出受模拟电路差分放大器启发的AmpAttention机制，构建RVAF模型融合任务引导的视角内与视角间AmpAttention；进一步结合SAM2图像编码器形成RVAF++。
AI.result: RVAF在18个RLBench任务（249种变体）上取得最优平均成功率，训练时间减少33.3%，并在真实场景中成功完成飞镖投掷等高精度任务；RVAF++在'insert peg'任务中达到91%成功率。
AI.conclusion: AmpAttention有效抑制注意力噪声，提升信噪比，RVAF及其扩展版RVAF++显著提升了多视角机器人操作的性能与泛化能力，尤其适用于高精度任务。

title: Jointly Improving Dialect Identification and ASR in Indian Languages using Multimodal Feature Fusion
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) and Dialect Identification (DID) are crucial for Indian languages, many of which are low-resource and exhibit significant dialectal differences. Existing methods often optimize ASR or DID individually, resulting in performance trade-offs. In this work, we propose a multimodal framework that jointly improves ASR and DID. Our method employs a Bottleneck Encoder to extract dialectal features from Conformer-based speech representations and a RoBERTa encoder to process ASR-generated CTC embeddings. A gating mechanism merges these features, followed by an attention encoder to refine the representations. The learned embeddings are concatenated with Conformer outputs to enhance ASR features. Evaluated on eight Indian languages with thirty-three dialects, our method achieves an average DID accuracy of 81.63% and average CER and WER of 4.65% and 17.73%, respectively. These results highlight the effectiveness of our method for joint ASR-DID modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合优化自动语音识别（ASR）和方言识别（DID）的多模态框架，利用瓶颈编码器和RoBERTa编码器分别提取方言特征和CTC嵌入，并通过门控与注意力机制融合，显著提升了低资源印度语言的ASR与DID性能。
AI.motivation: 印度多种语言资源匮乏且方言差异显著，现有方法单独优化ASR或DID导致性能权衡，亟需联合建模方案。
AI.method: 提出多模态联合框架：使用Conformer提取语音表征，瓶颈编码器提取方言特征，RoBERTa编码CTC嵌入，门控机制融合双路特征，注意力编码器细化表示，最终将融合嵌入与Conformer输出拼接以增强ASR特征。
AI.result: 在八个印度语言、三十三种方言数据集上，DID平均准确率达81.63%，ASR的平均CER和WER分别为4.65%和17.73%。
AI.conclusion: 所提联合ASR-DID框架能有效提升低资源印度语言的语音识别与方言识别性能，验证了多模态特征融合策略的有效性。

title: Inpainting U-Net for seamless pedestrian-level wind prediction across urban morphologies
summary: Pedestrian-level wind prediction is essential for urban design and wind-comfort assessment, but high-fidelity simulations such as LES remain computationally expensive for rapid evaluation. This study develops a two-stage U-Net framework for efficient prediction of time-averaged pedestrian-level wind speed over realistic urban morphologies. The model is trained and evaluated using the UrbanTALES dataset, which contains realistic city configurations under different approaching wind directions. In the first stage, a baseline U-Net model (M1) predicts wind fields patch-by-patch from normalised building height and fetch information. This formulation allows application to urban domains of arbitrary size, but independent patch inference can introduce discontinuities at patch boundaries. To address this, a second U-Net model (M2) is introduced as an inpainting-based refinement model. M2 uses a larger contextual window containing the initial M1 prediction and local morphology to reduce discontinuities using neighbouring flow information. During full-field inference, M2 is applied iteratively using a Gauss-Seidel scheme until convergence. Results show that M1 captures the main spatial distribution of pedestrian-level wind speed and performs well in low- and moderate-velocity regions, although high-velocity peaks are less accurate. M2 substantially reduces patch-boundary artefacts and improves spatial coherence. Across unseen urban cases, the framework reproduces mean velocity and spatial variability reasonably well, while maximum velocities remain underestimated. Overall, the proposed framework provides an efficient and flexible surrogate model for high-resolution pedestrian-level wind prediction across realistic urban morphologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段U-Net框架，用于高效预测真实城市形态下行人尺度的平均风速，第一阶段（M1）进行分块预测，第二阶段（M2）通过上下文感知的修复机制消除边界伪影，显著提升空间一致性。
AI.motivation: 高保真风场模拟（如LES）计算成本高，难以支持城市设计与风环境舒适性评估中的快速迭代需求，亟需高效、准确且可扩展的替代模型。
AI.method: 构建两阶段U-Net模型：M1基于归一化建筑高度与迎风距离分块预测风场；M2作为修复网络，以M1输出和局部城市形态为输入，采用Gauss-Seidel迭代方案进行全区域优化。训练与验证使用UrbanTALES数据集。
AI.result: M1能较好捕捉风速空间分布，但在高风速峰值处精度不足；M2有效抑制块间不连续性，提升空间连贯性；整体框架在未见城市案例上合理复现平均风速与空间变异性，但最大风速仍被低估。
AI.conclusion: 该两阶段U-Net框架是一种高效、灵活且适用于多样化真实城市形态的行人尺度风速代理模型，为城市风环境快速评估提供了可行技术路径。

title: A Granularity-Aware EEG Feature Framework for Psychopathology Dimension Prediction
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) offers a noninvasive approach for examining neurophysiological correlates of dimensional psychopathology, yet systematic evidence across EEG paradigms and feature granularities remains limited. Here, we develop a granularity-aware EEG feature pipeline that organizes multi-scale descriptors into global, regional, and channel levels. Using the Healthy Brain Network (HBN) cohort, we evaluate the prediction of four psychopathology dimensions: p-factor, internalizing, externalizing, and attention problems, across four EEG paradigms. Given the heterogeneity of pediatric psychopathology and the moderate reliability of questionnaire-derived scores, this setting represents a challenging feasibility test rather than a clinical screening scenario. Tree-based models and granularity-balanced feature selection showed promising improvements over conventional approaches in selected conditions, although effect sizes remained modest. Visualization of selected markers revealed dimension-specific spatial and spectral patterns that were broadly aligned with existing neurophysiological knowledge. An exploratory cross-dataset sanity check on the independent PEARL cohort suggested that the proposed selection principle remains technically feasible under protocol shifts, without claiming cross-dataset generalizability. Overall, multi-scale EEG features contain weak but detectable signals related to dimensional psychopathology, and granularity-aware selection may serve as a useful feature-reduction strategy for future EEG-based phenotyping studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种粒度感知的EEG特征处理流程，用于预测儿童精神病理学的四个维度（p因子、内化、外化和注意力问题），在HBN队列上验证了其有效性，并通过PEARL队列进行了初步跨数据集可行性检验。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对不同EEG范式和特征粒度下精神病理学维度预测的系统性证据，且儿童精神病理学异质性强、问卷评分信度中等，亟需更稳健的EEG特征建模方法。
AI.method: 构建了包含全局、区域和通道三个粒度的EEG特征流水线；在Healthy Brain Network（HBN）队列上，结合树模型与粒度平衡的特征选择方法，预测四种精神病理学维度；并在PEARL队列上进行跨范式可行性验证。
AI.result: 粒度感知方法在部分条件下优于传统方法，效应量虽小但显著；可视化显示所选标记具有维度特异性的空间与频谱模式；PEARL队列的探索性验证表明该选择原则在范式变化下仍具技术可行性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度EEG特征中存在微弱但可检测的精神病理学维度信号，粒度感知的特征选择可作为未来EEG表型研究中一种有效的特征降维策略。

title: MedCalc-Pro: Solving Complex Medical Calculations with LLM Agents
summary: Current benchmarks for evaluating large language models (LLMs) in medical calculation are largely based on simplified settings, where each patient case corresponds to a single calculator and the required tool is explicitly specified in the query. However, real clinical scenarios often require multiple calculators for joint evaluation, nested-scale calculation, and fuzzy queries that do not directly specify the target calculator. To this end, we propose a new medical calculation benchmark, MedCalc-Pro, which covers three progressively challenging task settings: single-calculator, multi-calculator, and nested-calculator calculation settings. MedCalc-Pro contains 2,268 real-world clinical cases, covering 77 medical calculators across 14 clinical departments. Meanwhile, to address the limited performance of existing frameworks and methods in complex clinical scenarios, we further propose a more generalizable agent framework that supports multi-tool selection and nested-tool calling, while suppressing parameter error propagation through structured validation and evidence review. We conduct systematic comparisons across open-source, closed-source, and medical-specialized LLMs, and the results show that our framework achieves the best performance across all three task settings. This work provides a new benchmark and method for evaluating and applying LLMs in challenging medical calculation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedCalc-Pro医疗计算基准，涵盖单计算器、多计算器和嵌套计算器三种渐进式挑战任务，并设计支持多工具选择与嵌套调用的通用代理框架，显著提升LLM在复杂临床计算场景中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗计算评测基准过于简化（如单病例单计算器、显式指定工具），无法反映真实临床中多计算器联合评估、嵌套计算及模糊查询等复杂需求。
AI.method: 构建包含2268个真实临床案例、覆盖77个计算器和14个科室的MedCalc-Pro基准；提出支持多工具选择、嵌套调用、结构化验证与证据审查的新型代理框架。
AI.result: 在单/多/嵌套计算器三类任务上，所提框架在开源、闭源及医学专用LLM中均取得最优性能。
AI.conclusion: MedCalc-Pro为LLM在复杂医疗计算场景下的评测与应用提供了更贴近临床的新基准与新方法。

title: Fast 3D Foundation Model Initialized Gaussian Splatting
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted at ICECET 2026
summary: This paper introduces a fast method for high-quality 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) reconstruction without traditional Structure-from-Motion (SfM). The proposed approach leverages 3D Foundation Models (3DFMs) for camera pose and point-cloud initialization, then jointly optimizes both camera poses and Gaussian primitives using a depth-guided loss function. This enables fast convergence even from rough initialization with as few as 50-60 input views. To further improve reconstruction quality in sparse-view scenarios, an MLP-based pose refinement module is introduced alongside depth-guided supervision from the foundation model. Extensive experiments on Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks and Temples, and RobustNeRF demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive reconstruction quality (23.61 dB PSNR, 0.19 LPIPS) while reducing training time to approximately three minutes per scene. The proposed method produces ready-to-use 3DGS models at a fraction of the time required by existing pipelines, making it suitable for near real-time applications in robotics, VR, and autonomous navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需传统运动恢复结构（SfM）的快速高质量3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）重建方法，利用3D基础模型初始化相机位姿与点云，并通过深度引导损失联合优化位姿与高斯原语，结合MLP姿态精修模块，在稀疏视角下提升重建质量，训练时间仅约3分钟/场景。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS方法依赖耗时的Structure-from-Motion（SfM）流程，难以满足机器人、VR和自动驾驶等近实时应用对高效重建的需求。
AI.method: 利用3D基础模型（3DFMs）初始化相机位姿和点云；设计深度引导损失函数联合优化相机位姿与高斯原语；引入MLP-based姿态精修模块以提升稀疏视角下的重建质量。
AI.result: 在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks and Temples和RobustNeRF数据集上达到23.61 dB PSNR和0.19 LPIPS的重建质量，单场景训练时间缩短至约3分钟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著加速了高质量3DGS重建流程，摆脱了对SfM的依赖，适用于需快速建模的实时应用场景。

title: Silicon Sampling via Cross-Survey Transfer
summary: Silicon sampling-using large language models (LLMs) to simulate human survey respondents-has emerged as a promising approach for augmenting traditional survey research. However, most evaluations rely on distributional comparisons rather than individual-level prediction, which risks conflating pattern matching with coherent respondent-level prediction. We propose cross-survey transfer, a more rigorous evaluation framework in which an LLM is given a respondent's answers to one set of questions and must predict their answers to entirely different questions from the same survey. Using data from the Taiwan Election and Democratization Study (TEDS) 2024, three open-weight LLMs (27B-120B parameters), and supervised machine learning baselines, we find that: (1) zero-shot LLMs achieve 52% accuracy on genuinely unseen items, closing to within 6 percentage points (pp) of a supervised random forest trained on same-population data; (2) a stable construct predictability hierarchy emerges, from 67% for partisan attitudes to 23% for sovereignty; and (3) variance collapse and safety alignment effects-two commonly cited LLM limitations-turn out to be more nuanced than previously reported, with variance collapse affecting supervised models as well and alignment effects varying dramatically across model families. These findings clarify both the promise and boundaries of silicon sampling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更严格的硅采样评估框架——跨问卷迁移，利用台湾选举与民主化研究（TEDS）2024数据，评估LLM在个体层面预测未见题项的能力，并揭示其预测能力的结构性差异与局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有硅采样评估多依赖分布对比，难以区分模式匹配与真实个体级预测；需更严谨的个体预测评估范式。
AI.method: 提出跨问卷迁移评估框架：用一组问题的回答预测同一受访者在另一组全新问题上的回答；在TEDS 2024数据上测试三款开源LLM（27B–120B）及监督式随机森林基线。
AI.result: （1）零样本LLM在真正未见题项上达52%准确率，接近监督随机森林（相差仅6pp）；（2）不同构念预测难度呈稳定梯度：党派态度67%，主权态度仅23%；（3）方差坍缩与安全对齐效应比以往认知更复杂：前者亦见于监督模型，后者因模型家族而异。
AI.conclusion: 硅采样在个体预测上具现实潜力，但效果高度依赖构念性质；其优势与边界需在严格个体级评估下重新界定。

title: Relevance-Based Embeddings: Lightweight Candidate Retrieval via Heavy-Ranker Calls
summary: In many machine learning applications, the most relevant items for a query should be efficiently retrieved. The relevance function is usually an expensive similarity model, making the exhaustive search infeasible. A typical solution is to train another model that separately embeds queries and items to a vector space, where similarity is defined via the dot product or cosine similarity. This allows one to search the relevant items through fast approximate nearest neighbor search at the cost of some reduction in quality. To compensate for this reduction, the found items (candidates) are re-ranked by the expensive ranking model. In this paper, we investigate an alternative approach to candidate selection that utilizes the scores of the expensive model to improve the representations of queries and items. The idea is to describe each query (item) by its relevance to a set of support items (queries) and use these new representations to obtain query (item) embeddings. We theoretically prove that such embeddings are powerful enough to approximate any complex similarity model (under mild conditions). We also investigate the choice of support items, which is a crucial ingredient of the proposed approach. The experiments on diverse academic and production datasets illustrate the power of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用昂贵相似度模型的分数来改进查询和物品表示的新方法，通过支持物品（查询）构建新表示，并证明其能逼近任意复杂相似度模型，在多个数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用廉价嵌入模型进行快速近似最近邻搜索，再用昂贵排序模型重排序，但存在质量损失；本文旨在利用昂贵模型的分数直接提升嵌入表示质量，减少对重排序的依赖。
AI.method: 提出基于支持集（support items/queries）构造查询和物品新表示的方法：每个查询（物品）由其对一组支持物品（查询）的相关性得分描述，并据此学习嵌入；理论证明该嵌入可逼近任意复杂相似度函数，并研究支持集的选择策略。
AI.result: 在多个学术与生产数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了候选生成质量，降低了对昂贵重排序的依赖，同时保持高效检索能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于昂贵模型分数构建的支持集驱动嵌入方法，是一种理论上严谨、实践中有效的替代候选生成范式，可更好平衡检索效率与精度。

title: DREAMSTEER: Latent World Models Can Steer VLA Policies During Deployment Without Any Finetuning
summary: Pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) policies show promising zero-shot generalization, but often fail under deployment-time distribution shift, leading to decreased robustness and inconsistent instruction following. While prior work commonly tackles this by finetuning on in-distribution data, it assumes demonstrations collected on tasks in the target environment. In this work, we propose DREAMSTEER, a deployment-time steering framework for pretrained VLAs without any finetuning or parameter modifications. The key insight in DREAMSTEER is to leverage a latent world model and a value model to steer pretrained VLA policies. During deployment, DREAMSTEER samples candidate action chunks from a VLA policy and predefined motion primitives, imagines their outcomes using an action-conditioned latent world model, and ranks the imagined trajectories with a language-conditioned value model. Across four real-world manipulation benchmarks with unseen objects, DREAMSTEER improves task success rate from 23.75% to 66.25% and instruction-following accuracy from 38.75% to 56.25% over the base VLA policy.

AI.tldr: DREAMSTEER是一种无需微调的部署时引导框架，利用潜在世界模型和价值模型提升预训练视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和指令遵循能力。
AI.motivation: 预训练VLA策略在部署时面对分布偏移时鲁棒性差、指令遵循不一致，而现有微调方法依赖目标环境中的示范数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: DREAMSTEER在部署时采样候选动作片段（来自VLA策略和预定义运动基元），用动作条件潜在世界模型想象其结果，并用语言条件价值模型对想象轨迹进行排序。
AI.result: 在四个含未见物体的真实操作基准上，任务成功率从23.75%提升至66.25%，指令遵循准确率从38.75%提升至56.25%。
AI.conclusion: DREAMSTEER无需微调即可显著提升预训练VLA策略在真实世界分布偏移场景下的泛化能力和指令遵循性能，为零样本部署提供了新范式。

title: PraMem: Practice-derived Experiential Memory for Long-horizon Behavior Prediction
summary: Long-horizon behavior prediction aims to infer a user's next action based on a lengthy historical sequence, playing a crucial role in artificial intelligence field. The rise of large language models (LLMs) offers a promising direction for sequential behavior prediction, yet LLMs struggle with latent behavioral pattern induction and model-intrinsic cognitive biases when tackling long-horizon behavior prediction. Prior memory management methods follow a context-compression paradigm that attempts to address this task by alleviating the historical sequence burden, yet fail to resolve the core challenges. In this paper, we advocate a paradigm shift that reframes the lengthy historical sequence from a burden into a valuable resource to be exploited, and accordingly propose PraMem, which conducts beforehand practice over the lengthy historical sequence to build an experiential memory, thereby serving as the assisted input for accurate long-horizon behavior prediction. Extensive experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that PraMem achieves superior performance than prior methods, and more in-depth analyses provide valuable insights into the mechanism and evolution of the experiential memory. Code: https://github.com/icip-cas/PraMem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PraMem方法，通过在长历史序列上进行预训练实践构建经验记忆，以提升长时序行为预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在长时序行为预测中难以有效提取潜在行为模式，并受模型内在认知偏差影响；传统记忆管理方法仅压缩上下文，未能解决根本问题。
AI.method: 提出PraMem框架，将长历史序列视为可利用资源而非负担，通过‘事先练习’构建经验记忆，并将其作为辅助输入用于预测。
AI.result: 在多个任务上的实验表明，PraMem显著优于现有方法；深入分析揭示了经验记忆的机制与演化规律。
AI.conclusion: 将历史序列转化为经验记忆是一种有效的范式转变，能显著提升长时序行为预测性能。

title: Double-Helix Active Geometry: LiDAR-Anchored Multi-View Depth with Selective Abstention
summary: Consumer depth sensors such as the LiDAR scanner on recent iPhones provide metric range, but their useful range is short and their returns are sparse. We present DH-Active, a lightweight, training-free geometry back-end that treats the sensor as a metric ruler rather than the sole source of depth. Near-field returns anchor the metric relative pose of two views through PnP; visually trackable samples without a valid depth return are then triangulated under that pose. A parallax/reprojection gate abstains wherever the geometry is ill-conditioned, leaving an explicit hole and a selective score instead of forcing an estimate. The measured core front end, including spiral sampling, sparse back-projection, and hole taxonomy but excluding preprocessing and multi-view recovery, runs at 1.11 ms median latency on CPU (OpenCV using 14 threads), about 38 times faster than a DINOv2-L visual branch on GPU in our timing setup. Across two iPhone captures and the public TUM RGB-D and ARKitScenes benchmarks, held-out depth is recovered at 1.4 to 6.7 percent median relative error. In a controlled ARKitScenes protocol that uses only returns within 2 m to set scale and an independent laser scan as ground truth, DH-Active achieves 64.2 percent scene-median coverage of evaluable far-field candidates at 13.4 percent scene-median relative error; direct triangulation from the device trajectory is not usable. We also report the alternatives that failed in our tests: single-frame defocus, classical focus-stack depth, defocus-LiDAR fusion, point-to-point ICP over a good visual-inertial track, and attention-to-holes resampling. A 1.26 B learned model remains more accurate after oracle scale alignment. The contribution here is narrower: metric sparse depth, explicit abstention, zero learned parameters, and near-millisecond CPU cost.

AI.tldr: DH-Active 是一种轻量、无需训练的几何后端方法，将消费级深度传感器（如iPhone LiDAR）视为‘度量标尺’而非唯一深度源，结合PnP定位与三角测量，在几何病态时主动放弃估计（显式留空），实现毫秒级CPU运行与高精度远场深度恢复。
AI.motivation: 消费级深度传感器（如iPhone LiDAR）虽提供度量深度，但有效范围短、返回稀疏；现有方法难以在远场可靠重建深度，且多数依赖学习模型或计算开销大。
AI.method: DH-Active 将传感器作为度量标尺：近场深度点通过PnP确定两帧间度量相对位姿；无深度返回但可视觉跟踪的点在此位姿下三角化；引入视差/重投影门控机制，在几何病态时主动 abstain（显式留空并评分），避免错误估计。前端含螺旋采样、稀疏反投影与空洞分类。
AI.result: 在iPhone实拍、TUM RGB-D和ARKitScenes数据集上，保留深度中值相对误差为1.4–6.7%；在ARKitScenes 2米内定标+激光扫描真值协议下，远场覆盖率达64.2%，中值相对误差13.4%；核心前端（不含预处理与多视角融合）CPU中位延迟仅1.11 ms（OpenCV 14线程），比GPU上的DINOv2-L快约38倍。
AI.conclusion: DH-Active 的核心贡献在于：零学习参数、显式几何置信度控制（abstention）、度量级稀疏深度重建能力，以及接近毫秒级的纯CPU效率，为AR与移动SLAM提供了高效可靠的轻量几何后端。

title: LiNO: Lifting based multiresolution neural operator
summary: Recently, neural operators have shown promising outcomes for learning solution operators of differential equations directly from data. This framework learns a functional mapping from the parameter field to the solution field, enabling the prediction of an entire class of solutions rather than a specific instance. However, existing operators often struggle to capture both global dynamics and fine-scale structure simultaneously. To design an effective operator capable of representing multiscale features, a hierarchical multiscale decomposition framework is required. In this study, we develop the Lifting Neural Operator (LiNO), a multiresolution operator built on the second-generation wavelet lifting scheme. LiNO learns a multiresolution decomposition directly from data by parameterizing the lifting transform. This lifting transformation is adaptive to the underlying solution function and exactly invertible by construction, enabling information-preserving multiscale operator learning. In the lifted multiresolution space, the operator evolves coarse and directional detail coefficients separately, resulting in scale-aware modeling of the underlying physics. We evaluate LiNO on several benchmarks, including Darcy flow, the Poisson equation, the Allen-Cahn equation, the compressible Navier-Stokes equation, and the Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion system. Together, these benchmarks cover a wide range of physical behaviors, including multiscale phenomena, transport-dominated dynamics, and chaotic systems. LiNO demonstrates strong performance on these challenging benchmarks compared with state-of-the-art neural operators. These results suggest that adaptive multiresolution operators provide a promising direction for scientific machine learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Lifting Neural Operator (LiNO)，一种基于第二代小波提升方案的多分辨率神经算子，通过参数化提升变换实现自适应、可逆的多尺度分解，从而在提升后的空间中分别建模粗粒度和方向性细节系数，提升对多尺度物理现象的建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子难以同时捕捉全局动力学与细尺度结构，缺乏有效的多尺度分解框架来建模复杂物理系统。
AI.method: 提出LiNO，基于第二代小波提升方案构建可学习、自适应且严格可逆的提升变换，在提升后的多分辨率空间中分别演化粗系数与方向细节系数，实现尺度感知的物理建模。
AI.result: 在达西流、泊松方程、Allen-Cahn方程、可压缩Navier-Stokes方程及Gray-Scott反应扩散系统等多个基准上，LiNO显著优于现有最先进神经算子。
AI.conclusion: 自适应多分辨率神经算子为科学机器学习提供了有前景的新方向，尤其适用于多尺度、输运主导及混沌等复杂物理系统。

title: Oyster-II: Reinforcement Learning for Constructive Safety Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse applications, yet ensuring their simultaneous safety, helpfulness, and trustworthiness remains a persistent challenge. Conventional refusal-oriented alignment strategies mitigate harmful content generation but systematically fail to serve legitimate user needs, often withholding information that could safely and constructively address the underlying intent of sensitive queries. Building upon the constructive safety paradigm pioneered by Oyster-I, which moves beyond blanket refusal toward thoughtful, response-oriented safety alignment, we identify two critical limitations of its Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)-based scheme: insufficient safety generalization to out-of-distribution scenarios and a phenomenon we term safety chain-of-thought (CoT) over-generalization, wherein safety-oriented reasoning patterns are excessively applied to benign queries, degrading helpfulness and user experience. To address these limitations, we propose Oyster-II, a reinforcement learning (RL)-based constructive safety alignment framework that adopts a Zero-RL paradigm combined with a multi-stage reinforcement learning strategy.Evaluated across extensive benchmarks, Oyster-II comprehensively surpasses both Qwen3-14B and its predecessor Oyster-I on safety dimensions, achieving cross-scale performance comparable to Qwen3-Max and Qwen3.5-397B.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Oyster-II，一种基于强化学习的建设性安全对齐框架，旨在解决大型语言模型在安全性、有用性和可信性之间的权衡问题，克服了前代Oyster-I在安全泛化和安全思维链过泛化方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有拒绝式对齐策略虽能减少有害内容，但常错误拒绝合法用户需求；Oyster-I虽转向建设性安全范式，但仍存在安全泛化能力弱和安全思维链过泛化问题，损害有用性。
AI.method: 提出Oyster-II框架，采用零强化学习（Zero-RL）范式与多阶段强化学习策略，实现建设性安全对齐。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，Oyster-II全面超越Qwen3-14B和Oyster-I，在安全性上达到与Qwen3-Max及Qwen3.5-397B相当的跨尺度性能。
AI.conclusion: Oyster-II通过RL方法有效缓解了安全与有用性的冲突，验证了建设性安全对齐路径的可行性与优越性。

title: TemporalGS: Training-Free Plug-and-Play Acceleration for 3D Gaussian Splatting Rendering via Temporal Priors
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized novel-view synthesis with its fast and high-fidelity rendering. However, rendering at high FPS and low latency across various scenes remains a challenge, especially when large amounts of 3D Gaussian ellipsoids appear in the scene. To address this issue, we introduce TemporalGS, to the best of our knowledge, the first training-free plug-and-play algorithmic approach to accelerate 3DGS rendering without any post-training or post-processing, implemented on top of tile-based software rasterization. The key idea is that, instead of rendering frames independently as 3DGS, we leverage the temporal priors, represented by novel geometry and appearance buffers, etc., to reduce redundancy of Gaussian preprocessing, sorting, and rasterization operations of consecutive frames. Specifically, we propose two acceleration strategies: (1) temporal dynamic culling, which filters out Gaussians that contribute less to current frame rendering; (2) selective rendering, which renders only a small portion of tiles that cannot be approximated by the temporal priors. By adapting and interleaving these two strategies, TemporalGS yields a simple but effective plug-and-play solution for 3DGS rendering speed-up without any training. Extensive experiments show that TemporalGS achieves comparable or even better performance compared to existing state-of-the-art post-training or post-processing-based 3DGS rendering acceleration approaches. TemporalGS can significantly enhance the rendering speed of various 3DGS methods, achieving up to $1.48\times$ acceleration, while maintaining competitive rendering quality. We further extend our TemporalGS to hardware rasterization-based 3DGS to show the portability of our algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TemporalGS，一种无需训练的即插即用算法，通过利用时序先验（如几何与外观缓冲区）减少高斯预处理、排序和光栅化冗余，实现3D高斯泼溅渲染加速。其包含时序动态剔除与选择性渲染两种策略，在保持画质前提下最高提速1.48倍。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）虽在新视角合成中表现优异，但在多场景下仍难以兼顾高帧率与低延迟，尤其当场景中高斯椭球体数量庞大时。
AI.method: 提出TemporalGS：基于瓦片软件光栅化的训练无关即插即用方法；引入时序先验（几何/外观缓冲区）；设计两种策略——时序动态剔除（剔除对当前帧贡献小的高斯）与选择性渲染（仅渲染无法被时序先验近似的瓦片）；并自适应交替执行二者。
AI.result: 在多种3DGS方法上实现最高1.48×加速，渲染质量保持竞争力；性能优于现有需后训练或后处理的加速方法；可扩展至硬件光栅化平台，验证算法可移植性。
AI.conclusion: TemporalGS是一种简单、高效、无需训练且即插即用的3DGS加速方案，显著提升实时渲染效率，同时具备良好通用性与可扩展性。

title: Organizational Memory for Agentic Business Process Execution
summary: LLM-based agents offer new opportunities for automating business process execution beyond the limits of rule-based systems. However, general-purpose LLMs lack the organization-specific knowledge required for reliable execution, which is typically fragmented across human-oriented artifacts such as policies, process models, and standard operating procedures. While such knowledge can technically be encoded in individual prompts or agent-specific retrieval setups, this approach does not scale in enterprises, as it gives rise to knowledge silos and rule duplicates, and makes consistent updates and learning across agents difficult. We argue that this calls for an organizational memory for agentic business process execution: a shared, governed, and agent-consumable reference layer of evolving organization-specific procedural knowledge about how work should be executed. We derive requirements for such a memory, propose an architecture for its curation and consumption, and demonstrate its effectiveness in a proof-of-concept based on a procurement scenario.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向代理型业务流程执行的组织记忆架构，旨在解决大语言模型（LLM）缺乏组织特有知识的问题，通过构建共享、受控且可被智能体消费的过程知识参考层，提升企业级自动化的一致性与可维护性。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型缺乏组织特定知识，而现有将知识嵌入提示或检索系统的方法在企业中难以扩展，易导致知识孤岛、规则重复及跨智能体更新困难。
AI.method: 提出组织记忆的概念，推导其核心需求，设计其构建（curation）与使用（consumption）架构，并基于采购场景开展概念验证（proof-of-concept）。
AI.result: 验证了所提组织记忆架构在提升代理执行一致性、可维护性和知识复用方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 组织记忆是实现可靠、可扩展、可治理的代理型业务流程执行的关键基础设施，应作为企业级智能体系统的共享知识中枢。

title: The Powerless Noise: How Experimental Settings Shape the Reported Power of Noise
summary: Recent work has suggested that adding irrelevant documents to the input of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems can improve question-answering performance, a phenomenon referred to as the ``\textit{Power of Noise}.'' This motivated investigations into the role of noise in information retrieval. In this paper, we reproduce the main findings of Cuconasu et al. \cite{cuconasu2024power} and evaluate the robustness of the effect under extended experimental settings. We first confirm that the phenomenon holds under the original setup, which uses earlier-generation LLMs, restrictive prompting and constrained decoding settings. We subsequently introduce a series of extensions to investigate the underlying causes of the noise effect, examining the authors' original design choices including the use of different models, instruction prompting, and relaxed output length constraints. Across these ablations, the Power-of-Noise pattern proves highly sensitive to inference configuration: it can appear, weaken, or disappear under small changes to prompt formulation and decoding limits. Combined with our error analysis, which shows substantial contributions from truncation and malformed generations, this variance indicates that the original effect cannot be robustly confirmed as a general benefit of noisy retrieval under these experimental conditions. More broadly, our work highlights the importance of carefully scrutinizing inference design in retrieval-augmented generation systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/ina0105/The-Power-of-Noise-Reproduction.

AI.tldr: 本文复现并扩展了Cuconasu等人关于检索增强生成（RAG）中‘噪声力量’现象的研究，发现该效应高度依赖于推理配置（如提示设计与解码限制），缺乏鲁棒性；结果表明原始结论不能被稳健确认为噪声检索的普遍益处。
AI.motivation: 验证并深入探究‘噪声力量’这一现象是否真实、稳健，及其在不同实验设置下的可复现性与成因。
AI.method: 复现Cuconasu等人的实验，并通过模型更换、指令提示调整、输出长度约束放宽等消融实验，系统评估噪声效应的鲁棒性；辅以错误分析（如截断与格式错误生成）。
AI.result: ‘噪声力量’效应在原始设置下可复现，但在多数扩展设置中敏感甚至消失；错误分析显示截断与生成异常显著影响结果。
AI.conclusion: ‘噪声力量’并非稳定可靠的通用现象，其观测高度依赖特定推理配置；研究强调RAG系统中推理设计需被审慎评估。

title: Continuous-Time Gaussian Belief Trees for Motion Planning
summary: We address sampling-based motion planning for continuous-time stochastic systems under process and measurement uncertainty, with probabilistic guarantees on safety and performance. The robot dynamics are modeled as a continuous-time linear stochastic differential equation, while sensor measurements arrive at discrete time instants. We derive an offline hybrid belief propagation model in which the belief evolves according to continuous-time ODEs between measurements and undergoes discrete Kalman filter update jumps at measurement times. To ensure safety, we introduce a belief-barrier-function-based safety checker for segment-level probabilistic verification. This enables the planner to certify safety over entire continuous trajectory segments and detect inter-sample chance-constraint violations that are missed by conventional node-based checks. Together, these components provide a principled framework for sampling-based belief planning that accounts for both continuous-time uncertainty propagation and continuous-time safety requirements. We integrate the method with RRT and SST planners and evaluate it across multiple benchmark environments. The results show that the proposed method achieves high success rates and robust enforcement of chance constraints, including in narrow-passage scenarios where discrete-time counterparts fail due to missed inter-sample unsafe behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向连续时间随机系统的基于采样的运动规划方法，通过混合信念传播模型和信念障碍函数，实现了对安全性和性能的概率保证。
AI.motivation: 现有基于采样的规划方法在处理连续时间随机系统时，难以兼顾过程与测量不确定性，并常因离散化忽略采样间隔内的安全违规（inter-sample violations），导致概率约束失效。
AI.method: 构建离线混合信念传播模型：信念在测量间按连续ODE演化，在测量时刻用卡尔曼滤波更新；引入基于信念障碍函数的安全检验器，实现轨迹段级的概率安全性验证。
AI.result: 在RRT和SST等规划器中集成该方法，在多个基准环境中验证：相比离散时间方法，本方法显著提升成功率与概率约束鲁棒性，尤其在狭窄通道场景下避免了因忽略采样间不安全行为而导致的失败。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架统一处理连续时间不确定性传播与连续时间安全要求，为随机系统提供具备严格概率保障的采样式信念规划新范式。

title: Where do LLMs Fall Short in CBT-Guided Affective Reasoning?
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, accepted for publication in Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), 2026
summary: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) provides a structured framework for understanding a user's mental state by examining the interaction between cognitive and behavioral factors. However, out-of-the-box LLMs respond fluently and empathetically, yet collapse into validation & reflection, regardless of what the user actually needs. They know theoretical CBT (scoring up to 96% accuracy on licensing exam questions) but fail to apply it effectively. We explore this gap with a knowledge-guided framework that treats CBT dialogue as controlled affective reasoning: user narratives are decomposed into Beck's Cognitive Conceptualization structure, grounded in clinical SNOMED CT concepts validated via Natural Language Inference, and a Multiple Chain-of-Thought (MCoT) strategy selection between Validation & Reflection, Socratic Questioning, or Alternative Perspectives. To measure whether such guidance actually changes behavior, we introduce the Protocol Leverage Force (F), a behavior-level metric that captures how far an intervention shifts a model away from its default response. Across three open-weight LLMs and 14 RealCBT-derived case studies, evaluated with human experts, valence-arousal trajectories, and linguistic entrainment, F shows that simply introducing protocol definitions via single chain-of-thought prompting fails to change LLM behavior, while MCoT on these definitions guides strategy selection better. Still, the effect stays within 1% (approx. 1.2-1.3%), and all models remain biased toward Validation & Reflection. These results show CBT knowledge alone does not ensure effective application, giving the affective-computing community instrumentation to measure where LLMs fall short.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种知识引导框架，将CBT对话建模为受控的情感推理过程，通过分解用户叙述、临床概念映射和多链思维策略选择来提升大语言模型在CBT中的应用效果，并引入Protocol Leverage Force（F）指标量化干预对模型行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型虽能准确回答CBT理论问题，但在实际对话中仍倾向于无差别地使用验证与反思策略，缺乏对CBT协议的有效应用。
AI.method: 构建知识引导框架：将用户叙述按Beck认知概念化结构分解，用SNOMED CT临床概念进行语义 grounding（经NLI验证），并采用Multiple Chain-of-Thought（MCoT）策略选择机制，在Validation & Reflection、Socratic Questioning和Alternative Perspectives间动态决策；引入Protocol Leverage Force（F）作为行为级评估指标。
AI.result: 在三个开源权重LLM和14个RealCBT案例上验证表明，单链思维提示无法改变模型默认行为，而MCoT可提升策略选择能力，但整体行为偏移仅约1.2–1.3%，模型仍强烈偏向Validation & Reflection。
AI.conclusion: 单纯掌握CBT知识不足以实现有效应用；本文为情感计算社区提供了可量化的工具（F指标）来识别和衡量LLM在临床对话协议执行上的不足。

title: Entropy-Coded MS-VQ-VAE with Learned Priors for Ultra-Low Bitrate Video Compression
summary:
Learned video codecs based on continuous latent representations struggle to operate reliably below 0.1 bits per pixel~(bpp): without a differentiable rate signal, Lagrangian optimisation cannot effectively trade reconstruction quality for bitrate at extreme compression ratios. We demonstrate that discrete latent representations sidestep this limitation entirely. In a vector-quantized~(VQ) codec, the codebook size~$K$ imposes a hard information ceiling of $\log_2 K$ bits per symbol; a learned autoregressive prior then exploits the non-uniform distribution of code usage -- which we show follows a power law -- to push actual bitrates well below this ceiling, without any rate-penalty tuning.
  Building on the MS-VQ-VAE architecture introduced in~\cite{kotthapalli2026msvqvae}, we sweep $K \in \{128, 256, 512, 1024\}$ under a uniform training protocol to trace four operating points on the rate-distortion~(RD) curve. We identify and resolve a critical training instability: gradient-based VQ collapses catastrophically at $K \leq 512$, whereas EMA-stabilised codebook updates with dead-code restart maintain full utilisation across all configurations. On 500 UCF101 test clips ($64\!\times\!64$, 32~frames), our models operate at 0.043-0.064~bpp -- 3.3-5$\times$ below H.264's practical floor and $5$-$7.6\times$ below H.265's floor at this resolution. Every MS-VQ-VAE configuration outperforms H.265 CRF\,36 on perceptual quality (LPIPS) despite using $5$-$7.6\times$ fewer bits. At $K{=}1024$, the model surpasses H.265 CRF\,36 on LPIPS by a margin of 0.072 absolute while using $5.1\times$ fewer bits. Codebook analysis confirms power-law index distributions and 70-85\% entropy efficiency, establishing the pipeline as a principled learned entropy coder.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离散潜在表示（向量量化）的视频编解码器，克服了连续潜在表示在极低码率（<0.1 bpp）下因缺乏可微率信号而导致拉格朗日优化失效的问题；通过稳定训练的MS-VQ-VAE架构，在UCF101上实现0.043–0.064 bpp，显著优于H.264/H.265，且具备理论熵编码合理性。
AI.motivation: 连续潜在表示的视频编解码器在低于0.1 bpp时难以可靠工作，因其缺乏可微率信号，导致拉格朗日优化无法有效权衡质量与码率。
AI.method: 采用向量量化（VQ）构建离散潜在表示，利用固定码本大小K设定信息上限，并通过学习的自回归先验建模码字使用频率的幂律分布以实现高效熵编码；改进MS-VQ-VAE架构，引入EMA稳定更新与死码重启机制解决梯度坍缩问题。
AI.result: 在UCF101测试集上达到0.043–0.064 bpp，比H.264实际下限低3.3–5倍、比H.265下限低5–7.6倍；所有配置LPIPS均优于H.265 CRF36，其中K=1024时LPIPS绝对提升0.072且码率仅为其1/5.1；码本分析显示70–85%熵效率及幂律分布。
AI.conclusion: 离散潜在表示能从根本上突破极低码率瓶颈，所提VQ视频编解码器兼具高性能与理论熵编码合理性，为超高压缩视频编码提供了新范式。

title: Weighted Conformal Prediction for Lab-to-Track Thermal Transfer in EV Motorsport Powertrains
comment: 8 pages, 3 tables, github like for the codes and dataset:https://github.com/nearpot/Weighted-Conformal-Thermal-Transfer
summary: Predicting thermal volatility in high-performance EV powertrains is difficult as internal temperatures are rarely observable outside the lab, and models calibrated on lab drive cycles fail when deployed against real-world loads. We study this lab-to-track transfer problem using conformal prediction, offering distribution-free uncertainty bounds. We implement Ensemble Batch Prediction Intervals (EnbPI; Xu & Xie, 2021), a leave-one-out bootstrap-ensemble conformal method for autocorrelated time series, and calibrate it on real CALCE lithium-ion cycler data (A123 SP20 cells, FUDS profile). We evaluate it under a genuine, measured covariate shift: a second real CALCE test condition (US06 Highway Driving Schedule at 45°C). The unweighted EnbPI bound, achieving its nominal 95% coverage in-distribution (measured: 95.00%), degrades to 70.13% empirical coverage under this real shift. We introduce a weighted EnbPI procedure combining EnbPI's ensemble residuals with density-ratio weighting (Tibshirani et al., 2019), estimating the density ratio via a probabilistic domain classifier. This recovers coverage to 72.42%, a modest, honestly-reported improvement, not a complete fix. We additionally apply the calibrated model to real 2023 Formula 1 telemetry (Monza and Silverstone, driver VER) as an unsupervised out-of-distribution diagnostic. Because no internal thermal channel exists in public trackside telemetry, we report only unsupervised flag rates (65.6% at Monza, 58.0% at Silverstone, well above the 5% in-distribution base rate) and note inconsistent associations between flags and braking/DRS zones. We conclude that conformal domain adaptation is a promising but only partially solved tool for this problem, detailing exactly where it falls short.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了电动汽车动力系统热波动性的预测问题，提出了一种基于共形预测（conformal prediction）的不确定性量化方法EnbPI，并针对真实世界中出现的协变量偏移（如不同驾驶工况和温度条件）进行了校准与改进，引入加权EnbPI结合密度比估计以提升跨域覆盖率；实验表明其在真实数据迁移下覆盖率仅从70.13%提升至72.42%，并在F1实车遥测中验证其作为无监督异常检测工具的有效性（标志率显著高于基线），最终指出共形域自适应仍为部分解决手段。
AI.motivation: 高功率电动汽车动力系统的内部温度在实际运行中难以观测，且实验室标定的模型在真实负载下泛化能力差，存在显著的‘实验室到实车’迁移难题。
AI.method: 采用Ensemble Batch Prediction Intervals（EnbPI）这一面向自相关时间序列的共形预测方法，并引入密度比加权（通过概率域分类器估计）改进其在协变量偏移下的鲁棒性；在CALCE电池循环数据（A123 SP20，FUDS/US06工况）上校准，并拓展至2023年F1赛事遥测数据（Monza/Silverstone）作无监督异常诊断。
AI.result: 原始EnbPI在US06高温测试下覆盖率降至70.13%（名义95%）；加权EnbPI提升至72.42%；在F1数据中，无监督标志率分别为65.6%（Monza）和58.0%（Silverstone），远高于5%的分布内基线率，但标志与制动/DRS区域关联不一致。
AI.conclusion: 共形域自适应是解决热预测迁移问题的有前景方向，但当前方法仅能部分缓解覆盖率下降，尚未实现可靠鲁棒性，论文明确指出了其失效边界与局限性。

title: VERITAS: Towards a General-Purpose Replication Tool for Scientific Research
summary: AI tools are accelerating scientific publication while the systems that review it struggle to keep up, and independent verification of published research has become both harder and more important. As manual replication is slow and expensive, a growing line of work uses coding agents to automate parts of the process. Existing efforts are largely packaged as benchmarks with companion agents that only run inside the benchmark's own pipeline, and no general-purpose replication tool exists. We present VERITAS, a domain-agnostic replication framework built around CLI coding agents. Given a paper, a code repository, or both, VERITAS extracts the paper's claims, runs the methodology while resolving issues as they arise, and judges each claim against the evidence from experiment runs. The pipeline returns an importance-weighted Replication Score, a severity-rated log of every fix applied, and the patched codebase. We evaluate VERITAS on CORE-Bench and ReplicationBench, 65 papers spanning computer science, social science, medicine, and astrophysics. Against two strong Claude Code baselines on the same model and host environment, VERITAS achieves state-of-the-art performance and leads on every metric on both benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VERITAS，一个通用、领域无关的科研可复现性验证框架，利用CLI编码智能体自动提取论文主张、执行方法、修复问题并评估主张是否成立，最终输出加权复制分数、修复日志和补丁代码。
AI.motivation: 当前AI加速科研发表，但同行评审与独立验证滞后；人工复现成本高、耗时长，现有自动化复现工作局限于封闭基准，缺乏通用工具。
AI.method: 设计VERITAS框架，基于CLI编码智能体，支持从论文或代码库中提取主张、动态执行实验流程、实时问题修复与主张验证，并生成复制评分、修复日志和补丁代码。
AI.result: 在CORE-Bench和ReplicationBench（共65篇跨学科论文）上，VERITAS在所有指标上均超越两个强Claude Code基线，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: VERITAS是首个通用、可部署的自动化科研复现框架，显著提升跨学科研究的可验证性与可信度。

title: RoboDojo: A Unified Sim-and-Real Benchmark for Comprehensive Evaluation of Generalist Robot Manipulation Policies
summary: Generalist robot manipulation policies have advanced rapidly, yet existing benchmarks remain limited in systematically evaluating their capabilities. Many rely on simple, short-horizon, or skill-narrow tasks with limited capability coverage, and are often conducted only in simulation or only in the real world. Simulation enables scalable feedback but misses physical deployment challenges, while real-world evaluation is costly, time-consuming, and difficult to reproduce. We introduce RoboDojo, a unified sim-and-real benchmark for comprehensive evaluation of generalist robot manipulation policies. RoboDojo includes 42 simulation tasks and 18 real-world tasks covering diverse and complementary manipulation capabilities. The simulation benchmark evaluates five dimensions: generalization, memory, precision, long-horizon execution, and open-vocabulary instruction following, while the real-world benchmark exposes policies to challenging physical-world deployment conditions. RoboDojo supports scalable evaluation through heterogeneous parallel simulation in Isaac Sim and provides RoboDojo-RealEval, a reproducible real-world evaluation system with remote cloud access, standardized hardware, scene reset, evaluation protocol, and deployment interface. Together with XPolicyLab, policies can be integrated once and evaluated across simulation and real-world settings with minimal adaptation. We integrate 30 policies into XPolicyLab and evaluate them on RoboDojo, establishing a public leaderboard and systematic analysis of current policy performance. The website is available at http://robodojo-benchmark.com/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RoboDojo，一个统一的仿真与真实世界结合的基准测试平台，用于全面评估通用机器人操作策略，涵盖42个仿真任务和18个真实世界任务，并支持可扩展、可复现的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作策略基准测试存在任务简单、覆盖能力有限、仅限仿真或仅限真实世界等问题，难以全面、系统、可复现地评估通用策略性能。
AI.method: 构建RoboDojo基准，包括多维度仿真任务（泛化性、记忆、精度、长时序执行、开放词汇指令跟随）和真实世界任务；集成Isaac Sim异构并行仿真与RoboDojo-RealEval远程云评估系统；联合XPolicyLab实现一次集成、跨平台评估。
AI.result: 集成30种策略，在RoboDojo上建立公开排行榜与系统性性能分析，提供可复现的真实世界评估流程与标准化硬件/协议。
AI.conclusion: RoboDojo为通用机器人操作策略提供了首个兼具广度、深度与可复现性的统一评估基准，推动仿真到现实的策略验证与迭代。

title: EmCom-Diffusion: Probing Visual Reflection in Emergent Languages via Image Generation
summary: Measuring the extent to which emergent languages encode the visual content of their inputs is an open problem. We refer to this property as visual reflection: the extent to which emergent messages preserve information about their source images that can be recovered without appeal to the speaker-listener pair that produced them. Existing metrics measure it only indirectly, through proxies such as human-defined concept inventories, natural-language captions, structural distance correlations, or Referential Game accuracy, each of which can either miss visual content the message encodes or credit content it does not. We propose EmCom-Diffusion, an evaluation framework that measures visual reflection directly: it reconstructs each input image from its emergent message and compares the reconstruction with the original image itself, rather than with human-defined targets. Concretely, it finetunes a pretrained text-to-image diffusion model on (image, emergent-message) pairs and scores visual reflection as the perceptual similarity between the reconstructed and original images, operating generatively rather than discriminatively. Instantiating it on MS-COCO with a Referential Game, we validate the metric against random and fixed-token baselines under three pretrained visual encoders, and compare it against four existing metrics (CBM, supervised translation, TopSim, and R@1). EmCom-Diffusion captures visual content the other metrics miss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmCom-Diffusion框架，通过微调文本到图像扩散模型，直接从新兴语言消息中重建图像并计算其与原图的感知相似性，以直接量化‘视觉反射’能力，优于现有间接评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有评估新兴语言视觉编码能力的方法（如基于人工概念库、自然语言标注、结构距离或指称游戏准确率）均为间接代理指标，易遗漏消息实际编码的视觉信息或错误归因。
AI.method: 提出EmCom-Diffusion：将新兴语言消息视为扩散模型的条件输入，微调预训练文本-图像扩散模型（如Stable Diffusion）以从消息重建图像；用感知相似性（如LPIPS）度量重建图与原图的一致性，实现生成式、无监督的视觉反射评估。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO指称游戏中验证表明，EmCom-Diffusion能检测出其他指标（CBM、监督翻译、TopSim、R@1）无法捕捉的视觉内容，且对随机/固定token基线敏感，具鲁棒性和判别力。
AI.conclusion: EmCom-Diffusion提供了一种更直接、生成式、无需人工标注的视觉反射评估范式，显著提升对新兴语言视觉表征能力的刻画精度。

title: Next-Gen Sponsored Search: Crafting the Perfect Query with Inventory-Aware RAG (InvAwr-RAG) Based GenAI
summary: Sponsored search plays a crucial role in e-commerce revenue generation, where advertisers strategically bid on keywords to capture the attention of users through relevant search queries. However, the process of identifying pertinent keywords for a given query presents significant challenges because of a vast and evolving keyword landscape, ambiguous intentions, and topic diversity. This paper highlights an opportunity for to earn a considerable amount of Ads revenue and user engagement where a significant proportion of queries fail to retrieve any sponsored ads. To utilize this opportunity, we introduce the Inventory-Aware RAG-based Generative AI model (InvAwr-RAG), which integrates advanced semantic retrieval and real-time inventory data. This model combines dynamically generated and historically successful queries to align with available inventory and ad campaigns while diversifying rewritten queries to enhance relevance and user engagement. Preliminary results show a significant 68% increase in fill rate and balanced relevance metrics, indicating a strong potential for increased ad revenue. The InvAwr-RAG model sets a new standard in dynamic query optimization, significantly improving ad relevancy, advertiser ROI, and user experience on Walmart's digital platform.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种库存感知的RAG生成式AI模型（InvAwr-RAG），通过融合语义检索与实时广告库存数据，提升电商搜索广告填充率与相关性，初步实验显示填充率提升68%。
AI.motivation: 大量用户搜索查询未能匹配到赞助广告，造成广告收入和用户参与度损失；关键词匹配面临关键词空间庞大、用户意图模糊和主题多样等挑战。
AI.method: 提出InvAwr-RAG模型，结合动态生成查询与历史高表现查询，融入实时广告库存信息，并通过多样化重写提升语义相关性与覆盖范围。
AI.result: 初步结果表明广告填充率提升68%，相关性指标保持平衡，显著提升广告相关性、广告主ROI和用户体验。
AI.conclusion: InvAwr-RAG为动态查询优化设立了新标准，有效挖掘未被满足的广告机会，在沃尔玛数字平台实现商业与体验双赢。

title: Longitudinal-Motion-Aware Lateral Control for Autonomous Vehicles: A Robust Nonlinear Control Framework
summary: As autonomous vehicles (AVs) operate in increasingly dynamic traffic conditions, lateral control must be performed while longitudinal speed and acceleration vary. Yet many existing lateral controllers rely on constant-speed or operating-point-based assumptions, which can degrade performance during transient longitudinal maneuvers. Moreover, most methods assume precisely known vehicle parameters, despite real-world parametric uncertainties. To address these limitations, this paper presents a longitudinal-motion-aware robust nonlinear lateral control framework for AVs. It first derives a tracking error model that depends on varying longitudinal speed and acceleration. Using this model, feedback linearization is employed to obtain a linear input-output relation for lateral error tracking while embedding longitudinal motion into the control law. The resulting internal dynamics are then analyzed to ensure overall system stability. To address parameter uncertainty, two robust control designs with distinct implementation trade-offs are proposed: (i) a Lyapunov redesign (LR) approach inspired by sliding mode control, and (ii) an incremental nonlinear dynamic inversion (INDI) method. Both are rigorously analyzed and proven to ensure ultimate boundedness, with key robustness-tuning parameters explicitly identified.
