To address this, we propose Dual-Adaptive SAM3 (DA-SAM3), a novel framework that achieves both high segmentation accuracy and extreme parameter efficiency via a dual-adaptive specialization mechanism. Our first adaptation is task-aware: a Dynamic Expert Router (DER) that sparsely activates the most relevant experts by jointly reasoning about the visual input and the textual concept prompt, mimicking a clinical consultation process. Our second adaptation is parameter-aware: a Decomposed Parameterized Experts (DPE) design that represents each expert as a shared frozen base (inherited from the pretrained SAM3) and a lightweight trainable low-rank delta, reducing MoE parameter overhead by over 80\%. Extensive experiments on multiple public medical segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that Dual-Adaptive SAM3 not only matches or exceeds the accuracy of fully fine-tuned SAM3 and standard MoE baselines, but also achieves a notable 5\% gain over current state-of-the-art methods, with interpretable results validating its effectiveness. The code is available at: https://github.com/Reconsider80/DA-SAM3.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dual-Adaptive SAM3（DA-SAM3），通过任务感知的动态专家路由（DER）和参数感知的分解参数化专家（DPE）设计，实现高精度、极低参数开销的医学图像开放词汇分割，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有SAM类模型在医学图像分割中面临参数效率低与计算开销大的双重挑战，亟需兼顾精度与临床实用性的适配方法。
AI.method: 提出双自适应机制：1）任务感知的动态专家路由器（DER），依据视觉输入与文本提示稀疏激活最相关专家；2）参数感知的分解参数化专家（DPE），采用冻结基础模型+轻量低秩增量的方式降低MoE参数量超80%。
AI.result: 在多个公开医学分割基准上，DA-SAM3精度媲美或超越全量微调与标准MoE基线，并较当前SOTA提升5%，同时具备可解释性。
AI.conclusion: DA-SAM3为开放词汇医学图像分割提供了高效、精准且临床可行的新范式，验证了双自适应专业化设计的有效性与泛化潜力。

title: On the Design Space of Discrete Diffusion Online Adaptation for Molecular Optimization
comment: Submitted to The Fortieth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
summary: Molecular optimization often starts from a pretrained generative model that captures a broad prior over valid molecular structures. At test time, however, the goal is not to sample from this prior, but to use a limited oracle budget to shift generation toward task-specific high-reward molecules. We study this adaptation problem for discrete diffusion models. Each online round couples several choices. The loop must decide which candidates to evaluate, how rewards become model updates, which feedback to reuse, and how far to move beyond the pretrained prior. These choices have mostly been studied in isolation, leaving open whether they complement one another, become redundant, or interfere inside a full online adaptation loop. We conduct controlled studies across six small-molecule binding-affinity tasks and three protein-fitness tasks. We find that acquisition, reward shaping, and model debiasing provide complementary routes to higher reward, especially for small molecules. Replay further stabilizes learning, while validity penalties keep small-molecule exploration on the valid molecular manifold. Together, these findings point to a practical recipe for feedback-efficient molecular optimization: online fine-tuning with acquisition, reward shaping, debiasing, replay, and validity control. This recipe outperforms offline fine-tuning and inference-time search baselines under matched oracle-call budgets and GPU-hour accounting. The gains are largest when high-reward candidates require larger shifts from the pretrained prior.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了离散扩散模型在分子优化中的在线适应问题，提出了一种结合采集策略、奖励塑形、模型去偏、回放机制和有效性控制的实用配方，在多个小分子结合亲和力和蛋白质适应性任务上显著优于离线微调和推理时搜索基线。
AI.motivation: 分子优化通常从预训练生成模型出发，但测试时目标是利用有限的oracle预算将生成偏向高奖励的特定任务分子，而现有方法中各组件（如候选选择、奖励反馈、模型更新等）多被孤立研究，其协同效应尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过在六个小分子结合亲和力任务和三个蛋白质适应性任务上开展受控实验，系统评估采集（acquisition）、奖励塑形（reward shaping）、模型去偏（debiasing）、回放（replay）和有效性惩罚（validity penalties）等策略的组合效果，并对比在线微调与离线微调及推理搜索基线。
AI.result: 发现采集、奖励塑形和模型去偏具有互补性，尤其对小分子提升明显；回放增强学习稳定性；有效性惩罚保障分子结构有效性；整体配方在相同oracle调用和GPU时间预算下显著优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 提出一种高效反馈驱动的分子优化实用配方：在线微调融合采集、奖励塑形、去偏、回放与有效性控制，特别适用于需大幅偏离预训练先验的高奖励分子发现场景。

title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
summary: Scaling pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute have become the central paradigms for improving the capabilities of LLMs. In this work, we identify verification, the ability to determine the correctness of a solution, as a new scaling axis. To unlock this and demonstrate its effectiveness, we introduce LLM-as-a-Verifier, a general-purpose verification framework that provides fine-grained feedback for agentic tasks without requiring additional training. Unlike standard LM judges that prompt LLMs to produce discrete scores for candidate solutions, LLM-as-a-Verifier computes the expectation over the distribution of scoring token logits to generate continuous scores. This probabilistic formulation enables verification to scale along multiple dimensions: (1) score granularity, (2) repeated evaluation, and (3) criteria decomposition. In particular, we show that scaling the scoring granularity leads to better separation between positive and negative solutions, resulting in more calibrated comparisons. Moreover, scaling repeated evaluation and criteria decomposition consistently lead to additional gains in verification accuracy through variance and complexity reduction. We further introduce a cost-efficient ranking algorithm for selecting the best solution among candidates using the verifier's continuous scores. LLM-as-a-Verifier achieves state-of-the-art performance on Terminal-Bench V2 (86.5%), SWE-Bench Verified (78.2%), RoboRewardBench (87.4%), and MedAgentBench (73.3%). Beyond verification, the fine-grained signals from LLM-as-a-Verifier can also serve as a proxy for estimating task progress. We build an extension for Claude Code, enabling developers to monitor and improve their own agentic systems. Finally, we show that LLM-as-a-Verifier can provide dense feedback for RL, improving the sample efficiency of SAC and GRPO on robotics and mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-as-a-Verifier框架，将验证能力（即判断解的正确性）作为大语言模型能力的新扩展维度，通过连续分数、细粒度打分、重复评估与标准分解实现可扩展验证，并在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，同时支持任务进展估计与强化学习反馈。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型能力提升主要依赖预训练、后训练和测试时计算量的扩展，而验证能力（判断解的正确性）尚未被系统性地视为独立的可扩展维度。
AI.method: 提出LLM-as-a-Verifier框架：不依赖额外训练，利用LLM对评分token logits分布求期望，生成连续而非离散的验证分数；支持细粒度打分、多次评估与多准则分解；并设计低成本排序算法从候选解中选出最优解。
AI.result: 在Terminal-Bench V2（86.5%）、SWE-Bench Verified（78.2%）、RoboRewardBench（87.4%）和MedAgentBench（73.3%）上达到SOTA；验证信号可用于任务进展估计与RL（如SAC、GRPO）的密集反馈，提升样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 验证是一种可独立扩展的能力轴；LLM-as-a-Verifier提供通用、免训练、细粒度、可扩展的验证机制，不仅提升验证准确率，还拓展至代理系统监控与强化学习优化等新应用场景。

title: Submitted and Diagnostic Analysis of Full-Text Temporal Retrieval for LongEval-Sci
summary: LongEval-Sci evaluates scientific retrieval under collection change, where a system should be effective on the current corpus and remain usable as documents accumulate over time. This paper reports both official Task 1 results and development diagnostics for LongEval-Sci 2026. We compare the official PyTerrier BM25 and Qwen3 dense baselines with full-text BM25, additive and router variants, temporal full-text retrieval, temporal+citation retrieval, RM3 query expansion, cross-encoder reranking, and reciprocal rank fusion (RRF). In the official DCTR evaluation, the temporalized full-text runs are our strongest submissions: FT BM25+temporal and FT BM25+temporal+citation obtain the best ARP on all three snapshots (0.285, 0.267, and 0.180 nDCG@10) and reduce snapshot-3 relative change from 0.481 for the BM25 pivot to 0.368. Citation features match the temporal-only variant but do not provide a measurable additional gain in the official summary. Our internal snapshot-1 diagnostics show a complementary pattern: full-text BM25 is the strongest single development retriever (DCTR nDCG@10 = 0.3302, MAP = 0.2853), RRF gives the best deep recall (Recall@1000 = 0.9667), and some uncalibrated overlays can sharply degrade top-rank quality. We therefore conclude that full-text retrieval is the strongest foundation, temporal integration can improve official longitudinal effectiveness when applied to that foundation, and citation evidence still requires cleaner ablation and calibration. Beyond ranking, we also report a qualitative weekly IR-system update-monitoring analysis based on ingestion velocity and stale-coverage drift.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了LongEval-Sci中科学文献检索在文档集合动态增长下的性能，发现时序增强的全文BM25方法在纵向效果上最优，而引用信息增益有限；同时指出全文检索是基础，时序建模可提升其长期有效性，引用特征需进一步校准。
AI.motivation: 解决科学文献检索系统在持续新增文档（collection change）场景下保持有效性和可用性的挑战，即既要适应当前语料，又要随时间推移维持检索质量。
AI.method: 对比多种检索方法：官方基线（PyTerrier BM25、Qwen3稠密检索）、全文BM25及其变体（加法融合、路由）、时序全文检索、时序+引用检索、RM3查询扩展、cross-encoder重排序、RRF融合等，并开展DCTR官方评估与内部快照诊断分析。
AI.result: 时序化全文BM25（FT BM25+temporal及+temporal+citation）在全部三个快照上取得最高nDCG@10（0.285/0.267/0.180），并将快照3相对性能衰减从0.481降至0.368；快照1诊断显示全文BM25单模型最强（nDCG@10=0.3302），RRF提升深度召回（Recall@1000=0.9667），但部分未校准融合会损害首屏质量；引用特征未带来显著额外增益。
AI.conclusion: 全文检索是最稳健的基础；在其上引入时序建模可有效提升纵向检索效果；引用信息虽具潜力，但当前实现缺乏充分消融与校准；此外，提出基于摄入速率与陈旧覆盖率漂移的IR系统周级监控方法。

title: Beyond Point-Attached Semantics: Object-Centric Semantic Fields for Generalizable Manipulation
summary: Generalizable robot manipulation requires stable 3D understanding of functional object parts, such as handles, tool heads, openings, and graspable regions. Raw point clouds provide geometry but lack explicit part semantics, and their sampled points vary with viewpoint, sensor configuration, and object instance. Existing 2D feature lifting and discrete 3D point-wise features enrich point clouds with semantics, but the resulting features remain attached to observation-dependent samples. We propose an object-centric continuous semantic field that conditions on an object point cloud and reads part-aware semantic embeddings at explicit 3D query locations. The field is trained from part-annotated object models and then frozen to generate semantic point clouds as object-level conditioning for manipulation policies. Experiments on RoboTwin simulation tasks and real-world bimanual object manipulation show that our representation provides more stable functional-part cues and improves policy performance over raw point-cloud, 2D feature lifting, and 3D point-wise feature baselines. Project Page: \href{https://zainzh.github.io/beyond-point-attached-semantics}{https://zainzh.github.io/beyond-point-attached-semantics}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向物体的连续语义场，用于为机器人操作提供稳定、泛化性强的3D功能部件理解，摆脱了传统点云语义表示对观测采样的依赖。
AI.motivation: 通用机器人操作需要稳定、泛化的3D功能部件理解（如把手、工具头等），但原始点云缺乏显式语义且采样点受视角、传感器和物体实例影响；现有2D特征提升或离散3D点特征仍绑定于观测相关的采样点，导致泛化性差。
AI.method: 提出一种物体中心的连续语义场，以输入物体点云为条件，在任意3D查询位置输出部件感知的语义嵌入；该场由带部件标注的物体模型训练后冻结，用于生成语义点云作为操纵策略的对象级条件输入。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin仿真与真实世界双臂操作任务中，该表示相比原始点云、2D特征提升及离散3D点特征基线，提供了更稳定的功能部件线索，并提升了策略性能。
AI.conclusion: 连续语义场能解耦语义表征与观测采样，显著增强机器人对功能部件的稳定理解和操作泛化能力。

title: The Role of Prompt Language and Translation-Theory-Driven Prompts in Large Language Models: A Case Study on Spanish-Chinese Journalistic Translation
comment: Published in the Proceedings of the 27th Annual Conference of the European Association for Machine Translation (EAMT 2026), pp. 927-945. ACL Anthology entry forthcoming
summary: This study examines how prompt language and translation theory-driven prompt design influence the quality of Spanish-Chinese journalistic translations generated by GPT-5.2. A parallel corpus of four editorials from El Pais was translated under 48 experimental conditions (4 prompt types, 3 prompt languages, and 4 articles). Translation quality was assessed using BLEU and BERTScore-F1 for automated evaluation, alongside human evaluation based on the Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM) framework. Automated metrics identified the baseline prompt (BASE) as the best-performing condition, whereas human evaluation ranked the brief-oriented prompt (BRIEF) highest (MQM: 8.66 vs. 7.84), a reversal likely attributable to the single-reference constraint inherent in automated measures. Sub-error type analysis revealed that translation theory-driven prompts selectively reduced Awkward style errors, while Unidiomatic style errors persisted across conditions. Prompt language had a negligible impact under both evaluation paradigms. These results indicate that translation theory-driven prompts can yield measurable quality gains under expert evaluation of journalistic translations, although their pedagogical implications for language learners remain suggestive and require validation through user-based studies.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了提示语言和基于翻译理论的提示设计对GPT-5.2生成西班牙语—中文新闻翻译质量的影响，发现理论驱动型提示在人工评估中显著提升译文质量（尤其减少生硬风格错误），但自动指标结果与人工评价存在分歧。
AI.motivation: 探究如何通过优化提示设计（特别是引入翻译理论）来提升大语言模型在专业领域（如新闻翻译）中的输出质量，并厘清自动评估与人工评估之间的差异。
AI.method: 构建48种实验条件（4类提示×3种提示语言×4篇社论），使用BLEU、BERTScore-F1和MQM框架进行多维度评估，并开展子错误类型分析。
AI.result: 人工评估显示基于翻译理论的简明提示（BRIEF）效果最优（MQM得分8.66），而自动指标偏好基线提示（BASE）；理论驱动提示可选择性减少生硬风格错误，但无法缓解不地道风格错误；提示语言影响可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 翻译理论驱动的提示设计能在专家人工评估下切实提升新闻翻译质量，但其教学应用价值尚需面向语言学习者的真实用户研究进一步验证。

title: Additive Causal Construction for Transferable and Reconfigurable Cross-System Learning in Multi-Source Image Fusion
summary: In multi-source image fusion scenarios, heterogeneous inputs are typically driven by distinct generative mechanisms and can be viewed as a composition of multiple causal systems. However, cross-system discrepancy (CSD) and cross-system entanglement (CSE) commonly arise during the fusion process, often leading to significant performance degradation under out-of-distribution (OOD) predictions. To address the CSD and CSE issues, we propose the additive causal construction (ACC) framework, which characterizes information fusion at two levels: firstly, it establishes causal "anchors" shared among multiple systems through intervention consistency to enable causal graph transferability (CGT); and secondly, it formalizes the fusion process as causal construction and models the reliability of constructed paths through uncertainty quantification to ensure causal graph reconfigurability (CGR). Building upon this, we revisit the traditional causal representation learning (CRL) with ACC and propose ACC-CRL as a learnable instantiation of the framework. The method explores joint causal content representations across systems via content-mechanism decoupling, and performs response alignment under shared anchors to mitigate CSD. Furthermore, it incorporates structural uncertainty to adaptively regulate the fusion process, thereby suppressing unstable CSE. We conduct systematic experiments on synthetic data (ColorMNIST) and real-world multi-center medical imaging tasks (microvascular invasion (MVI) prediction). The results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves OOD generalization while maintaining in-distribution (ID) performance, validating the effectiveness and robustness of the ACC-CRL strategy based on mechanism alignment and uncertainty modeling in open environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为加性因果构建（ACC）的框架，用于解决多源图像融合中的跨系统差异（CSD）和跨系统纠缠（CSE）问题，通过因果锚点和不确定性建模提升OOD泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 多源图像融合中异构输入来自不同生成机制，易产生跨系统差异（CSD）和跨系统纠缠（CSE），导致分布外（OOD）预测性能下降。
AI.method: 提出加性因果构造（ACC）框架：1）通过干预一致性建立跨系统的因果‘锚点’以实现因果图可迁移性（CGT）；2）将融合建模为因果构建，并用不确定性量化建模路径可靠性以保障因果图可重构性（CGR）。在此基础上提出可学习实例ACC-CRL，结合内容-机制解耦、响应对齐与结构不确定性调节。
AI.result: 在ColorMNIST合成数据和多中心医学影像（微血管侵犯MVI预测）任务上验证，ACC-CRL显著提升OOD泛化能力，同时保持ID性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于机制对齐与不确定性建模的ACC-CRL策略，在开放环境下展现出优异的有效性与鲁棒性。

title: Labeled-Data-Free Meta-Learning: Efficient Task Generation Using Pre-trained Models and Unlabeled Data
summary: Meta-learning without labeled data is crucial for real-world applications, where obtaining labeled datasets can be expensive or restricted due to privacy concerns. Data-Free Meta-Learning (DFML) addresses this challenge by leveraging pre-trained models without access to training data. However, existing DFML methods rely on model inversion to generate training data, a process that is generally difficult and computationally expensive due to the need to generate high-dimensional data matching the original distribution. To address this limitation, we propose a novel meta-learning setting that avoids model inversion by jointly leveraging pre-trained models and unlabeled data. Our method generates meta-training tasks by assigning soft labels from pre-trained models to unlabeled data. Since the quality of these tasks can vary, we introduce a task-weighting mechanism based on task confidence and class distribution balance to ensure effective meta-learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach substantially reduces computational cost and improves generalization, achieving up to 104-fold speedup and 8.4 percent to 36.4 percent improvements in few-shot classification accuracy compared to state-of-the-art DFML methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需模型反演、结合预训练模型与无标签数据的新型元学习方法，通过软标签生成元训练任务并引入任务加权机制，显著降低计算成本并提升少样本分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无数据元学习（DFML）依赖困难且昂贵的模型反演生成训练数据，难以在真实场景中应用。
AI.method: 利用预训练模型对无标签数据分配软标签以构建元训练任务，并设计基于任务置信度和类别分布平衡的任务加权机制。
AI.result: 相比SOTA DFML方法，计算速度提升最高达104倍，少样本分类准确率提升8.4%–36.4%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效规避模型反演瓶颈，在保证性能的同时大幅降低计算开销，推动无标签元学习实用化。

title: APeB: Benchmarking Personalization Ability of Large Language Model Agents
summary: LLM-powered agents struggle with personalization when users issue raw, underspecified queries. In this setting, agents must infer latent intent, extract preferences from noisy interaction histories, and select among competing alternatives. Existing benchmarks rarely test this capability, as they often rely on user-refined queries or simplified histories. We introduce personalized product search (PPS), a testbed for agentic personalization under raw queries and diverse histories. We construct Agent Personalized Benchmark (APeB) from action logs, pairing underspecified intents with rich histories and user-viewed candidate items. Evaluating state-of-the-art LLMs with multi-step agent workflows, we find that models handle explicit queries well but struggle with early-stage queries requiring intent and preference discovery. Rubric analysis attributes this gap mainly to ineffective history use. A simple history-aware query-refinement pipeline, VQRA, yields consistent gains, highlighting the need for dedicated history-utilization modules in personalized agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出个性化产品搜索（PPS）测试平台和Agent Personalized Benchmark（APeB）基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）代理在原始、未明确查询下的个性化能力；发现现有模型因历史信息利用不足而在意图与偏好发现上表现较差，并提出简单有效的历史感知查询重写方法VQRA以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基准难以评估LLM代理在用户发出原始、未明确查询时的个性化能力，缺乏对隐含意图推断、噪声交互历史中偏好提取及多选项选择等关键能力的测试。
AI.method: 构建基于真实动作日志的个性化产品搜索测试平台PPS与基准APeB，包含未明确意图、丰富交互历史及用户浏览候选商品；设计多步代理工作流评估主流LLM，并通过细粒度评分标准分析失败原因；提出历史感知的查询重写方法VQRA。
AI.result: 实验表明，当前SOTA LLM在显式查询上表现良好，但在需意图与偏好发现的早期查询上显著下降；归因分析指出历史利用低效是主因；VQRA方法带来稳定性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 个性化代理亟需专门设计的历史利用模块，PPS与APeB为该方向提供了可复现、贴近实际的评估框架。

title: LBR: Towards Mitigating Length Bias in Large Language Models for Recommendation
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) have recently emerged as powerful backbones for recommender systems by reformulating recommendation as a token-level generation task. Despite their promise, we identify a pervasive yet underexplored issue: $\textit{Length Bias}$. Because items are represented by textual descriptions of varying lengths, LLM-based recommenders can be systematically biased in two ways. On the input side, longer item descriptions occupy more tokens in the context and thus receive disproportionately large aggregate attention mass during user preference modeling. On the output side, decoding based on summed autoregressive log-likelihood score inherently disfavors long items. Worse still, conventional length normalization can introduce an additional bias and even degrade recommendation performance.
  To address this problem, we propose $\textbf{LBR}$ ($\textbf{L}$ength $\textbf{B}$ias $\textbf{R}$eduction), a lightweight and model-agnostic framework for mitigating length bias in LLM-based recommendation. LBR mitigates input-side bias via Length-Aware Attention Calibration, which incorporates a length-dependent offset into attention logits to neutralize attention skew. For the output side, LBR introduces Effective Information Length Normalization, replacing naive token count with an information-theoretic length surrogate derived from the branching structure of the prefix tree. Extensive experiments on three real-world Amazon datasets and two representative LLM-based recommenders demonstrate that LBR substantially alleviates length bias while consistently improving recommendation accuracy and fairness, with negligible additional training and inference overhead (with an average NDCG@5 gain of 16.82%). The code is available at https://github.com/Void-JackLee/LBR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LBR框架，通过长度感知注意力校准和有效信息长度归一化，解决大语言模型推荐系统中的长度偏差问题，显著提升准确性和公平性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型推荐系统中存在未被充分研究的长度偏差问题：输入侧长物品描述占据更多注意力，输出侧自回归解码倾向于短物品，且传统长度归一化会引入额外偏差。
AI.method: 提出LBR框架，包括长度感知注意力校准（输入侧）和基于前缀树分支结构的有效信息长度归一化（输出侧）。
AI.result: 在三个Amazon数据集和两个LLM推荐器上验证，LBR显著缓解长度偏差，平均NDCG@5提升16.82%，开销极小。
AI.conclusion: LBR是一种轻量、模型无关的长度偏差缓解方案，兼顾性能提升与公平性增强。

title: AnchorVLA: Bridging Discrete Decisions and Continuous Trajectories for Vision-Language-Action Planning
summary: Autonomous driving planning requires translating navigation intent, traffic rules, dynamic interactions, and language instructions into executable continuous trajectories. Vision-Language-Action models have been introduced into driving planning to improve long-tail generalization, commonsense reasoning, high-level semantic understanding, and explainability. However, existing VLA planners mainly follow planning-head-based trajectory prediction or full-trajectory autoregressive generation. The former only weakly constrains continuous trajectory generation with VLA reasoning, while the latter relies on long sequences of low-information-density coordinate tokens, making semantic-action alignment difficult and leading to discretization errors and inefficient inference. To address these limitations, we propose AnchorVLA, a hierarchical decision-anchored VLA planning framework that uses trajectory-pattern anchors as an explicit interface between high-level VLA reasoning and continuous trajectory execution. Specifically, Decision-as-Anchor Representation represents behavior-level driving decisions with anchor tokens, each encoding an entire local motion pattern rather than a single coordinate point. Decision-Anchored Residual Flow then generates fine-grained continuous trajectories in the selected anchor-defined residual space, capturing multi-modal execution refinements after high-level decision making. By reasoning over compact and semantically meaningful anchors instead of autoregressively generating waypoint sequences, AnchorVLA preserves LLM-based decision making while improving inference efficiency, semantic-action alignment, and continuous generation flexibility. Experiments on the Bench2Drive closed-loop benchmark show that AnchorVLA achieves a state-of-the-art Success Rate of 77.28 and a competitive Driving Score of 89.92.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnchorVLA，一种分层决策锚定的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）规划框架，通过轨迹模式锚点连接高层语义推理与连续轨迹执行，提升自动驾驶规划的语义-动作对齐、推理效率与生成灵活性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA规划器存在两类问题：基于规划头的方法对连续轨迹生成约束弱；全轨迹自回归生成依赖低信息密度坐标标记，导致语义-动作对齐困难、离散化误差及推理低效。
AI.method: 提出AnchorVLA框架，包含两部分：1）Decision-as-Anchor Representation：用锚点标记表征行为级驾驶决策，每个锚点编码完整局部运动模式；2）Decision-Anchored Residual Flow：在锚点定义的残差空间中生成细粒度连续轨迹，实现多模态执行细化。
AI.result: 在Bench2Drive闭环基准上，AnchorVLA达到77.28的成功率（Succ）和89.92的驾驶得分（DS），为当前最优。
AI.conclusion: AnchorVLA通过引入语义紧凑、行为明确的轨迹模式锚点，有效 bridging 高层VLA推理与底层连续控制，在保持LLM决策能力的同时显著提升规划质量与效率。

title: KARMA: Knowledge graph-based Automated Reasoning Materialization and Alignment
summary: Template-based contrastive synthesis is scalable, but its candidates often differ only in a few entity-slots while sequence-level optimization spreads supervision over mostly shared templates. We formalize this as the Resolution Mismatch Problem and propose KARMA, which enumerates schema-constrained paths over domain knowledge graphs and verbalizes them into slot-aligned contrastive candidates. Slot-Parallel Alignment (SPA) then applies a decoupled slot-level objective to route preference supervision to discriminative entity-slots, with slot-aware masked attention serving as an optional packed-evaluation implementation. Across biomedical, computer-science, and chemistry benchmarks, KARMA outperforms base LLM and same-data SFT baselines, and compares favorably with sequence and token-level preference methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KARMA方法，通过在领域知识图谱上枚举模式约束路径并将其转为槽位对齐的对比候选，结合槽位并行对齐（SPA）机制实现细粒度监督，解决模板对比合成中的分辨率不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 模板式对比合成虽可扩展，但候选样本常仅在少数实体槽位上不同，而序列级优化将偏好监督分散到大量共享模板上，导致监督信号稀疏低效，即‘分辨率不匹配问题’。
AI.method: KARMA：1）在领域知识图谱上枚举schema约束路径，并将其具象化为槽位对齐的对比候选；2）引入槽位并行对齐（SPA），采用解耦的槽位级目标函数，将偏好监督精准导向判别性实体槽位；3）可选地使用槽位感知掩码注意力实现打包评估。
AI.result: 在生物医学、计算机科学和化学多个基准上，KARMA显著优于基础大语言模型及同等数据下的监督微调基线，并优于现有序列级与token级偏好学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 槽位级细粒度对比学习能更高效利用偏好信号，KARMA为知识引导的可控文本生成提供了可扩展且高分辨的新范式。

title: Symmetry-Structured Neural Completion of Islamic Geometric Patterns from Sparse Control Geometry
summary: Islamic geometric patterns are governed by exact rotational symmetry and strict construction rules. This paper treats these rules as formal geometric knowledge and embeds them in a neural completion framework, rather than leaving them to be learned statistically from data. Given sparse control geometry and a target symmetry order, the system completes the pattern as a vector graph by predicting edges and refinements of bounded curves over a candidate lattice whose edges are organised into rotational orbits under the cyclic group. Symmetry is enforced either by constraining predictions within these orbits or by projecting them onto them during inference. The orbit-tied variant provides a constructive guarantee: for any input and any orbit-level selection rule, it produces exact N-fold symmetry, preserves anchor points, and keeps all refinements within prescribed bounds. These properties are verified numerically. The study focuses on rotational symmetry, and all quantitative results are obtained from procedurally generated graphs inspired by Islamic geometric design rather than from a historical corpus. On clean inputs, enforcing exact validity produces no measurable loss in fidelity. When control geometry is missing, an unstructured decoder loses fidelity and breaks symmetry; retraining on corrupted inputs recovers much of the fidelity but not exact validity. Symmetry-structured inference, by contrast, keeps violations at zero throughout. The results show that augmentation and symmetry structure address distinct failure modes: augmentation improves fidelity under corruption, while symmetry structure guarantees validity. The framework therefore provides a knowledge-constrained, guarantee-backed approach to neural completion for scalable vector ornaments whose validity depends on exact geometric structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将伊斯兰几何图案的严格对称性规则显式嵌入神经补全框架的方法，通过轨道约束确保精确N重旋转对称性，兼顾有效性与保真度。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络依赖数据统计学习伊斯兰几何图案规则，难以保证严格的几何有效性；本文旨在将形式化的几何知识（如旋转对称性）显式融入模型，实现可验证的有效性保障。
AI.method: 将控制几何与目标对称阶数作为输入，在候选旋转轨道格点上预测边与有界曲线细化；通过轨道约束或投影实现对称性强制；提出轨道绑定变体以提供构造性保证。
AI.result: 轨道绑定方法在任意输入下均实现零对称违反、锚点保持及边界内细化；数值验证其有效性；对比显示：数据增强提升 corrupted 输入下的保真度，而对称结构保证始终有效的几何合法性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为依赖精确几何结构的矢量装饰图案补全提供了知识约束、可验证保证的神经建模新范式。

title: Trading Confidence: Comprehensive Uncertainty Estimation in Algorithmic Trading
comment: Accepted at the Pacific Asia Conference on Information Systems (PACIS 2025). 17 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful approach in financial trading, enabling agents to learn optimal strategies through direct market interaction. However, financial markets are highly uncertain, with price fluctuations driven by stochastic volatility, model limitations, and regime shifts. Traditional RL models struggle in dynamic environments, often failing to adapt to sudden market disruptions, leading to suboptimal trading decisions. To address this challenge, we propose an uncertainty-aware RL framework that integrates distributional, epistemic, and aleatoric uncertainty estimations. Our approach enhances uncertainty estimation using SHAP-weighted reconstruction uncertainty, MC Dropout, and an LSTM-based technical indicator consensus mechanism. Experimental results on five major U.S. stock indices demonstrate that RL agents equipped with uncertainty estimation significantly outperform traditional models in return and risk management. This study advances uncertainty estimation in RL-based financial trading, with future research extending its application to other asset classes and alternative RL architectures for greater adaptability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向金融交易的不确定性感知强化学习框架，通过融合分布性、认知性和偶然性不确定性估计，提升RL智能体在动态市场中的适应性和决策质量。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习模型在高度不确定、易受突发市场扰动影响的金融市场中表现不佳，难以及时适应波动、模型局限和市场机制转换。
AI.method: 构建不确定性感知RL框架，整合SHAP加权重构不确定性、MC Dropout（用于认知不确定性）和LSTM技术指标共识机制（用于分布性与偶然性不确定性）。
AI.result: 在五大美国股票指数上的实验表明，引入不确定性估计的RL交易智能体在收益和风险管理方面显著优于传统模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了RL在金融交易中的不确定性建模能力，为后续扩展至其他资产类别及不同RL架构奠定了基础。

title: Autonomous Information Seeking: A Roadmap for Agentic Recommender Systems
summary: The rapid integration of large language model-based agents into recommender systems has driven a shift from static, ranking-based pipelines toward autonomous and interactive systems that can reason, plan, and act. This survey provides a comprehensive overview of this emerging landscape by introducing a unified taxonomy grounded in the level of autonomy and three core paradigms of agentic recommender systems: agent-assisted recommendation, agent-as-recommender, and agent-as-user-simulator. The autonomy framework organizes existing methods along increasing capabilities in proactivity, context awareness, interaction flexibility, and adaptivity. Building on this framework, the survey analyzes how each paradigm adopts different agentic architectures and how agents enhance key components such as profiles, memory, tool use, workflows, and optimization mechanisms. We further examine evaluation methodologies for agentic recommendation, covering automated metrics, LLM-based judging, and simulation-based assessment, and discuss their limitations in capturing reasoning quality, user experience, and system behavior. Beyond existing evaluation protocols, we further discuss unresolved issues in evaluating agentic recommender systems, including trajectory-level assessment, agent contribution analysis, and calibration of user simulation. Lastly, the survey outlines open challenges in lifelong user modeling, contextual abstraction, multimodal alignment, controllability, trustworthiness, privacy, scalability, and efficiency. Together, these analyses establish a unified foundation for understanding the current progress of agentic recommender systems and highlight promising opportunities for developing more autonomous, reliable, and human-aligned recommendation agents.

AI.tldr: This survey introduces a unified taxonomy for agentic recommender systems based on autonomy levels and three paradigms—agent-assisted, agent-as-recommender, and agent-as-user-simulator—and analyzes architectures, components, evaluation methods, and open challenges.
AI.motivation: The rapid integration of LLM-based agents into recommender systems calls for a structured understanding of their autonomy, architectures, and evaluation, as traditional static pipelines are being replaced by interactive, reasoning-capable agents.
AI.method: The paper proposes a unified taxonomy grounded in autonomy level and three core paradigms; analyzes agentic architectures and enhancements to recommendation components; reviews and critiques evaluation methodologies; and identifies key open challenges.
AI.result: A comprehensive framework for classifying and analyzing agentic recommender systems, including insights into evaluation limitations and unresolved issues like trajectory-level assessment and user simulation calibration.
AI.conclusion: The survey establishes a foundational framework for agentic recommender systems, highlighting progress while emphasizing the need for more reliable, trustworthy, scalable, and human-aligned agents.

title: Layout-independent actuation allocator for fin-actuated marine robots
comment: Accepted by 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
summary: In this study, we propose a layout-independent control allocator capable of zero-shot deployment across diverse actuator configurations. The proposed method utilizes a learning pipeline that integrates a Graph Neural Network (GNN) and a Transformer to represent the robot's geometric layout as a graph, along with a Mixture Density Network (MDN) to predict multi-modal control command distributions. Furthermore, by incorporating a differentiable physics surrogate model, we achieve command refinement during inference to minimize target wrench tracking error and energy consumption. A single generalized model using randomly generated actuator layout data demonstrated high trajectory tracking performance on different actuator layout robots outside the training distribution. Additionally, in real-world pool experiments, our approach achieved performance nearly equivalent to conventional controllers designed to specific layouts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种布局无关的控制分配器，通过图神经网络、Transformer和混合密度网络结合可微物理代理模型，实现对多种执行器构型的零样本部署，并在仿真与真实水池实验中验证了其高性能。
AI.motivation: 传统控制分配器通常针对特定执行器布局设计，缺乏跨构型泛化能力，难以适应新型或未知机器人结构。
AI.method: 采用GNN+Transformer建模机器人几何布局为图结构，用MDN预测多模态控制命令分布，并引入可微物理代理模型在推理阶段优化指令以降低力矩跟踪误差和能耗。
AI.result: 单一通用模型在未见过的执行器布局上实现了高轨迹跟踪精度；真实水池实验中性能接近专用传统控制器。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法成功实现了零样本跨布局部署，兼具泛化性与实用性，为机器人控制分配提供了新的通用范式。

title: S-DiverSe: Spanish Diverse Speech
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) has advanced remarkably for standard speech, yet speech affected by neurological conditions remains a challenge. We present S-DiverSe (Spanish Diverse Speech), a corpus of 3.2 hours of in-the-wild Spanish speech from 22 speakers with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, and stroke. The dataset contains 444 manually transcribed audio segments with metadata on speaker sex, disease type, and intelligibility. S-DiverSe is designed to support ASR evaluation and development for neurologically affected Spanish speech. We describe the dataset, analyze its composition, and report baseline ASR results alongside initial adaptation experiments. Our findings reveal that heuristic text post-processing is more robust than fine-tuning for out-of-domain neurological Spanish speech. This underscores the need for dedicated in-the-wild Spanish benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了S-DiverSe数据集，一个包含22名患有肌萎缩侧索硬化症、帕金森病和中风的西班牙语患者的3.2小时真实场景语音语料库，用于推动神经疾病影响下的西班牙语自动语音识别（ASR）研究，并发现启发式文本后处理比微调更适用于该类语音识别。
AI.motivation: 标准语音的自动语音识别（ASR）已取得显著进展，但受神经系统疾病影响的语音识别仍具挑战性，尤其缺乏针对西班牙语神经障碍语音的高质量真实场景基准数据集。
AI.method: 构建S-DiverSe语料库（3.2小时、22名患者、444段人工转录音频），标注说话人性别、疾病类型和可懂度；开展ASR基线实验与初步适配实验（包括微调与启发式文本后处理）。
AI.result: 启发式文本后处理在神经疾病西班牙语ASR任务中比模型微调更具鲁棒性；验证了S-DiverSe作为专用评估基准的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 亟需建立真实场景下的西班牙语神经障碍语音专用基准；当前主流微调方法在该领域表现有限，轻量级后处理策略可能更具实用价值。

title: Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning: Evaluating Criterion-Shift Adaptation in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models can perform new tasks without parameter updates through in-context learning (ICL), whose core mechanism is utilizing the support set for task induction. In the standard ICL setting, once the task is induced, its decision criterion remains fixed. However, in real-world applications, many tasks exhibit a stable high-level intent, while their decision criteria shift according to specific requirements. Thus, we introduce a new setting, denoted as Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning (CC-ICL), where models must infer the latent criterion from context and adjust predictions accordingly under fixed task semantics. To evaluate this capability, we propose two complementary metrics, Criterion Invariance and Criterion Sensitivity, capturing the model's robustness and adaptability under criterion shifts. We further construct CC-Bench, a multi-domain benchmark that supports evaluation under the CC-ICL setting. By employing a dual-level data hierarchy, CC-Bench enables legitimate ground-truth variation conditioned on the active criterion even when the task remains fixed. Experiments on CC-Bench reveal that most models exhibit a rigid boundary bias, struggling to align their decisions with the latent criterion. We also find that even a simple multi-criterion training strategy can significantly reduce this bias, improving Criterion Sensitivity and enabling 7B-scale models to surpass proprietary models without degrading general multimodal performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视觉-语言模型评估范式——准则条件下的上下文学习（CC-ICL），要求模型在固定任务语义下，根据上下文动态推断并适应变化的决策准则；为此构建了多领域基准CC-Bench，并提出两个新指标（准则不变性与准则敏感性）来衡量模型鲁棒性与适应性；实验表明现有模型存在刚性边界偏差，而简单多准则训练可显著缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现实任务中，高层意图稳定但具体决策准则随需求变化，而标准上下文学习假设决策准则固定，无法反映这一实际需求。
AI.method: 提出CC-ICL新范式，设计双指标（Criterion Invariance & Criterion Sensitivity）量化模型对准则变化的鲁棒性与适应性，并构建多领域基准CC-Bench，其采用双层数据结构支持同一任务下不同准则的合法真值变化；引入多准则训练策略缓解模型偏差。
AI.result: 实验发现主流视觉语言模型普遍存在刚性边界偏差，难以适配隐含准则；多准则训练可显著提升7B规模模型的Criterion Sensitivity，甚至超越专有大模型，且不损害通用多模态性能。
AI.conclusion: CC-ICL为评估和提升视觉语言模型在动态准则下的推理能力提供了新框架；准则感知能力是迈向更灵活、实用多模态智能的关键维度。

title: Reward Granularity in RLVR: Comparing Process and Outcome Reward Structures for Mathematical Reasoning in Small Language Models
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising paradigm for improving mathematical reasoning in language models. Yet most RLVR work rewards only the final answer (outcome-based rewards), leaving the impact of step-level process supervision (process rewards) underexplored especially for small models that lack the capacity to self-correct under sparse feedback. We systematically compare five reward conditions applied to Qwen2.5-0.5B fine-tuned with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on GSM8K: a no-RL baseline, process-only, outcome-only, and three hybrid weightings ($λ\in \{0.9, 0.5, 0.1\}$ process weight). Process-only supervision achieves 63.73% test accuracy versus 53.75% for outcome-only, a nearly 10-percentage point gap while yielding reasoning traces with higher step validity and lower deviation from ground-truth chain length. Hybrid rewards generally correlate positively with process weight, with one notable anomaly: the low-process / high-outcome configuration ($λ=0.1$) underperforms pure outcome supervision, suggesting conflicting optimization signals. Error analysis using GPT-4o as a judge reveals distinct failure mode distributions: process models generate structurally inconsistent but arithmetically grounded traces, while outcome models produce concise but derivation-error-prone chains. Our results demonstrate that reward granularity is a first-order design decision for RLVR, with process-level supervision substantially improving both accuracy and trace fidelity in small language models.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了不同奖励机制（仅过程、仅结果、混合）对小语言模型（Qwen2.5-0.5B）数学推理能力的影响，发现过程级奖励显著提升准确率与推理链保真度，优于结果级奖励。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法多依赖稀疏的结果奖励，忽视过程监督对小模型（缺乏自纠错能力）的重要性；需探究细粒度奖励设计对推理质量的影响。
AI.method: 在GSM8K数据集上，使用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 对Qwen2.5-0.5B进行微调，对比五种奖励设置：无RL基线、纯过程奖励、纯结果奖励、以及三种过程权重λ∈{0.9,0.5,0.1}的混合奖励；辅以GPT-4o进行错误模式分析。
AI.result: 纯过程奖励达63.73%准确率，显著高于纯结果奖励（53.75%）；过程监督提升步骤有效性与链长一致性；λ=0.1混合配置反低于纯结果奖励，表明信号冲突；错误分析显示过程模型偏结构性不一致但计算正确，结果模型偏简洁但推导易错。
AI.conclusion: 奖励粒度是RLVR的关键设计选择；对小模型而言，过程级监督比结果级监督更有效，能同步提升准确性与推理链保真度。

title: Embodied Operators and Benchmarking: Toward Reusable and Deployable Embodied Intelligence Systems
summary: Embodied intelligence systems require not only end-to-end policy models, but also reusable functional modules that transform multimodal observations, robot states, human demonstrations, and task contexts into structured representations, decisions, trajectories, control references, and system services. This work defines these modules as embodied operators and studies them as independent yet composable units in embodied intelligence pipelines. We clarify their definition boundary, emphasizing task semantics, standardized input-output contracts, deployability, reusability, and multi-layer optimizability. We further construct a taxonomy covering five categories: detection and segmentation, spatial localization and 3D understanding, hand motion recovery, embodied foundation models and task-decision operators, and planning, control, and system support operators. For each category, we summarize representative functions, technical paradigms, application roles, and practical limitations. Beyond taxonomy, we propose a multi-dimensional benchmark framework that evaluates embodied operators in terms of correctness, end-to-end efficiency, resource usage, temporal stability, portability, interface compatibility, deployment reliability, and downstream task utility. We also discuss workflow-level operator acceleration and open challenges in operator composition, data standardization, world models, VLA safety, edge deployment, and real-world application value. Overall, this work argues that embodied operators should be optimized and evaluated as holistic deployable components, providing a foundation for reusable, scalable, and verifiable embodied intelligence systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出'具身操作符（embodied operators）'概念，将其定义为具身智能系统中可复用、可组合的功能模块，并构建了涵盖五大类别的分类体系与多维基准评测框架，旨在推动具身智能系统向可部署、可验证、可扩展方向发展。
AI.motivation: 具身智能系统不仅需要端到端策略模型，更需可复用、可组合的标准化功能模块来处理多模态感知、状态理解、任务推理与控制输出，当前缺乏统一定义、分类与评估标准。
AI.method: 提出‘具身操作符’定义，明确其语义性、接口标准化、可部署性、可复用性及多层可优化性；构建五类操作符的系统化分类学；设计涵盖正确性、效率、资源、稳定性、可移植性、兼容性、可靠性及下游效用的多维基准评测框架。
AI.result: 建立了首个面向具身操作符的完整分类体系与多维评测框架，明确了各类型代表方法、技术范式、应用角色与局限；识别出操作符组合、数据标准化、世界模型、VLA安全、边缘部署等关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 具身操作符应作为整体可部署组件进行优化与评估，是构建可复用、可扩展、可验证具身智能系统的基石。

title: Evaluation and Explainability of Unsupervised Scholarly Collaboration Recommendations
summary: In this paper, we examine unsupervised, content-based collaboration recommendations using publication text in scholarly settings. We compare three families of methods: a TF-IDF baseline, topic-based models (LDA and BERTopic, including clone variants), and embedding-based retrieval using SciBERT with Faiss. To evaluate model behavior beyond simple lexical matching, we introduce a constrained setting where publication overlap between researchers is partially removed while still using historical co-authorship as proxy ground truth for post-hoc evaluation. Results show clear differences across methods. TF-IDF performs best under full information but drops significantly as overlap is reduced. In contrast, topic-based and embedding-based approaches show more stable performance, suggesting they capture broader distributional similarities, rather than relying only on direct lexical overlap. We also examine explainability through two perspectives: intrinsic topic-based explanations and post-hoc, retrieval-based explanations generated using language models. These provide complementary trade-offs between transparency and human readability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于出版物文本的无监督、内容驱动的学术协作推荐方法，比较了TF-IDF、主题模型（LDA、BERTopic及其变体）和基于SciBERT与Faiss的嵌入检索三种方法，并在减少作者间出版物重叠的约束设置下评估其鲁棒性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有协作推荐方法多依赖显式交互或简单文本匹配，难以在出版物重叠较少时仍有效识别潜在合作者；需探索更鲁棒、可解释的内容驱动推荐机制。
AI.method: 对比TF-IDF、LDA/BERTopic（含克隆变体）及SciBERT+Faiss嵌入检索三类方法；设计约束评估场景——人工削减作者间出版物重叠，以历史合著关系为代理真值进行后验评估；引入两类可解释性分析：内在主题解释与基于大语言模型的后验检索解释。
AI.result: TF-IDF在完整信息下表现最优但鲁棒性差；主题与嵌入方法性能更稳定，表明其捕捉分布语义而非仅词汇重叠；两类可解释方法各具优势：主题解释透明性强，检索解释更自然易读。
AI.conclusion: 基于主题与嵌入的方法更适合低重叠场景下的协作推荐；可解释性需兼顾透明性与可读性，两类解释路径具有互补价值；未来工作应融合语义建模与可解释生成。

title: Derivations of Error-State Kalman Filter Kinematics for Globally Applicable Aided Inertial Navigation Systems
summary: Global navigation systems require state estimation algorithms that handle Earth's curvature, Earth's rotation, and gravitational variations. These factors can typically be neglected in local navigation algorithms for robots, drones, etc. In classical error-state Kalman Filtering (ESKF) the error state dynamics are trajectory-dependent. Invariant ESKFs utilize Lie Group symmetries to represent the error, which can render error propagation trajectory-independent for group-affine systems. Choosing between a standard filter (where position and velocity errors are defined additively in the navigation frame), a left-invariant filter (where errors are represented in the body frame) and a right-invariant filter (where errors are represented in the navigation/world frame) depends on system dynamics and sensor configuration. This note presents the mathematical formulas for four classical and invariant ESKFs for globally applicable aided inertial navigation systems. It is intended to serve as a systematic reference for comparison and implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了四种经典和不变误差状态卡尔曼滤波器（ESKF）的数学公式，适用于全球导航系统，旨在为比较与实现提供系统性参考。
AI.motivation: 全球导航系统需考虑地球曲率、自转和重力变化等影响，而传统局部导航算法通常忽略这些因素；同时，经典ESKF的误差状态动力学依赖于轨迹，而不变ESKF利用李群对称性使误差传播轨迹无关，需系统梳理不同滤波形式的适用条件与公式。
AI.method: 推导并整理了四种经典与不变ESKF（标准、左不变、右不变及另一种经典形式）的数学公式，基于李群理论和误差状态建模，针对全球适用的辅助惯性导航系统。
AI.result: 给出了四种ESKF的完整数学表达式，明确了各滤波形式在系统动力学与传感器配置下的适用场景，为实际实现提供了清晰的理论依据与公式参考。
AI.conclusion: 不变ESKF通过李群对称性可实现轨迹无关的误差传播，选择何种ESKF形式取决于系统动力学特性和传感器配置；本文提供的公式体系有助于统一理解与工程应用。

title: TACG: Trajectory-Aware Commit Gating for Diffusion Language Model Decoding
summary: Diffusion language models (DLLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising masked positions, exposing a trajectory of predictive distributions rather than a single instantaneous belief. Most existing decoders ignore this trajectory and commit tokens from the current snapshot alone, conflating confidence with commitment readiness: a transient top-1 peak under incomplete context can be locked in, while candidates with consistent cross-step support are delayed. We propose Trajectory-Aware Commit Gating (TACG), a training-free gate-level decoder that anchors token identities to the base posterior and uses trajectory-aware signals only to decide whether the current proposal is ready to commit. TACG combines Temporal Implicit Logits Guidance (TILG), which keeps an exponential moving average of past logits as a self-reference and contrasts the current logits against this reference in natural-parameter space, with a History Gate (HG) that enforces short-term proposal persistence before commitment. Together with a capped extra-promotion budget, these components yield a stability-constrained commit rule without auxiliary networks or extra forward passes. We evaluate TACG on LLaDA, Dream, and LLaDA2-Mini across code (HumanEval, MBPP) and math (GSM8K, MATH500) benchmarks; it typically improves or preserves accuracy while reducing denoising steps and increasing tokens per forward (TPF). The code is publicly available at https://github.com/Clarence-CV/TACG-DLLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的解码器TACG，利用扩散语言模型（DLLM）生成过程中的预测轨迹信息，通过时间隐式logits引导（TILG）和历史门控（HG）实现更稳定的token提交决策，在保持或提升准确率的同时减少去噪步数、提高每前向传播生成的token数。
AI.motivation: 现有DLLM解码器仅依赖当前步预测快照，忽略预测轨迹中蕴含的时序一致性信息，导致过早提交低置信但瞬时领先的token，而忽略跨步稳定支持的候选token。
AI.method: 提出Trajectory-Aware Commit Gating（TACG），包含两个核心组件：1）Temporal Implicit Logits Guidance（TILG），在自然参数空间中对比当前logits与历史logits指数滑动平均；2）History Gate（HG），强制短期提案持续性；并引入上限约束的额外提升预算，构成稳定性约束的提交规则。
AI.result: 在LLaDA、Dream和LLaDA2-Mini模型上，于HumanEval、MBPP、GSM8K、MATH500等代码与数学基准测试中，TACG通常保持或提升准确率，同时显著减少去噪步数、提高tokens per forward（TPF）。
AI.conclusion: TACG是一种轻量、即插即用的训练无关解码策略，有效利用DLLM内在轨迹信息提升生成稳定性与效率，为扩散语言模型解码提供了新范式。

title: Classroom Behavior Monitoring with YOLO An Empirical Study in Higher Education Settings
summary: Classroom behavior monitoring plays a vital role in evaluating student engagement and improving teaching effectiveness. Traditional observation methods remain subjective and lack scalability. This study introduces a real-world dataset of classroom videos collected at the Banking Academy of Vietnam (BAV-Classroom dataset), annotated with nine distinctive behavioral categories. State-of-the-art Computer Vision models were evaluated and compared, with YOLOv11 achieving the best performance. Experimental results indicate that students' concentration often decreases notably during the final part of lectures, highlighting challenges in sustaining engagement. Our findings demonstrate the feasibility of applying computer vision for automated classroom monitoring, providing valuable insights for academic quality management.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了越南银行学院的BAV-Classroom真实课堂视频数据集，包含九类行为标注，并评估了多种计算机视觉模型，YOLOv11表现最优；结果揭示学生注意力在课程后半段显著下降，验证了CV技术用于自动化课堂行为监测的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统课堂行为观察方法主观性强、难以规模化，亟需客观、可扩展的自动化监测方案。
AI.method: 构建真实课堂视频数据集（BAV-Classroom），涵盖九类学生行为；采用多种前沿计算机视觉模型进行行为识别与性能对比，以YOLOv11为主模型。
AI.result: YOLOv11在该数据集上取得最优性能；实验发现学生专注度在课程末段明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 计算机视觉技术可有效支持自动化课堂行为监测，为教学质量管理和学生参与度提升提供数据驱动依据。

title: Poisson-Gamma Modeling of Inter-Relational Dependencies in Dynamic Knowledge Graphs
comment: Accepted at the 42nd Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2026). 20 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables
summary: Dynamic knowledge graphs are ubiquitous in today's AI applications, as we represent molecular structures, social relationships, and language information using these graph models. As knowledge graphs evolve over time and are often noisy and incomplete, modeling their temporal and relational dependencies becomes crucial for downstream tasks. To address these challenges, this paper proposes PGRE (Poisson-Gamma Relational Evolution), a probabilistic model for modeling inter-relational dependencies in dynamic knowledge graphs. PGRE represents multi-relational temporal links via a Poisson-Bernoulli formulation. It introduces Gamma-distributed latent variables to capture entity-factor associations and cross-relation dependencies mediated by shared latent communities. A Gamma Markov process further models the temporal evolution of these latent variables, enabling principled characterization of relational dynamics. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that PGRE achieves competitive performance in link prediction, particularly in sparse settings, while revealing meaningful relational evolution patterns in dynamic knowledge graphs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PGRE模型，通过泊松-伽马关系演化框架建模动态知识图谱中的时序与多关系依赖，利用泊松-伯努利链接建模、伽马分布隐变量和伽马马尔可夫过程，提升稀疏场景下的链接预测性能并揭示关系演化模式。
AI.motivation: 动态知识图谱普遍存在且常具噪声与不完整性，需有效建模其时序性和多关系依赖以支撑下游任务。
AI.method: 提出PGRE（Poisson-Gamma Relational Evolution）模型：采用泊松-伯努利公式建模多关系时序链接；引入伽马分布隐变量刻画实体-因子关联及跨关系依赖；使用伽马马尔可夫过程建模隐变量的时序演化。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，PGRE在链接预测任务中表现优异，尤其在稀疏场景下；同时能揭示动态知识图谱中有意义的关系演化模式。
AI.conclusion: PGRE为动态知识图谱提供了一种概率化、可解释的建模范式，兼顾建模能力与结构可解释性，适用于分子结构、社交关系和语言信息等复杂时序关系建模。

title: Reflective Dialogue or Prompt Refinement? Effects of Tutor Scaffolding on Students' Independent LLM Use for Programming
comment: Best paper award, Published in AIED 2026: The 27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) can provide personalized support in learning, several studies have raised concerns regarding their use in education. Importantly, learning depends on how students engage with LLMs. This study examined how two types of LLM-based tutors shape students' prompting practices, learning, and subsequent LLM-use: a Socratic-Guidance (SG) tutor, which structures interaction through dialogic questioning, and a Prompt-Refinement (PR) tutor that guides the formulation of effective prompts. We conducted a two-phase study in a graduate-level mobile robotics course: 66 students used either the SG or PR tutor during a 6-week intervention, followed by 52 students using an unconstrained LLM during a 3-week course project. Results show that while the SG- and PR tutors led to similar task performance and prompting patterns during guided use, they differ in learning outcomes and later LLM-use. SG-students, relative to PR-student, achieved higher learning gains in later sessions, and were more likely to adopt understanding-driven prompting strategies, which are predictive of higher understanding, when using an unconstrained LLM. Although learners perceived the SG tutor as less efficient, the findings suggest that Socratic guidance supports the development of students' capacity to learn with LLMs over time, highlighting its importance for LLM tutor design.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了两种基于大语言模型（LLM）的辅导方式——苏格拉底式引导（SG）与提示词优化（PR）——对学生提示策略、学习成效及后续无约束LLM使用行为的影响，发现SG虽感知效率较低，但更有利于深层理解与长期自主学习能力发展。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在教育中具有个性化支持潜力，但其实际学习效果高度依赖学生如何与之互动；现有研究缺乏对不同LLM辅导范式如何塑造学生提示行为与元认知能力的实证比较。
AI.method: 在研究生移动机器人课程中开展两阶段实验：第一阶段（6周），66名学生随机分配使用SG或PR型LLM导师；第二阶段（3周课程项目），52名学生自由使用无约束LLM；通过任务表现、提示日志、学习增益测量及质性分析评估差异。
AI.result: SG与PR组在干预期间任务表现和提示模式无显著差异，但SG组后续学习增益更高，且更倾向采用以理解为导向的提示策略（该策略可预测更高理解水平）；SG组学生虽认为其效率更低，但展现出更强的LLM自主学习迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 苏格拉底式引导型LLM导师虽牺牲短期效率，却更有效地促进学生形成深度理解驱动的交互习惯与长期LLM学习能力，应成为教育型LLM系统设计的重要范式。

title: Do All Visual Tokens Matter Equally? Object-Evidence Preserving Token Merging for Vision-Language Retrieval
summary: Multi-vector vision-language retrieval preserves fine-grained visual evidence through maximum-similarity late interaction, but dense image-side tokens make storage and scoring expensive. Existing token compression methods reduce this cost, yet they can remove or collapse object- and region-level evidence that future query tokens may need to select. We propose SaMer, an object-aware token merging framework that compresses image-side post-projector tokens into $K$ representative centroids while preserving the original late-interaction interface. SaMer uses object annotations only during training as a merge prior to discourage cross-instance mixing, requires no ground-truth bounding boxes or detectors at inference time, and adapts only the shared projection layer with frozen vision and language backbones. With $K=64$, SaMer removes more than 93% of image-side tokens and reduces ColPali storage by $16.09\times$, while improving R@1 on Flickr30K and MSCOCO. These gains arise because object-aware merging preserves query-selectable object evidence that pruning or feature-only pooling can remove or collapse. SaMer also outperforms compression baselines and shows stronger phrase-level grounding, suggesting that efficient multi-vector retrieval depends not only on reducing token count, but on preserving the evidence future query tokens need to select.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SaMer框架，通过对象感知的token合并方法，在压缩图像侧token的同时保留细粒度视觉证据，显著提升多向量图文检索效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有token压缩方法会移除或合并未来查询token可能需要的对象级和区域级证据，导致检索性能下降。
AI.method: SaMer是一种对象感知的token合并框架，在训练中利用对象标注作为合并先验以避免跨实例混合，仅微调共享投影层，冻结视觉和语言骨干网络；推理时不需真实边界框或检测器。
AI.result: 在K=64时，SaMer移除超93%图像侧token，ColPali存储减少16.09倍，并在Flickr30K和MSCOCO上提升R@1；同时增强短语级定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 高效的多向量检索不仅依赖减少token数量，更关键的是保留查询token可选择的对象级证据；SaMer验证了对象感知压缩的有效性。

title: Strouhal-Aware Model Predictive Control for Efficient Multi-Fin Flapping Locomotion
comment: Accepted by IEEE Journal of Oceanic Engineering
summary: Efficient flapping propulsion hinges on operating within a narrow Strouhal number window, a principle nature has converged upon for maximum thrust-to-power ratio. We translate this bioinspired empirical rule into real-time control, demonstrating it on an autonomous underwater vehicle driven by four soft fins. The proposed Strouhal-aware Model Predictive Control (MPC) enhances a quasi-steady hydrodynamic model with an explicit penalty for Strouhal deviation, solving the resulting nonconvex problem via a two-stage sampling and gradient optimization that runs onboard at 25 Hz. Pool and field trials show that the controller keeps each fin within the optimal Strouhal corridor (0.25-0.35) while precisely tracking commanded forces. This results in a mean reduction in mechanical power of 8.8\% to 32\% throughout the cruising range of 0.1 to 0.3 m/s. The proposed method also allows for a velocity of 0.4 m/s, which is unattainable for a baseline of the conventional inverse model. The results confirm that embedding first-principle flow physics into an MPC objective yields tangible endurance gains without sacrificing agility, offering a generic pathway to energy-aware locomotion in next-generation multifin robots.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于斯特劳哈尔数（Strouhal number）优化的模型预测控制（MPC）方法，用于四软鳍自主水下机器人，实现实时高效推进与能耗降低。
AI.motivation: 受自然界高效扑翼推进中斯特劳哈尔数窗口（0.25–0.35）启发，旨在提升水下机器人推进效率与续航能力。
AI.method: 提出斯特劳哈尔感知的MPC控制器，在准稳态水动力模型中显式加入斯特劳哈尔偏差惩罚项；采用两阶段采样与梯度优化求解非凸问题，支持机载25 Hz实时运行。
AI.result: 实验表明该控制器使各鳍稳定运行于最优斯特劳哈尔区间，力跟踪精度高；巡航速度0.1–0.3 m/s下机械功率降低8.8%–32%，并实现0.4 m/s基准无法达到的速度。
AI.conclusion: 将流体力学第一性原理嵌入MPC目标函数，可在不牺牲机动性的前提下显著提升续航，为多鳍机器人提供通用节能运动控制范式。

title: From Gentlemen to Frontiermen: Masculine Formations in English-Language Fiction (1771--1930)
summary: Masculinity in nineteenth-century fiction is not a single ideal but a field of competing scripts. Drawing on 150 British and American canonical novels from the txtLAB Novel450 corpus, published between 1771 and 1930, this paper examines the changing relative prominence of competing models of masculine authority. To focus the analysis on masculine characterisation, the study extracts male-character-centred text windows by using coreference resolution to group names, nominal mentions, and pronouns into character-specific reference chains. It then fits an unsupervised structural topic model with publication year and author gender as topic-prevalence covariates. The model identifies six distinct masculine formations: aristocratic-chivalric, Christian manhood, gentlemanly respectability, country squire, professional-commercial, and imperial/adventure. Across the corpus, formations tied to inherited rank and sacred authority decline, while those organised around paid work and adventure rise. The largest increase occurs not in professional-commercial breadwinning but in imperial/adventure masculinity, particularly the frontier-wilderness register. The trajectory points to a reallocation from inherited and sacred status towards achieved, commercial, and expansionary forms of masculine authority. Adventurous and commercial formations are also more prevalent in novels by authors recorded as male. Because these formations emerge without a seeded vocabulary yet align with categories established in independent scholarship, the article offers a reproducible method for measuring the reorganisation of gendered authority across the long nineteenth century.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析1771–1930年间150部英美经典小说，利用无监督结构主题模型识别出六种男性气质类型，发现十九世纪男性权威从世袭与神圣向成就、商业与扩张型转变，尤其帝国/冒险型增长最显著；方法基于共指消解与主题建模，结果具可复现性且与既有研究吻合。
AI.motivation: 探究十九世纪小说中男性气质并非单一理想，而是多种竞争性脚本的动态场域，旨在量化其历史演变及社会权威重构。
AI.method: 基于txtLAB Novel450语料库，使用共指消解提取男性角色中心文本片段，构建以出版年份和作者性别为协变量的无监督结构主题模型。
AI.result: 识别出六类男性气质：贵族骑士型、基督教男子气概、绅士体面型、乡绅型、职业商业型、帝国/冒险型；前两类衰落，后两类上升，尤以帝国/冒险型（特别是边疆-荒野维度）增幅最大；男性作者更倾向书写冒险与商业型气质。
AI.conclusion: 十九世纪男性权威经历系统性重配置，从世袭与神圣地位转向以成就、职业实践和地理/文化扩张为基础的新形态，该变化可通过计算方法稳健测度。

title: Evaluating Intellectual Property Guardrails of Generative Image Models: A Technical Report
summary: Generative image models are capable of producing images that bear a strong resemblance to, or replicate, recognizable intellectual property (IP). In this technical report, we present a benchmark and automated evaluation pipeline to test for evidence of IP guardrails in generative image models along with the propensity for these models to generate images with recognizable IP. The IP categories we tested include fictional characters, celebrity likeness, and commercial logos and do not encompass the full range of IP which may be implicated by image generation models. We evaluated fourteen widely used text-to-image models, including three self-hosted open weights models and eleven private models. While all of the private models were observed to refuse generations at some level due to IP guardrails, the frequency of generation refusals varied substantially among models. The refusal rates also varied considerably across the different IP categories tested. Commercial logos were refused least frequently and were successfully generated at the highest rate, on average. Though the rate varies, all models tested readily generated images containing recognizable IP as of March 2026.

AI.tldr: 本技术报告构建了一个基准和自动化评估流程，用于测试生成式图像模型中知识产权（IP）保护机制的有效性，并评估其生成可识别IP内容的倾向；研究涵盖14个主流文本到图像模型，发现所有私有模型均存在一定程度的IP拒答机制，但拒答率在不同模型及IP类别（虚构角色、名人肖像、商业标志）间差异显著，其中商业标志被成功生成的比例最高，所有模型在2026年3月前仍普遍存在生成可识别IP内容的现象。
AI.motivation: 评估生成式图像模型对知识产权（IP）的保护能力，识别其生成可识别IP内容（如虚构角色、名人肖像、商业标志）的风险，以推动负责任的AI部署。
AI.method: 构建包含虚构角色、名人肖像和商业标志三类IP的基准测试集，设计自动化评估流水线，对14个文本到图像模型（3个开源自托管模型+11个私有模型）进行系统性测试，统计各模型在不同IP类别下的生成拒绝率与成功生成率。
AI.result: 所有私有模型均表现出一定IP拒答行为，但拒答率差异大；商业标志被拒绝最少、生成成功率最高；截至2026年3月，所有测试模型仍能较容易生成含可识别IP的图像。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流生成式图像模型虽内置IP保护机制，但其有效性有限且不均衡，亟需更鲁棒、细粒度的IP合规策略与标准化评估框架。

title: Dynamic Regret for Non-Stationary Linear Bandits via Misspecification Reductions
summary: Many online decision-making problems involve both round-specific feasible actions and drifting reward models: eligible ad impressions, feasible prices, and available treatments can change over time, while user preferences, demand curves, and patient responses may evolve. Motivated by these applications, we study non-stationary linear bandits with round-specific feasible decision sets. Existing methods that obtain the optimal \(\widetilde O(T^{2/3}P_T^{1/3})\) dependence, where \(P_T\) is the path length of the reward-parameter sequence, impose an orthogonal-structure assumption on round-specific decision sets, which can be restrictive in contextual applications. We address this gap through a unified misspecification-reduction viewpoint: after partitioning the horizon into blocks, we relate each block's dynamic regret to regret against a fixed-parameter linear bandit benchmark, with the within-block parameter drift entering as bounded misspecification. Restarting algorithms with misspecification-dependent regret guarantees then yields the optimal \(T^{2/3}P_T^{1/3}\) dynamic-regret dependence for both linear bandits with general compact decision sets and \(K\)-armed contextual linear bandits.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有轮次特定可行决策集的非平稳线性赌博机问题，提出了一种基于误设减少视角的统一方法，在无需正交结构假设下实现了最优的动态遗憾界 $\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3}P_T^{1/3})$。
AI.motivation: 现实在线决策问题（如广告投放、定价、医疗干预）中，每轮可行动作集和奖励模型均随时间漂移，需研究适配此类非平稳性的线性赌博机算法。
AI.method: 采用分块策略，将时间划分为若干块；在每块内将动态遗憾转化为对固定参数线性赌博机基准的遗憾，并将块内参数漂移视为有界误设；结合具有误设依赖遗憾保证的重启算法。
AI.result: 在一般紧致决策集和K臂上下文线性赌博机两种设定下，均实现了最优的 $T^{2/3}P_T^{1/3}$ 动态遗憾界，且无需现有方法所需的正交结构假设。
AI.conclusion: 该统一误设减少框架有效克服了原有方法对决策集结构的限制，拓展了非平稳线性赌博机理论的适用范围与实用性。

title: When Aggregate Alignment Misleads: Auditing Policy Repair Without Per-State Expert Actions
summary: Agentic AI systems are increasingly used to edit, refine, and repair decision policies, but evaluating these edits is difficult when per-state expert action labels are unavailable. We study this problem in a hotel-pricing simulator where an agentic policy editor receives only region-level diagnostic feedback: summaries of how its price distribution differs from a benchmark policy across time, inventory, and market regions. The editor cannot observe benchmark actions, benchmark source code, reward numbers, or held-out outcomes, and may only propose constrained edits to a target-action table. On 5,000 held-out episodes, a multi-restart LLM editor reaches RevPAR 108.47 (95% CI 107.61 - 109.34), close to the benchmark policy's 108.75 (107.81 - 109.68), with paired gap (LLM minus benchmark) -0.276 and 95% CI [-0.692, 0.146]. A cheap diagnostic projection already recovers much of the revenue (107.90), so the LLM editor's distinctive gain is not raw revenue lift alone: it also reduces episode composition distance from 1.153 to 0.609. This is the strongest non-benchmark repair result. This profile is not explained by restart search alone: non-semantic proposers with up to 2,500 evaluations fall 8.77 - 14.57 RevPAR points short. Nor is it explained by plausible prompt format: a shuffled-diagnostic control breaks region-error correspondence and falls to RevPAR 94.30. The match is genuine but partial. A tree editor achieves stronger pooled alignment, 0.214 versus 0.266, and stronger reference-state D1, 0.328 versus 1.197, yet revenue falls to 98.91. These results show that agentic policy repair should be evaluated by whether diagnostic feedback becomes reliable closed-loop outcome, not by a single behavioral distance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在缺乏逐状态专家动作标签的情况下，如何评估基于诊断反馈的智能体策略编辑器（如LLM）对酒店定价策略的修复效果；提出了一种仅依赖区域级诊断反馈（而非精确奖励或动作标签）的策略编辑框架，并通过实验证明多重启LLM编辑器能在RevPAR和策略分布对齐上接近基准策略，但需兼顾诊断反馈的闭环可靠性而非单一行为距离指标。
AI.motivation: 现有Agentic AI系统在编辑决策策略时面临评估难题，尤其当无法获得逐状态专家动作标签时；本文旨在探索仅依靠粗粒度、区域级诊断反馈（如价格分布差异摘要）进行策略修复与评估的可行性。
AI.method: 在酒店定价模拟器中设计受限策略编辑任务：编辑器仅接收时间-库存-市场区域维度的诊断反馈，不可见基准动作、源码、奖励或结果，仅能对目标动作表做约束修改；采用多重启LLM编辑器与对照组（随机搜索、乱序诊断提示、树编辑器）进行对比实验。
AI.result: 多重启LLM编辑器在5000个测试集上达到RevPAR 108.47（95% CI: 107.61–109.34），接近基准策略108.75；其核心优势不仅在于收入提升，更显著降低 episode 组成距离（从1.153→0.609）；而单纯重启搜索或错误提示格式均导致性能大幅下降；树编辑器虽在分布对齐上更强，但RevPAR显著下降至98.91。
AI.conclusion: Agentic策略修复的有效性不应仅以单一行为距离（如策略相似性）衡量，而应考察诊断反馈是否真正转化为可靠的闭环结果；本文验证了在弱监督条件下，LLM编辑器可通过结构化诊断反馈实现高质量策略修复，但对齐与收益存在权衡。

title: GDPR-Aware Trajectory Sharing for ISAC-Assisted Robot Navigation: A Case Study on FID-Constrained Collision Prediction
summary: Integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) enables intelligent wireless infrastructure but raises growing regulatory concern as fine-grained personal trajectory histories become a byproduct of sensing. General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) Articles 5(1)(c) and 5(1)(f) require that personal data be limited to what is necessary and protected through appropriate technical measures against unauthorised reconstruction. This paper addresses both requirements through a Fisher information density (FID)-constrained trajectory sharing scheme for robot collision avoidance, where sensing estimates are perturbed according to local information content before sharing. Experiments on real pedestrian traces show that FID-controlled sharing achieves a strictly better privacy-utility tradeoff than fixed-error perturbation: at matched missed-conflict rates, reconstruction leakage and sustained exposure lengths are consistently lower, establishing information-aware perturbation as a principled technical measure aligned with GDPR data minimisation and integrity requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于费舍尔信息密度（FID）约束的轨迹共享方案，用于机器人避碰，通过根据局部信息内容对感知估计进行扰动，以满足GDPR的数据最小化与完整性要求。实验表明，该方法在隐私-效用权衡上优于固定误差扰动。
AI.motivation: ISAC系统在提供智能无线基础设施的同时，产生精细的个人轨迹历史，引发日益增长的监管担忧；GDPR第5(1)(c)和5(1)(f)条要求个人数据应限于必要范围，并通过适当技术措施防止未经授权的重建。
AI.method: 提出一种Fisher信息密度（FID）约束的轨迹共享机制，在机器人避碰场景中，依据本地信息内容对感知估计施加扰动后再共享。
AI.result: 在真实行人轨迹数据上的实验表明，相比固定误差扰动，FID控制的共享在相同漏检冲突率下，显著降低了轨迹重建泄露量和持续暴露时长。
AI.conclusion: 信息感知扰动是一种符合GDPR数据最小化与完整性原则的原理性技术措施。

title: From Judgments to Issues: Structured Extraction of Legal Reasoning with Citation-Hallucination Control
summary: We present an automated pipeline that decomposes Italian tax-court judgments into individual legal issues and extracts, for each issue, a structured XML representation grounded in the IRAC framework and the legal syllogism. The pipeline targets a corpus of approximately $330{,}000$ first- and second-instance decisions of the Italian tax courts and is built around a capable yet cost-efficient general-purpose model (DeepSeek V3), a choice driven by the need to process several hundred thousand documents at a sustainable cost. To address the well-documented unreliability of large language models on legal citations, we couple the extraction step with an automatic hallucination-detection filter that compares the references produced by the model with those identified in the judgment text by a dedicated parser (Linkoln), normalised to standard identifiers (URN-NIR, ECLI, CELEX). We validate the pipeline on $50$ judgments annotated by two PhDs in tax law, computing inter-annotator agreement and LLM-vs-expert agreement on both issue extraction and legal citations, together with a stand-alone evaluation of the hallucination filter. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first issue-level, expert-validated structured extraction pipeline with hallucination control for Italian tax-court decisions, and it provides a concrete starting point for downstream applications such as issue-level retrieval, citation-network analysis, and the construction of large-scale datasets of legal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化管道，用于将意大利税务法院判决分解为独立法律问题，并依据IRAC框架和法律三段论提取结构化XML表示；采用DeepSeek V3模型实现高性价比处理，并结合基于Linkoln解析器的幻觉检测机制确保引文准确性；在50份专家标注判决上验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决大型语言模型在法律引文上的不可靠性问题，同时以可持续成本处理数十万份意大利税务法院判决，实现法律问题级别的结构化抽取与验证。
AI.method: 构建基于DeepSeek V3的自动化管道，结合Linkoln解析器进行引文标准化（URN-NIR/ECLI/CELEX），并设计幻觉检测过滤器比对模型输出与原文引文；在50份由两位税法博士标注的判决上评估问题抽取、引文准确性和幻觉检测效果。
AI.result: 实现了首个经过专家验证、具备幻觉控制能力的意大利税务法院判决问题级结构化抽取管道，在问题抽取与引文识别上达到较高专家一致性，并验证了幻觉检测模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该管道为法律问题级检索、引文网络分析及大规模法律推理数据集构建提供了可靠基础，是面向意大利税法文本的大规模结构化处理的开创性工作。

title: RotateAttention: RoPE-Aware Rotation and Range Rectification for INT4 Quantized Attention in Video Generation
summary: In \textbf{DiT-based video generation models equipped with 3D Rotary Position Embeddings (3D RoPE)}, the attention mechanism remains a primary computational bottleneck due to its quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length. While quantized \textbf{FlashAttention} offers a promising path toward hardware acceleration, existing low-bit quantization methods overlook two critical challenges in this setting: \textbf{1)} applying online rotation matrices -- a widely used technique for mitigating outliers in Queries ($Q$) and Keys ($K$) -- is difficult to reconcile with \textbf{RoPE}; and \textbf{2)} the non-negative attention matrix $P = \exp(QK - \max(QK))$ makes symmetric quantization waste half of the 4-bit dynamic range. In this work, we observe that the outlier distributions of $Q$ and $K$ are strongly affected by the dimensional partitioning of \textbf{3D RoPE}. Based on this finding, we propose \textbf{RotateAttention}, an efficient \textbf{mixed-precision INT4 FlashAttention} framework tailored for \textbf{DiT-based video generation models with 3D RoPE}, using selective \textbf{FP16 fallback} for accuracy-sensitive attention blocks and denoising steps. RotateAttention introduces two core techniques: \textbf{1) RoPE-aware Rotation}, which employs either mergeable rotation matrices that can be fused into RoPE or negligible-overhead matrices to mitigate RoPE-induced outliers in $Q$ and $K$; and \textbf{2) Range-optimized $P$ Quantization}, which uses fixed scales and zero-points to fully exploit the \textbf{INT4 numerical range} with minimal computational overhead. Experiments show that \textbf{RotateAttention} preserves video generation quality nearly identical to full-precision baselines while achieving up to 1.68$\times$ end-to-end speedup and 2.2$\times$ kernel-level acceleration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RotateAttention，一种专为3D RoPE增强的DiT视频生成模型设计的混合精度INT4 FlashAttention框架，通过RoPE感知旋转和范围优化的P量化，在几乎不损失生成质量的前提下实现显著加速。
AI.motivation: 现有低比特FlashAttention在3D RoPE视频生成模型中面临两大挑战：1）在线旋转矩阵难以与RoPE兼容；2）非负注意力矩阵P导致对称量化浪费INT4动态范围。
AI.method: 提出RotateAttention框架，包含两项核心技术：1）RoPE感知旋转——融合可合并或低开销旋转矩阵以缓解RoPE引起的Q/K离群值；2）范围优化的P量化——采用固定缩放因子和零点，充分高效利用INT4数值范围。同时引入FP16选择性回退机制保障关键模块精度。
AI.result: 实验表明RotateAttention在保持视频生成质量几乎与全精度基线一致的同时，实现最高1.68×端到端加速和2.2×内核级加速。
AI.conclusion: RotateAttention有效解决了3D RoPE下低比特Attention的适配难题，为高效视频生成提供了实用且高性能的量化方案。

title: Variable Bit-width Quantization: Learning Per-Group Precision for "Bigger-but-Smaller" Language Models
summary: Low-bit quantization shrinks language models but treats precision as a single global hyper-parameter: every weight uses the same bit-width. We introduce Variable Bit-width Quantization (VBQ), a training-time method in which each contiguous group of 64 weights learns its own resolution from {1,2,4,8} bits via a Gumbel-Softmax relaxation, trained jointly by an alternating optimization that gives the precision logits a clean, task-aligned signal. VBQ discovers a consistent, strongly heterogeneous allocation within individual projection types, not merely across layers, impossible to express with per-layer methods: 69% of groups collapse to 1 bit, the LM head averages 1.09 bits, while the first MLP block keeps ~2.5 bits. This pattern is stable enough to freeze into a fixed recipe and reuse without further search. The recipe yields a "bigger-but-smaller" regime: a 131M model at 1.82 mean bits reaches perplexity 4.2 on TinyStories, beating a 55M FP16 model (PPL 4.4) at 3.8x less storage, and lets a 1.46B model on FineWeb-Edu match a 593M FP16 control at ~3.7x less storage with 2.5x more parameters. As quality-per-byte, VBQ is 3.9-8.4x more efficient than FP16. The recipe maps directly to packed low-bit storage, so it also accelerates inference: with custom fused dequantize-and-multiply kernels, memory-bandwidth-bound autoregressive decode is faster at equal output, and the speedup grows with scale (parity at 131M, 1.9x at 1.0B, 4.7x at 9B on Apple silicon). A distributional analysis (KL divergence and argmax-flip rate) reveals a striking mechanism: deeper layers progressively self-heal the quantization error injected by early layers. The win is a from-scratch, train-time phenomenon; scaling the search economically beyond 1.5B parameters remains open. VBQ reframes precision as a learnable, non-uniform resource and shows that spending a fixed bit budget unevenly beats spending it uniformly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可变位宽量化（VBQ）方法，让每个64权重组动态学习最优位宽（1/2/4/8 bit），实现细粒度、任务对齐的精度分配，在存储和推理效率上显著超越固定位宽量化和FP16。
AI.motivation: 传统低比特量化将精度设为全局超参，忽略不同权重组对精度的实际需求差异，导致压缩与性能间权衡不佳。
AI.method: VBQ在训练中引入Gumbel-Softmax松弛，使每个64权重组从{1,2,4,8}bit中学习最优位宽；采用交替优化，为精度logits提供任务对齐的梯度信号；最终提炼出冻结的位宽分配规则并支持直接打包存储与定制核加速。
AI.result: 在TinyStories和FineWeb-Edu上，VBQ以更低平均位宽（如1.82b）超越更大FP16模型（如131M vs 55M）；存储减少3.7–3.8×，质量-字节效率提升3.9–8.4×；推理速度随规模增长（9B模型达4.7×加速）；分析揭示深层自修复量化误差机制。
AI.conclusion: 精度应作为可学习、非均匀资源进行分配；不均匀分配固定比特预算优于均匀分配；VBQ为训练时端到端低比特大模型提供了新范式。

title: From Mobile Data to Business Insights: An End-to-End Analytics Framework for Large-Scale Urban Mobility Analysis and Decision Support
summary: Real time location data derived from mobile applications is a powerful tool for addressing various urban challenges, including tourism planning, parking management, bus route optimization, and resource allocation. Besides, it offers invaluable insights for shaping strategic decisions in commercial domains such as location based services, market share analysis, and behavioral profiling. In this expansive study, we aim to address all of the aforementioned challenges by investigating the behaviors and patterns of smartphone users within urban environments, particularly in the domains of tourism, transportation, and retail. Our approach encompasses the development of a sophisticated data platform from inception to implementation, which includes the formulation of use cases, architectural design, and implementation of modules. We employ state of the art techniques and technologies, including data anonymization, ETL pipelines, and utilizing Google BigQuery and Vertex AI for data processing and machine learning model development. A modular architecture based on reusable analytical building blocks was developed to generate data products that support multiple stakeholder driven use cases. Additionally, we apply interactive data visualization techniques via Power BI to facilitate the effective interpretation of analytical findings by stakeholders. The developed models address a wide range of mobility analytics tasks, including mobility profiling, frequent trajectory mining, area of influence analysis, traffic anomaly detection, and origin destination pattern analysis. The results demonstrate the framework's ability to capture user mobility dynamics at fine spatial and temporal resolutions, providing actionable insights for urban planning and strategic business decision making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于移动应用实时定位数据的城市智能分析框架，涵盖数据平台构建、隐私保护、ETL处理、机器学习建模（使用Google BigQuery与Vertex AI）及Power BI可视化，支持旅游、交通与零售等多场景应用。
AI.motivation: 利用手机实时位置数据解决城市规划（如旅游、停车、公交优化）和商业决策（如LBS、市场分析、行为画像）中的关键挑战。
AI.method: 构建端到端数据平台，包括用例设计、模块化架构、数据脱敏、ETL流程、BigQuery与Vertex AI驱动的机器学习建模，以及Power BI交互式可视化；采用可复用分析组件支持多利益相关方需求。
AI.result: 成功实现细粒度时空分辨率下的用户移动动态建模，完成移动画像、频繁轨迹挖掘、影响区分析、交通异常检测与OD模式分析等任务，产出可落地的城市与商业决策支持数据产品。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具备高扩展性与实用性，验证了实时位置数据在跨领域城市治理与商业智能中的核心价值，为同类项目提供了可复用的技术范式。

title: Invisible Strings: Deriving Puppetry Principles and their Hidden Connections to Robot Behavior Design
summary: When designing robots' nonverbal behaviors, many researchers have turned to arts-based insights, such as Disney's Animation Principles. Yet, while these principles bear key insights into the design of like-life characters, their application to robot design is inherently limited, in part because animation is not constrained by real-world physics, and in part because animation principles focus on low level animation mechanics and not high-level design considerations for physically embodied, interactive characters. In contrast, little attention has been paid to art forms like puppetry, despite their long history of exploring morphological, behavior, and interaction design of physically embodied, interactive characters. As such, in this work we leverage puppetry texts and practicing puppeteers' expert knowledge knowledge to derive a set of puppetry principles with key insights for robot design. As we show, these insights go beyond -- and uniquely complement -- the prior insights provided by theater, dance, and animation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过借鉴木偶戏的艺术实践和专家知识，提出了一套适用于物理实体、交互式机器人设计的木偶戏设计原则，弥补了动画原理在机器人非言语行为设计中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于动画原理（如迪士尼动画原则）的机器人非言语行为设计存在局限：动画不受物理约束，且聚焦于低层动画机制，缺乏对具身交互角色的高层设计考量；而历史悠久、专精于具身互动角色设计的木偶戏却被忽视。
AI.method: 系统梳理木偶戏相关文献，并结合实践木偶师的专家知识，提炼出一套面向机器人设计的木偶戏原则。
AI.result: 提出了一套源自木偶戏的、具有实践指导意义的设计原则，其洞察力超越并独特地补充了戏剧、舞蹈和动画等领域已有原则。
AI.conclusion: 木偶戏为机器人非言语行为设计提供了被长期忽视但极具价值的艺术范式与设计智慧，应成为人机交互与机器人行为设计的重要理论资源。

title: Efficient Decentralized Multi-task Dataset Valuation via Model Merging
summary: Accurate and efficient dataset valuation is essential for enabling fair and transparent data marketplaces, especially when multiple contributors provide data for training multi-task models. Most existing valuation methods, however, are limited to single-task settings, overlooking scenarios where a buyer aims to optimize performance across multiple downstream tasks. Moreover, traditional valuation approaches, such as Shapley-based or retraining-based methods, are computationally expensive and poorly suited for decentralized environments without a trusted central coordinator and with strict privacy constraints. We propose DMVM (Decentralized Multi-task Valuation via Model Merging), a novel framework that bypasses retraining and data sharing by leveraging task arithmetic to infer dataset contributions directly from model combinations. Instead of retraining or sharing raw data, DMVM quantifies how models trained on different datasets combine in parameter space to infer each dataset's marginal utility across multiple tasks. This formulation yields a valuation process that is scalable, computationally efficient, and explicitly aligned with multi-task generalization behavior. To support decentralized deployment, we introduce a secure aggregation protocol that enables collaborative valuation without revealing individual model parameters or private data. We also provide theoretical error bounds characterizing the approximation quality of DMVM and validate our framework through comprehensive experiments on computer vision and natural language processing tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMVM框架，用于在多任务学习场景下高效、去中心化地评估数据集价值，无需重新训练或共享原始数据，通过模型合并和任务算术直接推断各数据集对多任务性能的边际贡献。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集估值方法大多局限于单任务设置，且计算开销大、难以适应无可信中心节点和强隐私约束的去中心化环境，无法满足多任务数据市场公平透明的需求。
AI.method: 提出DMVM（Decentralized Multi-task Valuation via Model Merging），利用任务算术在参数空间中组合各数据集训练的模型，避免重训练与数据共享；设计安全聚合协议实现去中心化协作估值，并提供理论误差界。
AI.result: DMVM在计算机视觉和自然语言处理多任务实验中验证了其可扩展性、计算高效性及对多任务泛化行为的良好对齐；安全聚合机制保障了模型参数与数据隐私。
AI.conclusion: DMVM为去中心化多任务数据市场提供了首个兼顾效率、隐私与多任务适配性的数据集估值框架，突破了传统Shapley或重训练方法的局限。

title: Reliability-Aware CT-MRI Registration: A Quality Engineering Framework with Stability Analysis and Risk Classification
summary: Multimodal CT-MRI registration is central to image-guided radiotherapy, surgical navigation, and diagnostic workflows, but most pipelines report only aggregate quality metrics without per-case reliability signals.
