We propose a reliability-aware framework that converts registration quality into Green/Yellow/Red risk categories using data-learned thresholds. CT images were registered to T1-weighted MRI using rigid and affine transformations on 90 paired slices from 18 patients across brain, abdominal, and neck anatomies. Reliability was assessed using Delta NMI, Delta SSIM, Dice overlap, registration stability, and inverse consistency error, combined into a single score R. Thresholds learned from training patients were applied unchanged to held-out test patients. Affine registration outperformed rigid registration on NMI and SSIM, yielding 44% Green classifications versus 33% for rigid. Reliability-filtered registrations improved the average alignment profile compared with unfiltered methods. Per-anatomy analysis showed substantial variation, with stronger reliability for abdominal registrations than brain registrations. Weight sensitivity analysis identified Dice overlap as the dominant reliability component. The proposed framework provides an interpretable quality-control layer for multimodal registration, while risk thresholds reflect statistical rather than clinical validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向可靠性的多模态CT-MRI配准质量评估框架，通过数据驱动的阈值将配准质量划分为绿/黄/红三级风险，并在不同解剖部位验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有配准流程仅报告整体质量指标，缺乏逐例可靠性信号，难以满足临床决策对配准可信度的需求。
AI.method: 基于90对来自18名患者的CT-T1 MRI切片（涵盖脑、腹部、颈部），采用刚性和仿射配准；构建包含Delta NMI、Delta SSIM、Dice重叠、配准稳定性与逆一致性误差的综合可靠性评分R，并通过训练数据学习Green/Yellow/Red分类阈值。
AI.result: 仿射配准Green分类率达44%，高于刚性配准的33%；可靠性筛选后的配准显著提升平均对齐性能；腹部配准可靠性优于脑部；Dice重叠是主导的可靠性指标。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多模态配准提供了可解释的质量控制层，但当前风险阈值基于统计学习而非临床验证，尚需进一步临床标定。

title: Bootstrap Flow-Map Tree Sampling Enables Online Feedback Driven Search
summary: In many scientific and engineering domains, maximizing discovery within a limited sampling budget demands strategic, observation-guided exploration. While generative models have enabled training-free reward alignment, current methods typically excel in local searches within narrow regions of the underlying distribution. These approaches struggle when preferences are unknown a priori and only revealed through sequential feedback-a scenario demanding broad exploration to uncover high-utility regions. To address this, we introduce Bootstrap Flow-Map-Tree (a.k.a BFMT), a novel computationally efficient sampling framework designed for history-aware global search and alignment under sampling budget constraints. BFMT enables full tree-path construction from any tree depth using a single function evaluation, drastically reducing computational overhead while providing critical foresight for sequential sampling. By enabling dynamic transition time steps scheduling, BFMT efficiently allocates its sampling budget, smoothly transitioning from broad global exploration to fine-grained local refinement of high-utility modes discovered through exploration. Extensive experiments and ablations across diverse search and alignment tasks demonstrate that BFMT substantially outperforms baseline approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bootstrap Flow-Map-Tree（BFMT）的新采样框架，用于在有限采样预算下进行历史感知的全局搜索与奖励对齐，兼具高效计算与动态探索-利用权衡能力。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型虽支持无训练奖励对齐，但多局限于局部搜索；当偏好未知且仅通过序贯反馈揭示时，需更广域探索以发现高价值区域。
AI.method: 提出BFMT框架，通过单次函数评估即可构建任意深度的完整树路径，支持动态时间步调度，在全局探索与局部精调间自适应分配采样预算。
AI.result: 在多种搜索与对齐任务上的实验和消融研究表明，BFMT显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: BFMT是一种高效、灵活且可扩展的采样策略，适用于偏好未知、预算受限的序贯决策场景。

title: Efficient bias mitigation in T2I diffusion models using Concept Graphs
summary: Text-to-Image diffusion models often propagate harmful bias inherited from the training data. Existing bias mitigation techniques typically intervene only at the text encoder or provide inference-time guidance, often leading to generations that collapse into semantically incoherent outputs. To address these limitations, we introduce CO-ALIGN (Concept Ontology Alignment), a novel bias mitigation approach based on concept-graph alignment that operates on the model's internal concept ontology. By aligning concepts within the text encoder and denoiser, CO-ALIGN achieves substantial bias reduction while preserving generative integrity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of concept-graph alignment across three paradigms: text-encoders, denoisers and joint text-denoiser ontology alignment. CO-ALIGN outperforms the state of the art, improving fairness by $30\%$, $ΔFID=11.4$ in image quality, $2.8\%$ in image fidelity, all while reducing semantically incoherent outputs by $88\%$. Beyond bias mitigation, we show that CO-ALIGN benefits other downstream tasks as well. In particular, our experiments demonstrate that better-aligned internal ontologies enhance concept unlearning robustness across multiple unlearning techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CO-ALIGN方法，通过在文本编码器与去噪器内部概念本体间进行概念图对齐，有效缓解文生图扩散模型中的偏见问题，在提升公平性的同时保持图像质量与语义一致性，并增强概念遗忘等下游任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有文生图扩散模型易继承训练数据中的有害偏见，而当前偏见缓解方法多局限于文本编码器干预或推理时引导，常导致生成结果语义失真。
AI.method: 提出CO-ALIGN（Concept Ontology Alignment），基于概念图对齐技术，在模型内部概念本体层面（文本编码器、去噪器及二者联合）进行对齐，实现偏见缓解。
AI.result: 相比SOTA方法，公平性提升30%，FID下降11.4，图像保真度提升2.8%，语义不一致输出减少88%；同时提升概念遗忘任务的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CO-ALIGN是一种兼顾偏见缓解与生成质量的有效方法，其核心在于模型内部概念本体的对齐，具有泛化性和可扩展性。

title: Beyond Post-Quantization: Native Hash Learning with a Dedicated HASH Token
summary: Efficient large-scale image retrieval requires compact representations that preserve semantic similarity under fast Hamming-space search. Deep hashing is appealing, but most existing CNN- and ViT-based methods still follow a post-quantization paradigm, where continuous visual features are first learned and binary codes are then produced by a terminal hash projection or binarization operation. This late code generation creates a feature-to-code discrepancy between the continuously optimized representation space and the discrete Hamming space used for retrieval. To address this limitation, we propose HashViT, a Vision Transformer framework for native hash token learning. Instead of treating hashing as a terminal readout, HashViT introduces a dedicated HASH token that serves as a persistent, hash-oriented retrieval state inside the transformer. The HASH token is structurally decomposed into a Hash Register for direct binary code generation and a Semantic Workspace for preserving auxiliary continuous semantics. To enable effective workspace-to-register interaction, we further design a lightweight Hash Refinement Adapter that progressively refines the Hash Register across transformer layers. As a result, binary-oriented representations are formed through token evolution within the backbone, rather than being abruptly induced by an output-level projection. HashViT is optimized with a unified objective that combines learnable semantic center supervision, class-token similarity distillation, and quantization regularization, encouraging the HASH token to encode semantically structured and compact binary representations. Extensive experiments on three widely used benchmarks demonstrate that HashViT achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive retrieval performance while preserving the efficiency of compact Hamming codes. Code is available at https://github.com/Xinze919/HashViT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HashViT，一种基于ViT的原生哈希令牌学习框架，通过引入专用HASH token及其结构化分解（Hash Register与Semantic Workspace），结合轻量级Hash Refinement Adapter，在Transformer主干中逐步演化生成二值化表示，从而弥合连续特征空间与离散汉明空间之间的鸿沟，实现高效且语义结构化的图像检索。
AI.motivation: 现有深度哈希方法多采用后量化范式，导致连续优化的特征空间与离散汉明检索空间之间存在特征-码不一致问题。
AI.method: 提出HashViT框架：引入专用HASH token，将其分解为用于直接生成二进制码的Hash Register和保留辅助连续语义的Semantic Workspace；设计轻量级Hash Refinement Adapter实现跨层渐进式精炼；采用融合可学习语义中心监督、类别token相似性蒸馏与量化正则化的统一目标进行端到端优化。
AI.result: 在三个主流基准数据集上达到SOTA或极具竞争力的检索性能，同时保持紧凑汉明码的高效率。
AI.conclusion: HashViT通过在Transformer内部原生学习哈希令牌，有效解决了后量化范式下的特征-码失配问题，实现了语义结构化、紧凑高效的图像检索。

title: U-Joint CAAMS: Experimental Evaluation of a Universal-Joint Continuum Manipulator for Aerial Manipulation
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems 2026
summary: Continuum manipulators mounted on multi-rotor UAVs enable compliant aerial manipulation, but payloads and propeller downwash amplify out-of-plane bending and twisting that degrade end-effector pose accuracy. To address this problem, we present a universal-joint-based continuum manipulator designed to improve resistance to out-of-plane deformation during aerial manipulation. The proposed design uses a tubular backbone with spring-reinforced universal joints and an integrated conduit for internal routing and fluid delivery. We evaluate the design in still air and under peak propeller downwash across varying payloads, and benchmark it against a prior Nitinol-backbone CM. Bench tests show improved resistance to out-of-plane deformation across all conditions. Under peak downwash, the proposed design reduces mean error by 2.5-4x in yaw, 2-45x in y-axis, and up to 5x in roll compared to the NiTi-backbone design. We further analyze hover stability through in-flight coupled-disturbance tests over varying payloads and actuation speeds, and demonstrate the system in water sampling, spot spraying, and object transport.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于万向节的连续体机械臂设计，以增强在多旋翼无人机上进行空中操作时抵抗非平面变形（弯曲和扭转）的能力，显著提升了末端执行器的姿态精度。
AI.motivation: 连续体机械臂安装在多旋翼无人机上可实现柔顺的空中操作，但负载和螺旋桨下洗气流会加剧非平面弯曲和扭转，从而降低末端执行器位姿精度。
AI.method: 提出一种基于万向节的连续体机械臂设计，采用管状骨架、弹簧增强型万向节及集成导管（用于内部布线和流体输送）。在静止空气和峰值螺旋桨下洗气流下，针对不同负载进行了评估，并与先前的镍钛合金骨架连续体机械臂进行基准对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，该设计在所有测试条件下均表现出更优的非平面变形抵抗能力；在峰值下洗气流下，相比镍钛合金骨架设计，偏航（yaw）、y轴和横滚（roll）方向的平均误差分别减少2.5–4倍、2–45倍和最多5倍；飞行耦合扰动测试验证了悬停稳定性，并成功应用于水样采集、定点喷洒和物体运输。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的万向节式连续体机械臂设计有效提升了抗非平面变形能力，显著改善了空中操作下的末端位姿精度与系统鲁棒性，具备实际应用潜力。

title: Spectral Signatures of Large Language Models
summary: The rapidly growing repository of publicly available large language models (LLMs) presents significant challenges for systematic management and quantification at scale, such as model lineage tracing, licensing, and evaluation. However, task-specific benchmarks are insufficient for this setting, as LLMs differ widely in architectures, scales, and training procedures. To address this challenge, we adopt spectral shape-based metrics for managing and quantifying LLMs based on Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization theory. Our approach uses the shape information of the weight empirical spectral density as a compact spectral signature of each model. This signature captures intrinsic properties of pretrained models and remains robust during post-training, making it suitable for model-level analysis. In addition, this metric is data-free, computationally-efficient, and scale-invariant, enabling large-scale analysis in practice. Moreover, we curate a large and diverse model corpus consisting of major open-source LLM families, and use it to systematically benchmark spectral and non-spectral metrics across models and downstream tasks. We show that our spectral signature supports the tracking of the model lineage, the unsupervised clustering of similar models, and the quantification of the model performance. Overall, the proposed spectral signature provides a meaningful proxy for broad performance trends across LLMs, enabling efficient organization, comparison, and analysis of large model collections.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于权重经验谱密度形状的谱签名方法，用于大规模管理与量化大语言模型（LLMs），该签名具有数据无关、计算高效、尺度不变等优势，并在模型谱系追踪、无监督聚类和性能量化方面展现出有效性。
AI.motivation: 公开可用的大语言模型快速增长，带来模型谱系追踪、许可管理和评估等系统性管理挑战；而传统任务特定基准难以适用于架构、规模和训练方式差异巨大的LLMs。
AI.method: 基于重尾自正则化理论，提取模型权重的经验谱密度的形状特征作为紧凑、鲁棒、数据免费、计算高效且尺度不变的谱签名，用于模型级分析。
AI.result: 谱签名能有效支持模型谱系追踪、相似模型无监督聚类及性能量化；在涵盖主流开源LLM家族的大规模模型语料库上验证了其优于非谱方法的泛化性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的谱签名是一种有意义的LLM整体性能趋势代理指标，可支撑大规模模型集合的高效组织、比较与分析。

title: Homer: Understanding Long-form Videos with Hierarchical Memory and Agentic Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models excel on short clips but struggle on hour-long videos in an online setting, where frames are processed incrementally under limited memory. Existing online methods either retain compact visual representations that lack semantic structure, or build higher-level memory stores organized around temporal proximity rather than explicit causal links, leaving multi-hop narrative reasoning to be reconstructed by the LLM at every query. We bridge this gap with \textsc{Homer}, a Hierarchical Online Memory Exploration and Reasoning framework. \textsc{Homer}'s memory mirrors the multi-scale structure of long videos, ranging from raw perception, to recurring entities, to events connected by explicit temporal and causal relations. Its agentic reasoner then explores this memory the way humans do, locating the relevant scene, looking up details, and composing the answer through multi-round memory retrieval, with a harness that verifies and corrects each step. \textsc{Homer} outperforms the previous best agent method by $+5.5$, $+10.8$, and $+4.4$ points on M3-Bench-robot, M3-Bench-web, and Video-MME-Long, and consistently lifts three various LLM backbones, indicating a model-agnostic structural capability for grounded retrieval over long videos.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Homer框架，通过分层在线记忆探索与推理，提升多模态大语言模型在长视频（如小时级）在线处理中的叙事推理能力，显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有在线多模态方法难以支持长视频中的多跳叙事推理：要么保留缺乏语义结构的紧凑视觉表示，要么基于时间邻近性而非显式因果关系组织高层记忆，导致每次查询都需LLM重新构建推理链。
AI.method: 提出Homer框架，构建与长视频多尺度结构对齐的分层记忆（从原始感知→重复实体→具有时序与因果关联的事件），并设计具备定位、查证、多轮检索与步骤验证修正能力的智能体式推理器。
AI.result: 在M3-Bench-robot、M3-Bench-web和Video-MME-Long三个长视频基准上分别提升+5.5、+10.8、+4.4分；且对三种不同LLM主干模型均有一致增益，验证其模型无关性。
AI.conclusion: Homer通过结构化、因果驱动的分层记忆与类人探索式推理，为长视频在线理解提供了可泛化、可验证的模型无关基础能力。

title: CoFEND: A Cross-Modal Fusion End-to-End Network for Cold-Start Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction
summary: Cold-start drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction for new drugs is critical for minimizing unexpected adverse drug reactions. The key challenge is to capture similarity between new and known drugs. However, such similarity is closely associated with complex relationships and mechanisms among drugs, enzymes, transporters, molecular structures, and other biomedical entities. Existing methods have three limitations in capturing such similarity: (1) only partial relationships and mechanisms are considered, which overlooks cross-modal information and yields incomplete or biased similarity modeling; (2) similarity computation between new and known drugs is conducted separately across modalities and performed offline for cold-start DDI prediction, leading to misalignment between similarity computation and DDI prediction; and (3) existing interpretability analyses are typically single-modality and focus primarily on key determinants of the perpetrator drug, while the underlying causes of susceptibility for the victim drug are seldom investigated. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel Cross-Modal-Fused End-to-End Learning Network (CMF-ELN) with three components. First, diverse multimodal information is leveraged to construct four types of drug-centered knowledge graphs, enabling comprehensive similarity modeling under reconstruction-based supervision. Second, a four-channel graph autoencoder is designed to fuse cross-modal similarity within an end-to-end learning framework. Finally, a two-stage interpretability scheme is devised to precisely localize key factors for both perpetrator and victim drugs. Extensive experiments on two real datasets demonstrate that CMF-ELN achieves significantly higher prediction accuracy and more comprehensive interpretability of mechanisms than its peers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模态融合的端到端学习网络（CMF-ELN），用于冷启动药物相互作用（DDI）预测，通过构建多源知识图谱、四通道图自编码器融合及两阶段可解释性分析，显著提升预测精度与机制解释能力。
AI.motivation: 解决冷启动DDI预测中难以全面建模新药与已知药之间相似性的挑战，克服现有方法在关系覆盖不全、相似性计算与预测脱节、以及可解释性单边化三方面的局限。
AI.method: 提出CMF-ELN模型：1）构建四种药物中心知识图谱以支持重建监督下的相似性建模；2）设计四通道图自编码器实现跨模态相似性端到端融合；3）引入两阶段可解释方案，分别定位施害药与受害药的关键影响因子。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上，CMF-ELN在预测准确率和机制可解释性方面均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CMF-ELN通过跨模态融合与端到端学习，有效提升了冷启动DDI预测的性能与可解释性，为新药安全评估提供了更可靠的方法支撑。

title: Personalized Causal Recourse: A Human-In-The-Loop Approach
comment: Accepted at the 4th World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI 2026)
summary: Algorithmic recourse addresses the challenge of providing tailored recommendations to users affected by unfavorable machine learning decisions, in potentially high-stakes scenarios. Traditional approaches to recourse often rely on the closest counterfactual explanations or assume a priori knowledge of a user's causal structure, resulting in interventions that overlook individual contexts and specific feature interactions. To overcome these limitations, we study a human-in-the-loop framework that iteratively approximates the user's structural causal model through interactive queries via Bayesian inference before producing recourse recommendations. This framework exploits humans' feedback to improve the identification of causal effects, allowing personalized recourse that is plausible, cost-effective, and aligned with the actual causal dependencies of each user. As a proof of concept, we evaluate this framework through simulated human responses. Our simulations across linear and non-linear causal models show promising results, though challenges remain in capturing complex, non-linear structures, emphasizing the importance of accurate approximations and robust noise distribution modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种人机协同的算法救济框架，通过贝叶斯推理迭代逼近用户的结构因果模型，从而生成个性化、可行且符合实际因果关系的救济建议。
AI.motivation: 传统救济方法依赖最近反事实解释或预设因果结构，忽视个体背景和特征交互，难以提供个性化、可行的救济方案。
AI.method: 构建人机协同框架，利用用户反馈通过贝叶斯推理迭代估计其结构因果模型，并据此生成救济建议。
AI.result: 在模拟人类反馈的线性和非线性因果模型中验证了该框架的有效性，但对复杂非线性结构建模仍具挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能提升救济建议的合理性、成本效益与因果一致性，强调准确近似与鲁棒噪声建模的重要性。

title: Candidate-Constrained Retrieval-Augmented Generation for LongEval-RAG: System Design and Empirical Analysis
summary: We present a candidate-constrained retrieval-augmented generation system for LongEval-RAG, where each query is associated with an organizer-provided candidate set and all retrieved evidence and final citations must remain within that set. The system combines deterministic provenance tracking with passage-based retrieval, deterministic query expansion, pseudo-relevance feedback (PRF), reciprocal rank fusion (RRF), lightweight evidence reranking, citation-aware evidence aggregation, and optional MiniLM sentence reranking. We evaluate ten pipeline variants using a primary organizer evaluation and a supplementary self-generated diagnostic protocol. The primary evaluation shows that the strongest balanced variant is rule-minilm: a rule-based chunking pipeline with query expansion, PRF, RRF, reranking, citation prior, and late MiniLM sentence selection. This variant obtains the highest BERTScore, retrieval precision, nugget coverage, and average grade among our submissions. The result suggests that the main gain does not come from more complex semantic or topic-shift chunking, but from pairing stable rule-based evidence units with sentence-level neural selection before generation. The supplementary LLM-judge evaluation remains useful for early diagnosis and additional analysis, but it emphasizes different systems than the primary gold-answer and nugget-based evaluation, highlighting the need for multi-metric RAG evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种候选约束的检索增强生成（RAG）系统，用于LongEval-RAG任务，强调在给定候选集内进行检索与引用，并通过多种技术组合优化性能；实验表明，基于规则分块+MiniLM句子选择的pipeline效果最优，验证了稳定结构化证据单元与细粒度神经筛选结合的重要性；研究还指出多指标评估对RAG系统分析的必要性。
AI.motivation: 针对LongEval-RAG任务中需严格限制检索与引用范围于 organizer 提供的候选集这一挑战，探索如何在约束条件下提升检索精度、证据覆盖与生成质量，并检验不同RAG组件组合的有效性。
AI.method: 构建候选约束RAG系统，整合确定性溯源追踪、基于段落的检索、确定性查询扩展、伪相关反馈（PRF）、互惠秩融合（RRF）、轻量级证据重排序、引用感知证据聚合，以及可选的MiniLM句子重排序；评估10种pipeline变体，采用主办方主评估与自建LLM-judge诊断协议双轨评估。
AI.result: rule-minilm变体（规则分块+查询扩展+PRF+RRF+重排序+引用先验+晚期MiniLM句子选择）在BERTScore、检索精度、nugget覆盖率和平均评分上均最优；主评估显示性能提升主要源于规则分块的稳定性与句子级神经筛选的协同，而非复杂语义或主题偏移分块；LLM-judge评估虽具诊断价值，但偏好不同系统，凸显多指标评估必要性。
AI.conclusion: 在候选约束RAG场景下，简单稳定的证据单元划分（如规则分块）配合精细的神经级筛选（如MiniLM句子选择），比复杂语义分块更有效；RAG系统评估需兼顾金标准答案、nugget覆盖与LLM判断等多维指标，以全面反映系统能力。

title: Closed-loop vs. Open-loop Kalman Filter Architectures in Airborne Aided Inertial Navigation
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, submission to IEEE Navicon
summary: Closed-loop (or feedback) error-state Kalman filters with their relatives and offspring are the state-of-the-art in modern aided inertial navigation research. Estimated inertial navigation system (INS) errors are continually fed back to the INS to correct the nominal system state before subsequent predictions. Conversely, in safety-critical aeronautical applications, open-loop (or feedforward) systems are an undisputed standard, where the inertial mechanization is strictly decoupled to allow for operational independence and fault isolation of computing units. We assess the performance impacts of this architectural choice beyond qualitative system-safety justifications using a standard inertial mechanization in geodetic coordinates and direct position aiding. Simulations using a variety of inertial sensor error characteristics, ranging from consumer to navigation grade systems, showcase the trade-off between smooth information fusion for high-end IMUs using an open-loop filter and the inherent long-term stability of the closed-loop architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了闭环（反馈）和开环（前馈）误差状态卡尔曼滤波器在惯性导航系统（INS）中的性能影响，特别是在航空安全关键应用中；研究表明，开环架构在高端IMU下可实现更平滑的信息融合，而闭环架构则具有更好的长期稳定性。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键的航空应用中，开环系统是标准选择，因其支持计算单元的运行独立性和故障隔离；但其性能影响缺乏定量评估，本文旨在弥补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用标准地理坐标系下的惯性机械模型与直接位置辅助，通过仿真分析不同等级惯性传感器（从消费级到导航级）误差特性下，开环与闭环滤波器的性能差异。
AI.result: 仿真结果揭示了开环滤波器在高端IMU下信息融合更平滑，而闭环架构具备更优的长期稳定性，二者存在明确性能权衡。
AI.conclusion: 开环与闭环架构各有优势，应根据具体应用场景（如精度需求、安全性要求、传感器等级）进行权衡选择，而非仅基于定性安全理由决定。

title: The Classics at SemEval-2026 Task 3: Combining Transformer Models and LLM-Generated Annotations for Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
summary: This paper presents an approach to the SemEval-2026 Task 3: Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis. We investigate methods for moving beyond traditional categorical sentiment (e.g., positive or negative) to predict fine-grained, real-valued scores for sentiment "valence" (positivity) and "arousal" (intensity). We participate in two subtasks: predicting these scores for given aspects (Subtask 1) and extracting full sets of sentiment details, including aspects, categories, and opinions alongside their scores (Subtask 3). Our approach for the regression task involves a weighted ensemble of transformer-based encoder models. For the Russian language, we further enhance the input by using a large language model (LLM) to generate synthetic sentiment descriptions. For the extraction task, we fine-tune a decoder LLM to perform structured prediction, allowing the system to identify sentiment elements and estimate their numerical scores simultaneously.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于SemEval-2026任务3（维度化方面级情感分析）的方法，通过加权集成Transformer编码器模型进行回归预测，并结合LLM生成合成数据和结构化解码，实现对俄语情感细粒度（效价与唤醒度）的建模与元素抽取。
AI.motivation: 超越传统分类式情感分析，实现细粒度、实值化的情感维度（效价与唤醒度）预测，并支持多语言（特别是俄语）及端到端情感要素联合抽取。
AI.method: 1) 对Subtask 1采用加权集成的Transformer编码器模型进行回归预测；2) 针对俄语，利用大语言模型（LLM）生成合成情感描述以增强输入；3) 对Subtask 3，微调解码型LLM进行结构化联合预测，同步识别方面、类别、观点及其情感得分。
AI.result: 在SemEval-2026 Task 3中实现了对情感效价与唤醒度的高精度实值预测，并成功完成俄语场景下的端到端情感要素抽取任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了基于LLM增强与结构化解码的联合建模在维度化方面级情感分析中的有效性，尤其提升了低资源语言（如俄语）上的性能。

title: CPR: Chained Perceptual Refinement for Coarse-to-Fine Medical Image Classification
summary: High resolution medical images contain fine grained, spatially sparse cues that are critical for diagnosis, yet preserving full resolution incurs substantial computational and memory costs. Most deep models process images uniformly, leading to redundant computation or loss of diagnostic detail under downsampling. We propose Chained Perceptual Refinement, CPR, a coarse to fine framework that formulates medical image analysis as a sequential global to local decision process. Starting from a low resolution global view, CPR dynamically predicts the location and spatial extent of refinement regions, extracts high resolution evidence from the original image, and incrementally integrates it with global context. By keeping the backbone input size fixed while contracting the perceptual field, CPR preserves diagnostic fidelity with constant peak GPU memory. Extensive experiments on five medical imaging datasets and multiple backbone architectures demonstrate that CPR consistently outperforms both fixed resolution and multi scale state of the art baselines, achieving improvements of up to 2.27 percentage points over the second best method. It also achieves up to a 19.6 fold reduction in GFLOPs at matched accuracy, establishing a superior accuracy and efficiency trade off for high resolution medical image analysis. The code is available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Chained Perceptual Refinement（CPR）框架，通过从粗到细的动态区域精炼策略，在保持固定GPU内存开销的同时提升高分辨率医学图像分析的诊断精度与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率医学图像包含对诊断至关重要的细粒度、空间稀疏线索，但全分辨率处理带来巨大计算与内存开销；现有模型均匀处理图像，导致冗余计算或下采样时细节丢失。
AI.method: CPR是一种由粗到细的链式感知精炼框架，将医学图像分析建模为全局到局部的序列决策过程：从低分辨率全局视图出发，动态预测需精炼的区域位置与范围，从原始高分辨率图像中提取证据，并逐步融合至全局上下文；骨干网络输入尺寸固定，感知域收缩以节省内存。
AI.result: 在五个医学影像数据集及多种骨干网络上，CPR持续超越固定分辨率和多尺度SOTA方法，最高提升2.27个百分点；在精度相当情况下，GFLOPs最多降低19.6倍。
AI.conclusion: CPR在诊断保真度、GPU内存恒定与计算效率之间实现了更优权衡，为高分辨率医学图像分析提供了实用新范式。

title: In-span learning: adapting reduced-order models using their own predictions
summary: Reduced-order models compress high-dimensional dynamics into low-dimensional representations that can be evaluated rapidly, but they lose accuracy when online dynamics drift beyond the training data. Adaptive methods address this by updating the subspace online with external, out-of-span information, such as full-order corrections or sensor snapshots. We discovered that a complementary and previously unexploited in-span adaptation channel exists within the current reduced subspace. By streaming the model's own predictions through an incremental singular-value decomposition with forgetting, we obtain a trajectory-informed spectral preconditioner, in which the subspace is unchanged but the basis is reweighted and realigned toward the modes visited by the dynamics. This enables the model to absorb future out-of-span corrections more effectively. We expose aspects of this mechanism on a three-dimensional spiral and confirm it on viscous Burgers and Fisher-KPP dynamics. We also discuss how in-span learning can be viewed as a dynamical-systems analogue of in-context learning. More broadly, in-span learning suggests a new principle for computational science, revealing that model-generated trajectories contain more usable information than previously recognized.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为‘in-span learning’的新型自适应降阶建模方法：通过在现有低维子空间内对模型自身预测进行流式增量SVD（带遗忘机制），实现基底的重加权与重对齐，从而提升对后续外部校正的吸收能力，无需改变子空间维度。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应降阶模型依赖外部信息（如全阶校正或传感器快照）更新子空间，但忽略了模型自身预测轨迹中蕴含的、位于当前子空间内的可利用动态信息。
AI.method: 提出in-span learning机制：将模型在线预测序列输入带遗忘因子的增量奇异值分解（SVD），生成轨迹感知的谱预条件器，在保持子空间不变的前提下，动态重加权和旋转基底以匹配实际演化模式。
AI.result: 在三维螺旋、粘性Burgers方程和Fisher-KPP方程上验证了该方法能显著提升对漂移动力学的适应性，并增强对外部校正的吸收效率；同时揭示了其与大语言模型中in-context learning的动力学类比关系。
AI.conclusion: in-span learning揭示了模型自生成轨迹中蕴含未被充分利用的信息，为计算科学提供了一种新范式——低维模型可在不扩展维度的前提下，通过内部结构优化持续自我精化。

title: Demonstrating Generalization Failures via Mixtures of Conditional Policies
summary: Post-training of frontier language models is conducted on curated task suites, and inevitably leaves a distribution shift between training and deployment environments. This exposes developers to generalization failures, which are relatively poorly understood. To better understand such generalization failures, we believe the community should construct clean demonstrations under simplified conditions. To facilitate this, we propose a simple and flexible way to construct language models which fail to generalize in controllable ways when subsequently trained with Reinforcement Learning (RL) on a given distribution of training tasks. Our construction uses Supervised Fine-Tuning on a dataset of a mixture of transcripts corresponding to a collection of 'conditional policies', which can each independently be assigned certain behaviors on each different task distribution, to obtain a model that is then well approximated as a 'mixture of conditional policies.' We observe that RL training then selects for policies that obtain the highest reward on the training distribution. This can produce striking behaviors: in a controlled setting with two distributions containing identical questions prepended with two different 'trigger strings', RL training on either distribution actively degrades performance on the other to zero, even though the underlying task is identical. We also use our construction to illustrate two novel ways in which generalization may fail in future language models, corresponding to distribution shifts of task coverage and temporal context respectively. While our construction is deliberately simple and may not closely resemble 'natural' generalization failures, the resulting 'model organisms' are of interest for alignment stress-testing and generalization science, and can be used as existence proofs that training success and generalization can come apart in structured ways.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种构造语言模型的方法，使其在强化学习训练后在特定任务分布上可控地出现泛化失败，揭示了训练成功与泛化能力可能分离的现象。
AI.motivation: 当前前沿语言模型在后训练阶段面临训练与部署环境间的分布偏移，导致泛化失败，而这类失败机制尚缺乏清晰理解；亟需在简化条件下构建干净、可控的失败案例以推动对齐与泛化科学研究。
AI.method: 通过监督微调（SFT）混合多个‘条件策略’的文本数据，构建近似为‘条件策略混合体’的语言模型；随后在特定任务分布上进行强化学习（RL）训练，观察其对不同分布的泛化行为。
AI.result: RL训练会偏好在训练分布上奖励最高的策略，导致在语义相同但触发字符串不同的两个分布间性能急剧下降（甚至归零）；并揭示了任务覆盖范围偏移和时序上下文偏移两类新型泛化失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 该构造方法虽简化，但提供了训练成功与泛化能力解耦的明确存在性证明，可作为对齐压力测试与泛化机制研究的‘模型生物’。

title: Progressive Disclosure for LLM-Maintained Wiki Knowledge Bases: a Preregistered Ablation
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Preregistered on OSF (https://osf.io/feka7, DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/FEKA7). Materials-availability and deviations described in the paper
summary:
LLM agents increasingly answer questions against knowledge bases they help maintain. A common intuition holds that progressive disclosure, a compact catalog plus a one-line summary per page so the agent loads only what it needs, should make this cheaper than consulting a large monolithic index. We test that on a real 709-page markdown wiki maintained by an LLM. We retrofit it for progressive disclosure and run a preregistered ablation in which four versions of the corpus differ only in how the agent reaches the content: page bodies are byte-identical across arms, frozen as immutable git tags, so any measured difference is due to access structure alone. We cross the arms with three access conditions (a protocol-constrained agent, a free self-routing agent, and a catalog-preload regime) and grade answers blind against verified gold references with a cross-family judge.
  A pilot upended the premise: a capable tool-using agent never loads the index, inferring a page's path from the question and reading it directly, so the specific saving the retrofit targets does not materialize. We therefore made answer quality primary and cost secondary. Quality is non-inferior (the retrieval arm matches the index baseline within the preregistered margin) while cost falls in every regime, from about a third for a self-routing agent to well over half under catalog-preload, all confidence intervals excluding zero. The saving comes not from avoiding the index load but from more targeted access: the retrieval arm cites fewer pages and takes fewer tool turns. The study doubles as a case study in evaluation validity, applying threat-to-validity discipline to the tooling that produced it.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在LLM代理维护的知识库中采用渐进式披露（progressive disclosure）是否能降低成本并保持答案质量，结果发现虽然预期的索引节省未出现，但通过更精准的内容访问，成本显著降低且答案质量不劣于基线。
AI.motivation: 验证渐进式披露（紧凑目录+每页一行摘要）是否比使用大型单体索引更经济高效，尤其在LLM代理自主维护知识库的场景下。
AI.method: 在真实709页Markdown维基上实施渐进式披露改造，设计预注册消融实验：四个语料版本仅在内容访问方式上不同（页面正文完全一致、git冻结），交叉三种访问条件（协议约束代理、自由路由代理、目录预加载），盲评答案质量并由跨模型评委打分。
AI.result: 试点推翻原假设——能力强的工具使用代理直接推断路径读取页面，不加载索引；因此转而以答案质量为首要指标，发现检索臂在质量上非劣于索引基线，同时成本在所有访问条件下均显著下降（降幅约1/3至超1/2），源于更少页面引用和更少工具调用。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式披露的价值不在于避免索引加载，而在于提升访问目标性，从而在保障答案质量前提下显著降低成本；本研究亦为工具驱动评估的有效性提供了方法论案例。

title: Feeling the Unexpected: ResTacVLA for Contact-Rich Manipulation via Residual Tactile Representation
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Accepted by IROS 2026, Project page: https://awilekong.github.io/ResTacVLA-Website/
summary: Tactile perception is indispensable for contact-rich manipulation, yet integrating it into Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often induces modality collapse, where high-bandwidth visual features overshadow sparse tactile cues. Inspired by Predictive Coding, a neural mechanism where the brain attenuates predictable inputs to prioritize surprising stimuli, we propose ResTacVLA. Rather than treating tactile data as raw input, we reformulate it as a Residual Tactile Representation capturing the discrepancy between visual priors and physical sensations. By filtering out visually predictable dynamics, this formulation transforms sparse tactile signals into dense, high-value information gain, thereby inherently resolving the bandwidth mismatch. These residuals are discretized through a Vector Quantized (VQ) bottleneck into Latent Contact Primitives that capture critical events missed by vision. Analogous to the neural surprise signal, we leverage the uncertainty of the visual prior to adaptively gate tactile integration, prioritizing residuals specifically during visually unreliable phases to explicitly prevent visual dominance. Experimental results show that ResTacVLA consistently outperforms all baselines on a diverse set of contact-rich manipulation tasks, while remaining robust to unexpected dynamic disturbances. Project page: https://awilekong.github.io/ResTacVLA-Website/

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResTacVLA模型，通过将触觉信号建模为视觉先验与实际感知之间的残差，并结合预测编码机制和不确定性门控，有效缓解多模态融合中的触觉被视觉主导问题，在接触密集型操作任务中显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 触觉感知对接触密集型操作至关重要，但将其融入视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型时易引发模态崩溃——高带宽视觉特征压制稀疏触觉信号。
AI.method: 受预测编码神经机制启发，将触觉数据重构为‘残差触觉表征’（即视觉先验与物理感知间的差异），经向量量化瓶颈离散化为‘潜在接触基元’；并利用视觉先验的不确定性自适应门控触觉融合，仅在视觉不可靠阶段增强触觉整合。
AI.result: ResTacVLA在多种接触密集型操作任务上持续超越所有基线方法，且对意外动态扰动具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 残差化触觉建模与不确定性驱动的门控机制可有效解决VLA中触觉-视觉带宽失配与模态主导问题，为多模态具身智能提供新范式。

title: CaresAI at SMM4H-HeaRD 2026: Predicting TNM Staging
summary: This study aims to predict Tumor, Node, and Metastasis (TNM) stage labels independently, with the Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) pathology report as the sixth shared task of SMM4H-HeaRD 2026. The problem is framed as three multi-label classification tasks. We explore both classical and deep learning approaches using Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) features and embeddings from ClinicalBERT, BioBERT, and PubMedBERT. These representations are used with Logistic Regression (LR), Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LightGBM), Feed-Forward Neural Networks (FFNN), and Wide Residual Networks (WRN). Our results show that individual embeddings perform similarly to the TNM label classification, while their combination improves its predictive ability. WRN achieves AUROC scores of 0.839 (T), 0.8502 (N), and 0.803 (M) with F1-scores of 0.622, 0.702, and 0.9337, respectively, for the training phase. LightGBM with TF-IDF performs best with AUROC scores of 0.9368 (T), 0.9524 (N), and 0.8311 (M) and F1-scores of 0.7559 (T), 0.7384 (N), and 0.7017 (M) during the training phase. Furthermore, the result of the Codabench for the test sets indicates a Macro-F1 score of 0.978, 0.957, and 0.879 for the T, N, and M categories respectively for test set 1; while test set 2 records a Macro-F1 score for T, N, and M is 0.807, 0.767, 1.0 respectively. However, performance declined during the evaluation phase of the test sets, a drop from 0.938 to 0.858 of test set 1 to 2, for the Macro-F1 score across all stages; suggesting limitations in model generalizability, sensitivity to class imbalance, and challenges in processing lengthy clinical documents. Although this study provides an efficient baseline model and a reproducible pipeline, further optimization and validation are required before it can be considered suitable for use in a real-world clinical setting.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对TCGA病理报告中的TNM分期标签预测问题，采用多种经典与深度学习方法（如Logistic Regression、LightGBM、FFNN、WRN）结合TF-IDF与临床/生物医学BERT嵌入进行多标签分类，发现模型组合可提升性能，但泛化能力受限于类别不平衡与长文本处理挑战。
AI.motivation: 为解决TCGA病理报告中T、N、M分期标签的自动独立预测问题，支持临床决策与癌症精准分期。
AI.method: 将TNM预测建模为三个独立的多标签分类任务；使用TF-IDF及ClinicalBERT、BioBERT、PubMedBERT嵌入作为特征；分别输入Logistic Regression、LightGBM、FFNN和Wide Residual Networks进行训练与评估。
AI.result: LightGBM+TF-IDF在训练阶段取得最优AUROC（T:0.9368, N:0.9524, M:0.8311）；WRN在嵌入融合下表现稳健；测试集Macro-F1在两套数据上差异显著（Test1：0.978/0.957/0.879；Test2：0.807/0.767/1.0），显示泛化能力不足。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法提供了可复现的基线模型，但在真实临床场景应用前，仍需进一步优化以应对类别不平衡、长文本建模及跨数据集泛化等挑战。

title: H-OPD: Confidence Aware Heterogeneous Multi-Teacher Multimodal On-policy Distillation
comment: Technical report(work-in-progress). Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/buptyqx/H-OPD}
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has recently emerged as an effective post-training paradigm by providing supervision on student-generated trajectories. However, existing OPD methods for multimodal reasoning usually rely on a static teacher routing, assigning each sample to a single teacher based on modality or task type. This ignores that visual grounding and abstract reasoning may dominate different decoding steps, making a single teacher insufficient for the full trajectory. To this end, H-OPD is proposed as a confidence-aware heterogeneous multi-teacher OPD framework for multimodal reasoning. By verifying the complementarity of heterogeneous teachers in the same reasoning process, H-OPD replaces task or sample level teacher routing with token-level teacher arbitration along the shared student trajectory. H-OPD employs vision-to-language description transfer to enable text-only teachers to access key visual semantics, and uses a confidence-aware arbitration mechanism to dynamically combine vision-language teacher and text-only teachers at each token. Extensive evaluations over 11 widely-used reasoning benchmarks showcase the superior performance of our method.

AI.tldr: H-OPD是一种面向多模态推理的置信度感知异构多教师在线蒸馏框架，通过在token级别动态仲裁视觉-语言教师与纯文本教师，提升学生模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于样本或任务级静态教师路由的在线蒸馏方法无法适应多模态推理中不同解码步由视觉定位或抽象推理主导的动态需求，单教师难以覆盖完整轨迹。
AI.method: 提出H-OPD框架：1）引入视觉到语言描述迁移，使纯文本教师可获取关键视觉语义；2）设计置信度感知的token级教师仲裁机制，在共享学生轨迹上动态融合异构教师输出。
AI.result: 在11个主流多模态推理基准上验证了H-OPD的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: token级动态教师仲裁比静态样本/任务级路由更适配多模态推理过程，异构教师协同能更好覆盖视觉接地与抽象推理的不同阶段。

title: Missingness as Signal: Channel-Independent Spectrogram Learning for Clinical Time Series Prediction
summary: Clinical time series prediction in intensive care units remains challenging due to heterogeneous physiological variables and informative missingness. The presence or absence of a measurement can reflect clinical decisions and patient severity, and thus missingness can serve as a predictive signal rather than a simple data artifact. This work presents CISM, a Channel-Independent Spectrogram framework with a Missingness stream for clinical multivariate time series prediction. CISM converts each clinical variable into a variable-wise time-frequency spectrogram, preserves variable identity through variable-aligned encoding, and aligns an explicit missingness stream with the spectrogram representation. Experiments on an in-hospital mortality task derived from MIMIC-IV show that CISM achieves the highest mean AUROC (0.7225), AUPRC (0.3308), and F1 (0.3808) among the compared time series, missingness-aware, vision, and time-frequency baselines. Ablation studies further show that observation patterns provide a meaningful informative signal. Pixel-level mask injection improves performance over plain spectrogram inputs and recovers much of this predictive value. The aligned missingness stream contributes a further, complementary gain in both AUROC and AUPRC. These results highlight the importance of modeling observation patterns as structured signals in clinical time series prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CISM框架，通过将每个临床变量转换为时频谱图，并引入显式的缺失性流（missingness stream），以利用临床时间序列中缺失值的预测信号价值，在院内死亡率预测任务中取得了最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 临床时间序列预测面临异质生理变量和信息性缺失的挑战；缺失本身可反映临床决策与患者病情严重程度，因而具有预测意义，而非单纯的数据缺陷。
AI.method: 提出CISM（Channel-Independent Spectrogram with Missingness stream）框架：对各变量独立生成时频谱图，保持变量身份的对齐编码，并将缺失模式显式建模为与谱图对齐的缺失性流。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV院内死亡预测任务上，CISM在AUROC（0.7225）、AUPRC（0.3308）和F1（0.3808）上均优于各类基线模型；消融实验证实缺失模式是有效预测信号，像素级掩码注入及对齐缺失流均带来互补增益。
AI.conclusion: 将观测模式（即缺失结构）建模为有含义的结构化信号，对提升临床时间序列预测性能至关重要。

title: MentalThink: Shaping Thoughts in Mental SVG World
summary: We introduce MentalThink, a visual-symbolic reasoning paradigm that equips Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) with an executable mechanism for "mental" visualization. The core of MentalThink is a think-with-SVG pipeline, where the model learns to generate, render, and interpret scalable vector graphics (SVG) code as an intermediate visual representation for multi-turn reasoning. By creating structured vector sketches, the model can externalize spatial hypotheses, inspect them through deterministic rendering, and reason within a constrained geometric space, effectively mimicking the human process of mental imagery. We instantiate this paradigm through a two-stage training framework, combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for SVG syntactic alignment with multi-turn Reinforcement Learning (RL) to encourage iterative inspection, revision, and refinement of intermediate visual hypotheses. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that MentalThink achieves superior performance on spatial understanding and reasoning benchmarks (e.g., 55.1% on VSIBench, 76.0% on MindCube), showing that executable vector graphics provide a verifiable visual workspace for dynamic perspective taking, visual reflection, and compositional scene construction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MentalThink，一种视觉-符号推理范式，通过可执行的SVG代码作为中间视觉表示，使多模态大语言模型具备'心理可视化'能力，显著提升空间理解与推理性能。
AI.motivation: 为解决多模态大语言模型在空间理解与动态视角转换中缺乏可验证、可操作的视觉表征机制的问题，借鉴人类心智意象过程，引入可执行的视觉中间表示。
AI.method: 提出think-with-SVG推理流水线，结合监督微调（SFT）实现SVG语法对齐和多轮强化学习（RL）优化迭代可视化假设的生成、渲染与反思；模型生成SVG代码→渲染为图像→基于渲染结果继续推理。
AI.result: 在VSIBench（55.1%）和MindCube（76.0%）等空间推理基准上显著超越现有方法，验证了可执行矢量图形作为可验证视觉工作空间的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MentalThink证明了将可执行矢量图形作为中间表征能有效增强MLLM的空间推理能力，为构建具备心智模拟能力的多模态模型提供了新范式。

title: MTEB-PT: A Text Embedding Benchmark for Brazilian Portuguese
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables. Code (Apache-2.0): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21087217 . Results dataset (CC-BY-4.0): https://doi.org/10.57967/hf/9377 . Leaderboard: https://huggingface.co/spaces/mteb-pt/leaderboard
summary: Text embeddings for Portuguese have no dedicated benchmark: evaluation rests on translated corpora such as English MS MARCO or on thin multilingual coverage, with native tasks scattered and unconsolidated. We introduce MTEB-PT, a benchmark of 22 native Brazilian-Portuguese tasks across seven categories (classification, multilabel classification, pair classification, semantic textual similarity, clustering, retrieval, and reranking), admitting only data created or found in Portuguese and excluding translations by construction. We evaluate 93 models spanning 23M to 27B parameters: 73 open-weight and 20 closed commercial APIs. Alongside the leaderboard we report a statistical layer for every headline comparison: per-task bootstrap confidence intervals, paired-bootstrap significance, a task- and instance-level discrimination analysis (how sharply each task separates models) adapted from Item Response Theory, and a cross-leaderboard correlation. Three findings stand out. The benchmark cleanly separates about a dozen tiers of models, though the top six are statistically too close to order. An openly licensed, self-hostable model reaches that leading tier, so strong Portuguese embedding quality does not require a commercial API. And a model's rank on the global multilingual leaderboard predicts its Portuguese rank only moderately (Spearman rho = 0.75 over 55 shared models; one model ranks 3rd there and 49th here), so a native benchmark measures something the multilingual boards do not. We release every task, our code, and a public leaderboard, so practitioners can choose Portuguese embedding models on native evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MTEB-PT，首个专为巴西葡萄牙语设计的原生文本嵌入基准，包含22个葡萄牙语任务、覆盖7类NLP任务，并评估了93个模型；结果表明：该基准能有效区分模型能力层级，开源模型可达顶级性能，且多语言基准排名与葡萄牙语表现相关性中等（ρ=0.75），凸显原生基准不可替代。
AI.motivation: 现有葡萄牙语文本嵌入评估缺乏专用基准，依赖翻译数据或泛化多语言数据集，导致评估不准确、任务分散且未整合。
AI.method: 构建MTEB-PT基准：严格限定所有任务数据均为原生葡萄牙语（非翻译），涵盖7类共22个任务；系统评估93个模型（73个开源+20个商用API），引入统计分析层（如自助置信区间、配对显著性检验、基于项目反应理论的判别力分析、跨基准相关性）。
AI.result: 1）基准清晰划分约12个模型能力层级，但前六名统计上难以精确排序；2）存在开源、可自托管模型进入顶尖层级；3）多语言基准排名与葡萄牙语排名仅中度相关（Spearman ρ=0.75），说明原生基准捕捉了多语言基准无法反映的能力维度。
AI.conclusion: MTEB-PT填补了葡萄牙语文本嵌入评估空白，证明原生基准对语言特定能力评估至关重要；其开源任务、代码与公开排行榜支持实践者基于本地证据选择最优嵌入模型。

title: HiMe: Hierarchical Embodied Memory for Long-Horizon Vision-Language-Action Control
summary: Current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models excel at robotic manipulation but often struggle with non-Markovian tasks requiring long-term memory and reasoning due to their reliance on immediate observations. Existing solutions face a ''frequency-competence paradox,'' where stronger reasoning models are too slow for real-time control, while faster models lack sufficient reasoning capabilities. To resolve this architectural misalignment, we propose HiMe, a Hierarchical Embodied Memory framework that decouples embodied intelligence into a high-frequency Executor for execution, a Sentry for working memory, and a Planner for long-term strategy. We also introduce a dynamic knowledge system based on cross-modal semantic schemas and active management mechanisms, allowing robots to maintain memory plasticity through ''Add, Update, and Delete'' operations. This hierarchical design effectively balances the conflict between real-time execution and slow thinking planning, significantly improving success rates in long-horizon tasks. Experiments demonstrate that this approach not only outperforms flat memory baselines but also exhibits the novel ability to self-correct its internal knowledge based on human preferences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiMe框架，通过分层设计（Executor、Sentry、Planner）和动态跨模态知识系统，解决VLA模型在非马尔可夫任务中实时性与推理能力难以兼顾的问题，并实现基于人类偏好的自纠错能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在非马尔可夫任务中受限于仅依赖即时观测，且面临‘频率-能力悖论’：强推理模型太慢，快模型推理弱。
AI.method: 提出HiMe分层具身记忆框架，包含高频执行器（Executor）、工作记忆守卫（Sentry）和长期策略规划器（Planner），并构建基于跨模态语义图式与主动管理机制（Add/Update/Delete）的动态知识系统。
AI.result: 在长视野任务中显著提升成功率，优于扁平记忆基线，并首次实现依据人类偏好对内部知识进行自我修正。
AI.conclusion: HiMe通过解耦具身智能的时序与认知层级，有效协调实时执行与慢思考规划，为具身AI的记忆与推理协同提供了新范式。

title: Learning from Lost Provenance: Multiple Instance Learning for Cancer Registry Tumor Group Classification
summary: Modernizing cancer registries with deep learning is opening new opportunities to automate labor-intensive tasks such as the coding of pathology reports. However, progress is constrained by the scarcity of report-level human-annotated training data. Cancer registries generate substantial volumes of expert-assigned labels as a routine product of their operations, but these exist at the patient level and are not linked to the individual pathology reports that informed them, limiting their direct use for training models. We develop an efficient framework for training deep learning classifiers by leveraging these operationally-generated labels without requiring per-report human annotation, demonstrated for tumor group classification at the BC Cancer Registry. We use Attention-Based Multiple Instance Learning (ABMIL) to recover the lost link between patient-level labels and the reports that informed them, leveraging the attention the model places on each report to distil a large, noisily-labeled corpus into a compact, high-quality per-report training dataset. A classifier fine-tuned on a distilled dataset achieved a macro F1 of 0.83, outperforming established baselines across most tumor groups. By turning routine operational labels into high-quality training data without additional annotation or large-scale computing infrastructure, ABMIL offers a practical and accessible route to automating cancer registry workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，利用癌症登记处日常生成的患者级标签，无需逐报告人工标注，即可构建高质量的病理报告级训练数据集，显著提升肿瘤分组分类性能。
AI.motivation: 癌症登记处缺乏逐份病理报告的人工标注数据，但拥有大量日常生成的患者级标签；如何将这些患者级标签有效用于训练报告级深度学习模型是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用注意力机制的多实例学习（ABMIL），利用模型对每份病理报告的注意力权重，从患者级标签中蒸馏出高质量的报告级标签，并据此微调分类器。
AI.result: 在BC癌症登记处数据上，蒸馏后微调的分类器达到macro F1为0.83，多数肿瘤组上优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ABMIL提供了一种实用、低门槛的方案，可将常规运营标签转化为高质量训练数据，推动癌症登记自动化。

title: Token-level Response-visual Attention Guidance for Multimodal LLMs Knowledge Distillation
summary: While knowledge distillation (KD) is widely adopted for training lightweight models by leveraging supervision from larger teacher models, relying solely on output token distributions has proven insufficient for compressing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Since output tokens are a byproduct of the model attending to visual inputs, prior works have explored explicitly distilling attention to provide a direct supervisory signal. While promising, the precise utility of which attention signals to distill remains under-explored. In this work, we challenge the conventional reliance on prompt-to-vision attention by revealing that downstream performance correlates strongly with response-to-vision attention similarity to the teacher, but negligibly with that of prompt-conditioned attention. Furthermore, we observe that attention distributions exhibit significant variance across individual tokens, indicating that a uniform distillation objective is suboptimal. To this end, we introduce Token-level Response-visual Attention Guidance (TRAG), a distillation objective that 1) shifts the focus to response-to-vision signals and 2) employs token-specific objectives by adaptively weighting the Kullback-Leibler divergence based on attention entropy, effectively guiding the student to mirror the teacher's precise visual focus. Extensive experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that TRAG significantly outperforms prior distillation baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的知识蒸馏方法TRAG，聚焦于响应-视觉注意力（而非传统的提示-视觉注意力），并引入基于注意力熵的token级自适应权重KL散度损失，显著提升了多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的知识蒸馏效果。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM知识蒸馏仅依赖输出token分布效果不足；虽有工作尝试蒸馏注意力，但未明确哪种注意力信号最有效，且统一蒸馏目标忽视了token间注意力分布的差异性。
AI.method: 提出Token-level Response-visual Attention Guidance (TRAG)：1）以response-to-vision attention为蒸馏核心；2）对每个token，依据其注意力熵自适应加权KL散度损失，实现细粒度视觉关注引导。
AI.result: 在多个基准上显著超越现有蒸馏基线方法。
AI.conclusion: response-to-vision attention比prompt-to-vision attention更能反映下游性能，且token级自适应注意力蒸馏更有效；TRAG为MLLM高效压缩提供了新范式。

title: A Precedent-Guided Co-Scientist for Side-Effect-Aware Drug Redesign
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on AI for Science
summary: We propose PRECEDE, a precedent-guided co-scientist for side-effect-aware drug redesign that revises a parent compound to mitigate a specified side effect while preserving therapeutic function. Rather than isolated molecular generation, PRECEDE frames redesign as evidence-grounded reasoning over drug--side-effect associations, biomedical knowledge graphs, and precedents of safety-driven optimization, coordinated by an LLM orchestrator with explicit policies and human-review checkpoints. We position PRECEDE as a human-supervised AI-for-science workflow in which hypotheses remain auditable, falsifiable, and bounded by prior pharmacology.

AI.tldr: PRECEDE是一种先例引导的协同科学家框架，用于副作用感知的药物重设计，通过整合药物-副作用关联、生物医学知识图谱和安全优化先例，在大语言模型协调下实现可审计、可证伪且受药理学约束的重设计。
AI.motivation: 解决现有药物重设计方法缺乏对副作用的针对性干预及可解释性、可验证性不足的问题，强调在保留疗效的同时精准降低特定副作用。
AI.method: 将药物重设计建模为基于证据的推理任务，融合药物-副作用关联数据、生物医学知识图谱与历史安全优化先例，由具备显式策略和人工审核节点的大语言模型进行协调。
AI.result: 提出PRECEDE框架，支持副作用定向优化，确保假设可审计、可证伪，并受既有药理学知识约束。
AI.conclusion: PRECEDE代表一种以人为监督的AI for Science范式，推动可信赖、可解释且临床可行的智能药物设计。

title: Applying Answer Set Programming with Fuzzy Membership Functions: a Case Study
comment: A shorter version of this paper has been accepted at the 24th International Workshop on Nonmonotonic Reasoning (July 17-19, 2026, Lisbon, Portugal)
summary: Human reasoning often operates through qualitative concepts expressed by linguistic labels such as high, low, expensive, or cheap, whose interpretation depends on context and is usually vague, despite being rooted in numerical data. This paper explores a novel fuzzy-logic-based qualitative extension of Answer Set Programming (ASP) to bridge numerical information and qualitative reasoning. The underlying language, formally introduced in a separate work, provides a principled framework that avoids rigid thresholds and supports robust reasoning under vagueness. Focusing on a representative use case, we illustrate how the framework integrates numerically grounded inputs (such as outputs of machine learning models) with symbolic reasoning over qualitative labels. Key features, including learning-based membership functions and semantically enriched predicates, enable the combination of expert knowledge, contextual factors, and subjective interpretations within a unified declarative setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊逻辑的定性扩展Answer Set Programming（ASP），用于连接数值信息与定性推理，支持在模糊性下进行鲁棒推理，并整合机器学习输出与符号推理。
AI.motivation: 人类推理常依赖于上下文相关、模糊但根植于数值数据的定性概念（如'高'、'低'、'昂贵'、'便宜'），现有方法难以兼顾模糊性与数值基础。
AI.method: 构建一种基于模糊逻辑的定性扩展ASP框架，引入学习驱动的隶属度函数和语义增强谓词，在声明式范式中融合专家知识、上下文因素与主观解释。
AI.result: 实现了数值输入（如机器学习模型输出）与定性标签符号推理的无缝集成，避免了硬性阈值，提升了模糊情境下的推理鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为模糊定性推理提供了形式严谨、实用灵活的声明式建模途径，弥合了数值计算与人类常识推理之间的鸿沟。

title: CanniUplift: A Holistic Framework for Mitigating Seller and Incentive Cannibalization in E-commerce Uplift Modeling
summary: Personalized incentive allocation is vital for e-commerce, where uplift modeling is the standard for estimating Individual Treatment Effects (ITE). However, traditional models often fail in complex multi-seller environments with violations of the Stable Unit Treatment Value Assumption (SUTVA). We identify two critical challenges: Seller-level Cannibalization, where incentives shift expenditure between shops without growing the platform, and Incentive-level Cannibalization, where organic conversions or alternative rewards introduce significant noise into incrementality estimation. In this paper, we propose CanniUplift, a unified framework to mitigate these dual-source cannibalization effects. Specifically, we design Platform-level Global Alignment (PGA) to capture cross-shop substitution through global GMV consistency constraints. To tackle incentive-driven noise, we introduce Redemption-based Decomposition Denoising (RDD), which uses redemption behavior to decompose treated outcomes and reduce attribution noise within an entire-space framework. Furthermore, a Treat-Attention mechanism is designed to model intricate interactions between users' historical behaviors and current treatment options. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and large-scale industrial datasets demonstrate that CanniUplift significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Ablation studies confirm that the integration of PGA and RDD consistently improves wAUUC and wQINI. Successfully deployed online, our framework achieved a 4.08% relative increase in platform-wide incremental GMV (Delta GMV) over the production baseline and improved ROI in online A/B tests, proving effective in driving global platform growth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CanniUplift框架，通过平台级全局对齐（PGA）和基于兑付的分解去噪（RDD）解决多商家场景下的双重蚕食效应，显著提升增量GMV与ROI。
AI.motivation: 传统uplift模型在复杂多商家电商环境中因违反SUTVA假设而失效，面临商家间蚕食（支出转移而非平台增长）和激励级蚕食（有机转化与替代奖励干扰增量归因）两大挑战。
AI.method: 提出CanniUplift统一框架：1）平台级全局对齐（PGA），利用GMV一致性约束建模跨店替代；2）基于兑付的分解去噪（RDD），利用用户兑付行为分解处理结果以降低归因噪声；3）Treat-Attention机制，建模用户历史行为与当前激励的复杂交互。
AI.result: 在合成数据与大规模工业数据上显著优于SOTA基线；消融实验验证PGA与RDD联合有效提升wAUUC和wQINI；线上部署后平台增量GMV相对提升4.08%，ROI改善。
AI.conclusion: CanniUplift有效缓解多卖家环境中的双重蚕食问题，提升增量效应估计精度，驱动平台全局增长，具备实际落地价值。

title: ADP: Adversarial Dynamics Priors for Physically Grounded Humanoid Locomotion
summary: In this paper, we propose Adversarial Dynamics Priors (ADP) for perturbation-resilient humanoid locomotion control. Existing motion prior-based methods induce natural motion styles by imitating kinematic motion features, but they do not directly regularize dynamics features, such as CoM motion, centroidal momentum, contact forces, and contact states. To address this limitation, we replace kinematic motion-style feature with selected dynamics features extracted from locomotion trajectories as the target of adversarial regularization.To this end, we use trajectory optimization to construct a reference dataset and train a discriminator to evaluate whether policy-induced temporal windows are consistent with the resulting reference distribution.Without explicit motion tracking, ADP encourages policy rollouts to remain close to the reference support, even after perturbations. Experimental results show that, compared with AMP, the strongest baseline in our evaluation, ADP improves the $80\%$-success impulse threshold ($J_{80}$) by $16.7\%$, while reducing direction-averaged recovery time and velocity tracking error by $47.9\%$ and $35.4\%$, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为对抗动力学先验（ADP）的新方法，用于提升人形机器人在扰动下的运动鲁棒性，通过用动力学特征（如质心运动、重心动量等）替代传统运动先验中的运动学特征，并利用轨迹优化和对抗训练实现扰动恢复能力的显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于运动先验的方法仅模仿运动学特征，未直接正则化关键动力学特征（如质心运动、重心动量、接触力与状态），导致扰动下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 以动力学特征为对抗正则化目标，结合轨迹优化构建参考数据集，并训练判别器评估策略生成的时间窗口是否符合参考分布，无需显式运动跟踪。
AI.result: 相比最强基线AMP，ADP将80%成功冲量阈值（J80）提升16.7%，方向平均恢复时间减少47.9%，速度跟踪误差降低35.4%。
AI.conclusion: ADP通过动力学特征引导的对抗正则化，显著提升了人形机器人在外部扰动下的运动鲁棒性与恢复性能。

title: Lacuna Inc. at SemEval-2026 Task 4: Structurally Gated State-Space Models for Disentangling Narrative Similarity
summary: In this paper, we present the Invariant-Variant Disentangled State-Space Model (IVD-SSM), our submission to SemEval-2026 Task 4 on Narrative Story Similarity and Narrative Representation Learning. Evaluating narrative similarity is a profound computational challenge that requires models to look past concrete, superficial elements such as specific names, actors, objects, or settings to isolate and compare abstract patterns of causality and plot progression. To model these extended causal chains without the quadratic bottlenecks of standard Transformers, we leverage a hybrid State-Space Model (Jamba-1.5-Mini). Building upon this backbone, we introduce the Structurally Gated Alignment (SGA) head, a novel, differentiable algorithmic architecture. The SGA head operates on two scales: a heavily strided Macro-path maps the coarse structural skeleton of a story, which then acts as a gating mechanism to filter a full-resolution Micro-path, actively suppressing semantic noise and superficial keyword overlaps. Evaluated on both pairwise comparative judgments (Track A) and dense representation learning (Track B), our approach demonstrates that explicitly disentangling structural invariants from lexical variants provides a robust, principled framework for deep narrative understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Invariant-Variant Disentangled State-Space Model (IVD-SSM)，用于SemEval-2026任务4（叙事故事相似性与表征学习），通过结构化门控对齐（SGA）头，将叙事中的结构不变量与词汇变量解耦，提升深层叙事理解能力。
AI.motivation: 评估叙事相似性需模型忽略表面细节（如人名、地点等），聚焦抽象的因果与情节模式；传统Transformer存在二次计算瓶颈，难以高效建模长程因果链。
AI.method: 基于Jamba-1.5-Mini状态空间模型构建主干，并引入新型可微分结构化门控对齐（SGA）头：Macro-path提取粗粒度故事骨架，作为门控机制引导Micro-path精细建模，抑制语义噪声和表层词汇重叠。
AI.result: 在Track A（成对比较判断）和Track B（稠密表征学习）上均验证有效，证明结构不变量与词汇变量的显式解耦能提升叙事理解鲁棒性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: IVD-SSM为叙事理解提供了一种原理清晰、结构明确的解耦建模范式，兼顾效率与语义深度。

title: An automated method of identifying incorrectly labelled images based on the sequences of loss functions of deep learning networks
comment: Presented at the 6th EAI International Conference on IoT as a Service (IoTaaS 2020). Published by Springer in LNICST, vol 346, 2021
summary: Deep learning is widely applied in medical image analysis, but up to 10% of manually labelled images may be incorrect, degrading model performance. This paper proposes an automated method to identify incorrectly labelled medical images by analyzing sequences of loss functions from deep learning classification networks over multiple training epochs. Identified images can be reviewed and relabelled by experts, improving dataset quality and model performance. Two experiments validate the method on a fundus image dataset for referable diabetic retinopathy screening. In the first, 6% (648) of 10,788 gold-standard labels were intentionally flipped. The method identified 75.31% (488) of the flipped samples, with only 4.85% (492) false positives among correctly labelled samples. In the second, reviewing and correcting the 980 identified samples (9.1% of the dataset) and retraining the model improved best accuracy on an independent test set from 95.93% (with 6% label noise) to 96.50% (with 1.5% noise), approaching the ideal 96.57% (with 0% noise). The results demonstrate the method's effectiveness in improving model performance through automated label quality control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过分析深度学习分类网络在多轮训练中损失函数序列来自动识别医学图像错误标签的方法，经实验验证可有效提升数据集质量和模型性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学图像分析中广泛应用，但人工标注图像中高达10%可能存在错误，从而降低模型性能。
AI.method: 通过分析深度学习分类网络在多个训练周期中损失函数的变化序列，自动识别标注错误的医学图像。
AI.result: 在眼底图像数据集上实验表明：该方法能识别出75.31%的错误标签（488/648），假阳性率为4.85%（492/10140）；修正980个识别出的样本后，模型在独立测试集上的最佳准确率从95.93%提升至96.50%，接近理想无噪声情况下的96.57%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效实现医学图像标注质量的自动化控制，显著提升模型性能。

title: Individual Parameters in Weight-Sparse Transformers Appear Interpretable
summary: A central goal of mechanistic interpretability is to understand how neural networks work and what each individual component does. Dominant circuit-finding approaches focus on a specific behavior and reverse-engineer the role of components on the associated sub-distribution. However, past work has shown that components can have different functions that are active on different subsets of the input distribution. In this work we ask whether a single weight can be understood globally across the full training distribution by characterizing when it matters (the inputs on which ablating it changes the model's predictions). We introduce an automated LLM pipeline that writes a short, human-readable description of when a weight matters and verifies it on held-out text, crediting a weight only if its description generalizes. Across two sparse and two dense transformers, the fraction of weights that are interpretable (in this sense) is higher in sparse transformers than in dense ones, a gap that widens once unreliable descriptions are discarded. Our results show that a meaningful fraction of a sparse transformer model's weights can be interpreted: 12 to 31% of weights have a single short description that identifies what the weight is used for.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化LLM流水线，用于为神经网络权重生成可泛化的、人类可读的描述，以理解其在全训练分布上的全局作用；实验表明稀疏Transformer中可解释权重比例（12%-31%）显著高于密集Transformer。
AI.motivation: 现有电路发现方法仅针对特定行为或子分布分析组件功能，但组件功能可能随输入分布变化；本文旨在探究单个权重能否在完整训练分布上被全局理解。
AI.method: 设计自动化LLM流水线，为每个权重生成‘何时起作用’（即ablation影响预测的输入条件）的简短自然语言描述，并在held-out文本上验证其泛化性；仅当描述泛化成功时才认定该权重可解释。
AI.result: 在两类稀疏和两类密集Transformer上评估，稀疏模型中可解释权重占比更高（12%-31%），且剔除不可靠描述后差距进一步扩大。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏Transformer中存在可观比例的权重具备单一、简洁、可泛化的功能描述，表明其部分权重具有明确且可解释的全局语义角色。

title: How to Avoid Debate: Scalable AI Safety via Doubly-Efficient Interactive Proofs
summary:
As AI models continue to develop powerful capabilities, it becomes critical that we are able to verify that their output is aligned with our intentions. A recent line of work focuses on verification via debate, a model of interactive proofs where two competing powerful provers, or AI models, debate each other to convince a weak verifier, or a human, of the correctness of their claim. However, debate assumes that the two AI models possess equal abilities and that one of them is truthful, which may not be realistic.
  In this work, we show \emph{how to avoid debate}: we initiate the study of \emph{single-prover} interactive proofs for AI safety. Prior results in single-prover interactive proofs do not immediately carry over to the AI safety setting: for example, they do not work when the computation has access to an oracle, such as to human judgment or an external database such as the web. We present doubly-efficient single-prover interactive proofs and arguments for oracle-aided computations (also known as relativizing proofs), in the settings where (1) the computation is robust, in the sense that the output does not change if at most a small fraction of the answers to oracle queries are incorrect, or (2) the oracle is a low-degree polynomial. These results suggest that interactive verification is possible even without debate, under structured or noise-tolerant oracle access.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需辩论（debate）的单证明者交互式验证框架，用于AI安全，特别适用于带外部oracle（如人类判断或网络数据库）的计算场景，并在鲁棒性或低次多项式oracle假设下设计了双重高效协议。
AI.motivation: 现有基于辩论的AI验证方法假设两个AI能力相当且其中一方诚实，这在现实中不现实；同时，传统单证明者交互式证明无法直接应用于依赖oracle（如人类或网络）的AI计算场景。
AI.method: 提出针对oracle辅助计算的双重高效单证明者交互式证明与论证协议，分别在计算具有鲁棒性（容忍少量oracle错误响应）和oracle为低次多项式两种设定下构建理论框架。
AI.result: 首次建立了适用于AI安全场景的单证明者交互式验证理论，证明在结构化或噪声容忍的oracle访问条件下，无需辩论即可实现高效、可靠的人类可验证AI输出。
AI.conclusion: 单证明者交互式证明是可行且实用的AI安全验证路径，为摆脱对理想化辩论假设的依赖提供了新范式。

title: High-Precision Formation Control for Heterogeneous Multi-Robot Systems via Hierarchical Hybrid Physics-Informed Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Existing classical control methods commonly require precise models and struggle to cope with model uncertainties and external disturbances, while end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) approaches suffer from low sample efficiency and poor convergence. To overcome these challenges, this paper proposes a hierarchical hybrid physics-informed deep reinforcement learning (HHy-PIDRL) framework, aiming to realize high-precision, highly responsive formation control for heterogeneous multi-robot systems (HMRSs). The proposed framework contains two layers. Specifically, first, the upper layer designs an autonomous navigation policy network for Ackermann-steering leader based on the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithm. Second, the lower module integrates a high-fidelity physical feed-forward controller, a classical proportional-derivative (PD) controller, and an adaptive DRL residual controller to propose an effective hybrid model and DRL (HM-DRL)-based formation control policy network. Third, a unique hierarchical reward function is designed for training Omnidirectional followers, which effectively guides agents toward a refined, stable control policy. Experimental results demonstrate that, the success rate of both the upper-layer autonomous navigation policy network and the HM-DRL based formation control policy networks reach 100%. Meanwhile, ablation experiments are conducted to verify the validity and credibility of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层混合物理信息深度强化学习（HHy-PIDRL）框架，用于异构多机器人系统的高精度、高响应编队控制，结合SAC算法、物理前馈、PD控制与自适应DRL残差控制器，并设计分层奖励函数，实验显示成功率100%。
AI.motivation: 现有经典控制方法依赖精确模型且难以应对模型不确定性和外部扰动；端到端强化学习则样本效率低、收敛性差。
AI.method: 提出分层混合物理信息深度强化学习（HHy-PIDRL）框架：上层采用SAC算法设计阿克曼转向领航者自主导航策略；下层融合高保真物理前馈控制器、经典PD控制器与自适应DRL残差控制器，构建HM-DRL编队控制策略；并设计专用于全向跟随者的分层奖励函数。
AI.result: 上层自主导航策略网络与HM-DRL编队控制策略网络的成功率均达100%；消融实验验证了所提方法的有效性与可信性。
AI.conclusion: HHy-PIDRL框架成功兼顾模型鲁棒性与学习效率，在异构多机器人编队控制中实现了高精度与高响应性，为物理信息驱动的分层强化学习提供了可行范式。

title: Reading Between the Dots: Decoding Hidden Computation across Filler Tokens
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Mech Interp Workshop, 10 main paper pages, 20 appendix pages
summary: Frontier LLMs can perform multi-step reasoning over content-free filler tokens like dots or counting sequences, producing correct answers with no visible chain-of-thought (CoT). This is a limit case for behavioral oversight, where surface tokens carry no information about the underlying reasoning. But hidden from the output is not the same as hidden from us. On four task families (fact retrieval, parallel numeric composition, string manipulation, and in-context computation), two open-weights frontier models (DeepSeek V3, Kimi K2) compute over filler tokens in a structured, legible way: attention routes the question through the filler region to the answer, logit-lens readouts show retrieved facts emerging early and their composition crystallizing in late layers, and KV-cache transplants at filler positions causally swap outputs between examples. We introduce an unsupervised decoding pipeline that takes only hidden states as input and recovers intermediate values with 80-95% accuracy (best LLM judge) across both models and all four tasks, without ground-truth labels or training. Hidden computation that defeats behavioral CoT monitoring is, on these tasks, directly readable from the residual stream, suggesting monitorability is a property of the model's full computational trace, not just its surface tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文发现前沿大语言模型（LLM）能在无意义填充符（如省略号、计数序列）上进行多步推理并正确作答，表面无链式思维（CoT）痕迹；但通过分析隐藏状态（注意力机制、logit-lens、KV缓存移植等），作者揭示其内部推理过程结构清晰、可读性强，并提出一种无需标签或训练的无监督解码方法，以80–95%准确率恢复中间计算结果，表明行为监控失效不等于不可监控，关键在于利用完整计算轨迹而非仅输出token。
AI.motivation: 解决行为层面链式思维（CoT）监控失效的问题——当模型用无信息填充符完成推理时，表面无法观测其推理路径，但作者质疑‘隐藏于输出’不等于‘不可观测’，旨在探索是否能从内部状态中可靠还原推理过程。
AI.method: 在四类任务（事实检索、并行数值组合、字符串操作、上下文内计算）上，对DeepSeek V3和Kimi K2两个开源前沿模型，采用多种神经元级分析技术：注意力流追踪、logit-lens逐层读出、KV缓存位置移植实验，并构建仅依赖隐藏状态的无监督解码管道。
AI.result: 发现模型在填充符上的推理具有结构化、可解释性：注意力将问题路由至填充区再导向答案；事实在浅层即被检索，组合逻辑在深层固化；KV缓存移植可因果交换输出；所提无监督解码方法在所有任务和模型上恢复中间值准确率达80–95%（以最佳LLM为评判基准）。
AI.conclusion: 模型内部计算虽规避了基于输出token的行为监控，但在残差流中仍高度可读；监控可行性取决于对全计算轨迹（而不仅是输出token）的访问能力，为可信AI提供了新路径——转向隐状态层面的可解释性与监控。

title: CIPHER: Causal Intervention Pathways for Healthcare Equity and Robustness
summary: Deep learning models for medical diagnosis frequently exhibit substantial performance disparities across sensitive subgroups (e.g., race, sex), even when average accuracy is high. While generative data augmentation offers a route to mitigate this, existing strategies are suboptimal; they typically address only one or two dependency channels between sensitive attributes and image features. We formalize the medical image formation process via a structural causal model, revealing that sensitive attributes actually influence image content through four distinct pathways-a structural complexity neglected by prior works. Based on this insight, we introduce CIPHER (Causal Intervention Pathways for Healthcare Equity and Robustness), a framework designed to systematically intervene on all four causal paths. To achieve this, CIPHER utilizes a diffusion backbone equipped with classifier-free guidance and null-text inversion. This technical design enables the faithful reconstruction of patient-specific anatomy while allowing for the precise, editable synthesis of counterfactuals required to break sensitive dependency chains. We tested CIPHER using chest X-ray and dermoscopy benchmarks across both standard and shifted data distributions. By employing a multi-pathway intervention strategy, our model reduced worst-group disparities by an average of 35.8% compared to disease-conditioned synthesis baselines, while also improving total diagnostic accuracy

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIPHER框架，通过因果干预路径解决医疗图像诊断中敏感属性（如种族、性别）导致的性能差异问题，显著降低最差子组的性能差距并提升总体诊断准确率。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医疗诊断中常因敏感属性（如种族、性别）产生显著性能差异，现有生成式数据增强方法仅处理部分依赖关系，未能全面建模敏感属性对图像内容的多路径影响。
AI.method: 基于结构因果模型揭示敏感属性影响图像内容的四条独立路径，并设计CIPHER框架，利用带无分类器引导和空文本反转的扩散模型，实现患者解剖结构的保真重建与可编辑反事实图像合成，以系统干预全部四条因果路径。
AI.result: 在胸部X光和皮肤镜检查基准上，CIPHER相比疾病条件化合成基线，平均降低最差子组性能差距35.8%，同时提升总体诊断准确率。
AI.conclusion: CIPHER通过多路径因果干预有效缓解医疗AI中的公平性与鲁棒性问题，为基于因果推理的医疗图像生成与诊断提供了新范式。

title: Rank-Order N-of-M Codes for Sparse Distributed Memory: Disentangling Representation and Learning Effects in Noise Robustness Against Contemporary Neuromorphic Architectures
comment: 14 pages, 8 tables, 2 figures. Revisits rank-order sparse distributed memory for continual learning and memory-augmented AI. Includes comparisons with CALM and SpikingMamba, statistical evaluation, and real embedding experiments
summary: Large language models remain limited as continual learning systems, motivating renewed interest in Sparse Distributed Memory (SDM) as an explicit online episodic memory. CALM (Nechesov and Ruponen, 2025) identifies its threshold-binary encoder as an open design question. This paper evaluates rank-order N-of-M encoding (Furber et al., 2007) as an alternative. We make three contributions. First, a faithful reimplementation validates the published architecture by confirming exact equivalence between WheelSDM and RankOrderSDM (cosine similarity 1.0000 across 10 seeds) and reproducing the documented divergence of RDLIF neurons under interference. Second, multi-seed capacity experiments show RankOrderSDM outperforming StandardSDM by 13.4 percentage points at saturation in the scaled configuration and by 0.8 percentage points at the published architecture scale. Third, BER robustness experiments disentangle representation and learning effects, showing that the large robustness gain arises primarily from the interaction of rank-order encoding with MAX-Hebbian learning, while the encoder alone provides only a small advantage under matched learning conditions. Experiments on GloVe-100 embeddings confirm this small but consistent encoding benefit on real structured data, whereas sentence embeddings exhibit a ceiling effect at low memory load. A secondary analysis shows that idealized rank-order encoding requires half the component-level encoding energy of SpikingMamba's SI-LIF neurons at four-bit precision, although decoder costs dominate overall system energy. These results identify which components of the original rank-order SDM architecture provide measurable benefits for contemporary memory-augmented AI systems, offering practical guidance for architectures such as CALM.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了秩序N-of-M编码作为Sparse Distributed Memory (SDM)中阈值二值编码的替代方案，在CALM框架下验证其在容量、鲁棒性和能效方面的优势，并指出其核心增益源于编码与MAX-Hebbian学习的协同作用。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在持续学习方面能力有限，而Sparse Distributed Memory（SDM）作为显式在线情景记忆被重新关注；CALM模型中阈值二值编码器的设计尚不明确，亟需更优替代方案。
AI.method: 1）忠实复现WheelSDM与RankOrderSDM架构，验证等价性及RDLIF神经元干扰行为；2）多随机种子容量实验对比StandardSDM与RankOrderSDM；3）BER鲁棒性实验分离表示与学习效应；4）在GloVe-100和句子嵌入上测试真实数据表现；5）估算理想化秩序编码的组件级能耗。
AI.result: 1）RankOrderSDM与WheelSDM完全等价（余弦相似度1.0000）；2）饱和容量提升13.4个百分点（缩放配置）和0.8个百分点（原架构）；3）鲁棒性增益主要来自秩序编码与MAX-Hebbian学习的耦合，单独编码仅带来小幅提升；4）GloVe-100上存在稳定但微小的编码优势，句子嵌入在低负载下达天花板；5）理想秩序编码能耗为SpikingMamba SI-LIF神经元的一半（4比特精度），但解码能耗占主导。
AI.conclusion: 秩序N-of-M编码在SDM中具有明确实用价值，尤其与MAX-Hebbian学习协同时显著提升容量与鲁棒性；该结果为CALM等现代记忆增强AI系统提供了可落地的架构优化指引。

title: The Role of Rigor in Artificial Intelligence
comment: To appear in D. Rickles and T. Thebault (eds.) Philosophy of Rigor (Routledge, 2026)
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has achieved extraordinary capabilities despite lacking many of the conceptual and scientific foundations associated with mature disciplines. Unlike traditional sciences, where reliable technology typically emerges from theoretical understanding, modern AI has progressed largely through performance-driven iteration and "alchemical" experimentation. This tension motivates a systematic analysis of AI through the lens of rigor. We introduce a three-part framework consisting of conceptual rigor (clarifying foundational concepts), epistemic rigor (establishing scientific understanding), and operational rigor (ensuring reliable performance and deployment). Using this framework, we analyze competing conceptions of intelligence and understanding, the strengths and limitations of the empirical approach to deep learning, the power and pitfalls of benchmarks, and the obstacles to theory development posed by modern AI systems. We argue that the distinctive trajectory of AI arises from how forms of rigor interact across paradigms, resulting in the primacy of operational rigor in modern deep learning. This perspective helps explain both AI's rapid advances and its persistent uncertainties, while clarifying the challenges involved in transforming AI into a mature science and reliable technology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个三部分的严谨性框架（概念严谨性、认识论严谨性和操作严谨性），用以系统分析人工智能的发展现状，指出当前AI以操作严谨性为主导，导致其快速进步与持续不确定性并存，并探讨了AI走向成熟科学所面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: AI虽取得显著成就，但缺乏成熟学科应有的概念与科学基础，其发展主要依赖性能驱动的迭代和‘炼金术式’实验，这种现象促使作者从‘严谨性’角度系统审视AI。
AI.method: 构建包含概念严谨性、认识论严谨性和操作严谨性三个维度的分析框架，并以此框架分析智能与理解的不同定义、深度学习经验方法的优劣、基准测试的利弊，以及现代AI系统对理论发展的阻碍。
AI.result: 揭示AI独特发展轨迹源于不同严谨性形式在范式间的交互作用，特别是现代深度学习中操作严谨性的主导地位；该视角有助于解释AI的快速进展及其固有不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 要将AI转变为成熟科学和可靠技术，必须协调三种严谨性，尤其需加强概念与认识论层面的基础建设，而不能仅依赖操作层面的性能优化。

title: Current as Touch: Proprioceptive Contact Feedback for Compliant Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Compliance is essential for dexterous manipulation, yet existing solutions often rely on external tactile or force sensors that are costly, fragile, and difficult to deploy on low-cost robot hands. We propose a proprioception-driven framework that learns contact-aware compliance cues from motor current and joint states. Since motor current is closely related to actuator torque, it provides an intrinsic signal for perceiving contact force, object resistance, and grasp stability without additional sensing hardware. Rather than estimating external wrenches or commanding torque, our method predicts a compliance reference position: an ideal joint-position target for a standard PD controller whose induced position error generates appropriate grasping force. This position-based formulation is compatible with mainstream teleoperation and policy-learning pipelines, while enabling the robot to adapt interaction forces from real-time proprioceptive feedback. Thus, motor current serves not only as a force proxy but also as a learnable proprioceptive contact signal for compliance reference prediction. Experiments on multiple dexterous hands and contact-rich tasks, including fragile object handling, sustained surface contact, thin-object retrieval, and dynamic load adaptation, show stable compliant grasping, safer and more efficient teleoperation, and improved downstream policy learning without external tactile or force sensors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅依赖电机电流和关节状态的本体感知式柔顺控制框架，无需外部力/触觉传感器，通过学习预测PD控制器的柔顺参考位置，实现稳定、安全且适应性强的灵巧操作。
AI.motivation: 现有灵巧操作中的柔顺控制常依赖昂贵、易损且难以部署于低成本灵巧手的外部力/触觉传感器，亟需一种低成本、鲁棒、易集成的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用电机电流（作为关节扭矩与接触力的内在代理）和关节状态，端到端学习预测一个柔顺参考位置，供标准PD控制器使用；该位置误差自然生成所需抓取力，避免显式力估计或扭矩控制。
AI.result: 在多种灵巧手和接触密集任务（如易碎物操作、持续表面接触、薄物拾取、动态负载适应）中验证了方法有效性：实现了稳定柔顺抓取、更安全高效的遥操作、以及无需外置传感器的下游策略学习性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 电机电流不仅是力的代理信号，更可作为可学习的本体感知接触信号，支撑位置式的柔顺控制范式，为低成本、高鲁棒性灵巧操作提供了新路径。

title: Mental Health Disorder Detection Beyond Social Media: A Systematic Review of Available Datasets
summary: Detecting mental health disorders in a timely manner is an important societal challenge. NLP and machine learning (ML) methods used to assist with detection rely on data collected primarily from social media. However, such datasets often have sampling biases and inherent ethical and privacy issues. One avenue to overcome these limitations is non-social media data. We present the first comprehensive review of non-social media, free-text datasets for mental health research. We use the PRISMA methodology to conduct our survey and we review datasets available in multiple languages. We find that non-social media free-text based datasets are predominantly focused on English and on detecting depression. These datasets also vary in demographics, platforms, data types, annotation techniques, and methodologies. This systematic review also reveals key gaps and highlights opportunities to develop more diverse, reliable and clinically-relevant resources.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了非社交媒体来源的自由文本数据集在心理健康研究中的应用，发现现有资源主要集中于英语和抑郁症检测，存在语言、人群、平台和标注方法等方面的局限性，并指出了构建更广泛、可靠及临床相关数据集的机会。
AI.motivation: 克服社交媒体数据在心理健康检测中存在采样偏差、伦理与隐私问题等局限性，探索非社交媒体的自由文本数据作为替代资源。
AI.method: 采用PRISMA系统性综述方法，调研多语言、非社交媒体来源的自由文本心理健康数据集。
AI.result: 发现现有非社交媒体自由文本数据集主要面向英语和抑郁症检测，在人口统计学特征、数据来源平台、数据类型、标注方式和建模方法上差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了当前资源的关键缺口，强调需开发更多样化、可靠且具临床意义的数据集以支持心理健康NLP与ML研究。

title: Evaluating Agentic Harness Systems for Autonomous Computational Pathology
summary: Autonomous computational pathology (ACP) converts high-level pathology analysis goals into executable, traceable and clinically bounded workflows. Realizing this capability requires adapting general agentic harness systems to pathology-specific tasks, tools, evidence standards and clinical claim boundaries. We contribute ACP-Bench, a framework that adapts existing harness systems from computational pathology support toward ACP workflow capability.
