Puzzle-75B-A9B is constructed using a multi-stage pipeline that combines the Iterative Puzzle compression framework with knowledge distillation, reinforcement learning, quantization, and a Multi-Token Prediction head. The compression process jointly optimizes heterogeneous MoE pruning, active parameter budget, and Mamba pruning to improve inference efficiency while preserving model quality. We evaluate Puzzle-75B-A9B on a broad suite of reasoning, coding, multilingual, long-context, and agentic benchmarks. Despite substantial compression, the model retains strong downstream accuracy relative to the parent model across a wide range of tasks. These results demonstrate that large hybrid MoE models can be substantially optimized for deployment efficiency while maintaining strong downstream capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B，一种面向交互式部署优化的压缩版大模型，在保持下游任务性能的同时显著提升推理吞吐与长上下文并发能力。
AI.motivation: 解决大型混合MoE模型在实际交互式服务中部署效率低、硬件资源受限（如高用户吞吐、超长上下文）的问题。
AI.method: 采用多阶段压缩流程，融合Iterative Puzzle框架、知识蒸馏、强化学习、量化和Multi-Token Prediction头，并联合优化异构MoE剪枝、活跃参数预算与Mamba剪枝。
AI.result: 在单8xB200节点上服务器吞吐达Nemotron-3-Super的2倍；单H100 GPU上1M-token并发从1提升至8；在推理、编程、多语言、长上下文及智能体等基准测试中保持强性能。
AI.conclusion: 大型混合MoE模型可通过协同压缩策略大幅优化部署效率，同时维持强大的下游任务能力。

title: HALO-WA: Hybrid-Attention Latent-Guided Online Reinforcement Learning for World-Action Models
summary: World-action (WA) models can generate long-horizon action chunks for general-purpose robotic manipulation, but they remain vulnerable to calibration, perception, and contact-dynamics errors in real-world precision tasks, often failing in the final few millimeters of alignment or insertion. We propose HALO-WA, a hybrid-attention latent-guided online reinforcement learning (RL) framework for WA models, which leverages latent features and action priors from the WA generation process through a lightweight actor-critic adapter to enable fast online adaptation to real deployment errors. HALO-WA introduces a hybrid-attention structure that preserves the temporal consistency of action chunks while reading task-relevant information from WA latents conditioned on visual context and end-stage correction requirements, thereby producing refined action chunks. We validate HALO-WA on four real-world precision manipulation tasks, where it improves the average success rate from 26.4\% for WA-base to 87.1\%, outperforming the strongest baseline by 19.2 percentage points while requiring only 45--75 minutes of online training per task. To facilitate reproducibility, we further conduct supplementary simulation experiments in RoboTwin and release the code at https://github.com/YeanRoot/HALO-WA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HALO-WA框架，通过混合注意力机制与在线强化学习适配器，提升世界动作（WA）模型在真实精密操作任务中的鲁棒性与成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作（WA）模型在长程操作中表现良好，但在真实场景的精密任务（如毫米级对准/插入）中易受校准、感知及接触动力学误差影响而失败。
AI.method: 提出HALO-WA：一种混合注意力、潜空间引导的在线强化学习框架；利用WA模型生成过程中的潜特征和动作先验，通过轻量级Actor-Critic适配器实现快速在线适应；引入混合注意力结构，在保持动作时序一致性的同时，融合视觉上下文与末端修正需求以细化动作块。
AI.result: 在四个真实世界精密操作任务上，成功率达87.1%，显著高于基线WA模型的26.4%（+19.2个百分点）；每任务仅需45–75分钟在线训练；并在RoboTwin仿真中补充验证，开源代码。
AI.conclusion: HALO-WA有效弥合了离线预训练WA模型与真实部署之间的精度鸿沟，为通用机器人操作提供了高效、可部署的在线自适应解决方案。

title: Spinning Straw into Gold: Relabeling LLM Agent Trajectories in Hindsight for Successful Demonstrations
summary: Large language model agents operate in partially observable, long-horizon settings where obtaining supervision remains a major bottleneck. We address this by utilizing a source of supervision overlooked in existing post-training methods: unintended yet successful goals embedded within agent rollouts. Specifically, we introduce Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL), where an auxiliary LLM reviews each completed trajectory and relabels it with all of the natural-language goals the agent actually achieved. HSL then pairs the trajectory with its relabeled goals and uses these pairs for additional fine-tuning. To mitigate suboptimality in the relabeled data, we propose two learning techniques for HSL, irrelevant-action masking and sample reweighting. Our experiments show that HSL is flexible and compatible with existing post-training pipelines. It improves both SFT and DPO, with larger gains on long-horizon tasks with more diverse goal spaces. Moreover, HSL is sample-efficient: on ALFWorld, it surpasses baselines trained on the full dataset while using only one quarter of the ground-truth demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为‘后见监督学习（HSL）’的新方法，利用智能体在运行过程中无意但成功达成的目标作为监督信号，通过辅助大语言模型对轨迹进行重标注并用于后续微调，显著提升了长周期、多目标任务的性能，且具有样本高效性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型智能体在部分可观测、长周期环境中运行时，获取高质量监督信号困难，现有后训练方法忽略了智能体实际达成的、未被显式设定的‘意外成功目标’这一潜在监督来源。
AI.method: 提出Hindsight Supervised Learning（HSL）：用辅助LLM对完成的轨迹自动识别并标注其中自然语言形式的实际达成目标；将轨迹与重标注目标配对用于进一步微调；引入无关动作掩码（irrelevant-action masking）和样本重加权（sample reweighting）以缓解重标注数据的次优性。
AI.result: HSL兼容现有SFT和DPO流程，在ALFWorld等长周期任务上显著提升性能；在ALFWorld上仅用1/4的真值示范数据即超越使用全部示范的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HSL有效挖掘智能体自身行为中隐含的成功信号，是一种灵活、通用且样本高效的后训练范式，为解决长周期决策中的监督瓶颈提供了新思路。

title: Conversational Human Audio-visual Talking Dialogue Generation
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026 as a main paper
summary: Large-scale dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue (DIAD) datasets provide fundamental data resources for developing humanoid interactive virtual agents and digital humans. However, collecting such data is time-consuming, expensive, and ethically sensitive. To address this, we propose CHAT, a new dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue generation (DIADG) framework that generates diverse, paired, and mutually responsive speech-face dialogue clips from a single textual prompt. CHAT unifies large language models and talking face models with interactive audio and facial behaviour refinement modules, enabling the generation of aligned dyadic dialogue clips with diverse contents and facial identities. Experiments show that CHAT outperforms existing related methods designed for similar tasks under both objective and subjective evaluations. Moreover, our synthesised CHAT-AVD-50k dataset serves as effective pre-training data for downstream interactive head generation, consistently improving PerFRDiff and ReactDiff on REACT 2024. CHAT offers a scalable alternative to the costly and ethically sensitive collection of real dyadic interaction data.

AI.tldr: CHAT是一个用于生成大规模双人交互音视频对话（DIAD）数据的新框架，通过文本提示生成配对、响应式的语音-面部对话片段，避免了真实数据采集的高成本与伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模双人交互音视频对话数据集采集耗时、昂贵且存在伦理风险，亟需低成本、可扩展的合成方案。
AI.method: CHAT融合大语言模型与说话人脸生成模型，并引入交互式音频和面部行为精调模块，实现从单条文本提示生成内容多样、身份各异、音画对齐的双人对话片段。
AI.result: CHAT在客观与主观评估中均优于现有同类方法；其生成的CHAT-AVD-50k数据集有效提升下游交互头部生成模型（PerFRDiff、ReactDiff）性能。
AI.conclusion: CHAT为构建虚拟人交互系统提供了高效、可控、伦理友好的合成数据替代方案，显著降低对真实交互数据的依赖。

title: OpFlow: Learning Opportunity-Conditioned Choice Potentials for Robust OD Flow Prediction
summary: Origin-destination (OD) flow prediction is central to urban analytics, yet deep models trained on raw counts remain vulnerable to distribution shift. The core problem is that raw count supervision cannot distinguish transferable choice mechanisms from environment-specific shortcuts. Raw OD count mixes two objects: how much demand an origin produces and how that demand is allocated across destinations. We argue that the transferable object is the exposure-to-choice law that maps spatial conditions to relative destination preferences. We propose OpFlow, a mechanism-constrained framework that learns row-centered choice potentials and reconstructs flows by combining the induced allocation with a separately calibrated origin scale. Under distribution shift, spatial exposures and the induced allocations are allowed to vary; what transfers is the conditional map from exposure states to relative choice potentials. Theoretically, we characterize the identifiable row-centered potential and show that classical spatial interaction laws are restricted log-potential cases. Controlled synthetic shifts and a real-world experiment show OpFlow improves robustness under environment shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpFlow框架，通过分离学习可迁移的空间暴露-选择规律与环境特异性需求规模，提升OD流预测在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于原始OD计数的深度模型易受分布偏移影响，因其无法区分可迁移的选择机制与环境特异性捷径；原始计数混杂了源地需求量与目的地分配比例两个不同概念。
AI.method: 提出OpFlow框架：学习行中心化的选择势能（反映空间暴露到相对目的地偏好的条件映射），并独立校准源地尺度因子，通过二者结合重构OD流；理论分析其可识别性，并证明经典空间相互作用模型是其特例。
AI.result: 在可控合成分布偏移和真实世界实验中，OpFlow相比基线方法展现出更强的跨环境泛化能力与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将OD预测建模为暴露-选择机制而非纯统计拟合，能有效提升模型对分布变化的适应性；OpFlow为城市分析中因果驱动的流量建模提供了新范式。

title: Decentralized Aggregation of LLM Predictions via Wagering Mechanisms
summary: It is increasingly common to aggregate predictions from multiple LLMs, each with domain expertise or access to private tools and data, to improve collective prediction performance. In decentralized settings, aggregation weights need to be determined without access to models' private information and should remain robust to strategic reporting. We propose a family of advantage-aligned wagering mechanisms for LLM aggregation (WALLA), in which each model reports a prediction and a learned wager, and predictions are aggregated using wagers as weights. WALLA introduces a leave-one-out baseline into the net payout function, yielding three desirable properties: (1) dominant-strategy incentive compatibility of prediction under arbitrary belief structure, (2) advantage--wager alignment, where the optimal wager is proportional to the model's expected score advantage, and (3) prediction-agnostic wager optimization, enabling decentralized learning of wager policies without requiring optimal predictions. We further instantiate two mechanism variants that trade off normality and no-arbitrage while maintaining a bounded worst-case deficit for the mechanism. Experiments on question-answering and forecasting benchmarks across heterogeneous models and private-information settings show that WALLA matches centralized aggregation methods in predictive performance, while simultaneously achieving decentralized learning, advantage-aligned aggregation weights, uncertainty awareness, and incentive-compatible prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为WALLA的去中心化LLM预测聚合机制，通过引入留一法基线，实现激励相容、优势-投注对齐及预测无关的投注优化，实验证明其在保持去中心化的同时达到与中心化方法相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 在去中心化场景下，需在不访问模型私有信息的前提下确定聚合权重，并保证对策略性报告的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出WALLA机制，每个大语言模型报告预测和学习得到的‘投注’，以投注为权重进行聚合；核心创新是将留一法基线引入净收益函数。
AI.result: WALLA具备三大性质：(1)任意信念结构下的主导策略激励相容；(2)最优投注正比于模型预期得分优势；(3)投注优化与预测无关，支持去中心化 wager 学习。实验表明其在问答与预测任务上媲美中心化方法。
AI.conclusion: WALLA为多LLM协同提供了一种兼具激励兼容性、可学习性与高性能的去中心化聚合框架，适用于含私有信息与异构模型的实际部署场景。

title: GPU-Accelerated Polygonal Signed Distance Functions for Real-Time Collision Avoidance
summary: Optimization-based local planning and control require high-rate collision-avoidance constraint evaluation over a prediction horizon. In obstacle-dense environments, where feasible space is limited and the constraints become increasingly complex, the computational workload often dominates the control-cycle runtime. The resulting bottleneck motivates collision-avoidance constraints that combine computational efficiency with geometric fidelity. The proposed Polygonal Signed Distance Function (PSDF) is a geometry-exact signed distance function between a convex polygonal robot footprint and obstacles represented by their boundary edges. It is implemented as a weight-free, branch-free tensorized geometric pipeline enabling batched GPU execution and automatic differentiation. The PSDF is embedded into model predictive control by locally linearizing the stage-wise safety constraints within a sequential quadratic programming-based real-time iteration scheme, yielding the PSDF-embedded model predictive controller (PSDF-MPC). The design separates CPU/GPU computation so that the GPU evaluates batched PSDF values and gradients while the CPU solves a sparse quadratic program whose dimension is determined by system dimensions and horizon length, not by obstacle features. Microbenchmarks show that PSDF scales favorably against signed-distance query baselines. Closed-loop simulated and real-world navigation experiments, including comparisons with optimization-based baselines, demonstrate that PSDF-MPC maintains real-time feasibility and robust collision avoidance in dense polygonal environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为多边形符号距离函数（PSDF）的高效、几何精确的碰撞避让约束方法，用于优化驱动的局部规划与控制，在密集障碍物环境中实现GPU加速的实时模型预测控制（PSDF-MPC）。
AI.motivation: 在障碍物密集环境中，基于优化的局部规划与控制因高频碰撞避让约束评估而面临严重计算瓶颈，亟需兼顾计算效率与几何精度的新型约束表示方法。
AI.method: 提出Polygonal Signed Distance Function（PSDF），一种针对凸多边形机器人底座与边缘表示障碍物的几何精确符号距离函数；采用无权重、无分支、张量化几何流水线实现，支持批处理GPU执行与自动微分；将其嵌入MPC框架，通过序列二次规划（SQP）实时迭代中对阶段安全约束进行局部线性化，构建PSDF-MPC，并分离CPU/GPU计算职责。
AI.result: 微基准测试显示PSDF在查询效率上优于传统符号距离基线；仿真与真实世界闭环导航实验表明，PSDF-MPC在密集多边形环境中保持实时性与鲁棒避障能力，并优于现有优化类基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PSDF及其嵌入式控制器PSDF-MPC为高动态、障碍密集场景下的实时安全运动规划提供了兼具几何保真度与计算可扩展性的新范式。

title: Risk-Constrained Freshness-Aware Semantic Caching for Open-Web Retrieval-Augmented LLMs
summary: Semantic caching reduces the latency and cost of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) by serving cached answers to semantically similar queries, but most existing methods do not model the time-varying freshness of open-web evidence. We present FreshCache, a three-tier semantic cache that treats cache reuse as a risk-constrained temporal inference problem: before approving a cache hit, FreshCache estimates the probability that the cached result is stale using a fitted exponential decay model enhanced by a learned MLP, and approves reuse only when that probability falls below a per-tier error budget across answers (epsilon = 0.10), URL lists (epsilon = 0.20), and page content (epsilon = 0.35). This allows the system to degrade gracefully as entries age rather than forcing a binary choice between a stale hit and a full pipeline execution. We introduce FreshCache-Bench, a benchmark of 8,072 base queries across five freshness classes with ground truth staleness labels drawn from real web snapshots at 1, 12, 24 hours, and 7 days after a baseline crawl, expanded to 31,201 queries via paraphrase generation. At the 24-hour evaluation window, FreshCache_MLP achieves 97% search API savings at 0.1% hash-based stale error, and an LLM-judge evaluation on 396 confirmed change pairs shows that only 34.3% of detected content changes actually affect answer correctness, placing true answer-affecting stale error at approximately 0.034%. The rule-based FreshCache achieves 98% search savings at 3.3% stale error under a temporal holdout calibration, outperforming SemanticTTL (14.9% stale, 72% saved), vCache (7.2% stale, 47% saved), and SCALM (5.2% stale, 96% saved). Ablations show the temporal risk gate accounts for an 11.6 point reduction in stale error over similarity-only reuse, and the learned MLP reduces stale error a further 3.2 points over the rule-based model.

AI.tldr: FreshCache 是一种三层次语义缓存系统，通过建模开放网络证据的时间衰减特性，将缓存复用建模为风险约束下的时序推断问题，显著降低 RAG 的延迟与成本，同时控制不同粒度（答案、URL 列表、页面内容）的过期错误率。
AI.motivation: 现有语义缓存方法未充分建模开放网络证据随时间变化的新鲜度，导致缓存复用易产生过期结果。
AI.method: 提出 FreshCache：基于拟合指数衰减模型并融合学习型 MLP 估计缓存项过期概率；设置三层误差预算（ε=0.10/0.20/0.35）进行风险感知的缓存命中决策；构建 FreshCache-Bench 基准（含真实网页快照与多时间点 staleness 标注）。
AI.result: 在 24 小时窗口下，FreshCache_MLP 实现 97% 搜索 API 节省且哈希级过期错误仅 0.1%；LLM 评估显示真正影响答案正确性的过期错误仅约 0.034%；规则版 FreshCache 达 98% 节省与 3.3% 过期错误，优于 SemanticTTL、vCache 和 SCALM；消融实验证明时序风险门控和 MLP 分别降低过期错误 11.6 和 3.2 个百分点。
AI.conclusion: FreshCache 通过引入时序风险建模与分层误差控制，实现了缓存复用与新鲜度间的精细权衡，支持系统随缓存老化而优雅降级，显著提升 RAG 系统的实际部署可靠性与效率。

title: Prior Bias in Vision Language Models on UML Diagram Interpretation
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to software engineering artifacts, especially UML class diagrams whose meaning depends on visual notation. Yet, it is unclear whether VLMs actually read such diagrams or instead answer from pretrained priors about how classes typically relate. We introduce a controlled UML benchmark in which each prior-conforming diagram is paired with its prior-conflicting counterpart that (1) preserves the same class names and layout while (2) reverses only the relation arrow. We evaluate eight open-source VLMs from two model families, InternVL3.5 and Qwen3, alongside two closed-source frontier models GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.4 Mini. Across the eight open-source models, reversing the arrow reduces relation-direction accuracy by 33.48% on average, while GPT-5.4 Mini retains a 10% gap. In the harder three-class condition, accuracy drops sharply by 45.28% for open-source models, and even 18.62% for the GPT-5.4 family on average. Scaling provides only limited improvements and is family-dependent. Our benchmark presents a diagnostic prior-driven failure in diagram-grounded software understanding. Our artifact is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/UMLKnowledgeConflict-8461.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种控制型UML类图基准测试，用于检验视觉语言模型（VLMs）是否真正理解图表语义而非依赖先验知识；实验表明多数VLMs在箭头方向反转时性能显著下降，揭示其在图表驱动软件理解中存在先验主导的失败模式。
AI.motivation: 探究VLMs是否真正理解UML类图的视觉语义，还是仅依赖预训练中习得的类间关系先验知识。
AI.method: 构建一个受控UML基准：每对样本包含先验符合与先验冲突的类图，二者类名和布局相同，仅关系箭头方向相反；评估8个开源VLM（InternVL3.5、Qwen3）及2个闭源前沿模型（GPT-5.4系列）。
AI.result: 开源VLMs在箭头反转下关系方向准确率平均下降33.48%，GPT-5.4 Mini仍有10%差距；三类复杂条件下，开源模型准确率骤降45.28%，GPT-5.4家族也下降18.62%；模型缩放带来的提升有限且依赖模型家族。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs在UML类图理解上严重依赖先验知识，缺乏真正的图表接地能力；该基准可作为诊断先验驱动失效的有效工具。

title: Transition Information Density: Morphological Trajectories, Synesthetic Perception, and Structured Interpolation in Neural Training (or: The Synesthetic AI)
comment: 38 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. Empirical results from structured interpolation training across four representational mediums. Pipeline scripts, experimental data, and the Synesthesia Grid algorithm available upon reasonable request
summary: Standard machine learning training presents data as discrete endpoint pairs, omitting the structure of the space between them. This paper introduces Transition Information Density (TID) -- the information content recoverable from structured intermediate states between categorically distinct training endpoints -- and Positional Identity, the defined location of an intermediate state on the A-to-B continuum. Both constructs are grounded in three empirical contexts: grapheme-color synesthesia, the Synesthesia Grid (a boundary-contour morphing algorithm instantiating TID in visual morphological space), and a four-condition training experiment across four representational mediums. Probes trained on structured interpolation at defined Positional Identities (C3) exhibit substantially lower intrinsic dimensionality than volume-matched controls (C2) in Phonetic/Linguistic (C3: 3.33 vs. C2: 10.81) and Semantic Description (C3: 4.59 vs. C2: 8.67) mediums. Visual and cross-modal mediums do not show this effect, establishing a modality boundary condition. A fixed-N=50 comparison confirms that Positional Identity structure, not sample count, drives the effect. Resolution N scales monotonically with representational richness. Pooled TwoNN analysis reveals globally collapsed representations in visual space (0.075) and globally consistent representations in phonetic space (0.977). The paper contributes a formal definition of TID and Positional Identity, a nine-metric shape characterization framework, and a four-condition experimental design isolating trajectory structure, data volume, and Positional Identity as distinct factors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Transition Information Density (TID) 和 Positional Identity 概念，通过多模态实验验证结构化插值训练（C3）能显著降低语音/语言和语义表征的内在维度，且该效应依赖于Positional Identity结构而非样本量，并存在模态边界条件。
AI.motivation: 标准机器学习训练忽略数据点之间空间结构，而人类认知常利用中间状态进行学习；作者受联觉现象启发，试图形式化并量化这种中间状态的信息密度与位置身份。
AI.method: 提出TID与Positional Identity理论框架；设计四条件实验（含结构化插值C3与体积匹配对照C2）；在图符-色彩联觉、Synesthesia Grid算法及四种表征模态中实证检验；采用内在维度估计、TwoNN分析与九指标形状刻画框架。
AI.result: C3在语音/语言（3.33 vs. 10.81）和语义描述（4.59 vs. 8.67）模态中显著降低内在维度；视觉与跨模态无此效应；固定N=50证实效应源于Positional Identity结构；分辨率N随表征丰富度单调增长；TwoNN显示语音空间全局一致（0.977），视觉空间全局坍缩（0.075）。
AI.conclusion: TID与Positional Identity是可操作、可测量的认知结构化学习原则；其效应具有模态特异性；为超越端点监督的学习范式提供了理论基础与实验支持。

title: MechMath Agent Team: LLM Driven Agents for Mathematical Research
summary: AI reasoning has become a central focus in contemporary artificial intelligence, largely driven by the success of large language models. However, mathematical research, which is characterized by non-linear derivation paths, rigorous logical requirements, and protracted exploration cycles, poses severe challenges for existing reasoning systems. To overcome these limitations, we present the MechMath Agent Team (MMAT), which is a large language model driven agent designed to serve as a co-pilot throughout the full cycle of mathematical research. We design a tripartite Harness Architecture that decouples system responsibilities into Control, Execution, and Augmentation planes, thereby reconciling rigorous logical control with the agility demanded by open-ended research. Building upon this framework, we instantiate three specialized agents: a Knowledge Base Manager, a Natural Language Prover, and a Formal Language Prover, all operating in a closed loop to produce formally certified mathematical proofs. We evaluate MMAT on open problems in Number Theory, Algebraic Complexity Theory, Differential Algebra, Operator Algebra, and Inequalities. Across a two-month deployment, 11 problems have been solved, demonstrating its capacity to act as a co-pilot throughout the entire research cycle. The contributions are threefold: a general decoupled Harness Architecture for multi-agent mathematical reasoning, its concrete instantiation in the MMAT system, and empirical validation on a diverse suite of open problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MechMath Agent Team (MMAT)，一种基于大语言模型的多智能体系统，通过三层解耦架构（控制、执行、增强）支持数学研究全流程，包含知识库管理、自然语言证明与形式化语言证明三个专用智能体，已在数论等多个领域成功解决11个开放问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI推理系统难以应对数学研究中非线性推导路径、严格逻辑要求和漫长探索周期等挑战。
AI.method: 设计三平面解耦的Harness架构，并构建三个协同工作的专用智能体（知识库管理、自然语言证明、形式化语言证明），形成闭环形式化证明生成系统。
AI.result: 在数论、代数复杂性理论、微分代数、算子代数和不等式等领域的开放问题上，两月内部署成功解决11个问题。
AI.conclusion: MMAT验证了多智能体协同进行全流程数学研究的可行性，提出了通用解耦架构、具体系统实现及跨领域实证结果三大贡献。

title: Agent-driven Long-tail Simulation for Autonomous Driving
summary: Evaluating autonomous driving systems in closed-loop settings requires realistic and interactive simulation, yet existing simulators largely rely on log replay or rule-based agents, limiting behavioral diversity and long-tail coverage. We propose an agent-driven simulation framework in which surrounding road participants are controlled by instruction-following large language models through a structured action interface, enabling intentional and reactive behaviors while preserving physical plausibility. Furthermore, we introduce SemanticPlan, a benchmark of closed-loop planning in long-tail and semantically rich scenarios that augment real nuPlan scenes with multiple interactive agents following diverse language instructions. Evaluation results show that state-of-the-art planners still struggle to consistently achieve safe and effective task completion, suggesting that these long-tail scenarios remain challenging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）驱动的仿真框架，用于评估自动驾驶系统在长尾、语义丰富场景下的闭环规划能力，并构建了SemanticPlan基准测试集。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶仿真器依赖日志回放或规则驱动代理，行为多样性不足、难以覆盖长尾场景，亟需更真实、可交互的闭环仿真环境。
AI.method: 设计了一个由指令跟随式大语言模型控制周围交通参与者的仿真框架，通过结构化动作接口实现意图性与反应性行为；同时构建SemanticPlan基准，基于真实nuPlan场景，注入多个遵循多样化语言指令的交互式智能体。
AI.result: 实验表明当前最先进规划器在SemanticPlan上的安全与任务完成率仍不理想，验证了长尾场景的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的代理仿真和SemanticPlan基准为自动驾驶闭环评估提供了新范式，凸显了长尾交互场景对规划算法的关键考验。

title: CausalGame: Benchmarking Causal Thinking of LLM Agents in Games
comment: Zhenhao, Yongqiang, and Chenxi contributed equally to the project. A short version is accepted at the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026 as an Oral presentation. Project website https://causalgame.github.io/
summary: Building AI Scientist agents with Large Language Models (LLMs) has recently attracted growing attention. Since scientific discovery fundamentally relies on uncovering causal relationships from observations, the capability of causal thinking, i.e., distinguishing causation from correlation and recognizing hidden biases, is essential to LLM agents. Although a number of benchmarks exist for AI Scientists, none explicitly incorporate challenges from selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders that widely exist in real-world scientific discovery. To this end, we present CausalGame, a benchmark that evaluates the causal thinking capabilities of LLM agents through interactive games. CausalGame asks LLM agents to actively design experimental protocols, collect observation data, and derive a final solution with an explanation report. To emulate realistic scientific discovery challenges, we design 14 scenarios that incorporate selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders. Across 30 LLM agents, none demonstrates reliable causal thinking: the best model reaches only 68.0% survival against analytical optima of 78-85%, and merely 5-7% of sessions receive credits on the causal-reasoning rubrics. CausalGame provides a scalable and controlled testbed for evaluating the causal thinking of AI Scientist agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CausalGame基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）作为AI科学家在因果推理能力上的表现，涵盖选择偏差、测量误差和隐变量等现实科学发现中的挑战；实验表明当前LLM在因果思维上仍严重不足。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科学家评测基准未显式涵盖真实科学发现中普遍存在的选择偏差、测量误差和隐变量等因果挑战，亟需更贴近实际的因果推理评测工具。
AI.method: 构建CausalGame基准，包含14个模拟现实因果挑战的交互式游戏场景，要求LLM代理主动设计实验、采集数据并生成带解释的解决方案；对30个LLM代理进行系统评测。
AI.result: 所有30个LLM代理均未展现出可靠的因果思维能力：最优模型仅达到68.0%的生存率（分析最优解为78–85%），仅有5–7%的会话在因果推理评分项中获得认可。
AI.conclusion: CausalGame为AI科学家的因果思维能力提供了可扩展、可控的评测平台，同时揭示了当前LLM在因果推理方面的显著局限性。

title: Cancelable Biometric Template Protection Based on Multi-Instance Fusion: A Contralateral Iris Approach
summary: Biometric templates are vulnerable to theft if stored without protection. Unlike passwords, a compromised iris cannot be reissued. Although existing cancelable biometric schemes address this problem, most still require an external key or token, introducing an additional attack surface. This paper proposes a cancelable contralateral iris template protection scheme that eliminates the need for a separate token or stored secret, satisfying the three requirements of ISO/IEC 24745: irreversibility, unlinkability, and confidentiality. The method fuses three enrollment samples per eye using Majority Vote Fusion to produce a stable template, and applies a salt-based bit permutation derived from the subject's enrollment ID. Combining the left- and right-permuted templates via a bitwise XOR produces a single Protected Fused Template. Since left and right iris patterns are statistically independent, fusing contralateral irises improves the accuracy of the system. An attacker must possess both iris codes and both salts to recover any useful information, yielding a larger effective key space than single-iris schemes. Experiments on three datasets, CASIA-IrisV4-Interval, CASIA-IrisV2 (two devices), and CASIA-Iris-Thousand, yield EERs of $0.36$\%, $4.88$\%, $10.80$\%, and $3.35$\%, respectively; the highest value reflects the more challenging cross-device scenario. These results demonstrate that our contralateral approach outperforms unprotected baselines while remaining competitive with state-of-the-art cancelable methods. %In addition, an ablation study confirms the benefit on both recognition performance and security. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first scheme to combine tokenless multi-instance fusion and contralateral binding under ISO/IEC 24745.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部密钥或令牌的可撤销对侧虹膜模板保护方案，通过融合左右眼虹膜样本并结合基于注册ID的盐值比特置换与异或操作，满足ISO/IEC 24745标准的不可逆性、不可链接性和机密性要求，并在多个数据集上验证了其识别性能与安全性优势。
AI.motivation: 传统虹膜模板易被盗且不可重发；现有可撤销生物特征方案多依赖外部密钥或令牌，引入额外攻击面；需满足ISO/IEC 24745标准且消除密钥依赖。
AI.method: 采用多数投票融合（Majority Vote Fusion）融合每只眼三幅注册图像生成稳定模板；利用注册ID生成盐值进行比特置换；对左右眼置换后模板进行按位异或得到受保护融合模板；利用左右虹膜统计独立性提升识别精度。
AI.result: 在CASIA-IrisV4-Interval、CASIA-IrisV2（双设备）、CASIA-Iris-Thousand三个数据集上分别取得0.36%、4.88%、10.80%和3.35%的EER；最高EER对应跨设备场景，表明方案鲁棒性强；性能优于无保护基线，媲美当前最优可撤销方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方案是首个在ISO/IEC 24745框架下实现无令牌、多实例融合与对侧绑定相结合的虹膜保护方法；兼具高安全性（需同时获取双目虹膜码与双盐值）与高识别精度；为生物特征模板保护提供了新范式。

title: Joint distribution of upstream runoff governs downstream river-discharge prediction uncertainty in distributed ML models
summary: Uncertainty quantification of hydrological predictions is necessary to inform operational decisions. Recent generative machine-learning methods have advanced probabilistic streamflow prediction, but have remained confined to lumped models that predict a basin outlet directly. At the same time, deterministic LSTM runoff models are increasingly applied at grid or catchment scale and routed through river networks to produce spatially continuous, physically consistent discharge fields. This technical note argues that moving probabilistic prediction from lumped to distributed models introduces a specific new requirement: the joint distribution of upstream runoff generation must be sampled jointly. In lumped inference, the model predicts the outlet distribution directly and can modulate spread from basin attributes. In distributed inference, downstream discharge is obtained by routing many upstream runoff predictions, so independent local sampling averages uncertainty away. Using Japan as a case study, we train two probabilistic basin-scale runoff LSTMs and route their runoff through a Hayami routing scheme. Randomly matching upstream ensemble members produces severely under-dispersed downstream ensembles, whereas a simple quantile matching strategy restores much of the spread of the direct basin-scale reference. The shift from lumped to distributed probabilistic hydrology therefore requires explicit attention to the spatial joint structure of runoff uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将概率性水文预测从集总式模型扩展到分布式模型时，如何处理上游径流不确定性联合分布的问题。作者指出，在分布式模型中，若对上游径流进行独立采样会导致下游不确定性被平均掉，从而低估离散度；而采用分位数匹配策略可有效恢复下游集合的分散性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式机器学习方法虽提升了概率性径流预测能力，但主要局限于集总式模型；而分布式LSTM模型虽已用于网格或流域尺度并经河道汇流，却缺乏对上游径流不确定性联合结构的建模，导致下游不确定性被低估。
AI.method: 以日本为案例，训练两个概率性流域尺度径流LSTM模型，并通过Hayami汇流方案进行汇流；对比随机匹配上游集合成员与分位数匹配策略对下游集合离散度的影响。
AI.result: 随机匹配上游集合成员导致下游集合严重欠分散，而分位数匹配策略能显著恢复下游集合的分散性，接近直接流域尺度参考结果。
AI.conclusion: 从集总式向分布式概率水文预测转变时，必须显式考虑径流不确定性在空间上的联合结构，否则会系统性低估下游不确定性。

title: LLM-as-a-Tutor: Policy-Aware Prompt Adaptation for Non-Verifiable RL
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) for non-verifiable instruction following increasingly relies on LLM judges with prompt-specific rubrics as reward signals. While recent methods adapt these rubrics to the evolving policy during training, the training prompts themselves remain static, drawn from fixed corpora. This static approach often results in a critical misalignment between prompt difficulty and policy capability, leaving the judge unable to recover a discriminative reward signal when prompts fail to elicit quality variance among rollouts. To address this misalignment, we introduce LLM-as-a-Tutor, a framework that extends the LLM's role from judge to tutor: a single model serves as an examiner that pairwise-compares policy rollouts to detect non-challenging prompts, and as a generator that appends atomic constraints to them. This append-only design monotonically raises difficulty in step with the policy's capability, producing a self-calibrating training signal without external difficulty schedules. On three complex instruction-following benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms both policy-unaware baselines and prior policy-adaptive methods that adapt rubrics or rewrite prompts, suggesting prompt adaptation as a missing axis of policy-awareness in non-verifiable RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-as-a-Tutor框架，通过让大语言模型同时担任 examiner（检测非挑战性提示）和 generator（向提示追加原子约束），实现训练提示难度随策略能力单调提升，从而解决非可验证指令跟随中提示难度与策略能力的错配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM裁判的强化学习方法虽能自适应调整评分标准，但训练提示仍静态固定，导致提示难度与策略能力不匹配，使裁判无法给出有区分度的奖励信号。
AI.method: 提出LLM-as-a-Tutor框架：单一LLM既作为examiner对策略输出进行两两比较以识别非挑战性提示，又作为generator向提示追加原子约束，采用仅追加设计确保难度单调上升。
AI.result: 在三个复杂指令跟随基准上，该方法持续优于策略无关基线及仅适配评分标准或重写提示的策略自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 提示适应是当前非可验证强化学习中缺失的关键策略感知维度，LLM-as-a-Tutor为构建自校准训练信号提供了新范式。

title: A Perception-Manipulation Robotics System for Food Cutting
summary: In the development of cooking robots, mastering the task of cutting is crucial. A significant challenge lies in the diverse properties of food, which necessitate distinct cutting policies and even different knives for optimal processing. This paper presents a perception-manipulation framework for food-cutting tasks. Our system features a knife selection module that utilizes force data from a preliminary fixed trial cut to select the appropriate knife for the given food. This is followed by an adaptive cutting phase using reinforcement learning (RL) to balance cutting speed and energy efficiency. In our experiments, the knife selection module achieved 100% successful rate on unseen food, and we compared the performances of fixed policy, RL policy, with human operators. Our method not only achieves high performance but also demonstrates comparable results to those of human participants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于食物切割任务的感知-操作框架，包含基于力反馈的刀具选择模块和基于强化学习的自适应切割策略，在未见过的食物上刀具选择成功率达100%，性能媲美人类操作者。
AI.motivation: 烹饪机器人中切割任务面临食物材质多样性带来的挑战，需匹配不同刀具与切割策略。
AI.method: 构建感知-操作框架：先通过固定试切获取力数据以选择合适刀具；再用强化学习优化切割过程，兼顾速度与能耗。
AI.result: 刀具选择模块在未见食物上达到100%成功率；RL策略性能与人类操作者相当。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了食物多样性带来的切割适配问题，实现了自动化切割的高鲁棒性与实用性。

title: Legible-by-Construction: Attention and End-to-End Transformers
summary: A companion paper showed that a transformer's feed-forward layer can be rebuilt from explicit fuzzy set operations - intersection, set-difference, and a self-forgetting sequence quantifier - so its hidden units read as named logical operators at no cost to language-model quality. That left the other half of the transformer opaque. Here we carry the same idea into attention and join the two into one model. The mechanism is minimal: a head's value is passed through a sigmoid, so each value channel becomes a readable detector of whether a feature holds at a token. This adds no parameters and leaves the standard head otherwise untouched. A Boolean variant goes further, restructuring the value into an explicit within-token intersection and negation-capable set-difference. In both designs the output projection is left free, not tied to the vocabulary, which is the load-bearing decision: bounding what a head detects while leaving what it writes unconstrained yields selective detectors, whereas constraining the write does not. A bounded value is shaped into a readable detector by two selectivity pressures - one for sparse firing, one for decisive firing at the rails - and which a design wants is not universal. Across five specialized-attention designs at 125M parameters, 44 to 62 percent of value channels become crisp, contextually selective detectors, and their legibility rises with depth rather than crystallizing only on punctuation. Language-model quality is at parity with a conventional baseline. Finally, we couple the Boolean attention to the legible feed-forward layer and train an end-to-end legible-by-construction language model at benchmark parity: its feed-forward units are named set and quantifier operations throughout, and we can take a token it generates and read the named units that compose to produce it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使Transformer注意力机制可解释的新方法：通过sigmoid变换或布尔变体，将注意力头的value通道转化为可读的、上下文选择性的逻辑检测器，不增加参数且保持语言模型性能；并将其与先前可解释的前馈层结合，构建端到端可解释的语言模型。
AI.motivation: 此前工作已使前馈层可解释，但注意力机制仍不透明；本文旨在将同样可解释性思想扩展至注意力机制，并统一二者构建全可解释模型。
AI.method: 对注意力头value施加sigmoid变换使其成为特征检测器；提出布尔变体实现显式交集与差集；保持输出投影自由（不绑定词表），并通过稀疏激活与轨端决策双重选择性压力提升可读性。
AI.result: 在125M参数模型上，44–62%的value通道成为清晰、上下文选择性的检测器，可读性随网络深度增强；与基线模型语言建模质量持平；最终构建出端到端可解释模型，其前馈单元全程为命名集合与量化操作，可追溯单个生成token的逻辑组成。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制可通过极简结构改造实现高可读性而不损性能；解耦‘检测’与‘书写’是关键设计原则；结合可解释前馈层后，可构建性能对标、全程可读的语言模型。

title: E-TraMamba: A New Paradigm for Efficient Long-Term 3D Feature Tracking with Event Cameras
summary: Event-based 3D tracking enables low-latency and high-speed perception, while existing CNN- and Transformer-based trackers struggle to capture long-range spatiotemporal dependencies in sparse, noisy event streams, especially under real-time and efficiency constraints. To address these challenges, we present E-TraMamba, the first Mamba-based framework for 3D feature tracking on event data. This new framework adopts a linear state-space model for efficient long-range modeling and integrates a lightweight affine-transform predictor to maintain stable tracking under motion blur and occlusion. We also design an effective scheme to fuse multi-scale cues -- local spatiotemporal patches, correlation maps, and positional embeddings -- into a unified representation that enables stable and smooth 3D tracking. We construct a large-scale synthetic dataset, named EvD-PointOdyssey, which is generated with monocular rendering and provides synchronized event streams, depth maps, and accurate 3D trajectories for training and evaluating event-based 3D tracking models. Extensive experiments on event-based benchmarks demonstrate that E-TraMamba achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering over $2\times$ longer feature lifetimes under strict accuracy thresholds (e.g., 0.1 m), with higher tracked-feature ratios and lower RMSE than all baselines. These results make E-TraMamba a strong candidate for low-latency visual odometry, real-time SLAM, and interactive robotics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出E-TraMamba，首个基于Mamba架构的事件驱动3D特征跟踪框架，通过线性状态空间模型高效建模长程时空依赖，并融合多尺度线索，在合成数据集EvD-PointOdyssey上实现SOTA性能，显著提升特征寿命与跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN和Transformer的事件驱动3D跟踪方法难以在稀疏、噪声大的事件流中有效捕获长程时空依赖，且难以满足实时性和效率要求。
AI.method: 提出E-TraMamba框架：采用线性状态空间模型（Mamba）实现高效长程建模；引入轻量仿射变换预测器以应对运动模糊和遮挡；设计多尺度线索（局部时空块、相关图、位置嵌入）融合方案；构建大规模合成数据集EvD-PointOdyssey。
AI.result: 在事件驱动基准测试中达到SOTA：特征寿命提升超2倍（精度阈值0.1m），跟踪特征比例更高、RMSE更低。
AI.conclusion: E-TraMamba为低延迟视觉里程计、实时SLAM和交互式机器人提供了高性能、高效率的3D跟踪新范式。

title: PhenoNEST: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Ontology-Aware Multimodal Plant Phenotyping and Trait Discovery
summary: High-throughput plant phenotyping generates valuable data that often remains trapped in unstructured text and isolated RGB images. To bridge this semantic gap, we propose a framework for constructing a multimodal granular Knowledge Graph (KG) to monitor genotype-phenotype interactions across time and experiments. In this work, we focus on wheat Triticum aestivum as a representative target crop to validate our methodology across complex canopy environments. Our pipeline first distills noisy field notes to extract entities and relations, dynamically constructing the KG by converting unique instances into hierarchical class entities via RDF-typing. These graph nodes are then aligned with standardized ontologies (PO, RO, WTO) using PlantDeBERTa. To visually ground the constructed graph, a Vision-Language Model paired with a wheat-segmentation ViT generates attention-based softmaps, linking specific KG entities directly to image pixels. We introduce a central observation node Plant_Obs_Id to connect these multimodal subgraphs temporally. Evaluated on 500 curated WisWheat samples using Pointing Game accuracy, Visual Word Sense Disambiguation (VWSD), and rank-based metrics, our neuro-symbolic approach successfully maps complex field observations to a structured graph. This enables automated field note auditing, temporal stress monitoring, and precise spatial trait localization for wheat breeders.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种构建多模态细粒度知识图谱（KG）的框架，用于连接小麦表型文本记录与RGB图像，实现基因型-表型动态交互建模。方法融合自然语言处理（PlantDeBERTa）、视觉语言模型与小麦专用ViT分割模型，并引入Plant_Obs_Id节点实现时序对齐；在500个WisWheat样本上验证了其在字段笔记审计、胁迫时序监测和性状空间定位上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 高通量植物表型数据常以非结构化文本和孤立RGB图像形式存在，导致语义鸿沟，难以支持基因型-表型关联的动态、跨实验分析。
AI.method: 提出神经符号融合框架：1）从田间笔记中抽取实体与关系，通过RDF-typing构建分层KG；2）用PlantDeBERTa对齐PO/RO/WTO等标准本体；3）结合视觉语言模型与小麦分割ViT生成注意力软图，将KG节点像素级接地；4）引入Plant_Obs_Id节点实现多模态子图的时序连接。
AI.result: 在500个WisWheat样本上，通过Pointing Game准确率、视觉词义消歧（VWSD）及排序指标验证，该方法能有效将复杂田间观测映射为结构化KG，支持自动笔记审核、时间序列胁迫监测与性状空间精确定位。
AI.conclusion: 所提多模态细粒度KG框架成功弥合了文本与图像间的语义断层，为小麦育种提供了可解释、可追溯、时空关联的智能分析基础设施。

title: Agent Step Value: State-Transition Measurement with State-Grounded LLM Evaluators
summary: Most agent evaluations collapse a multi-step trace into a final answer, a success flag, or a trajectory-level score. These aggregates obscure the diagnostic question developers need most: which action changed the state in a useful direction? We introduce Agent Step Value (ASV), a state-transition measurement framework that scores each observed action by the change it induces in a state-grounded evaluator's distribution over fixed candidate outcomes. ASV renders redacted before/after state projections, uses a stateless LLM evaluator to assign candidate log scores, and reports both gold-free belief diagnostics and offline oracle validation metrics. A label-free rationale pass separates evaluator deliberation from one-token option scoring, preserving candidate likelihoods while exposing leakage and floor-score events. On 100 reviewed open-QA evidence-seeking tasks with live PubMed retrieval, a partially live DeepSeek actor, and DeepSeek log-probability scoring, ASV evaluates 1,100 steps and 2,200 states. Under the fixed-layout rationale-conditioned protocol, mean gold-margin gain is -2.335 (trajectory-bootstrap 95\% CI [-3.395, -1.272]), entropy movement is 0.000, and mean Bayesian surprise is 2.693. ASV therefore localizes constructive and destructive belief pivots that final-answer scores and entropy-only step metrics miss. We release the standalone ASV Eval toolkit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent Step Value（ASV）框架，用于评估智能体每一步动作对状态变化的贡献，通过状态感知的LLM评估器量化动作引发的信念更新，弥补传统轨迹级评估的诊断盲区。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体评估方法仅关注最终答案或轨迹整体得分，无法定位具体哪一步动作有效推动了状态向目标演进，缺乏细粒度的诊断能力。
AI.method: ASV框架基于状态转换建模：对每个动作前后状态生成投影，由无状态LLM评估器对固定候选结果打分（log-prob），结合黄金标注与无监督信念分析（如贝叶斯惊奇、熵变）进行多维诊断；引入无标签推理环节分离评估逻辑与打分过程。
AI.result: 在100个开放域问答任务（接入实时PubMed检索）上评估1,100步，发现ASV能识别出传统指标（如最终答案正确率、熵变）遗漏的建设性/破坏性信念转折点；平均黄金边际增益为-2.335，贝叶斯惊奇均值达2.693，熵变接近零。
AI.conclusion: ASV提供了一种可解释、无需黄金标签、支持离线验证的细粒度动作价值评估范式，显著提升了智能体行为调试与优化的可追溯性，并开源ASV Eval工具包。

title: SurgAM: Surgical Affordance Map Prediction with Multimodal Feature Fusion for Robot Autonomy
summary: Surgical automation is being increasingly studied, yet bridging visual scene understanding with autonomous action planning remains a fundamental challenge. While much research effort has been made on scene perception (e.g., tool recognition and scene segmentation), understanding and predicting actionable possibilities for surgical automation is still underexplored. In this paper, we introduce surgical affordance prediction, which identifies actionable regions for fundamental surgical actions from visual data. Specifically, a novel adaptive feature fusion framework is proposed that leverages the complementary strengths of a self-supervised vision transformer encoder for its superior semantic understanding and a large-scale generative model encoder for its spatially-aware capability. Furthermore, we introduce a hierarchical prompt learning mechanism to adapt to varying procedural contexts. Finally, a scene-guided attention decoder is proposed to focus on critical surgical areas while suppressing background distractions. To validate the effectiveness, we established a new dataset, derived from publicly available surgical datasets with affordance annotations for three basic surgical actions: aspiration, clipping, and retraction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, we validate our framework's applicability for downstream automation on a realistic lung and prostate phantom, and results show that the predicted affordance maps successfully enable autonomous surgical actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出手术可操作性预测（surgical affordance prediction），通过自监督视觉Transformer与大模型编码器的自适应特征融合、分层提示学习和场景引导注意力解码器，实现对吸除、夹闭、牵拉等基本手术动作的可操作区域精准识别，并在新构建的数据集及真实仿体实验中验证了其有效性与下游自动化应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 当前手术自动化研究中，视觉场景理解与自主动作规划之间存在鸿沟；尽管场景感知（如器械识别、分割）已有较多工作，但对手术中‘可操作性’（affordance）的建模与预测仍被忽视。
AI.method: 提出手术可操作性预测任务；设计自适应特征融合框架，结合自监督ViT编码器（强语义理解）与大尺度生成模型编码器（强空间感知）；引入分层提示学习以适配不同手术流程上下文；设计场景引导注意力解码器抑制背景干扰、聚焦关键区域。
AI.result: 在新构建的含三种基本手术动作（吸除、夹闭、牵拉）可操作性标注的数据集上达到SOTA性能；在肺部与前列腺仿体平台上成功驱动自主手术动作，验证了预测结果对下游自动化的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 手术可操作性预测是连接视觉感知与自主决策的关键桥梁；所提多源特征融合与上下文自适应方法显著提升了可操作性建模能力，为手术自动化提供了新范式。

title: WPG-MoE: Weak-Prior-Guided Dense Mixture-of-Experts for User-Level Social Media Depression Detection
summary: Online social media posts provide scalable signals for early depression screening, and recent studies mainly improve pre-classification evidence through risk-post selection, symptom grounding, and clinically informed feature construction. However, these screening-stage designs often leave final decisions to a single detector, overlooking how users heterogeneously express depressive risk after screening. A monolithic classifier must average across heterogeneous users, which may dilute localized evidence and cause misclassification, especially for non-self-disclosing users. To address this issue, we propose WPG-MoE, a weak-prior-guided dense mixture-of-experts framework built on a shared large language model (LLM) backbone. WPG-MoE derives user-level weak semantic priors to softly route users to experts matched to different evidence layouts. We formulate this process as learning using privileged information (LUPI): rich LLM-extracted structured evidence guides training-time routing, while inference retains only Patient Health Questionnaire-9 (PHQ-9) template screening and the deployable backbone. Experiments on Chinese and English datasets show that WPG-MoE outperforms strong baselines with interpretable routing behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WPG-MoE框架，利用弱先验引导的稠密专家混合模型，基于共享大语言模型主干，根据用户异质性表达动态路由至适配专家，提升抑郁症早期筛查效果。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁筛查方法依赖单一分类器，难以应对用户表达风险的异质性，尤其对不主动披露症状者易误判。
AI.method: 提出WPG-MoE：以LLM提取结构化证据作为特权信息指导训练时软路由，推断时仅需PHQ-9模板和轻量主干；通过用户级弱语义先验实现专家动态匹配。
AI.result: 在中英文数据集上显著优于强基线，具备可解释的路由行为。
AI.conclusion: WPG-MoE有效缓解了单分类器对异质用户表达的平均化问题，提升了非自我披露用户的筛查准确性，并兼顾部署实用性与可解释性。

title: SPLIT: Training-Free AI-Generated and Partially Edited Video Detection via Spatial Patch-Level Incoherence and Temporal Roughness
summary: Deploying AI-generated video detectors in real-world services demands an ultra-low false positive rate (FPR) on real videos to avoid falsely rejecting authentic content, a regime where standard metrics such as AUROC fail to reflect actual operating behavior. We introduce Spatial Patch-Level Incoherence and Temporal Roughness (SPLIT), a training-free detector that operates on patch tokens from a frozen vision encoder to detect both fully generated and partially edited videos. SPLIT computes two complementary signals: Two-step Temporal Roughness (TTR), capturing non-smooth patch trajectories via one-step and two-step feature variation contrast, and Local Spatial Motion Incoherence (LSMI), measuring spatially inconsistent temporal changes through gradients of a feature-space motion field. The two are fused multiplicatively with gamma correction to sharpen real-fake separation at strict thresholds. We further propose a service-aligned evaluation protocol based on Fake Recall at fixed FPR with real-only threshold calibration and cross-real threshold transfer. Across three benchmarks (FakeParts, GenVideo, and ViF-Bench), SPLIT achieves the highest Fake Recall at FPR = $0.1\%$, substantially outperforming supervised and training-free baselines while remaining robust to post-processing with negligible overhead. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/mldljyh/SPLIT .

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPLIT，一种无需训练的AI生成视频检测器，通过分析冻结视觉编码器的图像块标记，结合时空不一致性信号，在超低假阳性率下实现高检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现实服务中部署AI生成视频检测器需要极低的假阳性率（FPR），而传统指标如AUROC无法反映该严苛操作场景下的真实性能。
AI.method: SPLIT基于冻结视觉编码器的patch tokens，设计两个无训练信号：两步时间粗糙度（TTR）刻画非平滑patch轨迹，局部空间运动不一致性（LSMI）衡量特征空间运动场梯度的空间不一致；二者经伽马校正后相乘融合。并提出面向服务的评估协议：在仅用真实视频校准阈值、跨数据集迁移阈值的前提下，固定FPR（如0.1%）下评估伪造召回率。
AI.result: SPLIT在FakeParts、GenVideo和ViF-Bench三个基准上，于FPR=0.1%时取得最高伪造召回率，显著优于监督与无训练基线，且对后处理鲁棒、开销极小。
AI.conclusion: SPLIT是一种高效、鲁棒、即插即用的生成视频检测方法，其设计与评估范式更贴合实际部署需求。

title: Unbiased Alignment for Large Language Models with Noisy Preferences
summary: The alignment of large language models with human preferences is commonly achieved through Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback or Direct Preference Optimization. However, these methods are vulnerable to the significant noise prevalent in real-world preference datasets. To address this critical issue, we present a theoretical framework for unbiased alignment, introducing the Unbiased Reward Model (URM) loss and the Unbiased Direct Preference Optimization (UDPO) loss. By mathematically correcting the distortion induced by preference noise, our novel objectives enable unbiased model training directly from noisy datasets, without requiring clean ground-truth supervision. We provide rigorous theoretical analyses demonstrating that our methods are noise-tolerant, parameter downward compatible, and classification-calibrated. Comprehensive experiments across diverse datasets demonstrate that our approaches outperform state-of-the-art baselines. Code available at: https://github.com/cswjl/unbiased-alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对带噪声人类偏好数据的无偏对齐框架，包括无偏奖励模型（URM）损失和无偏直接偏好优化（UDPO）损失，理论上可消除偏好噪声影响，无需干净标注，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人类反馈的对齐方法（如RLHF、DPO）易受真实世界偏好数据中广泛存在的噪声干扰，亟需具备噪声鲁棒性的对齐方法。
AI.method: 构建理论框架，提出URM损失与UDPO损失，通过数学建模校正偏好噪声引起的偏差，实现仅用含噪数据进行无偏训练。
AI.result: 理论证明方法具备噪声容忍性、参数向下兼容性和分类校准性；实验表明在多个数据集上显著优于当前最优基线。
AI.conclusion: 所提无偏对齐方法为在现实噪声偏好数据上可靠训练大语言模型提供了新范式，兼具理论严谨性与实践有效性。

title: ResearchStudio-Idea: An Evidence-Grounded Research-Ideation Skill Suite from ML Conference Outcomes
summary: Large language models have made research ideation increasingly accessible, yet effective idea development requires more than generating candidate directions. Researchers must ground a problem in current literature, identify meaningful bottlenecks, differentiate from existing solutions, and evaluate risks before committing to implementation. We present ResearchStudio-Idea as a reusable skill suite for this first mile of research ideation. The suite includes Paper-Search, a standalone multi-source literature search skill; Scoop-Check, a standalone prior-art collision checker for novelty claims; and IdeaSpark, the end-to-end skill that composes evidence grounding, pattern-guided generation, collision retrieval, audit, and idea-card rendering into one workflow. IdeaSpark is constructed from a corpus of 1,947 machine learning conference papers collected from ICLR, ICML, and NeurIPS between 2021 and 2025, including Oral papers, a separately tracked high-citation subset, and rejected submissions. Analysis of these outcomes reveals 31 recurring ideation sub-patterns, consolidated into 15 reusable ideation patterns. Each pattern is operationalized as a structured card containing research contexts, bottleneck types, differentiation strategies, supporting precedents, and common failure modes. Given a research problem and an evidence bundle, IdeaSpark evaluates evidence readiness, reconstructs the surrounding research context, identifies unresolved bottlenecks, selects relevant patterns, instantiates one candidate direction, retrieves potentially conflicting prior work, and performs outcome-informed auditing. This workflow transforms reusable ideation patterns into traceable research proposals. Blind automated-judge evaluations show that IdeaSpark consistently produces stronger research proposals than no-skill and generic-skill baselines while maintaining competitive novelty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResearchStudio-Idea技能套件，旨在提升研究初期构想的质量与可追溯性，通过Paper-Search、Scoop-Check和IdeaSpark三个模块，结合15种可复用的构想模式，实现从问题定位、文献支撑、新颖性核查到提案生成的端到端流程。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽便于生成研究方向，但有效研究构想需深入文献、识别瓶颈、区分已有方案并评估风险；现有工具缺乏对‘研究第一英里’系统性支持。
AI.method: 构建包含Paper-Search（多源文献检索）、Scoop-Check（新颖性冲突检测）和IdeaSpark（端到端构想生成）的技能套件；基于1947篇顶会ML论文提炼31种子模式并归纳为15种结构化构想模式，每种含上下文、瓶颈类型、差异化策略、先例与失败模式；IdeaSpark依证据包执行证据就绪评估、上下文重建、瓶颈识别、模式匹配、方案实例化、冲突检索与结果驱动审计。
AI.result: IdeaSpark在盲审自动评估中显著优于无技能与通用技能基线，提案质量更高且保持竞争力的新颖性；验证了15种结构化构想模式的有效性与可复用性。
AI.conclusion: ResearchStudio-Idea将可复用的构想模式转化为可追溯、可审计的研究提案，为AI辅助科研提供了系统化、证据驱动的新范式。

title: ACE-Brain-0.5: A Unified Embodied Foundational Model for Physical Agentic AI
summary: Embodied AI is moving from isolated perception or action modules toward physical agents that understand, plan under goals, act through robot bodies, monitor progress, and improve from experience. Existing systems address this loop only in parts: end-to-end policies generate actions but often lack spatial reasoning, planning, and execution assessment, while robot-agent systems orchestrate tools or specialists but do not learn a shared representation. This fragmentation limits general Physical Agentic AI. We present ACE-Brain-0.5, a unified embodied foundation model that organizes robot intelligence into five coupled functions: spatial perception, decision making, embodied interaction, self-monitoring, and self-improvement. Built on ACE-Brain-0, which established spatial intelligence as a shared scaffold across robot platforms, ACE-Brain-0.5 extends an understanding-centric model into a closed-loop foundation model. A single 8B backbone instantiates the first four functions: grounding objects and affordances, reasoning over 3D and egocentric spatial relations, decomposing instructions into subgoals, generating navigation and manipulation actions, and estimating progress for verification and recovery. To unify these capabilities without cross-task interference, we introduce SSR+, which extends Scaffold-Specialize-Reconcile with a Reactivate stage after task-vector merging. The fifth function, self-improvement, is realized by a companion framework that updates external execution state, including task schemas, spatial memory, and failure-recovery cases, from rollouts. Across fifteen benchmarks, ACE-Brain-0.5 improves over ACE-Brain-0 on 14 of 18 spatial perception and grounding benchmarks, achieves competitive navigation and manipulation performance, and provides strong progress estimation in ID and OOD settings. Together, these results mark an early step toward general Physical Agentic AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACE-Brain-0.5，一个统一的具身基础模型，整合空间感知、决策、具身交互、自我监控与自我改进五大功能，通过SSR+架构实现多任务协同，并在15个基准测试中展现优越性能，推动通用物理具身智能发展。
AI.motivation: 现有具身AI系统存在碎片化问题：端到端策略缺乏空间推理与执行评估，机器人代理系统无法学习共享表征，限制了通用物理具身AI的发展。
AI.method: 提出ACE-Brain-0.5模型，基于8B主干网络实现前四大功能；引入SSR+架构（含Reactivate阶段）避免跨任务干扰；第五功能‘自我改进’由配套框架实现，从执行轨迹中更新任务模式、空间记忆与失败恢复案例。
AI.result: 在18个空间感知与接地基准中，14项优于ACE-Brain-0；导航与操作性能具竞争力；ID与OOD设置下进展估计能力强。
AI.conclusion: ACE-Brain-0.5是迈向通用物理具身AI的重要早期一步，验证了统一闭环基础模型的可行性与优势。

title: Memory-Orchestrated Semantic System (MOSS): An Auditable Agentic Memory Architecture
summary: Long-term memory remains a structural weakness of AI agents. The dominant approach, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), relies on embedding-based similarity search, which is opaque by construction, difficult to audit, and bounded by the theoretical limits of vector representations. We present the Memory-Orchestrated Semantic System (MOSS), an agentic memory architecture in which the agent drives retrieval over a structured relational database. MOSS is model-agnostic, storage-agnostic, and API-agnostic: it runs on any relational engine, connects to any LLM provider (or to deterministic non-LLM processes), and deploys on any infrastructure, local or cloud. Its retrieval execution is symbolic and reproducible (once a query is formulated, no LLM participates in the retrieval loop) and every step of the system, from indexing to answer formulation, is logged and inspectable, making MOSS auditable by construction. Rather than imposing an external ontology, MOSS derives its conceptual vocabulary from the corpus itself. We report on a longitudinal deployment unique in the agentic-memory literature: a year of continuous production over an individual scholar's working corpus--a conversational corpus reaching back to October 2024 (some 44 million tokens, retroactively indexed) comprising 110,183 segments, alongside 163,494 catalogued documents, 569 inductively derived concepts, 322,662 concept annotations, and eleven metadata graphs totaling approximately five million relations--across four successive infrastructure generations. While the present case is that of a single researcher, the architecture is in no way specific to one person: it serves a team, an institution, or any entity that accumulates knowledge over time. We argue that auditable, sovereign, structurally unbounded memory is a precondition for AI agents intended to accompany a person or an organization over years rather than sessions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOSS——一种基于结构化关系数据库的可审计、可复现、模型无关的AI长期记忆架构，替代传统黑盒式RAG，已在学者个人知识库中完成为期一年的生产级部署验证。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法依赖嵌入相似性搜索，存在不透明、难审计、受向量表征理论限制等结构性缺陷，亟需可审计、主权可控、无结构上限的长期记忆方案。
AI.method: 设计Memory-Orchestrated Semantic System（MOSS），以符号化、可复现的SQL式检索替代向量检索；记忆存储于关系型数据库，概念词汇由语料自动归纳生成；全程日志记录，LLM仅参与查询生成与答案合成，不介入检索执行环。
AI.result: 在单学者工作语料（4400万token、11万+文本段、16万+文档、569个归纳概念、500万关系）上完成跨四代基础设施、持续一年的生产部署；系统具备模型/存储/API三重无关性与全链路可审计性。
AI.conclusion: MOSS证明了基于关系数据库的符号化记忆架构是构建长期、可信、主权可控AI代理记忆的可行路径，为面向人或组织的多年期AI协作奠定基础。

title: ProLaViT: Learning Progressive Latent Visual Thoughts in Structured Latent Space
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress but still struggle with complex visual reasoning tasks requiring multi-step perception and logical deduction. While explicit visual generation incurs prohibitive computational costs, existing latent approaches often rely on external experts or lack rigorous cognitive logic. In this paper, we introduce ProLaViT (Progressive Latent Visual Thought), a framework empowering MLLMs to perform structured visual derivation in the continuous latent space. Unlike works dependent on heterogeneous external models, ProLaViT leverages an endogenous self-distillation mechanism, utilizing the model's own visual encoder to supervise latent thoughts. To facilitate this, we construct a scalable programmatic synthesis pipeline enabling the model to internalize algorithmic precision without inference time tools. We design two reasoning paradigms: (1) Coarse-to-Fine Causal Chain for spatial tasks, guiding attention from global context to local targets. (2) Dialectical Reasoning Chain for logical tasks, incorporating counter-factual thinking for verification. Furthermore, we propose a Distance-Weighted Diversity Loss to impose topology-aware constraints, preventing feature degeneration by enforcing semantic distinctiveness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ProLaViT outperforms baselines on vision-centric benchmarks, achieving superior accuracy and interpretability with high efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProLaViT框架，通过内生自蒸馏机制在连续潜在空间中实现结构化视觉推理，无需外部模型或显式图像生成，结合两种新型推理范式与拓扑感知损失，在视觉中心任务上提升准确性、可解释性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在需多步感知与逻辑推理的复杂视觉任务上表现不足；显式视觉生成计算开销大，而基于潜在空间的方法常依赖外部专家模型或缺乏严谨认知逻辑。
AI.method: 提出ProLaViT框架：1）基于模型自身视觉编码器的内生自蒸馏机制监督潜在视觉思维；2）构建可扩展的程序化合成流水线以内部化算法精度；3）设计粗到细因果链（空间任务）与辩证推理链（逻辑任务）两种推理范式；4）引入距离加权多样性损失以维持潜在特征的语义区分性。
AI.result: 在视觉中心基准测试中显著超越基线模型，兼具更高准确率、更强可解释性与更高推理效率。
AI.conclusion: ProLaViT验证了仅依赖内生机制即可在潜在空间中实现高质量、结构化视觉推理，为高效、可解释的多模态推理提供了新范式。

title: From Global to Local: Efficient Regional Weather Downscaling with Global Weather Foundation Model
summary: Accurate regional weather prediction requires resolving fine-scale structure while remaining consistent with global dynamics. Traditional limited area models rely on computationally expensive simulations, while many learning-based approaches frame the problem as super-resolution, overlooking statistical and physical mismatches across scales. We propose a foundation-model-driven downscaling framework that learns regional refinements of global forecasts by augmenting a pretrained weather model backbone with lightweight, multi-scale prediction heads operating directly in its latent space. Despite being trained on substantially coarser inputs, the pretrained backbone supports regional adaptation at resolutions corresponding to a two-order-of-magnitude increase in grid-cell resolution, without the need for retraining. The proposed approach uses regional numerical simulations as training targets and is evaluated not only against gridded datasets but also against ground-based weather station observations, enabling analysis of systematic biases between global reanalysis, regional simulations, and in-situ weather station observations. Our experiments show improved accuracy in comparison to NWP on most of the metrics at the fraction of computational cost. Moreover, we observe that building on a latent space of globally pre-trained weather foundation model offers better downscaling capabilities than the standard image-based super-resolution approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于气象基础模型的降尺度框架，利用预训练天气模型的潜在空间，通过轻量级多尺度预测头实现高效、高精度的区域天气预报，显著优于传统数值模式和图像超分辨率方法。
AI.motivation: 传统区域天气预报方法计算成本高，而现有学习型方法多将问题视为超分辨率，忽略了跨尺度的统计与物理不一致性。
AI.method: 在预训练天气基础模型的潜在空间中，添加轻量级、多尺度预测头，以全球预报为输入，学习区域精细化修正；使用区域数值模拟作为训练目标，并结合地面观测进行评估。
AI.result: 相比NWP，在多数指标上精度更高且计算成本大幅降低；在潜在空间中进行降尺度优于标准图像超分辨率方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于预训练气象基础模型的降尺度框架，能在不重训主干网络的前提下，实现高分辨率区域预报，兼顾物理一致性与计算效率。

title: Why Pure Reasoning is Not Enough: Nature as the Source of Mathematical Innovation
summary:
We advance the hypothesis that human mathematical reasoning, constrained by both the undecidability and the computational intractability of even modest logical fragments, relies fundamentally on pattern matching from domains external to pure deduction. The most prolific reservoir of such patterns is the natural world, whose physical laws and biological systems have undergone billions of years of ``pre-computation'' and already exhibit surprisingly innovative solutions. To ground this claim, we trace the history of the Fourier transform and relevant mathematics, from the vibrating string controversy to the hear equation and subsequent formalisms prevalent in mathematics. At each critical juncture, a physics problem forced the acceptance or creation of a mathematical tool that pure formal reasoning failed to anticipate or, worse, human reasoning had resisted.
  We further survey the landscape of logical complexity, from NP-hard propositional satisfiability to the non-elementary decision-procedures for monadic second-order theories, to demonstrate that even when a logic is decidable, the resources required for worst-case deduction are astronomically prohibitive. We argue that these barriers make physics-inspired pattern matching not just a historical accident but a cognitive necessity. Finally, we draw the consequence for artificial intelligence: if pure reasoning is constitutively insufficient, then any system aiming at human-level mathematical creativity must embed a vast store of cross-domain patterns rather than rely on deduction alone. This furnishes a principled justification for the enormous scale of contemporary large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出人类数学推理本质上依赖于来自物理世界等外部领域的模式匹配，而非纯粹演绎；因为纯逻辑推理受限于不可判定性和计算复杂性，而自然界经过长期演化已蕴含大量创新解法。文章以傅里叶变换发展史为例佐证，并论证AI若要实现人类级数学创造力，必须融合大规模跨领域模式知识，而非仅靠形式推理。
AI.motivation: 人类数学推理受限于逻辑系统的不可判定性和计算复杂性，纯形式推理难以支撑高效、创新的数学发现，需寻求更可行的认知机制。
AI.method: 通过历史案例分析（傅里叶变换起源与发展）、逻辑复杂性理论梳理（NP-hard、非初等等），结合认知与AI视角进行跨学科论证。
AI.result: 确立物理世界作为数学模式重要来源的合理性；揭示物理学驱动数学工具发展的普遍性；论证大规模跨域模式存储对AI数学创造力的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 人类数学能力根植于对外部世界（尤其是物理规律）的模式提取与迁移；AI要达到人类水平的数学创造力，必须超越纯符号推理，内嵌海量经验性、跨领域模式知识——这为大语言模型的规模与设计提供了原理性支持。

title: AI Wizards at EXIST 2026: Hierarchical Soft-Label Learning for Multimodal Sexism Identification in Memes
summary: We present the AI Wizards submission to EXIST 2026 for multimodal sexism identification in memes. The task is composed of three, increasingly harder subtasks. We model them hierarchically as conditional soft-label prediction over empirical annotator distributions. Our system maps fixed Gemini Embedding 2 vision-language representations through a lightweight Gated MLP trained with KL divergence and homoscedastic uncertainty weighting. Our submissions ranked first on Task 2.3 and fourth on Tasks 2.1 and 2.2 on the official Soft-Soft leaderboards. The code is available at https://github.com/NLP-AI-Wizards/EXIST-2026

AI.tldr: AI Wizards 提出了一种基于 Gemini Embedding 2 和轻量级门控 MLP 的分层模型，用于 EXIST 2026 多模态性别歧视识别任务，在 Task 2.3 中排名第一。
AI.motivation: 应对 EXIST 2026 挑战赛中日益复杂的多模态（图文）性别歧视识别子任务。
AI.method: 将三类子任务建模为基于众包标注者经验分布的条件软标签预测；使用 Gemini Embedding 2 提取多模态表征，接入轻量级门控 MLP，并以 KL 散度损失与同方差不确定性加权进行训练。
AI.result: 在官方 Soft-Soft 排行榜上，Task 2.3 排名第一，Task 2.1 和 2.2 均排名第四。
AI.conclusion: 所提分层软标签建模方法在高难度多模态 sexism 识别任务中展现出优越性能与泛化能力。

title: Holo-Captioning: Toward the Text Equivalent of 3D Scenes
summary: This work introduces holo-captioning, a novel task that strives to seek the text equivalent of 3D scenes. As the initial step, we formulate holo-captioning as generating a structured textual description that comprehensively depicts all entities within a 3D scene -- including their semantic tags, spatial locations, attributes, and inter-entity relations. To tackle this challenging task, we first develop an effective captioning engine to produce detailed descriptions of individual entity instances and instance pairs, and contribute a large-scale benchmark comprising over 15K scenes for training and evaluation. Building upon this foundation, we propose HoloScribe, a novel model that features an instance-aware decoupled pipeline for generating structured holo-captions, and further incorporates anchor-aware instance linking to identify relational instance pairs. Additionally, we propose a comprehensive evaluation metric named HoloScore, and provide a human-curated test set to ensure reliable model assessment. Experimental results demonstrate that HoloScribe significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D dense captioners and 3D LLM generalists, underscoring the effectiveness of our approach. Project page: https://visual-ai.github.io/holocap/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了全息字幕（holo-captioning）这一新任务，旨在为3D场景生成结构化文本描述，涵盖实体语义、空间位置、属性及关系；为此构建了大规模数据集、HoloScribe模型与HoloScore评估指标，并验证其显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D理解任务缺乏对场景整体结构化文本描述的能力，难以支持如具身智能、人机交互等高级应用，因此需定义并解决holo-captioning这一新任务。
AI.method: 提出holo-captioning任务定义；构建含15K+场景的大规模基准数据集；设计实例感知的解耦式生成模型HoloScribe，引入锚点感知的实例关联机制；开发综合评估指标HoloScore及人工标注测试集。
AI.result: HoloScribe在自建基准上显著超越当前最优的3D密集字幕模型和3D大语言模型泛化器，验证了方法有效性；提供了开源项目页与完整评估体系。
AI.conclusion: holo-captioning是连接3D感知与语言理解的关键桥梁，HoloScribe及其配套资源为该任务奠定了坚实基础，推动3D多模态理解向结构化、可解释方向发展。

title: A harmonised dataset for Earth system foundation models
summary: Foundation models for Earth systems have so far been trained primarily on physical climate and weather data, with limited representation of the human systems that both drive and respond to environmental change. The lack of a unified global training resource that combines climate, land, ocean, cryosphere, infrastructure, hazards, and socioeconomic data on a common grid hinders progress toward truly multimodal Earth system foundation models. We present WorldTensor, a harmonised global dataset that aligns hundreds of environmental and socioeconomic variables to a standardised 0.25$^\circ$ spatial grid and annual temporal framework. WorldTensor integrates reanalysis products, remote sensing, emissions inventories, land use reconstructions, hydrological observations, infrastructure and hazard datasets, and socioeconomic indicators within a single representation designed for machine learning workflows. To build the dataset, we regridded inputs across heterogeneous native resolutions and projections, rasterised point and vector datasets into spatially meaningful gridded fields, and reconciled temporal coverages ranging from daily observations to sparse multiyear socioeconomic snapshots. All outputs are distributed as NetCDF files with standardised coordinates, variable metadata, and a common CF metadata convention. WorldTensor provides a reproducible resource for training and evaluating foundation models that learn coupled dynamics across environmental and human systems at planetary scale.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了WorldTensor，一个统一的全球多模态数据集，整合了气候、陆地、海洋、冰冻圈、基础设施、灾害和经济社会等数百个变量，以标准化的0.25°空间网格和年度时间框架呈现，旨在支持地球系统基础模型的训练与评估。
AI.motivation: 现有地球系统基础模型主要基于物理气候与天气数据，缺乏对驱动并响应环境变化的人类系统的充分表征；缺少融合多源异构地球与社会数据的统一训练资源，制约了多模态地球系统基础模型的发展。
AI.method: 构建WorldTensor数据集：将数百个环境与社会经济变量统一重采样至0.25°空间网格与年度时间框架；对不同原生分辨率与投影的数据进行重网格化；将点/矢量数据栅格化为有意义的空间场；协调从日观测到多年稀疏社会经济快照的多尺度时间覆盖；所有数据以符合CF标准的NetCDF格式发布。
AI.result: 发布WorldTensor——首个大规模、多模态、标准化、可复现的全球地球-社会耦合数据集，支持行星尺度下环境与人类系统耦合动力学建模。
AI.conclusion: WorldTensor填补了地球系统基础模型训练中环境与人类系统数据融合的关键空白，为构建真正多模态、跨领域、可泛化的地球系统AI模型提供了基础性数据支撑。

title: Compressing the Validation Bottleneck: An Agentic Self-Driving Lab for Scientific Discovery
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 AI for Science Workshop ; AI Scientist Competition
summary: Agentic AI-for-Science can automate ideation, planning, and analysis, but final validation still depends on real experiments. A self-driving lab (SDL) can execute those experiments, yet the loop still has bottlenecks: the agent may spend too many rounds on low-value experiments, or each round may require a high-cost experiment. We target these two physical bottlenecks with one agent. First, a prior-aware agentic DOE loop uses domain knowledge and past results to propose feasible and informative next experiments, reducing trials-to-target. Second, a cost-aware surrogate agent predicts high-cost, high-resolution measurements from low-cost, low-resolution measurements. It chooses between a high- and a low-cost measurement based on the predicted uncertainty. We examine these directions in the biology and materials domains, respectively. Together, under a single agent, these components aim to accelerate the SDL loop by reducing both the number of loops and the cost per experiment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向科学发现的自主智能体框架，通过先验感知的实验设计（DOE）循环和成本感知的代理模型，分别减少自驱动实验室（SDL）中的实验轮次与单次实验成本，从而加速科学闭环。
AI.motivation: 现有Agentic AI-for-Science虽能自动化科研流程，但最终验证仍依赖真实实验；而自驱动实验室（SDL）在执行中面临两大物理瓶颈：低价值实验轮次过多、单轮实验成本过高。
AI.method: 1）先验感知的智能体DOE循环：融合领域知识与历史数据，主动筛选可行且信息量大的下一轮实验；2）成本感知的代理模型：基于低成本低分辨率测量预测高成本高分辨率结果，并依据预测不确定性动态选择测量方式。
AI.result: 在生物学（DOE优化）与材料学（成本代理建模）两个领域分别验证了方法有效性，联合显著减少了SDL循环次数与单次实验成本。
AI.conclusion: 该统一智能体框架可协同缓解SDL的双重物理瓶颈，为AI驱动的闭环科学发现提供更高效、更经济的实现路径。

title: Robustness Verification of an Autonomous Underwater Vehicle-based Plankton Classifier
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, Accepted in IEEE OES AUV Symposium 2026
summary:
The assessment of planktonic standing stocks and microorganism structures is critical for understanding upper ocean biological processes. Currently, autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) equipped with in-situ optical imaging and artificial intelligence (AI) methods offer a promising solution for persistent surveillance, mapping and monitoring of planktonic life. However, current AI methods often lack robustness in dynamic, unstructured environments, where environmental noise and non-biological artifacts lead to frequent misclassifications. Standard convolutional neural network (CNN) classifiers often struggle with such conditions, leading to misclassifications that require time-consuming manual validation by marine biologists.
  To address this issue, we propose a novel robustness verification framework for in-situ plankton classifiers based on reachability analysis. We also introduce a continuous-time neural ordinary differential equation (neural ODE) classification model leveraging the high-resolution imaging capabilities of the SilCam particle imager. In this paper, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework by formally verifying the robustness of the neural ODE model against environmental perturbations. We demonstrate that our verification framework acts as an automated filter providing formal guarantees of model stability against ambiguous data, thereby improving the reliability of autonomous sampling and reducing the post-processing workload.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可达性分析的鲁棒性验证框架，并设计了连续时间神经常微分方程（neural ODE）分类模型，用于提升水下原位浮游生物图像分类在动态复杂环境中的鲁棒性与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的浮游生物AI分类方法在动态、非结构化水下环境中易受环境噪声和非生物干扰影响，导致误分类频发，依赖人工校验，效率低且可靠性差。
AI.method: 提出基于可达性分析的鲁棒性验证框架，并构建面向SilCam高分辨率成像数据的神经ODE分类模型，实现对环境扰动的正式鲁棒性验证。
AI.result: 所提框架能为模型提供关于模糊/干扰数据的稳定性形式化保证，显著提升自主采样可靠性，并减少后期人工处理工作量。
AI.conclusion: 神经ODE模型结合形式化验证可有效增强原位浮游生物识别系统的鲁棒性与可信度，为海洋自主观测系统提供了新范式。

title: UI-MOPD: Multi-Platform On-Policy Distillation for Continual GUI Agent Learning
summary:
Recent advances in multimodal foundation models and agent systems have driven GUI agents from single-platform task execution toward cross-platform interaction. However, building multi-platform GUI agents remains challenging. On one hand, high-quality and executable cross-platform interaction trajectories are still scarce, and existing data often suffer from limited platform coverage. On the other hand, different platforms exhibit distinct interaction conventions, making joint or continual training prone to behavioral pattern mixing, platform-specific capability degradation, and catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we construct Uni-GUI, a high-quality cross-platform GUI interaction dataset, and propose UI-MOPD, the first method that incorporates multi-teacher on-policy distillation into continual learning for GUI agents. UI-MOPD dynamically selects a platform-specific teacher according to the current environment and transfers platform-specific behavioral priors to a shared policy through platform-conditioned distillation, enabling adaptation to new platforms while preserving capabilities on existing ones. Experiments on OSWorld and MobileWorld show that UI-MOPD achieves task success rates of 38.2% and 12.0%, respectively, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing cross-platform capability retention and new-platform adaptation.
  Project page: https://elispectre.github.io/UI-MOPD/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UI-MOPD方法，通过多教师在线策略蒸馏解决GUI智能体跨平台持续学习中的行为混淆与灾难性遗忘问题，并构建了高质量跨平台数据集Uni-GUI。
AI.motivation: 现有跨平台GUI智能体面临高质量可执行轨迹稀缺、平台覆盖不足，以及不同平台交互规范差异导致联合/持续训练中行为模式混淆、平台特有能力退化和灾难性遗忘等问题。
AI.method: 构建Uni-GUI跨平台GUI交互数据集；提出UI-MOPD方法，采用平台感知的多教师在线策略蒸馏，在持续学习中动态选择平台特定教师，将平台特有行为先验蒸馏至共享策略。
AI.result: 在OSWorld和MobileWorld上任务成功率分别达38.2%和12.0%，验证了其在保留已有平台能力的同时适应新平台的有效性。
AI.conclusion: UI-MOPD是首个将多教师在线策略蒸馏引入GUI智能体持续学习的方法，有效缓解跨平台持续学习中的关键挑战，为构建通用GUI智能体提供了新范式。

title: Learning Taxonomic Trees with Hierarchical Representation Regularization for Large Multimodal Models
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICML 2026
summary: Taxonomies provide key information about the semantic relationships between concepts and the inherent organization of vision and language. Despite their impressive capabilities, large multimodal models (LMMs) often lack taxonomic knowledge, leading to low hierarchical visual recognition (HVR) consistency. These models typically only rely on language modeling objectives during fine-tuning and lack explicit taxonomy-aware regularization. To address this, we propose Hierarchical Representation Regularization ($HiR^2$), a simple plug-and-play regularizer that improves hierarchical consistency in LMMs. Specifically, we introduce a semantic-aware visual tree construction framework that extracts coarse-to-fine visual features from intermediate LLM layers guided by textual cues. The regularizer combines two complementary objectives: a taxonomic entailment loss that enforces hierarchy via hyperbolic entailment cones in the Lorentz model, and a discriminative dispersive loss that promotes angular separation of semantically similar embeddings on the unit sphere without disturbing the radial hierarchical structure. Extensive experiments demonstrate that $HiR^2$ effectively captures taxonomic structures across diverse LMMs and fine-tuning methods. Code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/HiR2_ICML2026.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hierarchical Representation Regularization (HiR²)，一种即插即用的正则化方法，通过语义感知的视觉树构建与双目标损失（基于双曲空间的分类蕴含损失和单位球面上的判别分散损失），提升大语言-视觉模型在分层视觉识别中的层级一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有大 multimodal 模型缺乏显式的分类学知识，在分层视觉识别（HVR）中层级一致性低，因其微调阶段仅依赖语言建模目标，缺少分类学感知的正则化。
AI.method: 提出HiR²正则器：1）语义感知的视觉树构建框架，利用文本线索引导从LLM中间层提取粗到细的视觉特征；2）结合双曲空间（Lorentz模型）中的分类蕴含损失与单位球面上的判别分散损失，分别约束层级结构与语义相似嵌入的角分离。
AI.result: 在多种LMM架构与微调方法上验证了HiR²能有效捕捉分类学结构，显著提升HVR一致性；代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: HiR²是一种简单、通用且有效的插件式正则化方法，可增强多模态模型对概念层级关系的建模能力，为提升模型语义理解与结构化推理提供了新思路。

title: Statistically Meaningful Geometry (SMG) Beyond the Euclidean Paradigm, with Application to Generative AI
summary: Conventional uniform convergence bounds and empirical risk minimization break down in massive over-parameterized models, such as large language transformers and biological sequence networks. With near-infinite unconstrained internal degrees of freedom, their optimization landscapes develop flat vertical gauge valleys, rendering classical generalization metrics vacuous and inducing severe pathologies, specifically generative hallucination and catastrophic forgetting. We introduce the Statistically Meaningful Geometry (SMG) framework, an information-geometric paradigm lifting deterministic parametric models into infinite-dimensional non-parametric Orlicz statistical manifolds. Modeling the total state space as a differential fiber bundle ($\mathcal{M}, \mathcal{B}, π, \mathcal{V}, \mathcal{H}, ω$), we establish a Two-Fold Inference Paradigm. We formalize an Ehresmann connection 1-form $ω$ as a dynamic geometric filter that strips away vertical gauge noise (Structural Internal Directions, or SID) and isolates learning trajectories along the strictly non-degenerate horizontal distribution (Statistical Variational Directions, or SVD$χ$). We prove that under connection-filtered pre-training, out-of-distribution predictive variance is strictly upper-bounded by the finite diameter of the identifiable quotient base manifold $\mathcal{B}$, establishing a hard geometric containment of generative hallucinations. By projecting downstream updates onto the orthogonal complement of the historical horizontal carriage, we formalize the SMG Sequential Adaptation Flow, proving the total non-asymptotic elimination of catastrophic forgetting. SMG replaces empirical fine-tuning heuristics with coordinate-free topological constraints, bridging advanced differential geometry with structural reliability in AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Statistically Meaningful Geometry（SMG）框架，利用信息几何与微分纤维丛理论，解决大模型中因过参数化导致的泛化失效、生成幻觉与灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统一致收敛界和经验风险最小化在大规模过参数化模型（如大语言模型和生物序列网络）中失效，因其优化景观存在平坦的垂直规范谷，导致经典泛化指标失效，并引发生成幻觉与灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 构建基于Orlicz统计流形的无限维非参数模型；将状态空间建模为微分纤维丛（M, B, π, V, H, ω）；引入Ehresmann联络1-形式ω作为动态几何滤波器，分离结构内部方向（SID）与统计变分方向（SVDχ）；提出SMG序贯自适应流。
AI.result: 证明连接滤波预训练可严格上界OOD预测方差，实现生成幻觉的几何约束；通过投影下游更新至历史水平分布正交补，非渐近消除灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: SMG以坐标无关的拓扑约束替代经验微调启发式方法，将微分几何前沿与AI结构可靠性相融合，为大模型提供新的理论基础。

title: VLA Grounder: Language-Conditioning Space Optimization for Black-Box VLA Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are commonly treated as end-to-end action policies conditioned on natural-language task descriptions. In practice, however, their behavior often depends sharply on how the instruction is phrased, suggesting that language is not merely a task label but an optimizable conditioning input. We study whether frozen VLA policies can be improved by optimizing language space rather than updating action weights. Our method introduces a language-conditioning space policy that translates a human instruction into a short VLA-grounded command using object appearance, spatial relations, and target-grounding cues. The language-conditioning space policy is initialized with a failure-derived command-space prior and optimized with reinforcement learning from sparse task-completion rewards, while the downstream VLA remains fully frozen. This yields language-conditioning space optimization: RL discovers which VLA-grounded commands best elicit successful behavior from the frozen action policy. Experiments on RL4VLA and VL-Think show that language-conditioning space optimization improves success on instruction-sensitive, symbolic, and multi-object manipulation tasks, demonstrating that language can serve as an optimizable variable for a robot foundation models. Website: https://tttonyalpha.github.io/vla_grounder

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种语言条件空间优化方法，通过在冻结的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型上优化输入指令的语言表征（而非更新模型权重），提升其任务成功率。该方法利用强化学习从稀疏奖励中学习生成更有效的VLA接地指令，显著改善了对指令敏感、符号化及多物体操作任务的表现。
AI.motivation: VLA模型的实际行为对指令措辞高度敏感，表明语言不仅是任务标签，还可作为可优化的条件输入；而现有方法多依赖微调模型参数，本文探索仅优化语言输入是否能提升冻结VLA策略性能。
