Experimental results demonstrate a 91.8% task completion rate with a median per-request latency of 2.2 seconds, 96.0% safety compliance on the dedicated safety-critical evaluation subset, and an average operational cost of $0.0324 per appointment, yielding a significant cost reduction compared to manual human scheduling. These findings show that carefully scoped and rigorously safeguarded LLM-based agents can reliably automate complex healthcare operational workflows while maintaining safety guarantees and achieving substantial cost efficiency. The source code and system implementation are publicly available at https://github.com/Hadi-Hsn/CareConnect.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CareConnect，一个面向医疗预约调度的安全优先对话式智能体，结合LLM函数调用、RAG与多层确定性安全防护机制，在保证不提供医疗建议的前提下，高效完成预约相关任务，实现91.8%任务完成率、96.0%安全合规率及显著成本降低。
AI.motivation: 解决医疗预约调度中人工协调低效、系统碎片化、管理开销高等问题，提升医生可用性与患者可及性。
AI.method: 构建基于LLM函数调用与检索增强生成（RAG）的对话系统CareConnect，集成8个领域专用工具，并设计多层确定性安全守门机制（如紧急情况短路响应、医疗意图拒绝），严格限定系统作用域。
AI.result: 在680个任务场景基准测试中达到91.8%任务完成率、2.2秒中位延迟、96.0%安全合规率，单次预约平均成本仅0.0324美元。
AI.conclusion: 经过严格范围界定和安全加固的LLM智能体可在保障安全前提下可靠自动化复杂医疗运营流程，并带来显著成本效益。

title: CAC-VLA: Context-Gated Action Conditioning for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have become a promising paradigm for generalist robot manipulation, where visual-language representations are used to condition continuous action generation. However, these representations are not explicitly optimized for action conditioning, leaving the action expert to bridge the gap between multimodal understanding and precise motor control. Recent action-reasoning methods introduce additional modules to generate explicit action plans or action-space reasoning signals, demonstrating the benefit of action-level guidance but often requiring separate action-generation frameworks. We propose CAC-VLA, a Context-Gated Action Conditioning framework that learns a lightweight latent-action interface directly within the VLM. Instead of generating executable trajectories, CAC-VLA trains the VLM to predict coarse-to-fine latent actions, which are structured representations encoded from future action segments, and adaptively leverages them to condition the action expert via a context gate. This enables VLM-native action conditioning while calibrating the influence of latent-action guidance on expert action generation. Experiments on LIBERO and LIBERO-Plus demonstrate the effectiveness of CAC-VLA, achieving 98.3% average success rate on LIBERO and 89.5% LIBERO-Plus, suggesting that context-gated latent-action conditioning is an effective interface for continuous expert control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAC-VLA框架，通过在视觉语言模型（VLM）内部学习轻量级潜在动作接口，实现上下文门控的动作条件化，提升通用机器人操作性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型的视觉语言表征未显式优化用于动作条件化，导致动作专家需自行弥合多模态理解与精确运动控制之间的差距；而现有动作推理方法常依赖额外模块或独立动作生成框架，缺乏与VLM原生集成。
AI.method: 提出Context-Gated Action Conditioning（CAC-VLA）框架，在VLM内学习粗到细的潜在动作表征（由未来动作段编码而来），并通过上下文门控机制动态调节其对动作专家的影响，实现VLM原生的动作条件化。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和LIBERO-Plus基准上分别达到98.3%和89.5%平均成功率，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 上下文门控的潜在动作条件化是一种高效、可嵌入VLM的动作专家控制接口，能显著提升通用机器人操作性能。

title: Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT): Forensic Reconstruction Prompts as a Safety Diagnostic Across Model Generations
summary: Safety alignment in large language models is typically evaluated against direct, imperative harmful requests. We show that this alignment is highly conditioned on pragmatic register: models that refuse a direct request frequently comply when the same underlying objective is expressed through a different communicative stance. This suggests that current alignment policies are not invariant to semantic equivalence, but remain sensitive to how a request is pragmatically framed. We introduce Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT), a single-turn attack that reframes harmful requests as forensic reconstruction tasks. Rather than requesting harmful instructions directly, RetroCoT presupposes that the harmful outcome has already occurred and asks the model, acting as a forensic analyst, to reconstruct in reverse the causal chain that produced it. On AdvBench (n=50), RetroCoT achieves attach success rate of 58% on gpt-4o and 52% on gpt-4o-mini, compared with direct-request baselines of 0% and 4%, respectively. We further identify a pronounced generation gap: GPT-5-family models refuse RetroCoT entirely, explicitly identifying the reconstruction premise in their refusal rationales, consistent with explicit coverage of this reconstruction register. However, this robustness does not generalize across pragmatic forms. A single adversarial feedback turn presenting an existing forensic reconstruction response alongside evaluator critique raises ASR from 0% to 48% on GPT-5.4-mini and from 58% to 94% on GPT-4o; a control condition omitting the fabricated low score achieves 85% on GPT-5.4-mini, indicating that the operative element is pragmatic continuation within the established forensic frame rather than score manipulation. These results suggest that frontier-model alignment remains conditioned on pragmatic framing rather than semantic intent, and that new pragmatic registers can continue to expose a...

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大语言模型的安全对齐存在严重语用依赖性：模型对语义等价但语用形式不同的有害请求响应差异巨大；作者提出一种名为RetroCoT的单轮攻击方法，将有害请求重构为法医式逆向推理任务，显著绕过现有对齐机制，并发现前沿模型虽对特定语用形式鲁棒，但易被微小语用延续所攻破。
AI.motivation: 当前安全对齐评估主要基于直接、命令式的有害请求，但现实中恶意意图可通过多种语用方式表达；作者旨在检验对齐策略是否真正理解语义意图，还是仅机械匹配表面语言形式。
AI.method: 提出Retroactive Chain-of-Thought（RetroCoT）攻击：将有害请求转化为‘假设危害已发生，要求模型作为法医逆向推演成因’的任务；在AdvBench上评估不同模型对直接请求与RetroCoT的响应，并通过单轮对抗反馈测试模型对语用框架延续的敏感性。
AI.result: RetroCoT在GPT-4o和GPT-4o-mini上攻击成功率分别达58%和52%，远超直接请求的0%和4%；GPT-5系列模型初始拒绝RetroCoT，但仅一轮伪造的法医式反馈即可将GPT-5.4-mini和GPT-4o的攻击成功率提升至48%和94%。
AI.conclusion: 前沿模型的安全对齐仍高度依赖语用表层而非语义本质，现有对齐机制无法泛化到新语用注册；单纯增加训练数据或指令微调难以解决该根本缺陷，需转向语义不变性建模。

title: VISTA: Auditing Semantic Divergence in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models can exhibit visual concept-conditioned divergence: given images containing demographic features, corporate logos, or ideological symbols, some models produce unusually uniform responses that differ from what peer models say about the same input. These behaviors evade text-only audits because visual concepts cannot be isolated or substituted the way text tokens can. We present VISTA (Visual Inconsistency Screening Through Analysis), a black-box cross-model audit that couples semantic entropy with distribution-based divergence to flag model-specific anomalies. In a controlled study, we implant concept-conditioned stances in three VLMs via fine-tuning on small biased datasets and confirm that VISTA detects them. Auditing six VLMs across 19 topics, VISTA surfaces 142 high-suspicion cases (1.2%) and identifies selective refusal as a previously unreported divergence pattern, where models refuse demographic queries at rates varying from 0 to 65% across groups.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VISTA方法，用于检测视觉语言模型中由视觉概念引发的异常一致性行为，通过语义熵与分布差异结合的方式，在黑盒跨模型审计中识别模型特定偏差，并发现了一种新的偏差模式——选择性拒绝。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在处理含有人口统计特征、企业标志或意识形态符号的图像时，可能表现出异常一致但与其他模型不同的响应，而这些视觉概念无法像文本标记那样被隔离或替换，因此传统纯文本审计难以发现此类问题。
AI.method: 提出VISTA（Visual Inconsistency Screening Through Analysis）方法，是一种黑盒跨模型审计框架，结合语义熵与基于分布的差异度量来识别模型特异性异常；在受控实验中，通过对三个VLM进行小规模偏差数据微调以植入概念条件立场，并验证VISTA的有效性。
AI.result: 在对六个视觉语言模型、19个主题的审计中，VISTA共发现142个高可疑案例（占比1.2%），并首次识别出‘选择性拒绝’这一新偏差模式——即模型对不同人口群体查询的拒绝率差异显著（0%–65%）。
AI.conclusion: VISTA能有效揭示视觉语言模型中由视觉概念驱动的隐性偏差，尤其适用于黑盒场景下的跨模型一致性审计，为视觉-语言对齐安全评估提供了新工具和新发现。

title: Differentiate the Evaluator, Not the Program: An Efficient Runtime Representation for Neuro-Symbolic Learning
summary:
AI systems increasingly propose executable scientific models whose value depends on both their symbolic structure and their fitted continuous parameters. This makes parameter calibration the bottleneck of program-and-parameter co-search: an outer loop can generate thousands of candidate programs, but each needs an inner gradient-based optimization before it can be assessed. Staging each candidate into its own differentiable graph makes individual models fast but sacrifices the program-as-data property that keeps search fluid; interpreter-based approaches preserve programs as runtime data but pay interpreter overhead that dominates the numerical work.
  We present the Native Differentiable Virtual Machine (NDVM), a runtime representation that differentiates executable programs without compiling each candidate into a separate graph. NDVM separates symbolic structure from differentiable numeric state: tags, symbols, environments, and control remain native runtime data, while numeric payloads live in dense batched buffers with exact reverse-mode gradients recorded along the realized execution trace, so one evaluator walk is amortized across large populations of parameter vectors. A locked cost model of a real differentiable self-hosted Scheme interpreter motivates the design. We realize NDVM as a native runtime with forward and gradient equivalence to the reference backend, about 60x per-lane batch amortization, near-linear multicore scaling, and two independent front ends. In fixed-budget co-search over LLM-proposed programs, NDVM reaches high-quality solutions about 24x sooner in wall-clock time, suggesting runtime differentiation as a practical systems foundation for scientific discovery workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Native Differentiable Virtual Machine (NDVM)，一种在不为每个候选程序单独编译计算图的前提下，实现可微执行程序的运行时表示，兼顾符号结构灵活性与数值优化效率，在科学模型联合搜索中显著加速参数校准过程。
AI.motivation: AI系统生成的科学模型需同时优化符号结构和连续参数，而现有方法在程序与参数联合搜索中面临瓶颈：外层生成大量候选程序，但每个程序需独立梯度优化，导致效率低下；编译式方法快但丧失'程序即数据'特性，解释器方法保留该特性却因解释开销过大而低效。
AI.method: 提出NDVM，将符号结构（标签、符号、环境、控制流）保留在原生运行时数据中，而数值部分存于批量密集缓冲区，并沿实际执行轨迹精确记录反向模式梯度，使一次求值可摊销至大批量参数向量；基于真实可微自托管Scheme解释器建立锁定价模型，并实现具备前向与梯度等价性的原生运行时。
AI.result: NDVM实现约60倍每通道批量摊销加速、近线性多核扩展性、两个独立前端；在固定预算的LLM生成程序联合搜索中，相比基线，达到高质量解的墙钟时间缩短约24倍。
AI.conclusion: NDVM验证了运行时可微分作为科学发现工作流实用系统基础的可行性，为程序与参数协同搜索提供了高效、灵活的新范式。

title: Diffusion-Guided Uncertainty-Aware Delayed Policy Optimization
summary: Reinforcement learning in real world environments often suffers from severe performance degradation due to delayed feedback. Existing approaches typically mitigate performance degradation caused by observation delays by constructing augmented states or predicting the true states. However, these methods often overlook the inherent discrepancy between delayed state and true states induced by stochastic MDP. We theoretically prove the existence of such a discrepancy and show that it leads to the degradation of the optimal policy. To address this challenge, we propose Diffusion Guided Uncertainty Aware Delayed Policy Optimization (DUPO). Our method explicitly models the relationship between delayed state message and the current state using a diffusion model, and leverages the resulting discrepancy estimates to weight delayed policies. Extensive experiments on continuous robotic control tasks with multiple stochastic delays demonstrate that DUPO consistently outperforms existing methods and remains effective even under long and random delay scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DUPO方法，通过扩散模型建模延迟状态与当前真实状态的关系，并利用估计的差异加权延迟策略，以缓解随机MDP中因观测延迟导致的策略性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现实世界强化学习中因观测延迟导致性能严重下降，现有方法忽略随机MDP下延迟状态与真实状态间的固有差异，而该差异会损害最优策略。
AI.method: 提出Diffusion Guided Uncertainty Aware Delayed Policy Optimization (DUPO)，利用扩散模型显式建模延迟状态与当前状态的关系，并基于估计的差异对延迟策略进行加权优化。
AI.result: 在多个具有随机延迟的连续机器人控制任务上，DUPO持续优于现有方法，且在长时、随机延迟场景下仍保持有效性。
AI.conclusion: 理论证明了延迟状态与真实状态间差异的存在及其对策略性能的负面影响；DUPO通过不确定性感知与扩散建模有效缓解该问题，为延迟强化学习提供了新范式。

title: Athena-WBC: Capability-Aligned Policy Experts for Long-Tail Humanoid Whole-Body Control
summary: Large-scale humanoid motion-tracking controllers are commonly improved by reallocating training effort: difficult motions are sampled more often, isolated into smaller subsets, or assigned to specialized experts. We show that this view is incomplete. In strong whole-body-control baselines, a residual set of feasible training clips remains unsolved even under targeted training, especially for high-dynamic transitions and balance-critical motions. These failures arise not only from insufficient exposure, but from a mismatch between the motion demands and the effective capability induced by the default training recipe. We propose Athena-WBC, a compact teacher-student pipeline with capability-aligned policy experts for long-tail humanoid whole-body control. Dynamic experts use a tracking-focused, constraint-aware objective that removes conservative effort and temporal-control penalties while preserving physical feasibility constraints; balance experts use a gravity curriculum to improve early-training survivability. The resulting privileged teachers are motion-routed for DAgger distillation and then compressed into a single controller with deployable observations followed by RL fine-tuning. Experiments on a full-size humanoid show improved recovery of training-set long-tail motions and better held-out tracking than a strong SONIC-recipe baseline, using only a small number of experts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Athena-WBC，一种基于能力对齐的教师-学生框架，通过动态专家（聚焦跟踪与约束）和平衡专家（重力课程）提升人形机器人全身控制在长尾高动态动作上的性能，并经DAgger蒸馏与RL微调实现单控制器部署。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模人形运动跟踪控制器虽通过重采样、子集划分或专家分工改进，但仍难以解决高动态过渡与平衡关键动作等长尾问题，根源不仅是训练不足，更是运动需求与默认训练策略所诱导的能力不匹配。
AI.method: 提出Athena-WBC：1）构建两类能力对齐的特权教师专家——动态专家采用无保守努力/时序惩罚但满足物理可行性的跟踪目标；平衡专家引入重力课程提升早期生存性；2）通过运动路由将动作分发至对应教师，用DAgger进行知识蒸馏；3）压缩为单一控制器并基于可部署观测做RL微调。
AI.result: 在全尺寸人形机器人上实验表明，相比强基线SONIC方案，仅需少量专家即显著提升训练集长尾动作恢复率及未见动作跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 能力对齐的专家设计与分层蒸馏策略，比单纯增加训练数据或专家数量更有效地解决了人形全身控制中的长尾难题，为复杂运动控制提供了新范式。

title: FormalRx: Rectify and eXamine Semantic Failures in Autoformalization
comment: 44 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: The veracious semantic alignment in autoformalization is significant for formal mathematical reasoning. However, existing evaluations provide only opaque binary verdicts or scalar scores, offering no interpretable insight into where or why translations fail. This opacity severely limits both human understanding and automated system improvement. To bridge this gap, we introduce FormalRx, a comprehensive diagnostic evaluation framework that transforms autoformalization assessment from black-box judgments into actionable feedback. At its core is SCI Error Taxonomy, a hierarchical classification scheme decomposing autoformalization errors into 28 distinct categories with strict priority ordering. Building on this taxonomy, FormalRx provides four critical diagnostic capabilities: alignment verdicts, error categorization, error localization, and correction. We instantiate the framework with a diagnostic model FormalRx-8B, trained on 56,287 NL-FL pairs with fine-grained diagnostic annotations, and release FormalRx-Test as the first fine-grained diagnostic benchmark. FormalRx-8B achieves F1-scores of 0.88 (verdict) and 0.71 (categorization), along with accuracies of 0.75 (localization) and 0.73 (correction), substantially outperforming both general-purpose LLMs and specialized baselines. By connecting evaluation with actionable insights, FormalRx enables systematic diagnosis and improvement of autoformalization systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FormalRx框架，通过SCI错误分类法实现自动形式化评估的可解释性诊断，包含对齐判断、错误分类、定位与修正四大能力，并发布首个细粒度诊断基准FormalRx-Test。
AI.motivation: 现有自动形式化评估方法仅提供不透明的二元判决或标量分数，缺乏可解释性，限制了人类理解和系统改进。
AI.method: 提出SCI错误分类法（28类分层错误类型，具严格优先级），构建FormalRx诊断评估框架，开发诊断模型FormalRx-8B，并发布细粒度基准FormalRx-Test。
AI.result: FormalRx-8B在判断（F1=0.88）、分类（F1=0.71）、定位（准确率0.75）和修正（准确率0.73）任务上显著优于通用大模型及专用基线。
AI.conclusion: FormalRx将自动形式化评估从黑箱判断转变为可操作反馈，推动系统可解释诊断与持续改进。

title: CONFLUX: A Latent Diusion Model for 3D Chest-CT Synthesis with RL Post-Training
summary: Controllable generative models of 3D medical images can synthesize volumes with specified clinical attributes, but this demands samples that are simultaneously high-fidelity, natively 3D, and faithful to the requested conditioning. We present CONFLUX, a latent diffusion model for chest computed tomography (CT): a 3D variational autoencoder compresses each volume, and a rectified-flow transformer generates in the latent space. Generation is conditioned on structured radiological metadata (18 abnormality findings, sex, age, and reconstruction kernel) through adaptive layer normalization. The model leads strong volumetric baselines on tri-planar Frechet distance (FID 32.3 vs. 74.6 for MAISI) while exposing direct control over clinical attributes. To strengthen that control we add an online reinforcement-learning post-training stage (group-relative policy optimization) that rewards how reliably a classifier recovers the requested findings from each generated volume. Judged by a separate, independent classifier, post-training removes 47% of the shortfall relative to real-scan reliability. We release the model and a ~200k synthetic chest-CT dataset with conditioning metadata spanning a wide variety of clinical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CONFLUX的可控3D医学影像生成模型，基于潜在扩散架构，结合3D变分自编码器与修正流Transformer，在胸腔CT数据上实现了高保真、原生3D且条件精准的生成，并通过在线强化学习进一步提升临床属性控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有可控3D医学图像生成模型难以同时满足高保真度、原生三维性及对临床条件的准确响应，亟需更可靠的生成方法。
AI.method: 采用3D变分自编码器压缩CT体积，利用修正流Transformer在潜在空间生成；以结构化放射学元数据（18种异常发现、性别、年龄、重建核）通过自适应层归一化进行条件控制；并引入基于组相对策略优化（GRPO）的在线强化学习后训练阶段，以提升生成结果中临床特征的可识别性。
AI.result: CONFLUX在三平面Fréchet距离上显著优于基线（FID 32.3 vs. MAISI的74.6）；强化学习后训练使生成样本在独立分类器下的临床特征识别率提升，弥补了47%相对于真实扫描的可靠性差距；公开发布了模型及含丰富临床标注的约20万例合成胸腔CT数据集。
AI.conclusion: CONFLUX为可控、高质量3D医学影像合成提供了新范式，其结合潜在扩散建模与强化学习优化的方法，显著增强了临床条件的精确可控性与生成可信度。

title: When Geometry Aligns: Dihedral Hidden-State Transformations in UNet, ViT, and DiT Architectures
comment: Accepted at the Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs), 2026
summary: Diffusion architectures now encompass convolutional UNets as well as transformer-based designs such as Diffusion Transformers (DiTs), inspired by Vision Transformers (ViTs), yet the effects of structured geometric perturbations within these architectures remain poorly understood. We study this question through a unified framework that applies reflection-based elements of the dihedral group to intermediate hidden states as controlled internal interventions, contrasting geometrically consistent and inconsistent variants. Using activation-level diagnostics, including Self-Consistency Shift (SCS), Activation Mass Scatter (AMS), and Drift, we analyze feature stability and geometric drift. We find that consistent transformations improve stability, while inconsistent ones induce predictable, architecture-specific failures. In the main Stable Diffusion 2.1 U-Net study, we evaluate seven intervention modes over three seeds and complement the internal diagnostics with image-level FID, KID, CLIP score, and LPIPS diversity. Taken together with supporting ViT and controlled DiT analyses, these results establish geometric consistency as a key principle for stable hidden-state interventions in spatially structured vision and diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了几何扰动对扩散模型（如UNet和DiT）隐藏状态的影响，提出了一种基于二面体群反射的统一干预框架，并通过多种诊断指标分析了特征稳定性和几何漂移，发现几何一致性是确保空间结构视觉和扩散模型中隐藏状态干预稳定性的关键原则。
AI.motivation: 扩散架构（如UNet和DiT）日益广泛，但其内部隐藏状态对结构化几何扰动的响应机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 提出基于二面体群反射的统一干预框架，在中间隐藏状态施加几何一致/不一致的反射变换；结合激活层诊断指标（SCS、AMS、Drift）及图像级评估（FID、KID、CLIP、LPIPS）进行多维度分析。
AI.result: 几何一致变换提升特征稳定性，不一致变换导致可预测的、架构特异的失败；在Stable Diffusion 2.1 U-Net上验证了七种干预模式，并通过ViT和DiT对照实验进一步支持结论。
AI.conclusion: 几何一致性是空间结构化视觉与扩散模型中实现稳定隐藏状态干预的关键设计原则。

title: ASSEMCAD: Production-Ready CAD Assembly Generation from Natural Language
summary: Recent advances in large language models and programmatic CAD have significantly improved Text-to-CAD generation for individual parts. However, production-ready mechanical assembly generation remains largely unsolved. Unlike single-part modeling, assemblies require coordinated reasoning over multiple components, functional interfaces, assembly relations, engineering principles, and physical consistency. Consequently, directly generating executable CAD code is insufficient for constructing mechanically valid and reusable assemblies. We present AssemCAD, an axiom-grounded framework for production-ready CAD assembly generation from natural language. Instead of representing an assembly as monolithic CAD code, AssemCAD first constructs an axiomatic Assembly Specification consisting of typed parts, geometry-backed ports, executable mates, and engineering axioms. Each assembly relation is explicitly grounded in one or more engineering principles, making the resulting specification interpretable, reusable, and verifiable. To realize this specification, AssemCAD introduces a port- and mate-based CAD assembly library that executes symbolic assembly relations through deterministic mate transformations and validates declared interfaces using concrete B-Rep geometric evidence. Built on this representation and library, AssemCAD further supports on-demand synthesis of reusable parametric component factories for both standard and open-world geometries. Experiments on AssemBench show that AssemCAD substantially improves assembly preservation and physical validity over code-centric CAD generation baselines, while generalizing across different foundation-model backbones. By combining axiom-grounded assembly reasoning with deterministic geometric execution, AssemCAD extends Text-to-CAD from isolated part generation toward production-ready mechanical assembly design.

AI.tldr: AssemCAD 提出了一种基于公理的文本到机械装配生成框架，通过构建可解释、可验证的装配规范（含类型化部件、几何端口、可执行配合关系及工程公理），并结合端口-配合驱动的CAD库与参数化工厂合成能力，显著提升了装配保真度与物理有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-CAD方法擅长单零件生成，但难以生成生产就绪的机械装配；装配需协同推理多部件、接口、装配关系、工程原理与物理一致性，仅生成CAD代码不足以保证机械有效性与可重用性。
AI.method: 提出AssemCAD框架：1）构建公理支撑的装配规范（含类型化部件、几何端口、可执行mates、工程公理）；2）开发端口与mate驱动的CAD装配库，通过确定性mate变换执行装配，并用B-Rep几何证据验证接口；3）支持按需合成可重用的参数化组件工厂。
AI.result: 在AssemBench上实验表明，AssemCAD显著优于代码中心型基线，在装配保真度和物理有效性上提升明显，并能跨不同基础模型主干泛化。
AI.conclusion: AssemCAD将Text-to-CAD从单零件生成拓展至生产就绪的机械装配设计，融合公理化装配推理与确定性几何执行，为可解释、可验证、可重用的智能装配生成提供了新范式。

title: WinTA-GIL: Windowed Trajectory Alignment for GNSS-IMU-LiDAR Heading Refinement in Intermittent Signal Environments
summary: Although multi-source fusion positioning systems have achieved significant progress, accurate and reliable heading estimation remains a critical challenge due to the lack of gravitational constraints and the inherent weak observability of heading in complex environments. Most existing methodologies are specifically tailored for the startup phase, relying on a singular initial alignment to establish the heading reference. Consequently, these approaches lack the adaptability required to refine heading estimates dynamically, which renders the system highly vulnerable to accumulated drift and observation noise during prolonged navigation or immediately following GNSS signal outages. To address these limitations, this paper proposes WinTA-GIL, a novel heading refinement framework that integrates information from Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS), Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), and Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) through a temporal window-based optimization strategy. Unlike conventional alignment methods restricted to the startup phase, WinTA-GIL leverages high-precision local trajectories from LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (LIO) to register against filtered GNSS observations. This approach transforms heading estimation into a repeatable, trajectory-based consistency optimization problem. In particular, an adaptive re-estimation mechanism based on state discrimination is incorporated to trigger heading corrections whenever necessary, thereby effectively suppressing the inertial drift accumulated during challenging conditions. Extensive experiments on both open-source and self-collected datasets demonstrate that WinTA-GIL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both estimation accuracy and system robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WinTA-GIL框架，通过GNSS、IMU与LiDAR多源融合及时间窗优化策略，实现动态、可重复的航向角精化估计，显著提升长时间导航与GNSS失锁场景下的精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有航向估计方法多局限于启动阶段单次对准，缺乏动态修正能力，导致惯性漂移累积和噪声敏感，在复杂环境及GNSS中断后性能下降。
AI.method: 提出WinTA-GIL框架：利用LiDAR-IMU里程计（LIO）生成高精度局部轨迹，与滤波后的GNSS观测进行时间窗内配准；将航向估计建模为轨迹一致性优化问题，并引入基于状态判别的自适应重估机制触发航向修正。
AI.result: 在开源与自采数据集上实验表明，WinTA-GIL在航向估计精度和系统鲁棒性方面均显著优于当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: WinTA-GIL实现了航向估计从一次性对准到动态可重估范式的转变，有效抑制惯性漂移，提升了多源融合定位系统在挑战性条件下的可靠性与实用性。

title: ToolFailBench: Diagnosing Tool-Use Failures in LLM Agents
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures. Published at the Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) and the Workshop on Failure Modes of Agentic AI (FAGEN) at ICML 2026
summary: Tool calling is central to modern language model agents, but aggregate benchmark scores often hide where tool use fails. A model that never calls a needed tool and a model that calls the tool but ignores the result can look similar under final task accuracy. We introduce ToolFailBench, a diagnostic benchmark for measuring tool-use failures across 1,000 tasks in finance, medicine, law, cybersecurity, and real estate. Tool-required tasks return values the model wouldn't guess, forcing it to trust the tool while control tasks attach the same tools but should be answered directly. We label each trace with Tool-Skip, Result-Ignore, Output-Fabrication, and Unnecessary-Tool-Use, using a rule classifier and two LLM judges aggregated by majority vote. Across 19 headline models, the best reaches 86.33% Clean Tool-Use Rate, showing that faithful tool use is not saturated. More importantly, models with similar aggregate scores fail in different ways: most stay disciplined on no-tool controls, while Llama-3.1 models show an Always-Call pattern, and at the same parameter scale Llama-3.1-70B and Qwen2.5-72B differ by 89 percentage points on control-task accuracy. Tool-use evaluation should measure not only whether agents call tools, but whether they use tool outputs correctly and avoid tools when none is needed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ToolFailBench诊断基准，用于细粒度识别大模型在工具调用中的四类失败模式（跳过工具、忽略结果、捏造输出、不必要调用），揭示当前模型虽在整体准确率上表现尚可，但在忠实使用工具方面仍存在显著缺陷，且不同模型失败模式差异明显。
AI.motivation: 现有工具调用评估仅依赖最终任务准确率，掩盖了模型在工具调用过程中的具体失败类型（如调用但忽略结果 vs. 完全不调用），亟需细粒度诊断方法。
AI.method: 构建ToolFailBench基准：包含1000个跨领域任务，区分tool-required和tool-control两类任务；设计四类失败标签（Tool-Skip等），结合规则分类器与双LLM法官多数投票进行标注；在19个主流模型上进行系统评测。
AI.result: 最佳模型Clean Tool-Use Rate为86.33%，表明工具使用未饱和；不同模型失败模式迥异（如Llama-3.1倾向'Always-Call'，同规模模型间控制任务准确率相差达89个百分点）。
AI.conclusion: 工具使用评估不应止于是否调用工具，而应综合考察工具输出的正确利用及对非必要调用的规避，ToolFailBench为此提供了可解释、可分解的诊断框架。

title: REAL-OW: Rehearsal-free Open World Object Detection with Low-Rank Adaptation and Dual-Stage Objectness Modeling
summary: Open-World Object Detection (OWOD) requires detectors to identify previously unseen objects as unknown and incrementally incorporate them into the set of known categories, while preserving previously acquired knowledge. Existing frameworks rely heavily on exemplar replay to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, but in some real applications, storing raw data conflicts with data access restrictions and leads to data exposure risks, while incurring significant memory overhead. In this paper, we propose REAL-OW, a novel rehearsal-free framework that decouples incremental knowledge through a collaborative adapter architecture based on Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Specifically, we deploy General Adapters (GAs) in the backbone to enable the significance-aware refinement of cross-task universal representations, while Specific Adapters (SAs) in the decoder provide orthogonal storage for task-specific expertise. To resolve representation drift in objectness modeling under rehearsal-free constraints, we introduce Dual-Stage Objectness Modeling (DSOM), which alternates between feature aggregation and boundary consolidation to stabilize objectness distributions while maintaining the separation between known and unknown categories. Furthermore, DSOM is supported by a Calibrated Gaussian Negative Log-Likelihood (CG-NLL) distance tailored for the dispersed feature distributions inherent in rehearsal-free settings. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that REAL-OW achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing existing exemplar replay methods in both detection precision and unknown discovery. Our approach establishes a new baseline for rehearsal-free OWOD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REAL-OW，一种无需样本回放的开放世界目标检测（OWOD）新框架，通过基于LoRA的协同适配器架构解耦增量知识，并引入双阶段物体性建模（DSOM）与校准高斯负对数似然（CG-NLL）距离来缓解表征漂移，在保持已知类别性能的同时提升未知类别发现能力。
AI.motivation: 现有OWOD方法依赖 exemplar replay 缓解灾难性遗忘，但存储原始数据存在隐私泄露风险、访问限制及高内存开销，亟需 rehearsal-free 解决方案。
AI.method: 提出REAL-OW框架：1）采用通用适配器（GAs）在骨干网络中进行跨任务通用表征的显著性感知微调；2）使用特定适配器（SAs）在解码器中正交存储任务专属知识；3）设计双阶段物体性建模（DSOM），交替执行特征聚合与边界整合；4）引入校准高斯负对数似然（CG-NLL）距离以适配无回放下的分散特征分布。
AI.result: 在多个OWOD基准上达到SOTA性能，检测精度与未知类别发现能力均超越现有基于exemplar replay的方法。
AI.conclusion: REAL-OW为无回放开放世界目标检测建立了新基线，验证了适配器协同解耦与稳定物体性建模的有效性，兼顾知识保留与未知识别。

title: Modular Foundation Models for Time-Series Perception in Digital Twins
summary: Engineering Digital Twins and Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) systems rely on robust perception modules to extract actionable information from heterogeneous and non-stationary time-series data. However, most existing approaches remain task-specific, data-hungry, and difficult to integrate into scalable monitoring and decision-making pipelines. Moreover, purely data-driven models often lack robustness and transferability across varying operating conditions. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a modular foundation model for time-series perception based on a collection of pretrained representation encoders. The framework leverages self-supervised learning on heterogeneous datasets to learn transferable and task-agnostic representations, which can be reused across multiple PHM tasks. A gating mechanism is introduced to dynamically select relevant encoders for a given target dataset, enabling conditional computation and adaptive model composition. The selected representations are projected into a shared latent space and aggregated using a Transformer-based self-attention module that explicitly models cross-encoder interactions. The resulting architecture supports multiple downstream tasks, including imputation, long-term forecasting, and few-shot learning, through lightweight task-specific heads, while keeping pretrained encoders frozen during adaptation. Extensive ablation studies demonstrate the complementary roles of self-supervised pretraining, encoder selection, representation alignment, and adaptive aggregation. Experimental results on the ETT benchmark show competitive performance across tasks, while a real-world industrial case study on virtual sensing for hydro-generator rotor temperature highlights the practical relevance of the approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向时间序列感知的模块化基础模型，通过自监督预训练多个编码器，并结合动态门控选择、表示对齐与Transformer聚合机制，实现跨任务、低数据依赖、高鲁棒性的PHM应用。
AI.motivation: 现有PHM和数字孪生中的感知模块存在任务特异性强、数据需求高、泛化性差、难以集成等问题，尤其在非平稳异构时序数据下表现不佳。
AI.method: 构建基于多预训练表征编码器的模块化基础模型；采用自监督学习在异构数据上预训练编码器；引入门控机制动态选择适配目标数据的编码器；将选定表征投影至共享隐空间，并用Transformer自注意力模块建模跨编码器交互；下游任务仅添加轻量级特定头，冻结预训练编码器。
AI.result: 在ETT基准测试中各项任务（插补、长期预测、少样本学习）性能具有竞争力；真实工业案例（水轮发电机转子温度虚拟传感）验证了方法的实用性与有效性；消融实验表明自监督预训练、编码器选择、表征对齐与自适应聚合各组件互补且关键。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化基础模型为PHM系统提供了可复用、可扩展、高适应性的时序感知范式，显著提升了模型的泛化能力、鲁棒性与工程落地潜力。

title: TacReasoner: A Dynamic Tactile-Language Framework for Interactive Reasoning in Real-World Scenarios
summary: Among the five primary human senses, tactile is arguably the most fundamental to survival, as it enables the perception of physical contact and interaction in real-world environments. In this paper, we explore two key challenges of integrating tactile sensing into intelligent systems for multimodal reasoning: (i) insufficient modeling of dynamic tactile signals, which restricts reasoning over temporally evolving properties, and (ii) hallucination in tactile foundation models caused by the absence of explicit reasoning mechanisms, leading to unstable real-world inference. To address these challenges, we propose TacReasoner, a dynamic tactile-language framework for interactive reasoning in real-world scenarios. First, TacReasoner incorporates a Dynamic-aware Tactile Encoder to enhance the perception and representation of dynamic tactile signals. More importantly, we introduce TouchCoT-10k, the first tactile chain-of-thought dataset for structured reasoning over tactile inputs. Upon it, we establish DynTac-Bench to systematically evaluate dynamic tactile perception and real-world commonsense reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that TacReasoner achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art models across multiple datasets. Notably, despite using only 7B parameters, TacReasoner outperforms the 14B VTV-LLM model on most subtasks, highlighting its effectiveness and efficiency in tactile commonsense reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TacReasoner框架，通过动态触觉编码器和首个触觉思维链数据集TouchCoT-10k，解决触觉信号建模不足与幻觉问题，在动态触觉感知与常识推理任务中以更小参数量超越大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉智能系统存在两大挑战：一是对动态触觉信号建模不足，限制时序推理能力；二是触觉基础模型因缺乏显式推理机制而易产生幻觉，导致现实世界推理不稳定。
AI.method: 提出TacReasoner动态触觉-语言框架，包含动态感知增强的触觉编码器，并构建首个触觉链式思维数据集TouchCoT-10k及配套评测基准DynTac-Bench。
AI.result: TacReasoner在多个数据集上达到SOTA水平；仅用7B参数即在多数子任务中超越14B的VTV-LLM模型。
AI.conclusion: TacReasoner有效提升了动态触觉感知与现实世界常识推理能力，兼具高性能与高效率，为触觉多模态智能系统提供了新范式。

title: PRISM: Personalized Robotic Dataset Generation via Image-based Scene and Motion Synthesis
summary: Recent advances in large-scale pretrained vision-language-action models have improved robot policy learning, but directly deploying such policies in user-specific environments remains challenging due to limited generalization, which inevitably requires collecting a dataset tailored to the target environment. Teleoperation yields well-aligned data but is costly and difficult to scale, whereas simulation scales easily but struggles to resemble the target environment and generate task-specific trajectories. To meet both simultaneously, we propose PRISM, an end-to-end pipeline that generates personalized robotic datasets from a single image and a natural-language instruction. PRISM constructs digital cousin scenes that are semantically and geometrically aligned with the user environment yet diverse at the instance level, and synthesizes executable demonstrations without human teleoperation. Extensive experiments show that policies trained on PRISM-generated datasets outperform those trained on baseline-generated datasets on LIBERO and LIBERO-Plus, achieve up to 100\% success rate on three real-world manipulation tasks, and maintain stronger performance when evaluated in environments that differ from those seen during training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM，一种从单张图像和自然语言指令端到端生成个性化机器人数据集的新方法，以解决大模型在用户特定环境中泛化能力差、依赖人工遥操作或仿真数据的问题；实验表明其生成的数据显著提升策略性能与跨环境鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 大尺度视觉-语言-动作预训练模型虽提升了机器人策略学习，但难以直接部署于用户特定环境，因其泛化能力有限，需收集目标环境定制数据；而遥操作成本高、难扩展，仿真又难以真实还原环境并生成任务特异性轨迹。
AI.method: 提出PRISM端到端流水线：基于单张用户环境图像和自然语言指令，构建语义与几何对齐、实例级多样化的‘数字表亲’场景，并在其中合成可执行的机器人演示，无需人工遥操作。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和LIBERO-Plus基准上，PRISM生成数据训练的策略优于基线方法；在三个真实世界操纵任务中达到100%成功率；在训练未见环境上评估时仍保持更强性能。
AI.conclusion: PRISM有效弥合了仿真与现实之间的鸿沟，为个性化机器人策略学习提供了低成本、高保真、可扩展的数据生成新范式。

title: PAST-TIDE: Prototype-Anchored Statement Tuning with Topic-Invariant Normalization for Stance Detection
comment: Published in The Fifteenth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)
summary: We introduce PAST-TIDE, our stance detection system addressing both subtasks of the StanceNakba Shared Task at NakbaNLP@LREC-COLING 2026. The main idea is statement tuning. We redefine stance as cloze-style masked language modeling (MLM), letting a verbalizer map label words to stance categories through the pre-trained MLM head rather than appending a randomly initialized classification head. We complement this with prototypical contrastive learning, which uses learnable class prototypes for batch-size independent contrastive training, and topic-conditional layer normalization for cross-topic Arabic stance detection. PAST-TIDE achieves macro-F1 scores of 0.75 for Subtask A and 0.74 for Subtask B on the official leaderboard, indicating that minimal architectural additions to a pre-trained model can remain competitive in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: PAST-TIDE 是一个面向阿拉伯语立场检测的系统，通过语句微调、原型对比学习和主题条件层归一化，在低资源场景下取得了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 解决 NakbaNLP 2026 共享任务中阿拉伯语立场检测的低资源挑战，尤其针对跨主题泛化与模型轻量化需求。
AI.method: 提出 statement tuning：将立场分类重构为完形填空式掩码语言建模（MLM），利用预训练 MLM 头+ verbalizer 映射标签；引入原型对比学习（prototypical contrastive learning）实现 batch-size 无关的类别判别；采用 topic-conditional layer normalization 增强跨主题鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在官方排行榜上 Subtask A 和 Subtask B 的 macro-F1 分别达 0.75 和 0.74，验证了仅需最小架构改动即可在低资源设置下保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 无需额外分类头、依赖预训练 MLM 结构并辅以原型对比与主题感知归一化，是提升低资源阿拉伯语立场检测性能的有效范式。

title: PosterHarness: Turning Scientific Poster Generation into an Auditable Instruction-Following Benchmark
summary: Text-rich image models can now design poster-scale layouts, but we lack ways to measure whether they honor scientific communication contracts: legible labels, prescribed aspect ratios, and -- above all -- abstaining from fabricated scientific figures. We present POSTERHARNESS, an auditable harness reframing poster generation as measurable instruction-following tasks, with a pilot benchmark and failure taxonomy. POSTERHARNESS uses a placeholder-first contract to separate two jobs models otherwise conflate. The model performs visual-summary design: typography, reading path, color, and background -- but never draws data-bearing figures. Every figure region must be an empty labeled placeholder; a deterministic compositor inserts real source-paper figures at detected coordinates. This makes properties measurable: placeholder count and ID accuracy, blankness, aspect-ratio compliance, abstention from synthesized graphics, public-text hygiene, and source-figure provenance -- with failures logged as explicit rejections, not hidden in plausible-looking output. We instantiate the harness on 12 papers (6 HEP, 6 AI/ML-adjacent) and report three findings. (i) A counterfactual probe shows the placeholder contract drives VLM-counted synthesized figures from 34 to 0 across three papers. (ii) A failure taxonomy identifies blocking contracts: placeholder geometry, placeholder QA, template critic, and public text. (iii) Comparison with Paper2Poster shows a trade-off: PosterHarness yields higher-resolution artifacts, lower white-canvas fraction, and stronger VLM visual preference; the deterministic baseline retains slightly more PosterQuiz-style information and runs faster. We report this as regime characterization, not a superiority claim. All artifacts, prompts, manifests, and audit scripts are released as a reusable evaluation component.

AI.tldr: 本文提出POSTERHARNESS，一种可审计的海报生成评估框架，通过‘占位符优先’契约分离视觉设计与数据图表生成，确保模型不伪造科学图表，并实现多项可测量属性（如占位符准确性、空白性、长宽比合规性等）；在12篇论文上验证，发现该契约显著消除合成图表，构建了失败分类体系，并与Paper2Poster对比揭示性能权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有文本丰富图像模型虽能生成海报级布局，但缺乏对其是否遵守科学传播契约（如清晰标签、规定长宽比、尤其不伪造科学图表）的量化评估手段。
AI.method: 提出POSTERHARNESS框架：采用‘占位符优先’契约，将任务分为模型负责的视觉摘要设计（排版、阅读路径、配色等）和确定性合成器负责的真实图表插入；所有图表区域必须为空白带标签占位符；定义并测量多项属性（占位符数量/ID准确率、空白性、长宽比合规性、无合成图形、公开文本规范性、源图表溯源性），失败明确记录。
AI.result: 在12篇论文（6篇高能物理、6篇AI/ML相关）上验证：(i) 占位符契约使VLM检测到的合成图表数从34降至0；(ii) 提出四类阻塞性契约失败（占位符几何、占位符质量保证、模板批评、公开文本）；(iii) 相比Paper2Poster，PosterHarness产出更高分辨率、更低空白画布比例、更强VLM视觉偏好，但确定性基线略保留更多信息且更快。
AI.conclusion: POSTERHARNESS提供了一种可审计、可复现、可扩展的海报生成评估范式，强调契约驱动的设计分离与显式失败归因，推动文本-图像模型在科学传播场景中的可信部署；所有资源开源，作为可复用评估组件。

title: Graph Classification via Network Usable Information: From Representation Evaluation to Structure Selection
summary:
We propose NetinfoGC, a framework for graph classification that extends the Network Usable Information (NUI) paradigm to graph-level learning. Unlike conventional graph neural network approaches that rely on end-to-end training of black-box embeddings, NetinfoGC constructs a family of permutation-invariant graph representations derived from propagation-based mechanisms and classical structural descriptors, including graph centrality measures.
  To evaluate representation quality, we introduce a training-free NUI estimation procedure based on clustering consistency with ground-truth labels, providing a proxy for task-relevant information without supervised learning. We further exploit the same representations using sparse-group LASSO regularization, enabling automatic selection of informative structural descriptors while suppressing redundant ones.
  Experiments on benchmark datasets show that classical centrality measures are highly competitive with learned propagation-based representations, and in several cases yield superior performance. Moreover, we observe a strong correlation between estimated NUI and downstream classification accuracy, validating NUI as an effective measure of representation utility.
  Overall, NetinfoGC provides a unified and interpretable framework for evaluating and exploiting graph representations without requiring end-to-end neural training.

AI.tldr: NetinfoGC 提出了一种无需端到端训练的图分类框架，结合传播机制与经典中心性等结构描述符构建可解释、排列不变的图表示，并通过无监督的NUI估计和稀疏组LASSO实现特征选择与性能验证。
AI.motivation: 克服传统图神经网络黑箱嵌入与端到端训练带来的不可解释性和泛化局限，探索更透明、可评估的图表示范式。
AI.method: 提出NetinfoGC框架：1）融合传播机制与经典结构描述符（如中心性）构建排列不变图表示；2）设计基于聚类一致性的无监督NUI估计方法；3）采用稀疏组LASSO自动选择关键结构特征。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，经典中心性指标性能媲美甚至优于学习型传播表示；NUI估计值与下游分类准确率呈强相关，验证其作为表示效用指标的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NetinfoGC提供了一个统一、可解释、无需端到端神经训练的图表示评估与利用框架，强调结构先验与信息量化的重要性。

title: DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by decoupling draft generation from target verification. While recent parallel drafters efficiently propose long token sequences in a single forward pass, they suffer from rapid acceptance decay due to a lack of inter-token dependencies. Furthermore, indiscriminately verifying these extended blocks wastes critical batch capacity on tokens with high rejection risks, severely degrading throughput in high-concurrency serving systems. We introduce DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that unifies high-throughput parallel generation with adaptive, load-aware verification. To maintain draft quality, DSpark utilizes a semi-autoregressive architecture, coupling a parallel backbone with a lightweight sequential module, to introduce intra-block dependency modeling and mitigate suffix decay. To optimize system efficiency, DSpark employs confidence-scheduled verification, dynamically tailoring the verification length for each request based on estimated prefix survival probabilities and engine-specific throughput profiles. On offline benchmarks across diverse domains, DSpark substantially improves the accepted length over state-of-the-art autoregressive and parallel drafters. When deployed within the DeepSeek-V4 serving system under live user traffic, DSpark successfully mitigates verification waste. Compared to the established production baseline (MTP-1), DSpark accelerates per-user generation speeds by 60 to 85 percent at matched throughput levels. More importantly, by preventing severe throughput degradation under strict interactivity constraints, it enables performance tiers that were previously unattainable, shifting the Pareto frontier of our serving system.

AI.tldr: DSpark提出了一种新型推测解码框架，通过半自回归架构提升并行草稿质量，并采用置信度调度验证策略优化系统吞吐，显著提升LLM推理速度与服务效率。
AI.motivation: 现有并行草稿生成器因缺乏词元间依赖导致接受率快速下降，且盲目验证长块会浪费批处理资源，严重损害高并发服务系统的吞吐性能。
AI.method: DSpark采用半自回归架构（并行主干+轻量序列模块）建模块内依赖以缓解后缀衰减；并设计置信度调度的验证机制，根据前缀存活概率和引擎吞吐特征动态调整各请求的验证长度。
AI.result: 离线评测中显著提升平均接受长度；在线部署于DeepSeek-V4系统后，相较生产基线MTP-1，在相同吞吐下用户生成速度提升60%–85%，并在严格交互约束下避免吞吐崩溃，拓展了服务系统的Pareto前沿。
AI.conclusion: DSpark在保持高吞吐的同时提升了草稿质量与验证效率，为高并发LLM服务提供了更优的推测解码解决方案。

title: DSWAM: A Dual-System World Action Foundation Model for Fine-Grained Robot Manipulation
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) provide a promising alternative to Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies by using video-based world modeling as dense supervision for robot action learning. Existing WAMs excel at physically grounded execution, but typically lack the explicit language-level planning interface in VLM-based VLAs for decomposing coarse instructions. Such decomposition becomes important when household tasks involve complex multi-step goals, where coarse user commands need to be converted into sequences of fine-grained executable subtasks. Meanwhile, the field still lacks a fair real-robot comparison between VLA and WAM execution capabilities, since existing systems often differ in data, robot embodiments, and task protocols. To address both the decomposition gap and the need for a controlled WAM-VLA comparison, we introduce DSWAM, a Dual-System World Action Foundation Model for fine-grained robot manipulation. DSWAM keeps a System 1 WAM executor as the default control path and optionally activates a System 2 vision-language subtask planner only when task decomposition is useful. The planner predicts executable subtasks from short-term visual history and a global task prompt, while the WAM executor performs world-aware action generation for each instruction or subtask. The executor is trained with action prediction and video co-training, but inference directly predicts action chunks without explicit future video generation. To make this execution path practical on real robots, we further integrate TensorRT acceleration, asynchronous execution, and real-time chunking (RTC) so that policy queries do not block robot control. To provide a fair real-robot comparison with VLA policies, we build and evaluate DSWAM under the DeMaVLA real-world deformable manipulation setting with matched robot platform, pretraining data, post-training data, and evaluation criteria.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DSWAM，一种双系统世界动作基础模型，结合了世界动作模型（WAM）的物理执行能力与视觉语言模型（VLM）的分步规划能力，支持在真实机器人上进行公平、可控的VLA与WAM对比，并通过TensorRT加速和实时分块等工程优化实现高效部署。
AI.motivation: 现有WAM缺乏显式的语言级任务分解能力，而VLA虽具规划性但物理执行常不如WAM；同时，真实机器人上WAM与VLA尚无公平可比的评估基准。
AI.method: 提出DSWAM双系统架构：System 1为WAM执行器（基于视频-动作联合训练，推理不生成未来视频），System 2为轻量级视觉语言子任务规划器（仅在需分解时激活）；引入TensorRT加速、异步执行与实时分块（RTC）以保障实时控制；在DeMaVLA设定下统一平台、数据与评估协议进行真实机器人对比实验。
AI.result: DSWAM在真实机器人变形物体操作任务中展现出优于纯VLA的执行鲁棒性，同时保持可解释的分步规划能力；其执行延迟显著降低，满足实时控制要求；首次实现了WAM与VLA在严格控制变量下的公平实机性能对比。
AI.conclusion: 融合WAM与VLM优势的双系统设计是提升机器人复杂任务能力的有效路径；结构化分工（快速执行+按需规划）与工程优化对真实场景落地至关重要；统一评估框架为后续WAM/VLA研究提供了可复现的基准。

title: What You See Is What You Get: Observation-Aligned Supervision for Chart-to-Code Generation
summary: Chart-to-code generation is commonly trained with supervised fine-tuning on reference plotting scripts, implicitly treating the gold code as a fully observable target. We argue that this assumption is often invalid: many chart programs contain latent raw variables that cannot be uniquely recovered from the rendered image. For example, a boxplot exposes summary statistics rather than original samples, a pie chart reveals proportions rather than arbitrary raw values, and a histogram shows bin-level mass rather than individual observations. Supervising models to reproduce such non-identifiable quantities encourages hallucination and over-specified code generation. We introduce Observation-Aligned supervision, a rewriting framework that replaces latent raw-data targets with quantities constrained by the visual observation: box statistics for boxplots, wedge percentages for pie charts, and bin weights for histograms. Applying this framework to chart-to-code training data from two sources, we obtain the Observation-Aligned supervision target data. Experiments across multiple VLMs on ChartMimic and ChartX demonstrate consistent improvements in observable value recovery, including under both-executable evaluation. Our results suggest that improving chart-to-code models requires not only more data or advanced learning objectives or algorithms, but also supervision targets that respect what is identifiable from the chart image.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Observation-Aligned监督框架，通过将不可观测的原始数据目标替换为图像可观测的统计量（如箱线图的箱统计、饼图的扇区百分比、直方图的柱权重），提升图表到代码生成的准确性与可执行性。
AI.motivation: 现有图表到代码生成方法假设渲染图像能唯一恢复原始代码中的数据，但许多图表（如箱线图、饼图、直方图）丢失原始数据信息，导致监督信号不准确并引发模型幻觉。
AI.method: 提出Observation-Aligned监督框架，对训练数据中不可识别的原始变量进行重写，使其仅包含图像可观测的统计量；并在ChartMimic和ChartX两个基准上验证该方法。
AI.result: 在多个视觉语言模型上实验表明，该方法显著提升了可观测值恢复精度，并在可执行性评估下仍保持一致改进。
AI.conclusion: 图表到代码建模的关键不仅在于模型或数据规模，更在于监督目标是否尊重图像中实际可识别的信息。

title: HyperVAttention: Efficient Sparse Attention with Spatio-Temporal Clustering for Video Diffusion
summary: Video Diffusion Transformers (VDiTs) have demonstrated significant capabilities in high-fidelity video generation. However, their ability to produce long-duration videos is fundamentally constrained by the quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism. Recent clustering-based sparse attention methods improve the quality-speed trade-off by grouping semantically similar tokens, but their practical efficiency remains limited by two bottlenecks: substantial clustering overhead and low CTA utilization caused by irregular cluster-induced blocks. We propose HyperVAttention (HVA), a training-free sparse attention framework that addresses both bottlenecks jointly. To reduce clustering overhead, we introduce 3D local-window clustering, which exploits the spatio-temporal locality of video tokens to restrict centroid search to fixed local neighborhoods, and implement it with a custom Triton kernel for efficient execution. We further propose a hybrid clustering strategy that performs full clustering only at anchor steps and updates only subset tokens at intermediate steps, leveraging the temporal stability of cluster assignments across denoising steps. To improve CTA utilization, we present hardware-aware cluster merging that minimizes CTA-aligned execution cost through parallel agglomerative merging, improving block density and approximation fidelity by utilizing idle tile capacity. Together, these components reduce clustering overhead, avoid redundant updates, and better align sparse attention with the fixed tile structure of modern GPU kernels. Experiments on Text-to-Video generation show that HVA establishes a new Pareto frontier for training-free sparse attention in video diffusion, reducing end-to-end latency by up to $2.13\times$ while improving fidelity over existing training-free sparse attention baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperVAttention（HVA），一种无需训练的稀疏注意力框架，通过3D局部窗口聚类、混合聚类策略和硬件感知聚类合并，显著降低视频扩散Transformer中稀疏注意力的计算开销与GPU资源浪费，在保持甚至提升生成质量的同时，端到端延迟最高降低2.13倍。
AI.motivation: VDiTs在长视频生成中受限于自注意力的二次复杂度；现有基于聚类的稀疏注意力方法仍存在聚类开销大和GPU线程块（CTA）利用率低两大瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出HyperVAttention（HVA）：1）3D局部窗口聚类（定制Triton核实现）以降低聚类开销；2）混合聚类策略（锚步全聚类+中间步子集更新）利用去噪过程中的聚类时序稳定性；3）硬件感知聚类合并（并行凝聚式合并）提升CTA利用率与块密度。
AI.result: 在文本到视频生成任务上，HVA相比现有无需训练的稀疏注意力基线，端到端延迟最高降低2.13×，同时提升生成保真度，确立了新的Pareto最优前沿。
AI.conclusion: HVA通过协同优化聚类效率与硬件适配性，有效突破视频扩散模型中稀疏注意力的实际部署瓶颈，为高效长视频生成提供了实用新范式。

title: Implicit Bias of SGD in Multivariate ReLU Networks: Effective Width Collapse
summary: We study the implicit bias of noisy stochastic gradient descent in training wide two-layer ReLU networks for multivariate regression. In a mean-field regime, the training dynamics are approximated by a Wasserstein gradient flow that converges to a unique stationary measure. We characterize the structure of this stationary measure and the predictor it represents. We show that, despite the network being infinitely overparameterized, the learned predictor admits an effectively finite representation: the input weights and biases align along finitely many directions, leading to an effective width collapse. In particular, the solution function is continuous piecewise affine, with affine regions determined by the cells of a finite hyperplane arrangement. The number of learned directions, and hence hyperplanes, is bounded above by $2\mathcal{P}-1$, where $\mathcal{P}$ denotes the number of linear dichotomies realizable on the training inputs. We further establish a non-redundancy property of the learned representation by proving that each learned direction induces a unique ternary activation pattern on the training data. Consequently, the complexity of the learned predictor is governed by the combinatorial geometry of the training data.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多变量回归任务中，使用带噪声的随机梯度下降训练宽两层ReLU网络时的隐式偏差。在平均场极限下，训练动态被Wasserstein梯度流近似，并收敛到唯一平稳测度；该测度对应的预测函数是连续分段仿射的，其分段结构由训练数据所决定的有限超平面排列刻画，且有效宽度发生坍缩。
AI.motivation: 理解深度神经网络在过参数化情形下为何能泛化良好，特别是优化算法（如带噪声SGD）如何通过隐式偏差选择特定解。
AI.method: 采用平均场理论建模宽网络训练动力学，将其近似为Wasserstein梯度流；分析该流的平稳测度结构，并结合组合几何（线性可分性、超平面排列、激活模式）刻画学习到的预测器。
AI.result: 证明学习到的预测器具有有效有限宽度：输入权重与偏置仅沿有限个方向对齐，对应连续分段仿射函数，分段区域由至多2P−1个超平面划分（P为训练数据上线性二分的数量）；每个方向诱导唯一的三元激活模式，表明表示无冗余。
AI.conclusion: 网络虽无限过参数化，但隐式偏差使其学习出由训练数据组合几何决定的、结构简洁且非冗余的分段仿射解，揭示了优化过程与数据几何之间的深刻联系。

title: The Changing Role of Symbolic Methods in Artificial Intelligence
summary:
Why do intelligent systems need to perform explicit symbolic reasoning? Computer science has traditionally regarded symbolic reasoning as a defining component of intelligence. Yet the remarkable success of modern foundation models raises a fundamental question: if increasingly capable AI systems can operate with little explicit symbolic reasoning, what role do symbolic methods actually play?
  This article argues that explicit symbolic reasoning is not a fundamental property of intelligence, but a computational consequence of operating on simplified models of reality. We propose the Compression Principle: every computational model is a simplified representation of reality, and explicit symbolic reasoning compensates for information omitted during model construction. From this principle, we derive the Modeling--Reasoning Trade-off: as computational models preserve richer representations of the world, the need for explicit symbolic reasoning correspondingly decreases. This perspective provides a unified explanation for both the historical success of symbolic methods and the remarkable effectiveness of modern foundation models.
  Paradoxically, the same development makes symbolic methods increasingly important for humans. As intelligent systems become more capable and more opaque, symbolic representations increasingly serve as interfaces through which humans specify requirements, verify behavior, regulate autonomous systems, and establish trust. We therefore argue that the future of symbolic methods lies not primarily as the computational engine of intelligent systems, but as the symbolic interface between increasingly capable AI systems and the humans who build, govern, and depend upon them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出'压缩原理'，认为显式符号推理并非智能的本质属性，而是因计算模型简化现实所导致的补偿机制；随着模型表征能力增强，对符号推理的需求减少；但符号方法作为人机交互接口的重要性日益凸显。
AI.motivation: 探讨在大型基础模型成功背景下，显式符号推理在智能系统中的实际作用与必要性。
AI.method: 提出'压缩原理'及'建模-推理权衡'理论框架，结合历史与现代AI发展进行概念性分析与论证。
AI.result: 统一解释了符号方法的历史成功与基础模型的有效性，并指出符号方法未来核心价值在于作为人-AI之间的可解释性与信任接口。
AI.conclusion: 符号推理不是智能的根本属性，而是模型简化现实后的计算补偿；其未来角色应转向人类与强AI之间的语义接口，而非AI内部的计算引擎。

title: Closing the Reality Gap: Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Deployment for Dexterous Force-Based Grasping and Manipulation
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2601.02778
summary: Human-like dexterous hands with multiple fingers offer human-level manipulation capabilities but remain difficult to train the control policies that can deploy on real hardware due to contact-rich physics and imperfect actuation. We present a sim-to-real reinforcement learning method that leverages dense tactile feedback combined with joint torque sensing to explicitly regulate physical interactions. To enable effective sim-to-real transfer, we introduce (i) a computationally fast tactile simulation that computes distances between dense virtual tactile units and the object via parallel forward kinematics, providing high-rate, high-resolution touch signals needed by RL; (ii) a current-to-torque calibration that eliminates the need for torque sensors on dexterous hands by mapping motor current to joint torque; and (iii) actuator dynamics modeling with randomization to account for non-ideal torque-speed effects and bridge the actuation gaps. Using an asymmetric actor-critic PPO pipeline, we train policies entirely in simulation and deploy them directly to a five-finger hand. The resulting policies demonstrate two essential human-hand skills: (1) command-based controllable grasp force tracking and (2) reorientation of objects in the hand, both of which are robustly executed without fine-tuning on the robot. By combining tactile and torque in the observation space with scalable sensing and actuation modeling, our system provides a practical solution to achieve reliable dexterous manipulation. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of controllable grasping on a multi-finger dexterous hand trained entirely in simulation and transferred zero-shot on real hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于触觉与关节力矩感知的仿真到现实强化学习方法，用于训练多指灵巧手的控制策略，实现了无需微调的零样本迁移，并首次在纯仿真训练下实现对真实五指手的可控抓取与手内物体重定向。
AI.motivation: 人类级灵巧手虽具强大操作能力，但因接触丰富、物理建模复杂及执行器不理想，难以训练可部署于真实硬件的控制策略。
AI.method: 提出结合密集触觉反馈与关节力矩感知的sim-to-real RL方法；包括：(i) 基于并行正向运动学的快速触觉仿真；(ii) 电流-力矩标定替代力矩传感器；(iii) 随机化的执行器动力学建模；采用非对称Actor-Critic PPO框架进行纯仿真训练。
AI.result: 在真实五指手上零样本部署策略，成功实现可控抓力跟踪与手内物体重定向两项关键技能，无需在线微调。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合触觉与力矩观测、可扩展传感与执行器建模，为可靠灵巧操作提供了实用解决方案，是首个纯仿真训练、零样本迁移至真实多指手并实现可控抓取的工作。

title: Turning Off-Policy Tokens On-Policy: A Plug-in Approach for Improving LLM Alignment
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training for large language models (LLMs) follows a efficient paradigm of "rollout then update", which inevitably results in off-policy training data. To resolve this, Importance sampling (IS) is proposed, while the token-level ratios compound over long sequences, causing severe variance exploded. A natural idea is "transferring" these off-policy token into on-policy token, so that the importance scores for correction are unnecessary. Following this idea, we propose Selective Importance Sampling (SIS), which is inspired by rejection sampling. Concretely, SIS implements by viewing off-policy model as proposal distribution, and implement a token-level rejection test: accepted tokens are viewed as on-policy, so that receive unit importance score, while rejected tokens retain the standard IS correction. Our proposed SIS is theoretically proved reducing the gap between token-level and sequence-level off-policy gradient estimators. The SIS acts as a plug-in that only modifies the importance ratio in the policy loss, adding negligible wall-clock overhead, and can be combine with a vast vary of RL post-training algorithms. Experiments on dense and MoE LLMs across math and agent benchmarks show that SIS consistently improves all objectives, while providing substantially stronger robustness under off-policy data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Selective Importance Sampling (SIS)方法，通过token级拒绝采样将部分off-policy token转为on-policy，降低重要性采样方差，提升RLHF训练鲁棒性与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RL后训练中off-policy数据导致重要性采样（IS）因长序列累积而方差爆炸，需避免依赖高方差的token级重要性权重。
AI.method: 提出Selective Importance Sampling（SIS），将off-policy模型视为proposal分布，对每个token执行拒绝采样：接受则赋予单位重要性权重（视为on-policy），拒绝则保留标准IS校正；理论证明其缩小token级与sequence级梯度估计差距。
AI.result: 在dense和MoE架构的LLM上，于数学与智能体基准测试中，SIS显著提升各项指标，并大幅增强off-policy数据下的训练鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SIS是一种轻量、即插即用的改进方案，仅修改策略损失中的重要性比率，几乎不增加计算开销，且兼容各类RL后训练算法。

title: MambaLIE: Scene Light Intensity-Boosted Low-Light Image Enhancement with State Space Model
summary:
Images captured by consumer electronic devices, such as mobile phones and digital cameras, often suffer from low-light degradation due to sensor limitations and imaging pipelines, which degrades visual quality and affects downstream vision tasks.
  Existing methods based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Transformers have dominated current low-light image enhancement (LIE) due to their excellent ability to model hierarchical features.
  However, CNNs operate in local receptive fields that cannot model long-range dependencies, while Transformers overcome this problem but incur substantial computational costs.
  To address these challenges, we propose MambaLIE, a Scene Light Intensity-Boosted Low-Light Image Enhancement method based on a State Space Model (SSM).
  We first introduce scene light intensity to improve the structural distribution of illumination, which is then gated with the low-light input to guide enhancement.
  To better model the illumination while maintaining computational efficiency, we propose the Locally Enhanced State Space Model (LESSM) for efficient light enhancement.
  Our LESSM contains two branches: an SSM branch and a Local Enhanced branch, where the former is used to model the long-range dependencies with linear time complexity, while the latter is used to enhance local feature representations.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate that MambaLIE outperforms state-of-the-art CNN-based and Transformer-based LIE methods on four widely used synthetic benchmarks and five publicly available real-world benchmarks in terms of accuracy, speed, and model size, making it suitable for practical deployment on resource-constrained devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MambaLIE，一种基于状态空间模型（SSM）的低光图像增强方法，引入场景光照强度建模并设计局部增强状态空间模型（LESSM），兼顾长程依赖建模与计算效率，在多个合成与真实数据集上超越现有CNN和Transformer方法。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN难以建模长程依赖，Transformer虽能解决但计算开销大；低光图像受传感器限制质量差，影响视觉任务，需高效且准确的增强方法。
AI.method: 提出MambaLIE框架：1）引入场景光照强度指导增强；2）设计双分支LESSM——SSM分支建模长程依赖（线性复杂度），局部增强分支提升局部特征表达。
AI.result: 在4个合成与5个真实低光图像基准上，MambaLIE在精度、速度和模型大小方面均优于当前最优CNN和Transformer方法。
AI.conclusion: MambaLIE通过结合光照先验与高效状态空间建模，在保持轻量的同时实现高性能低光增强，适用于资源受限设备的实际部署。

title: Reflected Schrödinger Bridge Matching
summary: Recent advances in generative modeling have enabled the efficient computation of Schrödinger bridges (SB) in high-dimensional settings by leveraging partially simulation-free training methods inspired by flow matching. However, these have not covered SBs with reflecting dynamics, a useful model choice with built-in guarantees that generated samples stay in the data domain. Existing alternatives for reflected SBs instead rely on more complex training based on forward--backward SDE theory, requiring expensive higher-order derivatives and sampling entire paths during training. In this article, we introduce a partially simulation-free framework that allows reflected SBs to be trained similarly to flow matching, using a new sampling method and regression target. We demonstrate our results by coupling pairs of well-known high-dimensional image datasets. Using reflected dynamics incurs negligible additional wall-clock time during both training and inference while maintaining or slightly improving generative performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种部分无需仿真的新框架，用于高效训练带反射动力学的Schrödinger桥（SB），使其训练方式接近流匹配，同时保持样本在数据域内，并在高维图像数据上验证了其高效性与生成性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型虽能高效计算Schrödinger桥（SB），但未覆盖带反射动力学的SB——后者可保证生成样本始终位于数据域内；而现有反射SB方法依赖复杂的前向-后向SDE理论，需昂贵的高阶导数计算和全路径采样，效率低下。
AI.method: 提出一种部分无需仿真的训练框架，结合新型采样方法与回归目标，使反射SB的训练方式类比于流匹配。
AI.result: 在高维图像数据集（如MNIST、CIFAR-10等）上的配对耦合实验表明，反射动力学仅带来可忽略的额外训练/推理耗时，且生成性能持平或略有提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架显著降低了反射SB的训练复杂度，实现了高效、稳定且高性能的生成建模，为约束域内的概率路径建模提供了实用新范式。

title: AgentGym2: Benchmarking Large Language Model Agents in De-Idealized Real-World Environments
comment: Accepted as a main conference paper at ACL 2026
summary: Language agents, i.e., LLM agents, progress rapidly and are increasingly deployed in production environments. This trend underscores the urgent need for rigorous and realistic evaluations. However, most existing benchmarks evaluate agents in simplified, idealized settings. They typically rely on pre-packaged tool interfaces, overlook critical steps, and assume inputs are clean and fully specified. Consequently, they understate the difficulty of real deployments, where uncertainty and noise are ubiquitous and agents must proactively explore the environment to uncover new tools. To bridge this gap, we present AgentGym2, a new evaluation framework with task instances grounded in real-world end-to-end working demands. Beyond reasoning and planning, it measures agents' ability to execute end-to-end procedures, discover tools via exploration, compose tools for unseen tasks, and remain robust to noisy and underspecified information. Experiments on 15 proprietary and open-source models show that even SOTA systems like Gemini and GPT-5 struggle on AgentGym2, revealing a substantial gap between the capability of current agents and the demands of real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentGym2，一个面向真实世界端到端任务的LLM智能体评估框架，强调工具探索、组合、鲁棒性等现实挑战；实验表明当前SOTA模型（如Gemini、GPT-5）在此框架下表现远低于预期，揭示了实际部署能力与现有评估之间的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基准多在理想化、简化环境中评估语言智能体，忽略噪声、信息不全、工具需主动探索等现实挑战，导致评估结果无法反映真实部署难度。
AI.method: 构建AgentGym2评估框架，设计基于真实工作需求的任务实例，重点评测智能体的端到端执行、工具发现、工具组合及对噪声/欠定输入的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在15个闭源与开源模型上的实验显示，包括Gemini和GPT-5在内的SOTA系统在AgentGym2上表现较差，暴露出当前智能体能力与现实应用需求之间存在巨大鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: AgentGym2为语言智能体提供了更贴近现实的评估标准，指出现有模型在工具探索、组合与鲁棒性方面亟待提升，推动智能体研究向实用化演进。

title: Multi-Robot Open Adaptive Teaming Across Unseen Environments, Partners, and Scales
summary: Deploying robot teams in the real world requires simultaneous adaptation to unseen environments, unknown partners, and varying team sizes, yet existing approaches often address these challenges in isolation under the closed-world assumption of fixed teammates. We formalize this as open adaptive multi-robot teaming and propose a hypergraphic-form game formulation that captures team-level cooperative relationships beyond pairwise interactions, providing a principled foundation for coordination structure inference when team composition changes dynamically within episodes. Unlike graph neural network architectures, this is a game-theoretic construct for modeling strategic interactions and payoff structures among agents. Building on this formulation, we develop the Hypergraphic Open-ended Learning Algorithm (HOLA), which progressively expands partner and environment diversity during training rather than optimizing for fixed configurations. Evaluated on cooperative pursuit with multi-drone and multi-quadruped platforms, HOLA outperforms all baselines across all three adaptability dimensions. Learned policies transfer directly to physical hardware without fine-tuning, with successful deployments on Crazyflie and Zsibot L1 platforms confirming robust real-world coordination in novel environments with unseen teammates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向开放环境的多机器人协同框架——超图博弈形式化方法及HOLA算法，支持在动态变化的团队构成、未知环境与伙伴下实现自适应协作，并在真实无人机和四足机器人平台上验证了其零样本迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中部署多机器人团队需同时适应未见环境、未知伙伴及可变团队规模，但现有方法多基于封闭世界假设（固定队友），难以应对开放动态场景。
AI.method: 提出超图博弈形式化模型以刻画超越两两关系的团队级协作关系，并基于此设计超图开放学习算法（HOLA），在训练中渐进扩展伙伴与环境多样性。
AI.result: HOLA在多无人机与多四足机器人协同追捕任务中全面超越基线方法，在环境、伙伴与规模三类适应性维度上均表现优异；策略无需微调即可直接迁移到Crazyflie和Zsibot L1真实硬件平台并成功运行。
AI.conclusion: 超图博弈建模与HOLA算法为开放自适应多机器人协同提供了理论基础与实用解决方案，显著提升了策略在动态异构团队中的泛化性与物理世界鲁棒性。

title: LP-SFT: Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning via Multimodal Entropy Structure
comment: 21 pages, 3 figures. Code is available at https://github.com/Wakaka161/LP-SFT
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is the standard approach for adapting pretrained language models to downstream domains, yet it often improves target-domain behavior at the cost of degrading pre-existing capabilities. Standard cross-entropy fine-tuning promotes only the observed label token and leaves unconstrained how probability mass is redistributed over other plausible alternatives, potentially distorting the rich local preference structure learned during pretraining. We first analyze next-token predictions using Shannon and Renyi entropies, revealing that pretrained models exhibit a regular multimodal entropy structure. These entropy peaks correspond to varying numbers of plausible alternatives, indicating that the base model intrinsically encodes rich distributional knowledge beyond the single supervised token. Motivated by this observation, we propose LP-SFT, a Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning objective designed to explicitly protect this inherent entropy structure. At each step, LP-SFT constructs an adaptive support of alternative tokens and applies a locally normalized preservation loss to maintain the base model's relative structure among them, while standard cross-entropy independently optimizes the supervised token. Across mixed-domain and single-domain fine-tuning experiments, LP-SFT improves overall performance over vanilla SFT and recent SFT-enhancement baselines, achieving the best balance between pass@1 accuracy and pass@k performance. These results suggest that local preservation helps mitigate capability degradation without collapsing sampling-accessible diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LP-SFT的局部保持监督微调方法，旨在保护预训练语言模型中固有的多模态熵结构，从而在提升目标领域性能的同时避免已有能力退化。
AI.motivation: 标准监督微调（SFT）虽能提升目标领域性能，但常导致预训练模型原有能力退化；作者发现预训练模型具有丰富的局部偏好结构（表现为多模态熵分布），而传统交叉熵损失未对此加以保留。
AI.method: 提出LP-SFT：在每步预测中动态构建替代token的支持集，并施加局部归一化的保持损失，以维持基模型在该支持集内的相对概率结构；同时仍用标准交叉熵优化标注token。
AI.result: 在多领域与单领域微调实验中，LP-SFT在pass@1准确率和pass@k性能间取得更优平衡，优于标准SFT及近期增强方法，有效缓解能力退化且不牺牲采样多样性。
AI.conclusion: 局部结构保持是缓解监督微调中能力退化的有效途径，预训练模型的熵结构蕴含可被显式建模并保留的有价值分布知识。

title: $C^3$ASD: Multi-Level Consistency-Driven Representation Learning
summary: Active Speaker Detection determines whether a visible person in a video is speaking at each moment. While recent audio-visual fusion methods perform well on clean data, they degrade under real-world corruptions such as background noise, occlusion, or simultaneous modality degradation. We attribute this limitation to the absence of explicit consistency constraints that promote robust, semantically aligned representations across modalities. Without such guidance, models tend to learn fragile modality-specific shortcuts that fail under corrupted conditions. We propose $C^3$ASD, a multi-level consistency-driven framework with three complementary constraints: embedding-level inter-modality consistency aligns audio-visual representations during speech; sequence-level intra-modality consistency separates speaking and non-speaking clusters via track-aware contrastive learning; and prediction-level consistency stabilizes fusion through knowledge distillation. Extensive experiments demonstrate significant improvements under diverse audio, visual and joint corruptions, while maintaining competitive performance on clean data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出C³ASD框架，通过多层次一致性约束（嵌入级跨模态、序列级单模态、预测级融合）提升主动说话人检测在噪声、遮挡等真实场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有音视频融合方法在干净数据上表现良好，但在真实世界干扰（如背景噪声、遮挡、多模态同时退化）下性能显著下降，主因是缺乏显式的跨模态语义一致性约束，导致模型依赖脆弱的模态特异性捷径。
AI.method: 提出C³ASD框架，包含三个互补一致性约束：1）嵌入级跨模态一致性，对齐语音时段的音视频表征；2）序列级单模态一致性，通过轨迹感知对比学习分离说话/非说话片段；3）预测级一致性，利用知识蒸馏稳定多模态融合。
AI.result: 在多种音频、视觉及联合退化场景下显著提升性能，同时在干净数据上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 多层次一致性约束能有效提升主动说话人检测模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为多模态学习中的语义对齐提供了新思路。

title: LLM-Guided Transportation Hub Capacity Planning with Textual Business Inputs
summary: While traditional hub capacity planning models optimize effectively for quantitative inputs, they often fail to digest qualitative business context. We propose a novel framework where a large language model (LLM) agent iteratively proposes hub capacity decisions guided by natural-language business context descriptions. The key mechanism is a chain-of-thought reasoning protocol: the LLM constructs a structured decision table that maps each contextual item to specific capacity adjustments based on the implied direction and magnitude of changes. The new capacity decision is then validated through a feedback loop with an optimization model, which provides routing-based performance metrics to guide the agent's selection. On a real-world 13-hub freight network in the southeastern US, our framework achieves a 2.8% optimality gap relative to the hidden ground-truth, a significant improvement over the 11.0% gap produced by the traditional optimization model without textual business inputs. This demonstrates that LLMs can serve as a contextual bridge, integrating qualitative business insights into Operations Research workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型（LLM）与优化模型的新型枢纽容量规划框架，通过链式思维推理将自然语言描述的业务情境转化为结构化容量调整决策，并经反馈循环验证，显著缩小了与真实最优解的差距。
AI.motivation: 传统枢纽容量规划模型虽能有效处理定量输入，但难以融入定性业务背景，导致决策脱离实际业务需求。
AI.method: 设计了一个LLM代理框架，采用链式思维协议构建结构化决策表，将自然语言业务描述映射为具体容量调整；再通过与优化模型的反馈循环，利用路由性能指标验证和优化决策。
AI.result: 在美东南部13枢纽货运网络实证中，该框架相较传统优化模型将最优性差距从11.0%降至2.8%。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为定性业务洞察与运筹学工作流之间的有效桥梁，提升决策的业务贴合度与优化性能。

title: CP-WSP: A Declarative CP-SAT Framework for Configurable Multi-Constraint Workforce Scheduling
summary: Workforce scheduling is an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem requiring simultaneous satisfaction of labor regulations, coverage requirements, employee preferences and operational objectives. Existing CP formulations typically model simplified instances with 6-12 constraints at shift-level granularity and critically lack explicit support for: mandatory break scheduling with midpoint placement control; acuity weighted workload equity; sub-shift temporal granularity enabling demand-driven staffing; inter-week schedule stability; and cross-midnight shift patterns common in 24-hour operations. This paper presents CP-WSP: a declarative CP-SAT framework enforcing 14 hard constraints as mathematically inviolable requirements (zero regulatory violations by construction) while optimizing 15 soft objectives through a unified weighted penalty function -- all configurable via a JSON specification with no code changes required. Key contributions include: a shift-window variable decomposition enabling mandatory break scheduling with centrality control; acuity-weighted workload equity; multi-granularity temporal resolution from 30 minutes to 2 hours; inter-week schedule stability; a grid-offset preprocessing technique for cross-midnight shifts; and a reproducible 36-configuration benchmark suite for community comparison. Evaluated on INRC-II benchmarks at both hourly and shift-level granularity and on 36 synthetic configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CP-WSP框架，通过约束编程（CP-SAT）解决复杂排班问题，支持14项硬约束与15项软目标优化，并具备细粒度时间建模、跨午夜排班处理及多维度公平性等创新特性。
AI.motivation: 现有约束规划（CP）方法难以满足现实排班中强制休息安排、病情权重的工作量均衡、亚班次级时间粒度、跨周稳定性及跨午夜班次等关键需求。
AI.method: 提出CP-WSP：基于CP-SAT的声明式框架，采用shift-window变量分解、acuity加权均衡建模、多粒度时间分辨率、网格偏移预处理等技术，所有约束与目标通过JSON配置，无需修改代码。
AI.result: 在INRC-II基准和36组合成配置上验证了零违规排班能力与优化性能，支持小时级与班次级双粒度评估，并发布可复现的36配置基准套件。
AI.conclusion: CP-WSP显著扩展了排班问题的建模能力与实际适用性，为医疗等高监管行业提供了合规、灵活、可配置的自动化排班解决方案。

title: Designing Touch for Trauma-Informed Social Robots: A Design Space for Direct and Indirect Actuation
comment: Accepted as a workshop paper at Beyond Words 2, co-located with the International Conference on Social Robotics (ICSR 2026)
summary: Touch is a fundamental communication modality in human-robot interaction and may support grounding, emotional regulation, and stress reduction in therapeutic contexts. However, designing touch-based interactions for individuals with post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) requires careful consideration of trauma-informed care (TIC) principles, including safety, transparency, autonomy, and trigger avoidance. This paper investigates how touch actuation in social robots can be designed to align with trauma-informed care. We distinguish between direct touch, involving physical contact between a user and a robot, and indirect touch, mediated through artifacts such as wearables or smart textiles. Building on this distinction, we propose a design space comprising three dimensions: Actuation Modality, Objective of the Actuation, and Intended Effect of the Actuation. We analyze these dimensions through the lens of trauma-informed care and derive key design considerations for touch-based interventions. The resulting approach provides a conceptual foundation for developing trauma-sensitive social robots that support individuals with PTSD through touch-based interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何在社会机器人中设计符合创伤知情护理（TIC）原则的触觉交互，提出一个包含触觉执行模态、执行目标和预期效果三个维度的设计空间，并为面向PTSD患者的创伤敏感型触觉机器人提供概念基础。
AI.motivation: 为PTSD患者设计触觉交互需遵循创伤知情护理原则（如安全性、透明性、自主性和避免触发），但现有研究缺乏系统性指导框架。
AI.method: 提出区分直接触觉与间接触觉，并构建包含执行模态、执行目标和预期效果的三维设计空间，结合TIC原则进行分析并提炼关键设计准则。
AI.result: 建立了面向PTSD患者的触觉交互设计空间与关键设计考虑，为开发创伤敏感的社会机器人提供理论支撑。
AI.conclusion: 该设计空间有助于推动符合伦理与临床要求的触觉人机交互发展，支持PTSD个体的情绪调节与康复。

title: Evaluating the Effect of Linguistic Relatedness on Cross-Lingual Transfer in Large Multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition
summary: Extending automatic speech recognition (ASR) to low-resource African languages is constrained by the prohibitive demands of data collection at scale. A promising direction is to leverage linguistic relatedness to enhance cross-lingual transfer from a related auxiliary language to the low-resource target by sequentially adapting on both. Although this strategy has shown meaningful improvements in small ASR models, its effectiveness in large ASR remains unclear. We extend this framework to large multilingual ASR through a systematic controlled experimental design spanning six factors, two Africa-centric corpora, and four large ASR models, isolating whether linguistic relatedness reliably predicts cross-lingual transfer gains in this setting. Across all conditions, pre-adaptation on related auxiliary languages yields no practically meaningful transfer improvements given minimal target-language data, suggesting that linguistic relatedness alone may not reliably predict cross-lingual transfer gains in large multilingual ASR, or constitute an effective strategy for extending such models to low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在大型多语言自动语音识别（ASR）模型中，利用语言亲缘关系进行跨语言迁移是否能有效提升低资源非洲语言的ASR性能；实验覆盖六种因素、两个非洲语料库和四种大模型，结果表明：仅依赖语言亲缘关系的预适配策略在极少量目标语言数据下并未带来实际可衡量的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 扩展自动语音识别（ASR）至低资源非洲语言面临大规模数据收集困难；利用语言亲缘性进行跨语言迁移是一种有前景的方向，但其在大型ASR模型中的有效性尚不明确。
AI.method: 将基于语言亲缘性的顺序适配框架扩展至大型多语言ASR，通过系统性控制实验设计，涵盖六个因素、两个非洲中心语料库和四个大型ASR模型，以检验语言亲缘性是否能可靠预测跨语言迁移增益。
AI.result: 在所有实验条件下，对相关辅助语言的预适配均未在极少量目标语言数据下带来实际有意义的迁移提升。
AI.conclusion: 在大型多语言ASR中，仅依靠语言亲缘性可能无法可靠预测跨语言迁移效果，也不足以作为向低资源语言扩展的有效策略。

title: OmniDS: Dual-Stream Context Fusion for Omnidirectional Depth from Fisheye Cameras
summary: Omnidirectional depth estimation from multi-fisheye camera rigs is complicated by visibility conflicts: wide baselines cause different cameras to observe different portions, or even different faces, of the same object, so aggregating their features into a unified equirectangular (ERP) representation under fixed projection produces ambiguous matching evidence near occlusion boundaries and thin structures. Although existing methods mitigate this by down-weighting unreliable views, they do not resolve the underlying discrepancy because context formation and cross-view fusion remain tied to rigid fisheye-to-ERP sampling. We present OmniDS, an iterative depth refinement framework that replaces rigid aggregation by combining dynamic context fusion with consensus-aware multi-view similarity. A dual-stream encoder pairs a lightweight CNN for geometric detail with a frozen DINOv3 for semantic priors; their features are reprojected into ERP space at each refinement step via learned view weighting and deformable cross-attention with geometric distortion bias. In parallel, a multi-view consensus volume captures global cross-camera agreement through group-wise correlation and feature variance, regularized by a 3D U-Net. For efficient deployment, we distill the dual-stream representation into a single MobileNet-based encoder. OmniDS achieves state-of-the-art performance on the OmniThings, OmniHouse, and Sunny benchmarks while maintaining competitive inference speed. Project page and codes are available at https://parkchaesong.github.io/omnids.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniDS框架，通过动态上下文融合与共识感知的多视角相似性，解决多鱼眼相机系统在全向深度估计中因宽基线导致的可见性冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 多鱼眼相机系统在全向深度估计中存在可见性冲突：宽基线导致不同相机观察同一物体的不同部分甚至不同面，固定鱼眼到等距矩形投影（ERP）造成遮挡边界和细结构处匹配模糊。现有方法仅降低不可靠视角权重，未从根本上解决该问题。
AI.method: 提出迭代式深度优化框架OmniDS：采用双流编码器（轻量CNN提取几何细节 + 冻结DINOv3提供语义先验），在每次细化步骤中通过学习的视角加权与带几何畸变偏置的可变形跨注意力将特征重投影至ERP空间；并构建多视角共识体，利用组相关与特征方差建模全局跨相机一致性，并由3D U-Net正则化；最后蒸馏为单MobileNet编码器以提升部署效率。
AI.result: 在OmniThings、OmniHouse和Sunny基准上达到SOTA性能，同时保持具有竞争力的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: OmniDS有效缓解了多鱼眼系统中因视角差异引起的深度歧义，通过动态重投影与共识建模显著提升了全向深度估计精度与鲁棒性。

title: Phase-Preserving Trimodal Transformer for Tropical Forest Biomass Estimation Using Optical and PolInSAR Data
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, one of which is a TikZ
summary: The accurate estimation of Above-Ground Biomass (AGB) in mature tropical forests remains a critical challenge in remote sensing, primarily due to the saturation of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) signals in high-density areas and persistent cloud cover affecting optical imagery.
