title: WorldBagel: Uncovering the Power of Unified Multimodal Models for Vision-Language-Action-World Modeling
summary: World models aim to capture environment dynamics in ways that support perception, reasoning, and action, and have recently become a central direction in Vision-Language-Action-World (VLAW) modeling. Meanwhile, unified vision-language models have demonstrated strong multimodal generation capabilities, yet their potential as world models remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce \texttt{WorldBagel}, a unified VLAW framework built on BAGEL, a modern multimodal unified model, and use it to systematically investigate the role of unification in world modeling. Across multi-task robotic manipulation and cross-domain experiments, \texttt{WorldBagel} consistently outperforms task-specific alternatives and learns action representations that are more structured and semantically aligned with visual and linguistic context. Experiments on LIBERO, Language Table, and Franka show that unification is not only an architectural convenience, but also a key factor in learning effective VLAW models, leading to consistent empirical gains and deeper insights into multimodal world modeling. Code and model checkpoints will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WorldBagel，一个基于BAGEL统一视觉-语言-动作-世界（VLAW）建模框架，系统探究统一建模对世界模型性能的影响，并在多个机器人任务上验证其优于专用模型。
AI.motivation: 统一视觉-语言模型虽具强大生成能力，但其作为世界模型的潜力尚未被充分探索；同时，世界模型需支持感知、推理与行动，亟需更有效的多模态建模方法。
AI.method: 基于现代多模态统一模型BAGEL构建WorldBagel框架，在多任务机器人操作和跨域实验中进行系统评估，涵盖LIBERO、Language Table和Franka等基准。
AI.result: WorldBagel在各项任务中持续超越任务专用模型，学习到更结构化、语义上与视觉及语言上下文对齐的动作表征；实证表明统一架构不仅是工程便利，更是提升VLAW建模效果的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 统一建模是构建高效VLAW世界模型的核心要素，能带来一致的性能提升并深化对多模态世界建模的理解。

title: Asymptotic-Preserving A Posteriori Analysis of Diffusion and Flow-Matching Samplers
summary: Diffusion and flow-matching samplers integrate a learned probability-flow ODE from a large noise scale down to a small terminal floor $σ_{\min}$, at which the score is stiff and the flow develops a boundary layer. We treat $σ_{\min}$ as a singular-perturbation parameter and determine which fixed-step samplers are asymptotic-preserving (AP), that is, stable and uniformly accurate as $σ_{\min}\to0$, casting the criteria as an a posteriori audit: residual functionals with $σ_{\min}$-uniform coefficients, computable on a pretrained checkpoint without ground-truth scores or exact trajectories. On the terminal layer, Euler in the $σ$-clock, the deterministic DDIM update, is the unique layer-exact discretization up to affine reparameterization, with rectified flow its flow-matching counterpart; the $λ$-clock is stable only for steps $h\le h_\star=1+W(1/e)$, and the uniform-$σ^2$ heat clock stalls a $σ_{\min}$-independent distance from the data. On two solvable models (rank-deficient Gaussian, symmetric two-point mixture), deterministic samplers remain first-order uniformly accurate with no $\log(1/σ_{\min})$ factor, even across a symmetric posterior-switching interface whose distributional budget is a universal constant; the logarithm is charged entirely to the Itô term of stochastic samplers, whose path-KL scales as $Λ^2/N$ against the ODE's $O(Λ^2/N^2)$ budget, with $Λ=\log(σ_{\max}/σ_{\min})$. On the EDM CIFAR-10 checkpoint, spectra measured once predict held-out residual budgets across step count, schedule, and noise level against pre-specified gates with no per-configuration refitting, and calibrate the Itô coefficient at $M_1=1.00\pm0.01$. The clock decides stability; the noise, not the geometry, charges the logarithm.

AI.tldr: 本文研究扩散模型和流匹配采样器在小噪声极限下的数值稳定性与精度，提出一种无需真实分数或精确轨迹的后验审计方法，识别出在σ_min→0时保持稳定和一致精度的渐近保持（AP）离散化方案，并通过可解模型和真实模型（EDM CIFAR-10）验证理论结论。
AI.motivation: 扩散和流匹配采样器在终端小噪声尺度σ_min下易出现边界层和刚性问题，导致数值不稳定；需系统分析不同时间尺度（clock）和离散化方式在σ_min→0极限下的行为，以设计鲁棒、高效且理论可解释的采样器。
AI.method: 将σ_min视为奇异摄动参数，建立渐近保持（AP）性判据；引入残差泛函作为可计算的后验审计工具；分析不同时间尺度（σ-clock、λ-clock、σ²-clock）及离散格式（如Euler、DDIM、rectified flow）的稳定性与精度；在可解高斯与双点混合模型上进行理论推导，在EDM CIFAR-10预训练模型上实证验证。
AI.result: Euler在σ-clock下（即确定性DDIM）是终端层唯一层精确离散化；λ-clock仅当步长h≤1+W(1/e)时稳定；σ²-clock会停滞于距数据固定距离处；确定性采样器保持一阶一致精度（无log(1/σ_min)因子），而随机采样器的路径KL含Λ²/N项（Λ=log(σ_max/σ_min)），其对数代价完全来自Itô项；在CIFAR-10上，单次谱测量即可预测跨配置残差预算，并标定Itô系数M₁=1.00±0.01。
AI.conclusion: 采样器的稳定性由时间尺度（clock）决定，而对数误差代价源于噪声尺度而非数据几何；确定性方法在极限下更优，该工作为扩散采样器提供了统一的奇异摄动分析框架与实用审计工具。

title: PhysMirror: Physics-Aware Mirror Object Generation
summary: Synthesizing physically accurate mirror reflections remains a fundamental challenge for modern text-to-image diffusion models, which are increasingly critical for generating synthetic training data for embodied AI and robotic perception. These models typically struggle with strict geometric constraints, leading to hallucinations that degrade the utility of the synthetic data. To address this, we introduce a novel, end-to-end physics-aware generation framework namely PhysMirror that natively enforces projective geometry through explicit 3D spatial priors. Our method automatically lifts prompted objects into 3D meshes and constructs a lightweight, mathematically exact mirror scene within a simulated environment. By rendering this explicit 3D scene, we extract precise 2D conditioning elements, such as depth maps and segmentation maps, that serve as robust guiding signals for downstream diffusion models, guiding them to generate images with physically correct mirror reflections. Moreover, we introduce Mirror Consistency Score (MCS), reference-free, fully automated metric that quantifies physical correctness using dense feature matching and vanishing point convergence. Experimental results on our newly constructed MirrOB dataset demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in reflection accuracy and physical realism, while maintaining strong text-to-image semantic alignment, providing a reliable pipeline for embodied AI data generation. The source code is released at https://duyphuc0701.github.io/PhysMirror.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PhysMirror框架，通过引入3D空间先验和显式镜面场景建模，提升扩散模型生成物理准确镜面反射的能力，并设计无参考的Mirror Consistency Score（MCS）指标评估反射真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型难以满足镜面反射所需的严格几何约束，易产生幻觉，影响合成数据在具身AI与机器人感知中的实用性。
AI.method: 提出端到端物理感知生成框架PhysMirror：将提示对象自动升维为3D网格，在仿真环境中构建数学精确的轻量镜面场景；渲染该3D场景以提取深度图、分割图等2D条件信号，引导扩散模型生成符合物理规律的镜像；并设计无参考的Mirror Consistency Score（MCS）评估指标。
AI.result: 在新构建的MirrOB数据集上，PhysMirror在反射准确性与物理真实性方面显著优于SOTA方法，同时保持良好的文本-图像语义对齐能力。
AI.conclusion: PhysMirror为具身AI提供了一种可靠、可验证的高质量镜面反射合成数据生成范式，推动了物理一致性生成技术的发展。

title: GlacierCastAI: Predicting Glacier Retreat from Multi-Modal Satellite Imagery and Climate Signals
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Code available at GitHub
summary: ERA5 seasonal climate variables contain predictive information about future glacier retreat beyond what satellite imagery alone provides, yet existing deep learning methods focus on mapping current boundaries rather than forecasting future ones. This paper presents GlacierCastAI, which reframes glacier boundary prediction as a multi-modal spatiotemporal forecasting problem, fusing multi-temporal Landsat imagery with ERA5 reanalysis climate variables and Copernicus DEM terrain features to forecast glacier boundaries across five glaciers spanning four climate regimes. The architecture couples a ResNet50 spatial encoder with a ConvLSTM temporal model and a cross-attention climate fusion module. Because forecasting is inherently more uncertain than mapping current boundaries, the reported IoU values (0.320-0.337) are not directly comparable to state-of-the-art mapping models. Comparisons are against traditional baselines and experimental conditions. Through a pre-registered ablation study, adding ERA5 climate signals improves image-only IoU from 0.326 to 0.337 (+3.4%), suggesting that atmospheric forcing carries predictive information beyond imagery alone. All deep learning models substantially outperform persistence and linear trend baselines (IoU 0.160 and 0.169 respectively), with improvements of 89-99% relative IoU. A lightweight climate-only MLP baseline (661K parameters) achieves an IoU of 0.320 (98% of image-only performance) using 85x fewer parameters, suggesting that ERA5 variables encode substantial predictive signal independently of satellite imagery. SHAP attribution analysis suggests that spring solar radiation (MAM) is the dominant climate driver, consistent with the known role of spring insolation in setting melt season trajectories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GlacierCastAI，将冰川边界预测重构为多模态时空预测问题，融合Landsat影像、ERA5气候变量与Copernicus DEM地形特征，显著提升未来冰川退缩预测能力；实验表明ERA5气候信号可提升预测性能，且气候变量本身即含强预测性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法主要聚焦于当前冰川边界的映射，而忽视利用气候变量对未来冰川退缩进行预测；ERA5季节气候变量已被发现蕴含超越卫星影像的预测信息，但尚未被有效融入预测模型。
AI.method: 提出GlacierCastAI模型，结合ResNet50空间编码器、ConvLSTM时间建模模块及跨模态注意力气候融合模块，融合多时相Landsat影像、ERA5再分析气候变量和Copernicus DEM地形特征，对五个代表四种气候区的冰川开展边界预测；辅以预注册消融实验与SHAP归因分析。
AI.result: 加入ERA5气候信号使IoU从0.326提升至0.337（+3.4%）；所有深度模型显著优于持久性与线性趋势基线（IoU 0.160/0.169），相对提升89–99%；轻量级纯气候MLP（661K参数）达IoU 0.320，达图像模型98%性能；SHAP分析指出春季太阳辐射（MAM）是主导气候驱动因子。
AI.conclusion: 气候变量不仅增强多模态预测性能，其本身即具备强独立预测能力；GlacierCastAI验证了将冰川预测转向时空气候感知建模的可行性与有效性，为冰川动态建模提供新范式。

title: Learning to Generate Multiple Objects from Dense and Occluded Layouts
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models fail to generate correct object counts in dense scenes, where overlapping instances collapse into indistinguishable structures despite appearing visually plausible. We identify this as instance ownership collapse: tokens from overlapping objects interact freely through attention, while heavily occluded instances receive weak supervision due to their small visible areas. We address this through layout-aware attention biases that softly bias token interactions toward region-consistent grouping and suppress cross-instance leakage, paired with an amodal-balanced loss that amplifies gradients for occluded objects based on their occlusion level. To enable systematic evaluation, we introduce OverlapDepth-45K, a benchmark of densely overlapping scenes with amodal supervision. Our approach substantially improves count accuracy and prevents instance merging while preserving image quality. Project page: https://bachngoh.github.io/AIBL

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对文本到图像扩散模型在密集场景中物体计数不准问题的解决方案，通过布局感知注意力偏置和非模态平衡损失来缓解实例所有权崩溃问题，并构建了OverlapDepth-45K基准进行评估。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在密集重叠场景中常出现物体计数错误，原因是重叠物体的token在注意力机制中自由交互，且被严重遮挡的实例因可见区域小而监督信号弱，即‘实例所有权崩溃’。
AI.method: 提出布局感知注意力偏置（softly bias token interactions toward region-consistent grouping，抑制跨实例信息泄露）和非模态平衡损失（根据遮挡程度增强被遮挡物体的梯度）。
AI.result: 显著提升了物体计数准确率，防止实例合并，同时保持图像质量；在新构建的OverlapDepth-45K基准上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了扩散模型在密集场景中的实例所有权崩溃问题，为提升生成图像中结构合理性提供了新思路。

title: Parametric Memory Decoding for Zero-Shot Routing in LoRA-Based External Parametric Memory
summary: With the rise of parametric memory, LoRA-based External Parametric Memory (EPM) has emerged as a modular solution, but existing routing methods often introduce additional training, deployment, and maintenance overhead. This raises a natural question: can a LoRA-based EPM bank be routed without maintaining an additional routing component? However, existing zero-shot LoRA routing methods still face two problems under the EPM setting: (1) their evaluations are scattered across different task settings rather than organized around EPM access, and (2) their routing signals lack a unified perspective to guide systematic improvement. To address these problems, we organize PMD-Bench, covering document-level, domain-level knowledge, and task-skill, and propose Parametric Memory Decoding (PMD), the first framework designed to systematically improve zero-shot LoRA routing by reframing it as decoding activations over external parametric memory. Based on PMD, we further instantiate PMDRouter, which scores each LoRA by its response magnitude from a single base-model prefill. Experiments on PMD-Bench show that PMDRouter achieves the strongest internal-signal performance across multiple zero-shot routing settings. These results demonstrate the feasibility of zero-shot LoRA routing and suggest that PMD can serve as a general framework for improving zero-shot routing methods. Sources: Github (https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Parametric-Memory-Decoding-872A/)

AI.tldr: 本文提出Parametric Memory Decoding (PMD)框架，首次将零样本LoRA路由重构为对外部参数化记忆的激活解码问题，并基于此设计PMDRouter，在无需额外路由模块的前提下实现高效零样本LoRA选择；通过构建统一评测基准PMD-Bench验证其在多种场景下的优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA-based External Parametric Memory（EPM）的路由方法需额外训练/部署路由组件，带来开销；而当前零样本LoRA路由方法在EPM设定下缺乏统一评测基准和可解释、可优化的路由信号。
AI.method: 构建覆盖文档级、领域级知识与任务技能的统一评测基准PMD-Bench；提出PMD框架，将零样本LoRA路由建模为对外部参数化记忆的激活解码过程；在此基础上设计PMDRouter，仅依赖基础模型一次prefill的响应幅值对各LoRA打分。
AI.result: PMDRouter在PMD-Bench上取得最强的内部信号（internal-signal）性能，显著优于现有零样本LoRA路由方法；验证了无需额外路由组件的零样本LoRA路由可行性。
AI.conclusion: PMD是一种通用框架，可系统性提升零样本LoRA路由能力；PMDRouter证明了仅用基础模型激活幅值即可实现高效、免训练的EPM路由，为轻量级、模块化大模型扩展提供新范式。

title: Towards Standardized Light Field Quality Assessment: Hybrid Subjective Benchmarking and Objective Metric Evaluation
summary: Benchmarking immersive media coding solutions, especially in the standardization context, requires reliable and reproducible subjective quality assessment (QA) procedures, along with objective quality metrics that remain accurate across different distortion types. This paper presents a standardized workflow for light field QA, developed and deployed in the context of JPEG Pleno standardization activities, which integrates benchmark generation, a hybrid subjective evaluation, and objective metric analysis into a common workflow. The benchmark is designed to encompass not only traditional coding-only artifacts but also distortions that arise in processing pipelines in which light field encoding is accompanied with view synthesis and reconstruction techniques. A hybrid subjective method is proposed enabling fine-grained assessment by combining reference-anchored quality rating with targeted pairwise refinement in perceptually ambiguous regions. The reliability of subjective scores is verified using statistical consistency analyses between observers of two cohorts. Finally, a large set of objective metrics is systematically evaluated in terms of global prediction accuracy, local agreement in ambiguous quality regions, and robustness across distortion families. The results show that several metrics achieve strong agreement for coding-only stimuli, but their performance consistently drops when view synthesis distortions are included. The analysis further highlights the importance of view-pooling strategy in the design of future light field quality metrics. The work provides a reproducible and standardization-ready framework for fine-grained light field QA, while identifying key limitations of current objective metrics under emerging coding pipelines. The subjectively annotated dataset is publicly available at https://plenodb.jpeg.org/lfqa/objectivecfp.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向JPEG Pleno标准制定的光场主观与客观质量评估标准化工作流，涵盖基准生成、混合式主观评价及多维度客观指标评测，揭示了现有指标在含视图合成失真时性能下降的问题，并强调视图聚合策略的重要性。
AI.motivation: 沉浸式媒体（尤其是光场）编码标准化需要可靠、可复现的主观质量评估流程及能适应多种失真类型的客观质量度量方法。
AI.method: 构建覆盖编码失真与视图合成/重建失真两类的光场基准数据集；提出结合参考锚定评分与针对模糊区域的成对精细化比较的混合主观评估方法；通过双队列观察者统计一致性验证主观评分可靠性；系统评测大量客观指标在全局预测精度、局部模糊区域一致性及跨失真类型鲁棒性三方面表现。
AI.result: 多个客观指标在纯编码失真上表现良好，但在引入视图合成失真后性能显著下降；视图聚合策略被证实是影响未来光场质量指标设计的关键因素；构建了公开、标注完备的主观数据集（https://plenodb.jpeg.org/lfqa/objectivecfp）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了标准化就绪、细粒度、可复现的光场质量评估框架，同时明确了当前客观指标在新兴光场处理流水线中的核心局限。

title: CertMix: Certified, Data-Efficient Metamaterial Design by Affine Mixing of Aligned Neural-Implicit Weight Spaces
summary: Inverse design of mechanical metamaterials seeks a periodic unit cell whose homogenized elastic properties meet a prescribed target, but current learning-based methods are data-hungry, mostly interpolative, and provide no guarantee that the generated design satisfies the specification. We introduce CertMix, a data-efficient framework that represents each exemplar unit cell as a small periodic neural implicit field, specifically a SIREN signed-distance decoder overfit from a shared anchor, so that exemplar weight vectors become aligned and directly comparable. The key observation is that, in this aligned weight space, the homogenized elasticity tensor is approximately linear in the mixing coefficients. Targeted design therefore reduces to a small constrained affine-mixing problem solved with a differentiable periodic homogenizer in the loop. Negative coefficients enable extrapolation beyond the exemplar range, a linearity-mismatch trust region keeps blends valid, and split-conformal calibration converts the mismatch signal into a distribution-free certificate on achieved-property error. From as few as 50 exemplars, CertMix attains a scaled property error of $10^{-4}$, roughly two to three orders of magnitude below conditional generative baselines trained on 1000 cells. It remains accurate far outside the exemplar range, is $57\times$ faster than per-target topology optimization while avoiding checkerboards and enclosed voids, and extends to spatially graded fields, 3D triply periodic surfaces, and a certified running-shoe midsole application.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CertMix框架，通过神经隐式场对周期性单元进行高效表示，并利用权重空间中的线性近似实现可验证的机械超材料逆向设计。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的机械超材料逆向设计方法数据需求高、外推能力差且缺乏性能保证。
AI.method: 将每个示例单元表示为共享锚点上的SIREN符号距离解码器；在对齐的权重空间中建模弹性张量的近似线性关系；构建带约束的仿射混合优化问题，并结合可微周期均匀化器与分裂共形校准生成误差证书。
AI.result: 仅需50个示例即可达到10^{-4}量级的缩放性能误差，比使用1000个样本训练的生成基线高2-3个数量级；支持外推、避免棋盘格和封闭空洞；扩展至梯度材料、3D三重周期曲面及认证跑鞋中底设计。
AI.conclusion: CertMix实现了数据高效、可验证、可外推且实用性强的机械超材料逆向设计，显著优于现有方法。

title: Flex-Forcing: Towards a Unified Autoregressive and Bidirectional Video Diffusion Model
summary: Recent progress in large-scale generative models has substantially advanced video generation, yet existing methods remain constrained by a rigid inference paradigm. Bidirectional diffusion models excel at global coherence and visual fidelity but suffer from slow inference, while autoregressive models offer efficient and streaming generation at the cost of long-range consistency and exposure bias. We introduce Flex-Forcing, a unified training and inference framework that enables a video diffusion model to seamlessly operate under both bidirectional and autoregressive generation regimes. The core idea is a flexible chunking mechanism jointly defined over the temporal axis and denoising steps. This design allows the model to (1) perform flexible chunking according to different device budgets, (2) perform bidirectional inference across chunks for global structure planning, while generating frames autoregressively within each chunk for efficient and fine-grained synthesis, and (3) perform any-order, any-timestep autoregressive generation without the strict causal constraint. Extensive experiments on multiple video generation benchmarks demonstrate that Flex-Forcing achieves consistently better video quality, long-video stability than strong baselines with a rigid inference schedule, while offering faster inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flex-Forcing框架，统一视频扩散模型的双向与自回归生成范式，通过时序与去噪步联合分块机制，兼顾全局一致性、细粒度合成效率与长视频稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法受限于僵化的推理范式：双向扩散模型质量高但推理慢，自回归模型高效但缺乏长程一致性和存在曝光偏差。
AI.method: 提出Flex-Forcing框架，核心是时序轴与去噪步联合定义的灵活分块机制，支持跨块双向推理与块内自回归生成，并支持任意顺序、任意时间步的自回归生成。
AI.result: 在多个视频生成基准上，Flex-Forcing在视频质量、长视频稳定性上优于强基线，同时实现更快推理速度。
AI.conclusion: Flex-Forcing打破了生成范式的刚性限制，为视频生成提供了兼具效率、一致性与灵活性的新路径。

title: MDL Meets Latent Confounders: LNML-based Causal Discovery
summary: Causal discovery with nonlinear mechanisms and latent confounders remains challenging. Existing methods often rely on either linear assumptions or causal sufficiency, limiting their applicability. We propose an MDL-based causal discovery framework that explicitly accounts for latent confounders while allowing flexible nonlinear mechanisms by minimizing the luckiness normalized maximum likelihood (LNML) code-length. The causal relationship between each variable pair is determined by selecting the shortest code-length of the causal model, and we introduce the notion of $Δ$-pseudo-collinearity to identify dependencies induced by latent confounders. Based on these ideas, we develop a greedy algorithm, termed Pseudo-Collinearity Guided Causal Discovery (PCG-CD). Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method accurately recovers directed causal relationships and effectively detects latent confounders.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最小描述长度（MDL）的因果发现框架PCG-CD，能处理非线性机制和潜变量混杂因素，并通过Δ-伪共线性识别混杂效应，在合成与真实数据上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现方法常依赖线性假设或因果充分性假设，难以应对非线性机制和潜变量混杂因素，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出基于LNML码长最小化的MDL因果发现框架；引入Δ-伪共线性概念识别潜混杂导致的依赖；设计贪心算法PCG-CD进行因果结构学习。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上，PCG-CD能准确恢复有向因果关系，并有效检测潜变量混杂因素。
AI.conclusion: 该框架突破了线性与因果充分性限制，为含潜混杂的非线性因果发现提供了新思路与实用工具。

title: Perceptual Flow Matching for Few-Step Generative Modeling
summary: We propose Perceptual Flow Matching (PFM), a simple yet effective framework for few-step generation in flow-matching models. Rather than performing velocity regression in the conventional VAE latent space, PFM supervises flow matching in a perceptual feature space using pretrained perceptual models. This simple change substantially improves the few-step generation capability of flow-matching models, reducing the number of sampling steps from 35-50 to 4-8 while preserving generation quality. Unlike existing acceleration and distillation approaches, PFM requires neither teacher models nor auxiliary score networks and can be integrated into standard flow-matching training pipelines with minimal modifications. Extensive experiments on image generation, video generation, and image editing tasks demonstrate that PFM consistently produces high-quality results while producing fewer artifacts than existing distillation-based methods. We further show that perceptual supervision shifts the regression minimizer from mean-seeking to mode-seeking, biasing predictions toward on-manifold modes that remain accurate under coarse few-step integration. Our results reveal that standard flow-matching training can naturally yield high-quality few-step generators when supervised in an appropriate representation space. We hope this insight inspires future research into representation-aware objectives for efficient generative modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出感知流匹配（PFM），通过在预训练感知特征空间而非传统VAE潜在空间中进行流匹配监督，显著提升流匹配模型的少步生成能力，仅需4–8步采样即可保持高质量生成，且无需教师模型或额外网络。
AI.motivation: 现有流匹配模型在少步生成时质量下降，需大量采样步数（35–50步）；而加速方法多依赖教师模型或辅助网络，复杂且受限。作者旨在探索更简洁、通用的少步生成改进路径。
AI.method: 提出Perceptual Flow Matching（PFM）：将流匹配的目标从VAE潜在空间迁移至由预训练感知模型（如VGG、CLIP等）提取的高层语义特征空间，直接在该空间中进行速度场回归与监督；训练过程与标准流匹配一致，仅替换特征空间。
AI.result: 在图像生成、视频生成和图像编辑任务上，PFM以4–8步采样达到原需35–50步的质量， artifacts 更少；理论分析表明感知监督使回归目标由均值趋向（mean-seeking）转向模式趋向（mode-seeking），更契合数据流形结构。
AI.conclusion: 流匹配模型的少步生成性能高度依赖于监督所在表征空间；在感知特征空间监督可自然激发其高效生成潜力，无需复杂蒸馏或架构修改；该发现为高效生成建模提供了‘表征即先验’的新视角。

title: Masked Generative-Contrastive Representation Learning for Cross-Dataset EEG-Based Emotion Recognition
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) shows strong potential for cross-dataset transfer by improving feature representation and generalization. However, its application to EEG-based emotion recognition remains largely unexplored. Existing SSL methods struggle to capture the intricate spatiotemporal dependencies of EEG signals under varying channel configurations, extract fine-grained representations resilient to noise, and derive global features that generalize well across subjects. To address these challenges, we propose Masked Generative-Contrastive Representation Learning (MGCRL), a novel SSL framework specifically designed for EEG-based emotion recognition. Built upon a region-aware spatiotemporal encoder, MGCRL integrates generative and contrastive learning to achieve both fine-grained and global discriminative representations for cross-dataset generalization. MGCRL introduces three key designs: 1) a spatiotemporal encoder that incorporates region-based graph convolution to capture localized spatial and functional relationships, enhancing region-specific feature learning and mitigating the impact of varying EEG channel configurations across datasets; 2) a generative learning mechanism based on the joint embedding predictive architecture (JEPA) that utilizes masked features to capture noise robustness fine-grained representations, improving the model's capability to characterize subtle emotional states; and 3) a contrastive learning strategy that leverages masked and original features to learn temporally stable and cross-subject-invariant representations across the same stimuli, boosting emotion discrimination and cross-subject generalization. Under these designs, MGCRL exhibits remarkable ability to learn universal representation. Extensive experiments involving pretraining on the large FACED dataset and fine-tuning on multiple SEED-series datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of MGCRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Masked Generative-Contrastive Representation Learning (MGCRL) 的新型自监督学习框架，专为脑电图（EEG）情绪识别设计，通过区域感知时空编码器、基于JEPA的生成式学习和对比学习策略，提升跨数据集与跨被试的情绪识别泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法难以有效建模EEG信号在不同通道配置下的复杂时空依赖、抗噪细粒度表征及跨被试泛化的全局特征，限制了其在EEG情绪识别中的应用。
AI.method: 提出MGCRL框架：1）区域感知时空编码器，结合基于区域的图卷积以适应不同通道配置；2）基于JEPA的掩码生成式学习，提升噪声鲁棒性与细粒度情绪表征；3）利用掩码与原始特征的对比学习，学习时序稳定且跨被试不变的情绪判别表征。
AI.result: 在FACED数据集预训练并在多个SEED系列数据集微调的实验表明，MGCRL显著提升了跨数据集和跨被试的情绪识别性能，展现出强大的通用表征学习能力。
AI.conclusion: MGCRL通过融合生成式与对比式自监督学习，有效解决了EEG情绪识别中因通道差异、噪声干扰和个体差异带来的泛化难题，为基于EEG的跨域情绪识别提供了新范式。

title: Binary Iterative Method for Non-targeted Adversarial Attack
summary: Adversarial attacks guide and provide additional training and test data for both adversarial training and adversarial robustness validation, and expose the 'piecewise linearity' of deep learning based models. Since adversarial attacks and adversarial robustness are mathematically defined problems that can be optimised directly with end-to-end differentiable search, adversarial robustness is more widely applicable than other robustness metrics such as corruption and perturbation robustness, and new kinds of adversarial attacks are beneficial for robustness testing. Attacks are targeted or non-targeted depending on whether the image is modified to misclassify to a particular class or to any incorrect class; we focus on the non-targeted setting. Finding the optimal input data points and hyper-parameters for generating non-targeted adversarial attacks remains a challenge for current methods like the Fast Gradient Method, Basic Iterative Method and Virtual Adversarial Method. We propose a new method, the "Binary Iterative Method" (BinIM), which uses a divide-and-conquer paradigm to optimise parameters and hyper-parameters for the generation of non-targeted attacks. We compare our method to other gradient-based adversarial attacks evaluated over pre-trained networks (InceptionV3, InceptionV2, ResNet V2 152) on classification tasks. On 1000 randomly-sampled images from the standard ImageNet dataset, the Binary Iterative Method outperforms all other gradient-based methods, qualitatively making the classifier misclassify with confidence up to 0.995 while reducing the probability of the true label to 2.21e-09 (approximately 0).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的非目标对抗攻击方法——二进制迭代法（BinIM），采用分治策略优化参数与超参数，在ImageNet子集上显著优于FGM、BIM和VAT等现有梯度法，使分类器置信度达0.995，真类概率低至2.21e-09。
AI.motivation: 现有非目标对抗攻击方法（如FGM、BIM、VAT）在寻找最优输入点和超参数方面仍存在挑战，且对抗鲁棒性因具可微优化特性而比其他鲁棒性指标更普适。
AI.method: 提出二进制迭代法（BinIM），基于分治范式联合优化对抗样本生成中的参数与超参数，适用于端到端可微的非目标攻击。
AI.result: 在InceptionV3、InceptionV2、ResNet V2 152等预训练模型上，BinIM在1000张ImageNet图像上超越所有对比梯度法，实现最高0.995误分类置信度，真实类别概率低至2.21e-09。
AI.conclusion: BinIM是一种更高效、更强力的非目标对抗攻击方法，有助于提升对抗鲁棒性评估与训练的有效性。

title: Latent Clarity: Bridging World-Model Kinematics to Semantic Manifolds for Video Anomaly Anticipation
summary:
Continuous video anomaly detection is dominated by reactive Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) that collapses spatiotemporal features into scalar scores. We introduce PULS (Predictive Unified Latent Space), a continuous semantic world-model pipeline comprising two modules: a 490M-parameter KSD Bridge (Kinematic-to-Semantic Distillation) and a 16.8M-parameter Anticipatory State Predictor (ASP). The KSD Bridge maps V-JEPA 2 physical tensors into the 2048-d Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B text-aligned hypersphere, trained on a subset of UCF-Crime. This translation alone yields a chunk-level AUROC of 0.8994 for UCF-Crime and 0.8162 for out-of-distribution XD-Violence without MIL or hierarchical fusion.
  We introduce and validate the Latent Clarity Hypothesis: because JEPA's temporal predictor discards aleatoric pixel noise while preserving kinematics, anticipated future representations are more semantically separable than observed presents. The ASP sharpens these anticipated future latents, achieving 44.5% mean 14-way zero-shot VQA accuracy (exceeding observation baseline by +9.6 pp). Applying the ASP to Observation Tensors collapses accuracy to 7.3% (random chance), proving Anticipation and Observation occupy distinct sub-manifolds. A Triple-Track Lead-Time protocol with an L1-surprise gate yields a peak +8.9 pp anticipatory advantage at T-0.5s (p < 0.001, N = 1,000 permutation), separating physical anticipation from static scene priors. Zero-shot transfer to XD-Violence confirms that Newtonian-invariant kinematic representations generalize out-of-distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PULS连续语义世界模型，通过KSD Bridge将物理张量映射到文本对齐的隐空间，并利用ASP模块增强未来表征的语义可分性，在无需MIL或层级融合下实现高AUROC和零样本VQA性能，验证了‘隐空间清晰性假设’及牛顿不变运动表征的跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有连续视频异常检测方法主要依赖反应式的多实例学习（MIL），将时空特征压缩为标量分数，丢失丰富语义信息；本文旨在构建能持续建模物理-语义映射并提前感知异常的世界模型。
AI.method: 提出PULS框架，包含两个模块：1）4.9亿参数的KSD Bridge，将V-JEPA2物理张量映射至Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B的2048维文本对齐超球面；2）1680万参数的Anticipatory State Predictor（ASP），对JEPA预测的未来表征进行锐化；并设计Triple-Track Lead-Time协议与L1-surprise门控机制评估前瞻性优势。
AI.result: KSD Bridge单独在UCF-Crime上达chunk-level AUROC 0.8994，XD-Violence上达0.8162；ASP使14类零样本VQA准确率达44.5%（+9.6pp），而作用于观测张量时跌至7.3%（随机水平）；Triple-Track协议在T−0.5s处获得+8.9pp前瞻性优势（p<0.001）；零样本迁移到XD-Violence验证了牛顿不变表征的OOD泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 隐空间清晰性假设成立：JEPA预测的未来表征比当前观测更具语义可分性；PULS通过解耦物理动力学建模与语义对齐，实现了无需MIL的端到端连续异常检测与前瞻性理解，为视频理解提供了新范式。

title: Mask-based Predictive Representations for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Vision-based deep reinforcement learning involves dealing with high-dimensional inputs of image information. It is crucial to abstract effective states from high-dimensional image inputs and limited samples for sample-efficient reinforcement learning. To address this challenge, inspired by fields such as natural language processing and computer vision, we propose a self-supervised task based on mask prediction as an auxiliary task for reinforcement learning. This non-reconstruction method uses the sequence information collected by the agent from the environment and the context information in the sequence to predict the masked information, thereby strengthening the agent's understanding of the task and learning effective representations. Combined with transformers, we find that the model reconstructs the masked input sequence in the latent space. By feeding the compressed representations learned by this method into reinforcement learning models, we observe an improvement in the sample efficiency of reinforcement learning. Moreover, the model outperforms state-of-the-art sample-efficient reinforcement learning methods on multiple continuous and discrete control benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码预测的自监督辅助任务，结合Transformer学习高效表征，显著提升了视觉强化学习的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 视觉深度强化学习面临高维图像输入和有限样本的挑战，亟需从高维图像中抽象出有效的状态表征以提升样本效率。
AI.method: 提出一种基于掩码预测的自监督辅助任务，利用智能体采集的序列信息和上下文信息预测被掩码的部分，结合Transformer在潜在空间中重建掩码序列，并将学习到的压缩表征用于强化学习模型。
AI.result: 该方法在多个连续和离散控制基准上超越了当前最先进的样本高效强化学习方法，提升了强化学习的样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 基于掩码预测的自监督辅助任务能有效增强智能体对任务的理解并学习到更有效的表征，从而显著提升视觉强化学习的样本效率。

title: XPlainVerse: A Million-Scale Benchmark for Explainable Deepfake Detection
summary: As deepfake detection models increasingly produce natural language explanations, their reasoning often remains weakly grounded in visual artifacts, limiting reliability and user trust. Existing benchmarks mainly evaluate classification accuracy, overlooking whether explanations reflect the actual manipulations. This gap hinders progress toward deployable, explainable deepfake detection systems. To this end, we introduce XPlainVerse, a large-scale benchmark designed for joint deepfake detection and human-centered explanation. XPlainVerse comprises one million real and manipulated images, pairing authentic images from five established sources with forgeries generated by twelve off-the-shelf image editing and synthesis models. We further propose a multi-stage filtering pipeline, Edit-Check, to verify if manipulations satisfy their intended edits, enabling reliable reasoning supervision at scale. Beyond dataset scale, XPlainVerse provides two complementary explanation styles: technical explanations for expert analysis and simplified explanations optimized for non-technical users. To evaluate explanation quality beyond surface similarity, we propose novel metrics, EntityScore and EvidenceScore, that measure reasoning fidelity by checking whether explanations correctly identify manipulated entities and visual evidence. Human annotations on 2,000 explanation pairs validate our dataset quality against human judgment. We believe XPlainVerse will establish grounded explanation quality as a measurable dimension of deepfake detection and support scalable research on trustworthy, interpretable models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出XPlainVerse基准，用于联合评估深度伪造检测与人类中心化解释质量，包含百万级图像及多阶段验证流程Edit-Check，并引入EntityScore和EvidenceScore新指标衡量解释的推理保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型的自然语言解释缺乏对视觉伪造痕迹的可靠 grounding，且现有基准仅关注分类准确率，忽视解释是否真实反映伪造操作，阻碍可部署、可解释系统的进展。
AI.method: 构建大规模基准XPlainVerse（100万张真实/伪造图像），结合5个真实图像源与12种编辑/合成模型生成伪造；设计多阶段过滤流程Edit-Check验证伪造意图一致性；提供技术型与简化型两类解释；提出EntityScore和EvidenceScore新指标评估解释对操纵实体与视觉证据的识别准确性。
AI.result: XPlainVerse被验证具备高质量解释标注（基于2000对人工标注）；新指标能有效衡量解释的推理保真度；为可信赖、可解释的深度伪造检测研究提供了可扩展基准与评估维度。
AI.conclusion: XPlainVerse首次将‘解释的视觉 grounding’确立为可量化维度，推动深度伪造检测向更可信、更透明、更以人为中心的方向发展。

title: Geometry of Ordinal Representations in Language Models
summary: Recent work showed that language models represent character counts on curved 1D manifolds, with attention heads performing geometric transformations to enable computation. We test whether this generalizes across four ordinal tasks (bracket depth, indentation, table position, numeric magnitude) in Gemma-2-2B, Gemma-2-9B, and Qwen3-4B. We find that 1D manifolds with place-cell feature tiling emerge for tasks where the ordinal variable is locally computable from token identity, while tasks requiring cross-position integration or semantic extraction produce higher-dimensional or incoherent representations. Geometric computation is architecture-dependent: Qwen3-4B shows substantially stronger twisting than Gemma models for indentation, and its twisters preserve ordinal order, unlike its numeric twisters. Activation patching confirms that the identified manifold subspaces concentrate task-relevant information, with manifold-direction ablation causing dramatically larger probe accuracy drops than random-direction controls.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语言模型中序数任务的几何表征，发现1D流形表征仅在局部可计算的序数任务中出现，而需要跨位置整合或语义提取的任务则产生高维或混乱表征；几何计算具有架构依赖性，且激活修补实验验证了流形子空间对任务信息的高度集中性。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型中序数任务（如括号深度、缩进等）是否普遍采用1D曲线流形表征，以及这种几何计算是否跨模型和任务泛化。
AI.method: 在Gemma-2-2B、Gemma-2-9B和Qwen3-4B三个模型上测试四种序数任务；分析隐藏层激活的低维流形结构；比较不同任务与模型间的几何特性（如扭曲程度、顺序保持性）；通过激活修补与方向消融验证流形子空间的功能特异性。
AI.result: 1D流形+place-cell式特征平铺仅出现在局部可由token身份计算的序数任务中；需跨位置或语义处理的任务呈现高维/混乱表征；Qwen3-4B在缩进任务中表现出更强且保序的扭曲，而数值任务中扭曲不保序；流形方向消融导致探针准确率下降显著大于随机方向控制。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型中几何计算并非普适，其存在性与形式高度依赖于任务局部可计算性及模型架构；1D流形表征是特定计算需求下的涌现结构，而非通用表征机制。

title: EPRA U-Net: An Efficient Pyramid Residual Attention Framework for Accurate Infarct Segmentation in Diffusion-Weighted MRI
summary: Objective: Accurate identification of acute ischemic infarcts on diffusion-weighted magnetic resonance imaging (DWI) is a critical prerequisite for reliable lesion quantification and effective clinical decision support in the management of cerebrovascular events. Methods: This study presents EPRA U-Net (Efficient Pyramid Residual Attention U-Net), a task-specific integrated architecture for efficient and accurate infarct segmentation of DWI images. In the proposed architecture, an EfficientNet-based encoder was used as a hierarchical feature extractor with a minimized parameterization. In addition, a Residual-Recurrent (R2) block (recurrent unrolling step t = 2, following the original formulation) and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) were integrated to enhance the performance of spatial dependency modeling. Additionally, a dual attention mechanism was incorporated to highlight lesion-related activations while concurrently enabling the suppression of extraneous background responses. To prioritize lesion detection consistent with clinical imperative, a Tversky loss function was adopted, emphasizing the sensitivity of detection over its specificity during the optimization process. Results: Experimental evaluations were conducted utilizing an in-house dataset comprising 167 patients with 4,895 DWI slices; subsequently, the performance of the proposed EPRA U-Net was assessed in comparison with state-of-the-art models, specifically UNet++, DeepLabV3+, and TransUNet. The experimental results suggest that EPRA U-Net attained superior performance, evidenced by a pixel-aggregated Dice of 0.8984, a per-sample Dice of 0.9469, an IoU of 0.8155, a Recall of 0.8887, a Lesion F1 of 0.9378, and an HD95 of 11.62 px. Furthermore, a clear reduction in the rate of missed lesions, specifically by 16%, 25%, and 29%, was observed when compared with UNet++, DeepLabV3+, and TransUNet, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EPRA U-Net的新型深度学习模型，用于DWI图像中急性缺血性梗死病灶的高效精准分割，通过结合EfficientNet编码器、R2模块、ASPP和双注意力机制，并采用Tversky损失函数优化敏感性，在自建数据集上显著优于UNet++、DeepLabV3+和TransUNet。
AI.motivation: 急性缺血性梗死在DWI图像上的准确识别对病变量化和临床决策支持至关重要，但现有方法在精度、参数效率与病灶检出率方面仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 提出EPRA U-Net：采用EfficientNet作为轻量编码器；引入R2块（t=2）与ASPP增强空间依赖建模；嵌入双注意力机制突出病灶响应并抑制背景干扰；使用Tversky损失函数侧重提升检测敏感性。
AI.result: 在167例患者共4895张DWI切片上测试，EPRA U-Net取得Dice 0.8984（像素级）、0.9469（样本级），IoU 0.8155，Recall 0.8887，Lesion F1 0.9378，HD95 11.62 px；漏检率较UNet++、DeepLabV3+、TransUNet分别降低16%、25%、29%。
AI.conclusion: EPRA U-Net在保持模型轻量的同时显著提升了DWI图像中急性缺血性梗死的分割精度与病灶检出能力，具备良好的临床应用潜力。

title: FedFFT: Taming Client Drift in Federated SAM via Spectral Perturbation Filtering
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables decentralized training without data sharing, but suffers from statistical heterogeneity across clients, leading to client drift, poor generalization, and sharp minima compared to centralized training. Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) has emerged as a promising approach to improve generalization, yet its application in federated learning still suffers from divergence problems, since perturbations are computed locally and reflect client-specific loss geometries. To better understand this issue, we provide experimental evidence from a new perspective, the frequency domain, for SAM perturbations in federated settings, revealing that inter-client perturbation inconsistencies are predominantly concentrated in the low-frequency spectrum. Motivated by this insight, we propose Federated learning with Frequency-domain Filtering of SAM perturbations (FedFFT). It is a lightweight and plug-and-play method that filters out low-frequency components of SAM perturbations without requiring additional communication, thereby suppressing inconsistent components in client updates while preserving consistent learning signals. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and diverse backbones demonstrate that FedFFT consistently outperforms SAM-based FL methods, particularly under severe non-IID distributions. These results highlight the effectiveness, scalability, and general applicability of our frequency-domain perspective for sharpness-aware federated optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedFFT方法，通过在频域中滤除SAM扰动的低频分量来缓解联邦学习中因统计异质性导致的客户端漂移与收敛问题，提升泛化性能。
AI.motivation: SAM在联邦学习中因本地计算扰动导致跨客户端不一致，尤其在低频段表现明显，引发发散问题。
AI.method: 提出FedFFT，在客户端本地对SAM扰动进行频域变换（如FFT），滤除低频成分后再反变换回时域，作为更新方向；无需额外通信，轻量且即插即用。
AI.result: 在多个基准和骨干网络上验证，FedFFT在强非IID设定下显著优于现有SAM-based联邦学习方法，提升模型泛化与收敛稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 频域视角为理解与改进尖锐度感知的联邦优化提供了新思路，FedFFT证明了低频滤波在缓解客户端扰动不一致性上的有效性与普适性。

title: When Simpler Is Better: Evaluating Translation Pipelines for Medieval Latin Manuscripts
summary: Despite remarkable progress in machine translation, Vision Language Models (VLMs) struggle on historical manuscripts, a domain that stresses core Natural Language Processing (NLP) capabilities: low-resource transliteration, archaic vocabulary, and noisy input signals. We present a systematic framework for evaluating the full image-to-translation pipeline on medieval Latin manuscripts, a setting in which scribal shorthand, ligatures, and parchment degradation expose failure modes that are invisible in clean-text benchmarks. Benchmarking on the CATMuS Latin dataset reveals a specialization gap: domain-specific Optical Character Recognition (OCR) models reduce character error rate by up to 4.3$\times$ compared to general-purpose VLMs, despite operating at orders of magnitude fewer parameters. We introduce the Interpres-Parallel-Corpus (IPC), a novel dataset comprising 1,383 aligned manuscript image lines, transcriptions, and expert translations, the first of its kind for medieval Latin. Our experiments uncover a complexity paradox: the simplest pipeline, a specialized OCR model feeding directly into a VLM, outperforms all multi-component variants. Adding retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) or post-OCR correction introduces prompt saturation and error propagation that degrade aggregate translation quality. These findings offer both a new benchmark and practical guidance for deploying translation systems in low-resource historical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统性评估框架，用于测试视觉语言模型（VLMs）在中世纪拉丁文手稿图像到翻译任务中的性能，发现专用OCR模型配合VLM的简单流水线效果最优，而引入RAG或后处理反而降低质量；同时发布了首个中世纪拉丁文图文对齐数据集IPC。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs在历史手稿翻译任务中表现不佳，因其面临低资源转写、古语词汇和噪声图像等核心NLP挑战，缺乏针对性评估与数据支持。
AI.method: 构建端到端图像到翻译评估框架；发布Interpres-Parallel-Corpus（IPC）数据集（1383条图文-转录-翻译三元组）；对比多种流水线（含OCR+VLM、RAG增强、后校正等）在CATMuS Latin数据集上的性能。
AI.result: 专用OCR模型比通用VLM降低字符错误率最高达4.3倍；最简OCR→VLM流水线性能最优；引入RAG或OCR后校正导致提示饱和与错误传播，反降低翻译质量。
AI.conclusion: 在低资源历史文本场景中，轻量专用组件协同优于复杂多模块架构；IPC数据集与评估框架为该领域提供了新基准与实用部署指南。

title: PLGSA-Transformer: Periocular Landmark-Guided Attention with Occlusion-Adaptive Cosine Thresholding for Cross-Modal Masked and Unmasked Face Recognition
summary: The widespread adoption of facial masks, accelerated by COVID-19 and mandated in security-sensitive settings, has exposed limitations of conventional face recognition systems. Existing approaches relying on fixed cosine thresholds, non-adaptive CNNs, and purely data-driven features fail to generalize when facial regions are occluded, creating a gap between lab performance and real-world deployability. This paper proposes PLGSA-Transformer, a cross-modal face matching framework with three contributions. First, Periocular Landmark-Guided Spatial Attention (PLGSA) uses MediaPipe landmarks to compute Gaussian heatmaps over the eye, brow, and forehead regions, fusing them with EfficientNetB3 features via a learnable residual gate to direct attention toward discriminative visible regions. Second, a Hybrid CNN-Transformer Branch reshapes feature maps into tokens processed by a two-layer Multi-Head Self-Attention encoder, enabling cross-regional dependency modelling. Third, the Occlusion-Adaptive Cosine Threshold (OACT) is a jointly trained head that raises the matching threshold in proportion to predicted occlusion severity. The model is evaluated on 858 images from Zenodo MDMFR (60%), Kaggle CelebA-HQ masked collection (25%), and author-collected images (15%), spanning both genders, ages 21-75, with varied mask types, trained via a unified loss combining contrastive verification, identity classification, and occlusion cross-entropy. PLGSA-Transformer achieves 97.22% pair verification accuracy with ROC AUC 1.0000, surpassing VGG-16-based MUFM (Abdullah et al., 2025; 95.0%), HOG classifiers (Adnan et al., 2020; 85.0%), and Feature-based Structural Measure (Shnain et al., 2017; 86.61%). These results confirm that encoding periocular geometry into attention, with Transformer modelling and occlusion-adaptive thresholds, yields a robust, scalable solution for cross-modal masked face recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PLGSA-Transformer框架，通过眼周关键点引导的空间注意力、CNN-Transformer混合分支和遮挡自适应余弦阈值，显著提升戴口罩人脸匹配精度，在多个数据集上达到97.22%验证准确率和1.0000 ROC AUC。
AI.motivation: 常规人脸识别系统在面部被口罩遮挡时泛化能力差，固定阈值、非自适应CNN和纯数据驱动特征难以应对真实场景中的遮挡问题。
AI.method: 提出PLGSA-Transformer：1）Periocular Landmark-Guided Spatial Attention（PLGSA），利用MediaPipe关键点生成眼周高斯热图并与EfficientNetB3特征融合；2）Hybrid CNN-Transformer Branch，将特征图转为token并用两层多头自注意力建模跨区域依赖；3）Occlusion-Adaptive Cosine Threshold（OACT），联合训练以根据预测遮挡程度动态调整匹配阈值。
AI.result: 在Zenodo MDMFR、CelebA-HQ masked及自采图像共858张样本上测试，获得97.22%配对验证准确率和1.0000 ROC AUC，显著优于MUFM（95.0%）、HOG（85.0%）和结构度量方法（86.61%）。
AI.conclusion: 将眼周几何信息编码进注意力机制，结合Transformer建模与遮挡自适应阈值，可构建鲁棒、可扩展的跨模态戴口罩人脸识别方案。

title: Physics-Informed Graph Learning with Uncertainty Awareness for Open-Set Domain Generalization in Fault Diagnosis
summary: Intelligent industrial maintenance critically relies on reliable fault diagnosis of rotating machinery. However, it faces formidable challenges from unknown fault types and domain shifts induced by varying operating conditions, which is formally formulated as the open-set domain generalization (OSDG) problem. Existing methods are mainly data-driven, thereby overlooking the cascaded propagation of uncertainty across feature extraction, topological learning, and decision-making stages.To tackle this challenge, we propose PGU-OD, a novel Physics-Informed Graph Learning framework with Uncertainty Awareness for Open-set Domain generalization. First, it designs a physics-informed spectral attention module to extract condition-robust fault features, thereby suppressing perceptual uncertainty caused by frequency shifts. Further, it constructs an uncertainty aware adaptive graph learning mechanism to dynamically adjust the edge weights of the sample graph guided by class-scale Gaussian distribution parameters, which mitigates the structural propagation of uncertainty. Finally, a Gaussian-distribution-based adaptive boundary loss function and a dual-criteria open-set inference strategy are developed to optimize decision boundaries and reliably reject unknown faults. Extensive experimental evaluations on two public and widely used rotating machinery fault datasets demonstrate that the proposed PGU-OD outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both known fault classification and unknown fault rejection under domain shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PGU-OD框架，融合物理先验与图学习，并引入不确定性建模，以解决旋转机械故障诊断中的开集域泛化（OSDG）问题，在已知故障分类与未知故障拒识上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 旋转机械智能运维中，未知故障类型和工况变化导致的域偏移构成开集域泛化（OSDG）挑战，现有纯数据驱动方法忽视了特征提取、拓扑学习与决策各阶段间不确定性级联传播问题。
AI.method: 提出PGU-OD：1）物理信息谱注意力模块提取工况鲁棒故障特征，抑制感知不确定性；2）基于类别尺度高斯分布参数的不确定性感知自适应图学习机制，缓解结构不确定性传播；3）高斯分布驱动的自适应边界损失函数与双准则开集推理策略，优化决策边界并可靠拒识未知故障。
AI.result: 在两个公开旋转机械故障数据集上，PGU-OD在域偏移下显著优于现有SOTA方法，同时提升已知故障分类准确率与未知故障拒识能力。
AI.conclusion: PGU-OD通过融合物理先验、图学习与不确定性建模，有效应对OSDG挑战，为工业设备智能诊断提供了更鲁棒、可靠的解决方案。

title: Vision Non-Causal Trapezoidal Mamba: Eliminating Directional Scanning in Vision SSMs with Second-Order Dynamics
summary: State Space Models (SSMs) have emerged as an alternative to Vision Transformers, yet most vision SSMs inherit directional token scanning from causal sequence modeling. While effective for sequential data, directional scanning introduces spatial bias and orientation-sensitive representations. We present Vision Non-Causal Trapezoidal Mamba (VNCT), a second-order non-causal vision SSM that enables all image tokens to interact in a single pass, eliminating direSctional scanning and achieving low single-image inference latency. VNCT exhibits more orientation-robust representations, showing reduced performance degradation under image rotations and flips, while improving Boundary IoU by up to 3.7 points, leading to more accurate boundary preservation and object localization. Across ImageNet-1K classification, COCO object detection and instance segmentation, and ADE20K semantic segmentation, VNCT consistently outperforms both directional-scanning vision SSMs and first-order non-causal SSMs. These results show that directional scanning is unnecessary for high-performance vision SSMs and that second-order non-causal state-space modeling offers a simple, efficient, and robust alternative for visual recognition.

AI.tldr: VNCT是一种第二阶非因果视觉状态空间模型，通过消除方向性扫描，实现所有图像标记在单次传递中交互，提高了方向鲁棒性和边界定位精度，在多个视觉任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉状态空间模型（SSMs）大多继承了因果序列建模的方向性标记扫描，导致空间偏差和方向敏感表示，限制了其在视觉任务中的鲁棒性和性能。
AI.method: 提出Vision Non-Causal Trapezoidal Mamba（VNCT），一种第二阶非因果视觉SSM，支持全图像标记单次交互，摒弃方向性扫描，并采用梯形结构增强建模能力。
AI.result: VNCT在ImageNet-1K分类、COCO检测与实例分割、ADE20K语义分割任务上均超越方向性扫描及一阶非因果SSMs；边界IoU提升最多3.7点，旋转/翻转下性能下降更少，单图推理延迟低。
AI.conclusion: 方向性扫描并非高性能视觉SSMs所必需；第二阶非因果状态空间建模为视觉识别提供了更简单、高效且鲁棒的替代方案。

title: SpecGradFilter: A Spectral Gradient Filtering Framework for Taming Federated Heterogeneity
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is fundamentally challenged by statistical heterogeneity, where non-identically distributed (non-IID) data induces client drift that severely hampers global convergence. While existing approaches attempt to mitigate this drift through spatial-domain gradient correction or regularization, they overlook the intrinsic spectral structure of optimization signals. In this work, we revisit client drift from a novel frequency-domain perspective and uncover a critical Spectral Bias of Drift: inter-client gradient divergence is predominantly concentrated in low-frequency components which encode client-specific distributional shifts, while high-frequency components representing fine-grained features remain relatively consistent. Motivated by this, we propose SpecGradFilter, a unified Spectral Gradient Filtering Framework that tames heterogeneity by suppressing discordant low-frequency signals. Crucially, we demonstrate that SpecGradFilter is a generalizable principle, effective not only via precise FFT-based truncation but also through spatial approximations like Gaussian detrending. Extensive experiments on benchmarks such as CIFAR-10/100 and Tiny-ImageNet demonstrate that SpecGradFilter significantly performs better performance in highly Non-IID settings with negligible communication overhead, establishing a new paradigm for robust federated optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种频域视角下的联邦学习客户端漂移抑制方法SpecGradFilter，通过滤除表征客户端分布偏移的低频梯度分量，提升非独立同分布数据下的全局收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在统计异质性（非IID数据）下因客户端漂移导致收敛困难，且多聚焦空间域修正，忽略了优化信号的频谱结构。
AI.method: 从频域角度分析客户端漂移，发现其梯度差异主要集中于低频成分；据此提出SpecGradFilter框架，通过FFT截断或高斯去趋势等手段抑制低频不一致信号。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和Tiny-ImageNet等基准上验证了SpecGradFilter在高度Non-IID设置下显著优于现有方法，且通信开销极小。
AI.conclusion: 频域梯度滤波是一种通用且有效的异质性缓解范式，为鲁棒联邦优化提供了新思路。

title: Responsibility Distribution Estimation in Ego-View Accident Videos with Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Recent studies on multimodal traffic accident understanding have mainly relied on infrastructure-camera footage, satellite imagery, or structured crash records. However, such data sources are costly to deploy and maintain at large scale, and they cannot objectively capture what the driver was actually able to observe before the accident. In contrast, ego-view accident videos directly represent the driver's visual perspective, making them suitable for reasoning about avoidability and driver responsibility. In this paper, we introduce responsibility distribution estimation for ego-view traffic accident videos, a new task in which a model predicts the percentage of responsibility assigned to each involved agent. We construct an LLM-assisted responsibility annotation pipeline and fine-tune multimodal large language models under multiple input settings, including raw frames, segmentation-enhanced input, and textual descriptions. Experimental results establish a strong initial benchmark, demonstrating that multimodal LLMs can effectively perform this nuanced, constraint-based reasoning task. Our findings suggest that ego-centric accident videos provide a promising foundation for socially and legally meaningful multimodal reasoning beyond conventional accident classification and explanation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自车视角事故视频的责任分配估计新任务，构建了LLM辅助标注流程，并在多种输入设置下微调多模态大语言模型，建立了首个强基线，验证了其在约束性推理任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有交通事故理解研究依赖基础设施摄像头、卫星图像或结构化事故记录，成本高且无法客观反映驾驶员实际观察内容；而自车视角事故视频能真实反映驾驶员视觉输入，更适合分析事故可避免性与责任归属。
AI.method: 提出了责任分配估计任务，构建LLM辅助的责任标注流程，并在原始帧、分割增强输入和文本描述等多种输入设置下微调多模态大语言模型。
AI.result: 实验结果建立了该任务的强初始基准，证明多模态大语言模型能有效完成这种细致的、约束驱动的推理任务。
AI.conclusion: 自车视角事故视频为超越传统事故分类与解释任务的社会与法律意义多模态推理提供了有前景的基础。

title: Exploring Convolutional Neural Processes for Weather Downscaling
summary: Global reanalysis products such as ERA5-Land provide spatially complete weather fields but at resolutions too coarse for local applications, particularly in mountainous regions where temperature can vary by several degrees over short distances. This project investigates Convolutional Conditional Neural Processes (ConvCNPs) for statistical downscaling of daily maximum temperature from the ~11km resolution ERA5-Land grid to ~1km resolution over Switzerland, building upon the architecture of Vaughan et al. (2022) and adapting it to the topographically complex Swiss domain with high-resolution elevation features from the swisstopo DHM25. The best model, trained on ten years of data (2014-2023) with five-fold temporal cross-validation, achieves a mean absolute error of 1.31 Celsius and a CRPS-based skill score of 0.524 relative to bilinear interpolation, reducing the expected prediction error by more than half. An ablation study reveals that the elevation MLP is the indispensable component - without it, the model diverges entirely - while explicit seasonal features and Topographic Position Index provide secondary benefits. Under sparse on-grid input the model degrades gracefully, maintaining positive skill down to approximately 10% of the input grid; however, zero-shot deployment on off-grid station observations does not achieve positive skill at any density tested. All configurations exhibit severely overconfident uncertainty estimates, a structural limitation of the Gaussian likelihood training objective. These results demonstrate that ConvCNPs are a viable and effective approach to climate downscaling in complex terrain, and identify uncertainty calibration and native support for non-gridded input as the key challenges for operational deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用卷积条件神经过程（ConvCNPs）对瑞士地区的日最高气温进行统计降尺度，将ERA5-Land数据从约11km分辨率提升至约1km分辨率。模型在引入高分辨率地形特征后表现优异，MAE为1.31°C，CRPS技巧得分0.524，但存在不确定性估计过度自信及对非网格观测零样本泛化能力差的问题。
AI.motivation: 全球再分析产品（如ERA5-Land）空间覆盖完整但分辨率粗糙，难以满足山地等复杂地形下的局地应用需求，尤其温度在短距离内变化显著。
AI.method: 基于Vaughan等人（2022）的ConvCNP架构，结合瑞士高分辨率地形数据（swisstopo DHM25），构建用于气温降尺度的深度学习模型；采用十年（2014–2023）数据训练与五折时间交叉验证，并开展消融实验评估各模块贡献。
AI.result: 最优模型MAE为1.31°C，CRPS技巧得分0.524（相较双线性插值提升超50%）；地形MLP为关键组件，缺失则模型完全失效；稀疏网格输入下性能缓降，但对离网站点观测零样本预测无正向技巧；所有配置均存在严重不确定性过自信问题。
AI.conclusion: ConvCNPs是复杂地形气候降尺度的有效方法，但不确定性校准和对非网格输入的原生支持是其业务化部署的关键挑战。

title: Channel-Adaptive Robust Aggregation for Over-the-Air Federated Learning in Heterogeneous Networks
summary: The growing demand for privacy-preserving, data-intensive applications such as IoT, augmented reality, and autonomous systems positions Federated Learning (FL) as a key enabler in 6G networks. Over-the-Air FL (OTA-FL) leverages the superposition property of the wireless multiple access channel for efficient aggregation via simultaneous transmissions. Existing methods rely on fixed aggregation schedules and do not jointly address noise, fading, and client heterogeneity. We propose CHARGE-FL (CHannel-Adaptive Robust agGrEgation), a framework that adaptively schedules aggregation based on channel dynamics and application readiness. By combining a tailored optimization strategy with a dual-purpose precoding mechanism, CHARGE-FL mitigates channel distortion and bias from partial updates, achieving superior accuracy, stability, and convergence under realistic wireless conditions. Empirical results under realistic wireless conditions show that CHARGE-FL significantly improves accuracy, stability, and convergence over state-of-the-art OTA-FL methods, particularly in straggler-prone and noisy scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHARGE-FL框架，通过信道自适应调度与双功能预编码机制，提升OTA-FL在6G无线环境下的准确性、稳定性和收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有OTA-FL方法依赖固定聚合调度，未能联合应对无线信道噪声、衰落及客户端异构性问题，难以满足6G中隐私敏感、数据密集型应用的需求。
AI.method: 提出CHARGE-FL框架，基于信道动态和应用就绪状态自适应调度聚合；结合定制化优化策略与双功能预编码机制，抑制信道失真与部分更新偏差。
AI.result: 在真实无线条件下实验表明，CHARGE-FL显著优于现有OTA-FL方法，尤其在存在计算拖尾（straggler）和高噪声场景下，准确率、稳定性和收敛速度均更优。
AI.conclusion: CHARGE-FL为6G网络中面向异构、动态无线环境的鲁棒联邦学习提供了有效解决方案，推动隐私保护AI在边缘智能系统中的实际部署。

title: A Step Towards Robust Unsupervised Domain Adaptation via Fine-Tuning and Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted and presented at the 28th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI 2025), Bologna, Italy
summary: Adversarial robustness in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) remains a significant challenge due to noisy pseudo labels and inherent distributional shifts between the clean source and adversarially perturbed target domains. Existing approaches often fail to achieve an optimal trade-off between robustness and accuracy, as pseudo-labels generated by domain-adapted models tend to introduce classification errors under adversarial attacks. In this work, we propose \textbf{SFT+RL}, a two-stage robust UDA framework that integrates Supervised Fine Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) on top of CLIP's pre-trained visual encoder. In the SFT stage, we adversarially fine-tune a linear classifier using PGD-based perturbations over the labelled source domain while partially unfreezing CLIP's projection layer. It allows adaptation to adversarial noise while preserving CLIP's rich semantic priors. We introduce a confidence-guided pseudo-labeling strategy in the RL stage to annotate unlabeled target samples progressively. Pseudo labels are filtered using a decaying confidence threshold to balance quality and coverage, and the model is trained on a composite dataset formed by combining clean source samples with high-confidence target samples. Adversarial training is applied to mixed batches of clean and adversarial examples to enhance cross-domain robustness. Comprehensive evaluations on three benchmark datasets OfficeHome~\cite{tomm-ude}, PACS~\cite{pacs}, and VisDA~\cite{visda} demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Notably, \textbf{SFT+RL} achieves average improvements of \textbf{10.2\%} in clean accuracy and \textbf{15.8\%} in adversarial robustness across all three datasets, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SFT+RL框架，通过结合监督微调（SFT）与强化学习（RL），提升无监督域自适应（UDA）在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性；在SFT阶段对CLIP视觉编码器进行对抗微调，在RL阶段采用置信度引导的伪标签策略，并在混合干净/对抗样本上训练，显著提升清洁准确率（+10.2%）和对抗鲁棒性（+15.8%）。
AI.motivation: 无监督域自适应中，对抗鲁棒性受限于噪声伪标签和源域（干净）与目标域（对抗扰动）间的分布偏移，现有方法难以兼顾鲁棒性与精度。
AI.method: 提出两阶段SFT+RL框架：第一阶段在CLIP视觉编码器基础上，用PGD对抗扰动对线性分类器进行监督微调，并部分解冻CLIP投影层；第二阶段引入置信度衰减阈值筛选高置信伪标签，构建源域干净样本与高置信目标样本的混合数据集，并在该混合数据上进行对抗训练。
AI.result: 在OfficeHome、PACS和VisDA三个基准数据集上，SFT+RL平均提升清洁准确率10.2%，对抗鲁棒性15.8%，显著优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: SFT+RL有效缓解了UDA中伪标签噪声与域偏移带来的鲁棒性瓶颈，通过分阶段协同优化语义先验保持与对抗适应，在精度与鲁棒性间取得更好平衡。

title: Quantize the Target, Quantize the Drafter: Efficient Inference with Qwen3.5-4B
comment: All authors contributed equally. Our submission to Efficient Qwen Competition, ICML 2026 Workshop on AdaptFM
summary: This report describes our approach to the Efficient Qwen Competition, where the goal is to enable low-latency serving of Qwen3.5-4B on a resource-constrained NVIDIA A10G GPU. Our system combines a quantized target model with speculative decoding. To recover accuracy, we apply quantization-aware distillation to the target model while retaining the original quantization grid. To speed up decoding, a block-diffusion drafter specialized for the quantized target model is trained using a two-stage procedure: first learning from the high-precision target and then adapting to the low-precision target. Because the drafter is invoked at every speculative decoding step, we further reduce its overhead with quantization and sliding-window attention, preserving draft-token acceptance while improving long-context decoding latency. As a result, our submission achieves a 6.978$\times$ average speedup over the baseline while satisfying the required quality thresholds, ranking 3rd overall. We hope these results provide useful insights for practical LLM inference. The code and resources are available at https://github.com/nota-github/adaptfm-quant-dflash

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合量化目标模型与推测解码的高效Qwen3.5-4B推理方案，在NVIDIA A10G GPU上实现低延迟部署，通过量化感知蒸馏恢复精度，并设计专用块扩散起草器提升解码速度，最终获得6.978×平均加速。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的NVIDIA A10G GPU上实现Qwen3.5-4B模型的低延迟服务，兼顾推理速度与生成质量。
AI.method: 采用量化目标模型+推测解码架构；引入量化感知蒸馏以保持精度；训练适配量化目标的块扩散起草器（两阶段训练）；对起草器进一步应用量化和滑动窗口注意力以降低开销。
AI.result: 在满足质量阈值前提下，相比基线实现6.978×平均加速，竞赛中排名第三。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为实际大语言模型高效推理提供了可行且有效的技术路径，尤其适用于显存与算力受限场景。

title: SAF3R: Dynamic Sparse Attention for Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction Transformers
summary: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction (F3R) transformers have recently achieved remarkable success. However, scaling them to long image sequences remains challenging, as the quadratic complexity of cross-view global attention quickly becomes the dominant computational bottleneck. While recent efforts attempt to improve efficiency through compressed or sparse attention, they fail to fully exploit the inherent sparsity and dynamic behavior of global attention. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of global attention across multiple F3R transformers and reveal that attention patterns are highly heterogeneous, dynamic, and extremely sparse across layers and attention heads. Motivated by these findings, we propose SAF3R, a training-free dynamic sparse attention framework tailored to F3R transformers. SAF3R integrates tailored sparse attention mechanisms with offline head profiling and an efficient online adaptation strategy to match input-dependent attention behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SAF3R achieves high sparsity ratios while preserving camera pose estimation and 3D reconstruction quality, translating into substantial end-to-end speedup on F3R transformers compared to existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/jndeng/SAF3R

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAF3R，一种无需训练的动态稀疏注意力框架，针对前馈式3D重建（F3R）Transformer中跨视角全局注意力计算开销大的问题，通过离线头分析与在线自适应策略，在保持重建质量的同时显著提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有F3R Transformer因跨视角全局注意力的二次复杂度难以扩展至长图像序列；已有压缩/稀疏注意力方法未能充分利用其固有的稀疏性和动态性。
AI.method: 基于对多个F3R模型中全局注意力模式的实证分析，发现其具有高度异质性、动态性和层/头间稀疏性；据此设计SAF3R框架，融合定制稀疏机制、离线注意力头特征分析和输入依赖的在线适配策略。
AI.result: SAF3R在保持相机姿态估计与3D重建精度的前提下，实现高稀疏比，并在多个F3R模型上获得显著端到端加速效果，优于现有稀疏注意力方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态稀疏注意力可有效缓解F3R Transformer的计算瓶颈，SAF3R为高效、高质量的长序列3D重建提供了实用且通用的解决方案。

title: Signal or Noise? Understanding Generative Models for Real-World Sensor Time Series
summary: Generative models have changed how machine learning represents complex data distributions, especially in language and vision, yet many real-world systems are observed instead as continuous, high-dimensional, and noisy sensor time series. Existing generative modeling of sensor data, however, remains fragmented across modalities, datasets, and task formulations, limiting a systematic understanding of when, how, and why generative models succeed or fail in real-world settings. To address this gap, we introduce SensorGen, a large-scale study of sensor-signal generation spanning 14 settings across 4 domains, 7 datasets, and 12 signal modalities. Leveraging SensorGen, we systematically evaluate generative models from five major families and uncover three key findings: (1) flow-matching models provide strong overall performance across most settings; (2) signal properties matter, with demographic covariates improving longitudinal generation and time-frequency modeling improving high-frequency signal generation; and (3) generated signals have practical utility beyond visual realism, with scaling improving generation quality and synthetic data improving downstream performance. Together, SensorGen establishes a broader understanding of design choices, evaluation protocols, and failure modes in real-world sensor data generation.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SensorGen，一个大规模的传感器信号生成研究项目，涵盖14种设置、4个领域、7个数据集和12种信号模态，系统评估了五类主流生成模型，并得出三个关键发现：流匹配模型整体表现优异；信号特性（如人口统计协变量、时频建模）显著影响生成效果；生成信号具有实际应用价值，不仅视觉真实，还能提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有传感器数据的生成建模分散于不同模态、数据集和任务设定，缺乏系统性理解，难以判断生成模型在现实场景中何时、如何及为何成功或失败。
AI.method: 提出SensorGen框架，覆盖多领域、多数据集、多模态的14种传感器生成设置，并系统评估五类主流生成模型（如flow-matching等），分析信号特性、建模策略与下游效用的关系。
AI.result: 发现（1）flow-matching模型整体性能最优；（2）人口统计协变量有助于纵向生成，时频建模提升高频信号生成质量；（3）生成信号具备实用价值，缩放可提升质量，合成数据能增强下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: SensorGen为现实世界传感器数据生成提供了统一评估基准，揭示了关键设计选择、评估协议与失效模式，推动生成模型在时序传感领域的落地与理解。

title: HiFA4: Training-Free 4-bit FlashAttention on Ascend HIF4 NPUs for LLM Inference
summary:
We present HiFA4, a post-training operator-level design that executes both QK^T and PV in FlashAttention as 4-bit HIF4 Cube GEMMs for LLM inference on Ascend NPUs, while maintaining the online softmax state in FP16. To our knowledge, HiFA4 is the first Ascend-HIF4-targeted design of this kind evaluated on standard NLP benchmarks.
  HiFA4 combines two mechanisms. Smooth-QK applies a calibration-static per-channel equivalent rescaling to Q and K after RoPE, transferring quantization difficulty from K to Q without per-tile online reduction at inference. P-Reordering accumulates the softmax normalizer from the same quantized attention weights P_hat used in the PV GEMM, rather than from a higher-precision reconstruction. We show that this inconsistent formulation introduces a coherent output-scaling error, and validate the effect on a Qwen3-8B Layer-0 MMLU trace, where all 3.6M measured attention tiles exhibit net probability-mass loss with median epsilon_bar = -0.064. P-Reordering also allows the normalizer to be fused into the PV Cube GEMM.
  Across five LLMs, HiFA4 reduces quantization-induced decision drift. On Qwen3-8B, it recovers 37.5% of the accuracy gap introduced by direct HIF4 quantization, narrows the sample-weighted accuracy loss from 1.12 pp to 0.70 pp, reduces BF16-inconsistent MMLU predictions from 16.3% to 8.2%, and cuts MMLU accuracy regressions by 57% (1071 to 465). On Gemma2-9B, mild smoothing keeps HiFA4 within 0.7 pp of BF16 while reducing MMLU regressions by 27%. On LLaMA3.1-8B, Mistral-7B, and Phi-4B, where Smooth-QK is disabled, P-Reordering with the adopted Q-Mean auxiliary still reduces full-set MMLU regressions by 41-52%. A preliminary instruction-scheduling analysis projects a 35.4% critical-path latency reduction relative to BF16 by fusing the softmax normalizer into the PV Cube GEMM; on-hardware validation is left to future work.

AI.tldr: HiFA4是一种针对Ascend NPU的4位HIF4量化设计，通过Smooth-QK和P-Reordering两项技术，在保持FP16 softmax状态的同时提升LLM推理精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 在Ascend NPU上实现高效低比特LLM推理，同时缓解HIF4量化带来的精度损失与softmax计算不一致问题。
AI.method: 提出HiFA4：1）Smooth-QK对RoPE后Q/K进行静态逐通道重缩放，将量化难度转移至Q；2）P-Reordering直接用量化注意力权重P_hat计算softmax归一化因子，并融合进PV Cube GEMM；3）保持在线softmax状态为FP16。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B上恢复37.5%精度损失，MMLU回归数减少57%（1071→465）；Gemma2-9B误差控制在0.7pp内；其余模型MMLU回归减少41–52%；理论预测关键路径延迟降低35.4%。
AI.conclusion: HiFA4是首个面向Ascend平台的4-bit FlashAttention优化方案，兼顾精度、一致性与潜在性能增益，验证了量化注意力中归一化机制协同设计的重要性。

title: IDEAL-Bench: Indoor Dataset and Evaluation suite for Analyzing 3D Layout reasoning
summary: Spatial question answering is the dominant paradigm for evaluating spatial intelligence in Vision-Language Models (VLMs), but it leaves a complementary axis of spatial competence under-evaluated: holistic 3D layout inference, which predicts every visible object's pose and extent from a single image in a structured form. To this end, we introduce IDEAL-Bench, an evaluation suite that requires VLMs to predict structured 3D layouts on photorealistic indoor scenes across 10 room types, scored along five numerical dimensions and a perceptual render-and-compare protocol. By operating on semantically realistic scenes with full asset substitution under controlled lighting and viewpoint, IDEAL-Bench moves beyond CLEVR-style simple geometric primitives so that any image-space discrepancy reflects spatial reasoning alone. The benchmark is built on IDEAL-Scenes, a procedurally generated dataset of 1,000 re-renderable Blender environments with ground-truth layouts. Evaluating 15 prominent VLMs reveals three findings: the task remains substantially unsolved, with the strongest model reaching only 62.1/100 overall; all models exhibit a sharp asymmetry between object recognition and geometric regression, indicating that current VLMs are trained to describe scenes rather than to measure them; model rankings partially diverge from those on QA-based and primitive-reconstruction benchmarks: top-tier consensus holds, but mid-tier rankings shift substantially. Collectively, these findings establish IDEAL-Bench as a diagnostic suite, targeting the geometric and structural competencies that QA-based evaluation cannot surface, and paving the way towards more rigorous evaluation of spatial intelligence in next-generation VLMs. Together, these findings position IDEAL-Bench as a principled diagnostic for whether future VLMs achieve genuine spatial understanding rather than linguistic approximations of it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IDEAL-Bench，一个用于评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）在真实室内场景中进行整体3D布局推断能力的新基准，揭示当前VLMs在几何推理方面存在严重不足，强调需超越问答式评估以检验真正空间理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有空间智能评估主要依赖空间问答，但忽视了对整体3D布局推断能力的评测，即从单张图像中结构化地预测所有可见物体的姿态与尺寸。
AI.method: 构建IDEAL-Bench评估套件，基于1000个可重渲染的Blender生成室内场景（IDEAL-Scenes），要求VLMs预测结构化3D布局，并通过五个数值维度和感知渲染对比协议进行评分。
AI.result: 在15个主流VLM上测试发现：任务远未解决（最强模型仅62.1/100）；所有模型均表现出物体识别强而几何回归弱的显著不对称；模型排名在中游出现大幅变动，区别于QA和原始重建基准。
AI.conclusion: IDEAL-Bench作为诊断性基准，能有效揭示QA类评估无法覆盖的几何与结构能力缺陷，为下一代VLM的空间智能评估提供更严格、更本质的衡量标准。

title: On Preserving Geometrical Invariance for Superpixel Image Classification using Graph Transformer
summary: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Vision Transformer (ViT) for image classification exploit a dense grid of pixels containing redundant information. Consequently, for a larger image dataset, CNNs and ViTs face deployability challenges due to high computational complexity. Representing images as graphs of superpixels offers an efficient alternative that preserves key information while eliminating pixel-level redundancy. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been utilized on such graphs to perform image classification. However, GNNs are known to struggle with capturing long-range dependencies which is important in the domain of image classification. Furthermore, a majority of these superpixel-based image classification approaches do not explicitly preserve translation/rotation invariance. Nevertheless, preserving translation/rotation invariance is important for robust image classification. Thus, this paper proposes SuperGT, a Graph Transformer-based framework for image classification, which captures the long range dependencies, along with a pre-processing scheme that preserves translation/rotation invariance. We evaluate SuperGT on CIFAR-10 dataset and observe that it performs significantly better than many baselines. Furthermore, we note that the overall performance of SuperGT is comparable to the previous state-of-the-art model, namely, ShapeGNN, without relying on coordinates of the boundary points of each superpixel required by ShapeGNN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SuperGT，一种基于图Transformer的图像分类框架，通过超像素图表示图像以减少冗余，并设计预处理方法保持平移/旋转不变性，有效捕捉长程依赖，在CIFAR-10上性能媲美ShapeGNN但无需边界点坐标。
AI.motivation: CNN和ViT在处理大图像数据集时计算复杂度高；超像素图虽能降低冗余，但现有GNN方法难以建模长程依赖，且多数未显式保持平移/旋转不变性，影响分类鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出SuperGT框架：首先将图像构建成保持几何不变性的超像素图，再利用图Transformer建模节点间长程依赖；预处理阶段确保图结构对平移和旋转不变。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，SuperGT显著优于多个基线模型，性能与SOTA模型ShapeGNN相当，且不依赖超像素边界点坐标。
AI.conclusion: SuperGT验证了结合几何不变性预处理与图Transformer可有效提升超像素图上的图像分类性能，为轻量、鲁棒的视觉模型提供了新思路。

title: RADIO1D: Elastic Representations for Condensed Vision Modeling
comment: Published as main conference paper at ICML 2026
summary: This paper challenges the assumption that vision-language models (VLMs) require fixed patch-based 2D vision features. Analyzing fine-tuned vision encoders, we find that representations become increasingly abstract and less spatially coherent during VLM training. Notably, models trained with image-text alignment (such as SigLIP2) develop a small number of specialized tokens that effectively summarize global image content. Building on this, we introduce RADIO1D, which compresses images into a compact, variable-length 1D token sequence using multi-teacher knowledge distillation and an autoencoder design. The resulting representations exhibit strong hierarchical summarization, enabling accurate scene understanding - even with a single token - and support improved composition-aware image retrieval. In VLMs, RADIO1D provides flexible accuracy-efficiency tradeoffs through adjustable token counts, delivering competitive performance on diverse multimodal benchmarks with lower computational overhead and better accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了视觉-语言模型（VLMs）必须依赖固定二维图像块特征的假设，提出了一种新型一维图像表示方法RADIO1D，通过多教师知识蒸馏和自编码器设计，生成可变长度、层次化摘要的紧凑1D token序列，在保持甚至提升性能的同时显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs普遍采用固定patch-based 2D视觉特征，但作者发现其在训练中空间一致性下降、表征趋于抽象；同时观察到对齐训练（如SigLIP2）会自发产生少量能概括全局图像内容的专用token，启发设计更高效灵活的图像编码方式。
AI.method: 提出RADIO1D：一种基于多教师知识蒸馏与自编码器架构的图像压缩方法，将图像映射为可变长度的1D token序列；该序列具备强层次化摘要能力，并支持在VLM中按需调节token数量以实现精度-效率权衡。
AI.result: RADIO1D在多项多模态基准测试中达到有竞争力的性能，同时降低计算开销；单token即可实现准确场景理解，且提升组合感知的图像检索效果。
AI.conclusion: 图像无需固定二维结构表征；RADIO1D证明可变长度1D token序列既能保留关键语义信息，又提供更优的精度-效率平衡，为VLM视觉编码范式提供了新方向。

title: SAD-LoRA: Spectral Alignment for Low-Rank Knowledge Distillation
comment: ICML'26 workshop on CoLoRAI - The 2nd Workshop on Connecting Low-rank Representations in AI, 15 pages
summary: Distilling a fine-tuned teacher into a LoRA-adapted student is a standard recipe for parameter-efficient compression, but output-level KD does not explicitly control which rank-$r$ weight subspace the adapter occupies. We propose \textbf{SAD-LoRA} (\textbf{S}pectral \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{D}istillation), which selects this subspace from the data-weighted student-space reference update $\DWT\Sigx^{1/2}$ and maintains it during training via a differentiable principal-angle loss on $\colspan(B)$. We show that the data-weighted distillation error decomposes exactly into subspace misalignment, within-subspace coefficient mismatch, and irreducible rank residual; standard KD can affect the first term only indirectly through output gradients. On controlled synthetic problems with a flat teacher spectrum, SAD-LoRA reduces the subspace-misalignment term from $51\%$ to nearly zero and lifts final subspace alignment from $0.49$ to $1.00$. On RoBERTa-large to RoBERTa-base distillation across six GLUE tasks, SAD-LoRA improves rank efficiency: at $r{=}4$, it matches or beats the strongest included spectral baseline on five of six tasks, and at $r{=}8$ it gives the best result on SST-2 and CoLA. Ablations identify subspace alignment as the load-bearing component, while coefficient matching is auxiliary.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAD-LoRA方法，通过谱对齐蒸馏显式控制LoRA适配器的秩-r权重子空间，在合成和真实任务（如RoBERTa蒸馏）中显著提升子空间对齐度与下游性能。
AI.motivation: 现有输出级知识蒸馏（KD）无法显式控制LoRA学生模型所占据的低秩权重子空间，导致子空间错位问题影响压缩效率。
AI.method: 提出Spectral Alignment Distillation（SAD-LoRA）：基于数据加权的学生空间参考更新DWTΣx^{1/2}选择最优子空间，并通过可微的主角损失（principal-angle loss）约束B的列空间colspan(B)以维持该子空间。
AI.result: 在合成实验中，子空间错位项从51%降至近0，子空间对齐度从0.49提升至1.00；在RoBERTa-large→base蒸馏中，r=4时在6个GLUE任务中5个超越最强谱基线，r=8时在SST-2和CoLA上取得最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 子空间对齐是LoRA蒸馏中的关键因素，系数匹配作用次要；SAD-LoRA通过显式子空间控制显著提升参数高效蒸馏效果。

title: Probing Identity-Specific Motion Signatures: A Controlled Diagnostic Study
summary: Identity recognition (e.g., person, animal re-identification) has traditionally relied heavily on static appearance cues. Yet motion--consistent, individual-specific dynamics--can provide a complementary and potentially more robust signature, especially when appearance is weak or variable. This raises a fundamental question: when identity-specific motion cues are clearly present, to what extent do modern video models use them for recognition? To investigate this question, we conduct a systematic diagnostic study and introduce BALLER120, a controlled benchmark of 120 professional basketball players performing free-throws. By focusing on the same multi-phase action across individuals, BALLER120 reduces action-level variation and identity-correlated acquisition biases, enabling fine-grained analysis of identity-specific kinematic patterns. We find that modern video models can predict identity accurately from RGB videos, but often rely on static appearance cues such as faces and jersey regions, even when informative motion cues are available. Strikingly, when appearance is suppressed through silhouette-only or skeleton-only inputs, the same model architectures shift toward motion micro-patterns (e.g., foot placement and elbow bending). Despite containing less visual information, appearance-suppressed representations achieve competitive accuracy and stronger robustness to appearance shifts. Our qualitative analyses further show that appearance-suppressed models attend to distinctive motion patterns across individuals. Overall, our study demonstrates that identity-specific motion signatures are present, informative, and learnable, but modern video models may overlook them in favor of easier static shortcuts unless appearance cues are explicitly suppressed.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建BALLER120基准（120名篮球运动员罚球视频），系统探究现代视频模型是否利用身份特异的运动线索进行识别；发现模型默认依赖静态外观（如面部、球衣），但在外观被抑制（仅轮廓或骨骼）时，能有效学习并利用细微运动模式（如脚部位置、肘部弯曲），展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当身份特异的运动线索明显存在时，现代视频模型在多大程度上利用这些运动线索进行识别？传统方法过度依赖静态外观，而运动线索可能更鲁棒，但其实际被模型利用的程度尚不明确。
AI.method: 构建控制良好的BALLER120基准（统一动作——罚球），消除动作级差异与采集偏差；对比RGB、轮廓图、骨骼序列三种输入下主流视频模型的识别性能与注意力机制；结合定量评估与定性可视化分析模型决策依据。
AI.result: RGB输入下模型主要依赖静态外观（人脸、球衣）；轮廓/骨骼输入迫使模型转向学习身份特异的微运动模式（如肘部弯曲、脚部放置），虽信息量更少，却获得接近RGB的准确率和更强的外观变化鲁棒性；可视化证实外观抑制模型关注个体间运动差异。
AI.conclusion: 身份特异的运动签名确实存在、具有判别力且可被学习，但当前视频模型倾向于采用静态外观捷径；显式抑制外观可引导模型发掘并利用运动线索，为更鲁棒的身份识别提供新路径。

title: On the effectiveness of reward functions in reinforcement learning for confidence calibration of large language models
summary: In this paper, we consider the setting where large language models (LLMs) are trained using reinforcement learning (RL) to simultaneously improve reasoning accuracy and verbalize its confidence. Our reward scheme uses two functions for rewarding confidence verbalized by the LLM: one when the LLM is correct and a different one when the LLM is incorrect. With a poorly designed reward scheme, the LLM may be incentivized to answer incorrectly so that it can be confident that its answer is indeed incorrect, a phenomenon that we call confidence reward hacking. We propose the concept of non-hackable confidence reward schemes and define a spectrum of such reward schemes for RL confidence calibration training in LLMs. We demonstrate that selective confidence reward hacking can occur in practical datasets with reward schemes that are not designed to be non-hackable. We also demonstrate that the reward scheme with the best calibration to accuracy tradeoff depends on the dataset and the application, and propose using the reward scheme as a hyperparameter to optimize the tradeoffs in accordance to what is important for the application. The code of our experiments is available in https://anonymous.4open.science/r/rl-confidence-calibration-9ED4/README.md.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于大语言模型（LLM）强化学习训练中置信度校准的“不可被劫持”奖励机制，防止模型为获取高置信度奖励而故意答错（即‘置信度奖励劫持’），并指出奖励设计需作为超参数依任务与数据集优化。
AI.motivation: 现有RL训练中，若置信度奖励设计不当，LLM可能故意答错以获得高置信度奖励（即‘置信度奖励劫持’），损害可靠性与可信度。
AI.method: 定义并构建‘不可被劫持’的置信度奖励机制谱系，通过理论分析与实证实验验证不同奖励方案在多个数据集上的校准-准确率权衡及劫持风险。
AI.result: 发现实际数据集中存在选择性置信度奖励劫持现象；证明最优奖励方案依赖于具体数据集和应用场景；将奖励函数设为可调超参数可有效优化校准与准确率的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 置信度奖励设计必须避免劫持风险，‘不可被劫持’是基本要求；应将奖励方案视为关键超参数，在部署前依据应用需求进行针对性优化。
