AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向历史书法风格理解的细粒度数据集HCSU，旨在解决现有LVLM在书法风格感知任务中因模态混杂和标签扁平化导致的性能瓶颈；该数据集包含来自49位书法家、10个朝代的39,307个字符图像，并区分墨迹（Tie）与碑拓（Bei），提供层次化美学描述，支持细粒度风格判别与可解释审美推理；实验表明当前LVLM虽有一定能力，但仍严重依赖文本与源信息，难以基于笔触细节进行审美判断，揭示了多模态架构在文化遗产保护中的根本局限。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在书法风格细粒度感知任务中表现受限，主要由于数据集存在模态混杂（如墨迹与碑拓混杂）和标签扁平化问题，难以支撑文化传承所需的专家级视觉理解。
AI.method: 构建首个专用于历史书法风格理解的细粒度数据集HCSU：涵盖49位书家、10个朝代共39,307个字符图像，严格分离墨迹（Tie）与碑拓（Bei）两类模态，并引入专家撰写的层次化美学描述；设计两项评估协议——细粒度风格判别与可解释审美推理。
AI.result: 实验证明当前SOTA LVLM在该任务上虽具一定性能，但显著依赖字体、文本内容及来源线索，难以真正基于笔画细节进行审美判断，暴露其视觉-语义对齐与细粒度感知的根本缺陷。
AI.conclusion: HCSU基准揭示了当前多模态模型在文化遗产领域专家级视觉推理能力上的不足，为推动具备美学感知与解释能力的新一代LVLM提供了数据基础与评估范式。

title: ImputeECG: Deep Learning Reconstruction of Complete 12-Lead Electrocardiograms from Incomplete Recordings for Cardiac Assessment
summary: Complete digital 12-lead electrocardiograms (ECGs) are essential for AI-enabled cardiovascular assessment, yet many clinical ECG records, particularly those digitized from ECG images, remain incomplete because of short display formats, incomplete waveform digitization, lead loss, or signal corruption. We developed ImputeECG, a mask-conditioned one-dimensional Transformer autoencoder that completes 12-lead, 10-s ECGs while retaining all observed samples. The model was trained on PTB-XL and evaluated on PTB-XL and CPSC2018 under simulated incomplete settings, with additional real-world validation in a 43,633-record Kailuan clinical cohort after ECG image digitization. Metrics were computed over originally missing regions, with analyses of morphology and downstream diagnostic utility. On PTB-XL, ImputeECG reduced missing-region MAE by 41.7-51.0% and MSE by 54.0-63.7% versus the strongest baseline, with lower errors in R-peak timing, RR interval, QRS duration, QT interval, and P-wave, QRS-complex, and T-wave reconstruction. On CPSC2018, ImputeECG reduced MAE by 49.7-51.9%, supporting external generalization. In downstream multi-label classification, ImputeECG restored performance to 92.28% AUROC and 33.88% AUPRC in the most incomplete PTB-XL setting, approaching complete-ECG performance. On CPSC2018, completed ECGs achieved 94.75-95.89% AUROC and 78.83-81.86% AUPRC across settings. In Kailuan, ECG completion improved zero-shot sex prediction AUROC from 82.6% to 85.8% and reduced age prediction MAE from 10.72 to 9.87 years after image-based ECG digitization. These findings support ECG completion as a practical strategy for converting incomplete ECG records into AI-ready 12-lead, 10-s digital signals and extending the usable scope of ECG archives for digital cardiac assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImputeECG模型，一种基于掩码条件的一维Transformer自编码器，用于补全不完整的12导联、10秒心电图（ECG）信号，在多个数据集上显著提升补全精度与下游诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 临床中大量ECG记录（尤其由图像数字化而来）存在导联缺失、波形截断或信号损坏等问题，导致无法直接用于AI分析，亟需可靠且保真度高的ECG补全方法。
AI.method: 提出ImputeECG：一种掩码条件的一维Transformer自编码器，训练于PTB-XL数据集，并在PTB-XL、CPSC2018及真实世界Kailuan队列中验证；补全时保留所有观测样本，仅重建缺失区域。
AI.result: 在PTB-XL和CPSC2018上，MAE降低41.7–51.9%，MSE降低54.0–63.7%；关键波形特征（如R峰、QT间期等）重建更准；下游多标签分类AUROC达92.28–95.89%；Kailuan队列中性别预测AUROC从82.6%升至85.8%，年龄预测MAE从10.72降至9.87年。
AI.conclusion: ImputeECG能高效、保真地补全不完整ECG，显著提升其AI可用性，为拓展历史ECG档案的数字心血管评估价值提供了实用可行的技术路径。

title: Beyond Scene Priors: Fine-Grained Traffic Scene Reasoning with Benchmarking and Query-Guided Small-Object Focus
summary: In safety-critical traffic scenarios, answering complex questions relies on minute, localized visual cues. However, standard Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) tend to over-attend to backgrounds, overwhelming crucial small objects during visual-language alignment, a failure mode we term 'critical evidence dilution.' Furthermore, existing visual question answering (VQA) datasets rarely expose this flaw, as they lack large-scale, distractor-heavy evaluations that require pinpointing local evidence. To bridge this evaluation and architecture gap, we introduce the Fine-Grained Traffic Reasoning Benchmark (FGTR-Bench) and the Text-Guided Small-Object Reasoning MLLM (TSR-MLLM). FGTR-Bench comprises 40,236 single-image Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQs) created via multi-agent generation, consistency checks, and expert audits, alongside a disjoint 4,947-sample blind test split. To resolve evidence dilution, TSR-MLLM, built on Qwen3-VL-4B, uses a query-conditioned Text-Guided Small-Object Focus (TG-SOF) map. Applied once at the decoder boundary, the map adds sparse Top-K gated residuals to the most question-relevant vision slots while leaving text tokens unchanged. Together with lightweight decoder adaptation, TSR-MLLM preserves single-pass inference without external detectors or image re-encoding. Under matched settings, TSR-MLLM outperforms the strongest 4B baseline by 2.1 points on FGTR-Bench (74.1% overall), with larger gains on evidence-local tracks. Furthermore, it remains competitive on DriveQA-V (CARLA Signs) under greedy decoding without task-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FGTR-Bench基准和TSR-MLLM模型，解决交通场景中MLLM因背景干扰导致关键小目标证据被稀释的问题；TSR-MLLM通过文本引导的小目标聚焦机制提升细粒度推理能力，在新基准上显著超越基线。
AI.motivation: 标准多模态大语言模型在安全关键交通场景中易受背景干扰，忽略关键小目标（如交通标志、行人），造成‘关键证据稀释’；现有VQA数据集缺乏大规模、强干扰的细粒度评估基准。
AI.method: 构建含40,236题的细粒度交通推理基准FGTR-Bench，并提出基于Qwen3-VL-4B的TSR-MLLM模型，其核心是查询条件化的Text-Guided Small-Object Focus（TG-SOF）映射，在解码器边界引入稀疏Top-K门控残差，精准增强最相关视觉token，不修改文本token，且无需外部检测器或重编码。
AI.result: TSR-MLLM在FGTR-Bench上达74.1%准确率，较最强4B基线提升2.1点，尤其在证据定位子任务中增益更大；在DriveQA-V（CARLA Signs）上无任务微调下仍保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: TSR-MLLM有效缓解关键证据稀释问题，验证了细粒度视觉聚焦机制对安全关键交通VQA的重要性，FGTR-Bench为未来研究提供了高干扰、高精度评估新标准。

title: Hyperparameter Transfer in Graph Neural Networks
summary: The performance of deep learning models crucially depends on the settings of hyperparameters like learning rate, initialization scale, and weight decay. Hyperparameter transfer aims to make near-optimal hyperparameter settings consistent across model scale, so that large models can be optimized by proxy tuning their smaller, cheaper-to-optimize counterparts. While transfer principles are well-studied in the context of dense neural networks in language and vision tasks, they remain comparatively under-explored for graph neural networks (GNNs). We develop and validate a transfer parameterization for GNNs trained with SGD, Adam, and AdamW. Through theoretical scaling analyses and controlled experiments, we show that the proposed parameterization yields stable feature updates, learning rate transfer, and improved performance as width and depth increase. For SGD, we identify graph-dependent first-layer correction factors and show that their use can accelerate early training in graphs with sparse bag-of-words inputs. For Adam, we explore how different message passing normalizations affect early- and late-training transfer behavior, illustrating the importance of message passing normalization and advocating for an associated hyperparameter. For AdamW, we adapt a parameterization that allows for the joint transfer of weight decay and learning rate. Together, these results provide a practical recipe for scaling GNNs across a variety of learning tasks and training scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于图神经网络（GNN）的超参数迁移参数化方法，支持SGD、Adam和AdamW优化器，在宽度与深度扩展时保持稳定训练与性能提升。
AI.motivation: 超参数迁移在稠密神经网络中已有研究，但在图神经网络（GNN）中尚缺乏系统探索；需建立跨模型规模一致且高效的超参数设置策略。
AI.method: 结合理论缩放分析与受控实验，为SGD、Adam、AdamW分别设计GNN专用的超参数迁移参数化：SGD引入图依赖的一层校正因子；Adam分析消息传递归一化对迁移的影响；AdamW联合迁移学习率与权重衰减。
AI.result: 所提参数化方法实现了稳定的特征更新、学习率可迁移性，并随GNN宽度和深度增加提升性能；SGD校正因子加速稀疏图输入下的早期训练；Adam下消息传递归一化被证实关键；AdamW支持权重衰减与学习率协同迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为GNN在多种任务与训练场景下的规模化提供了实用、理论支撑的超参数迁移方案。

title: Perceiving Better Moments: Cover Frame Reselection and Enhancement for Live Photos with the Live2K Dataset
summary: Modern smartphones capture Live Photos, short video bursts surrounding a still image, offering a dynamic and engaging photographic experience. However, the cover photo and video components are generated by two distinct imaging pipelines: the photo stream undergoes full computational photography processing, while the video stream is constrained by real-time efficiency and heavy compression. This intrinsic separation produces a substantial quality gap in resolution, color fidelity, and dynamic range between the cover photo and video frames. When users reselect an alternative frame from the video to replace an imperfect cover, the chosen frame often suffers from severe degradation, making direct replacement visually unsatisfactory. Restoring such frames requires simultaneous enhancement of spatial detail and color appearance, a task considerably more challenging than ordinary super-resolution or color enhancement. To address this, we define the Live Photo Cover Frame Reselection and Enhancement (LPRE) task, which leverages the intrinsic cues available within each Live Photo: the high-quality cover image as a structural and color reference, the user-reselected low-quality frame as the reconstruction target and several adjacent video frames providing temporal cues. Building upon this formulation, we construct Live2K, a real-world dataset of 2,042 Live Photos, and develop a unified one-stage baseline that integrates multi-frame fusion, guided color enhancement and super-resolution, establishing the first benchmark for Live Photo enhancement research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Live Photo Cover Frame Reselection and Enhancement (LPRE)任务，利用高质量封面图像作为参考，结合用户重选的低质帧及相邻视频帧，实现结构、色彩与细节的联合增强；构建了真实世界数据集Live2K，并设计了一阶段多帧融合增强基线模型。
AI.motivation: Live Photos中封面照片与视频帧因使用不同成像流程导致显著质量差异（分辨率、色彩保真度、动态范围），用户重选视频帧替换封面时视觉效果差，需同步提升空间细节与色彩表现。
AI.method: 定义LPRE任务，利用封面图提供结构与色彩先验、重选帧为重建目标、邻近视频帧提供时序信息；构建含2042组Live Photos的真实数据集Live2K；设计统一的一阶段模型，集成多帧融合、引导式色彩增强与超分辨率。
AI.result: 建立了首个Live Photo增强基准，所提一阶段基线模型在Live2K上验证了多线索联合增强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LPRE任务及Live2K数据集填补了Live Photo内容一致性增强的研究空白，提出的多帧引导增强范式为后续工作提供了基础框架与评估标准。

title: Beyond Modality Fusion: Deep Ensembles for Multimodal Classification
summary:
In multimodal classification, late-fusion approaches classify concatenated modality-specific features extracted by unimodal neural networks.
  When modality imbalance is pronounced, various regularization techniques have been proposed to balance the learning process and overcome the inferior performance of late-fusion networks.
  In contrast, this work demonstrates that multimodal data can be effectively classified without any explicit modality fusion, using deep ensembles of unimodal networks.
  We systematically compare deep ensembles to late-fusion networks at equal parameter count and show that ensembles consistently outperform state-of-the-art late-fusion methods designed to address modality imbalance.
  This advantage also holds over intermediate-fusion techniques we evaluated and over hybrid methods that combine unimodal and multimodal predictions.
  We propose and empirically validate a method for selecting the number of models per modality in an ensemble, avoiding computationally expensive exhaustive search.
  Under extreme modality imbalance and small ensemble sizes, the heuristic indicates that ensembles of unimodal models trained solely on the stronger modality are preferable; as the ensemble scales up, incorporating models from the weaker modality becomes beneficial.
  Both predictions align with our empirical findings.
  To systematically explore the challenges of optimizing multimodal models, we propose a synthetic multimodal framework that allows control over both the number of modalities and their predictive strength; our findings are consistent across synthetic and real-world datasets.
  Finally, by fitting scaling laws to bimodal datasets, we estimate the asymptotic performance of ensembles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度集成（deep ensembles）的单模态网络替代显式模态融合方法进行多模态分类，在模态不平衡场景下显著优于现有晚融合、中融合及混合方法，并给出模型数量选择的启发式策略。
AI.motivation: 针对多模态分类中模态不平衡导致晚融合方法性能下降的问题，探索无需显式模态融合的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用深度集成的单模态神经网络，系统比较其与晚融合、中融合及混合方法的性能；提出基于模态预测强度和规模的集成规模选择启发式方法；构建可控的合成多模态框架验证结论。
AI.result: 深度集成在参数量相当条件下持续超越先进晚融合方法；启发式策略能有效指导各模态模型数量分配；在合成与真实数据集上结果一致；通过缩放律估计了集成的渐近性能。
AI.conclusion: 无需显式模态融合的单模态深度集成是处理模态不平衡多模态分类任务更优且更鲁棒的范式。

title: SeeMe: Mitigating Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models through Effective Visual Token Engineering
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in visual understanding tasks such as image captioning and visual question answering. However, they remain susceptible to hallucinations, generating content that is inconsistent with the actual visual input. Existing methods primarily intervene at the decoding stage, while overlooking a critical source of hallucinations: irrelevant or noisy visual tokens that mislead the decoding process. To address this issue, we propose SeeMe, a training-free framework that introduces the concept of feature engineering from traditional machine learning into LVLMs. SeeMe restructures visual tokens through a three-stage token engineering process to suppress hallucination sources while preserving informative visual evidence. Experiments on MME, POPE, and AMBER benchmarks across four LVLMs demonstrate that SeeMe consistently reduces hallucinations and improves output consistency, providing a novel perspective for mitigating hallucinations in LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeeMe框架，通过无需训练的三阶段视觉令牌工程来减少大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）中的幻觉现象，提升输出一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLMs易产生与图像内容不符的幻觉，主因是解码阶段受无关或噪声视觉令牌误导，而当前方法多聚焦解码干预，忽视视觉令牌本身的问题。
AI.method: 提出SeeMe——一种无需训练的框架，将传统机器学习中的特征工程思想引入LVLMs，通过三阶段视觉令牌重构（筛选、重加权、重组）抑制幻觉源并保留关键视觉信息。
AI.result: 在MME、POPE和AMBER三个基准上对四个LVLMs进行实验，SeeMe显著降低幻觉率并提高输出一致性。
AI.conclusion: SeeMe为LVLM幻觉缓解提供了新视角，证明在输入表征层面进行视觉令牌工程的有效性与通用性。

title: Uncertainty-aware damage identification in short-span bridges via physics-informed variational autoencoder
summary: Vibration-based damage identification in civil infrastructure is a challenging, ill-posed inverse problem due to measurement noise, sparse sensor arrays, and environmental variability. While deep learning is powerful for system identification, deterministic approaches lack reliable uncertainty quantification and can yield physically inconsistent results. This work proposes a robust probabilistic Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) framework: a physics-informed Gaussian copula variational autoencoder (PI-GCVAE) for structural health monitoring (SHM). First, we eliminate the need for data-driven surrogates by embedding a differentiable numerical eigenvalue solver directly into the VAE architecture. This ensures that latent space samples satisfy the governing equations of structural dynamics, reducing the trainable parameter space and improving generalization. Second, we replace the conventional independence assumption of latent variables with a Gaussian copula. This model captures complex, physics-dependent spatial cross-correlations between adjacent structural elements, defining feasible solutions while accounting for inherent system variability and measurement errors. Third, compared with alternatives such as Gaussian mixtures, our copula-based VAE provides an efficient distributional model for high-dimensional, strongly correlated latent spaces. We validate the approach using a synthetic dataset of a simply supported bridge subjected to various damage scenarios and corrupted with stochastic Gaussian noise. Synthetic data enables exhaustive validation against ground-truth stiffness values unavailable in practice. Results demonstrate that the PI-GCVAE accurately recovers the true posterior distribution, achieving 77.2% coverage. The proposed framework provides a reliable, scalable tool for early-stage damage diagnosis in operating bridges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理信息驱动的高斯copula变分自编码器（PI-GCVAE），用于桥梁结构健康监测，通过嵌入可微数值特征值求解器和高斯copula建模，实现对损伤参数后验分布的准确估计，并在含噪合成数据上验证了其可靠性与物理一致性。
AI.motivation: 振动基损伤识别面临测量噪声、传感器稀疏和环境变化等挑战，传统深度学习方法缺乏不确定性量化能力且易产生违背物理规律的结果。
AI.method: 提出物理信息高斯copula变分自编码器（PI-GCVAE）：1）将可微数值特征值求解器嵌入VAE架构，保证隐空间样本满足结构动力学控制方程；2）用高斯copula替代隐变量独立性假设，建模相邻结构单元间的物理相关性；3）相比高斯混合模型，更高效地建模高维强相关隐空间。
AI.result: 在含高斯噪声的简支桥合成损伤数据集上验证，PI-GCVAE准确恢复真实后验分布，覆盖率达77.2%，具备良好物理一致性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PI-GCVAE为在役桥梁早期损伤诊断提供了一种可靠、可扩展的概率性SciML新框架，兼具物理可解释性与不确定性量化能力。

title: CritiqueDriveVLM: From Verifier-Guided Reinforcement Learning to Latent Thought Distillation for Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end Vision-Language Models (VLMs) show immense potential in autonomous driving. However, standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) often suffers from reasoning hallucinations and conservative biases. While traditional tool-augmented frameworks and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) approaches mitigate these issues, they incur exorbitant token consumption and unacceptable latency, rendering real-time deployment impractical. To resolve this reliability-efficiency trade-off, we propose CritiqueDriveVLM, a novel unified three-stage framework internalizing reasoning directly into the VLM. First, we introduce Critique-Driven Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning (RL) guided by a multi-dimensional verifier. By providing granular scalar feedback and a multi-turn penalty, we force the policy to internalize logical deduction, cultivating a robust System-2 Teacher that achieves high accuracy without fragile external tools. Subsequently, we propose Latent Thought Distillation to overcome the latency bottleneck. By aligning the Student's latent representations with the Teacher's fully converged reasoning states, we compress deep logical capabilities into a fast, CoT-free System-1 Student. Extensive experiments on the widely-used DriveLMM-01 benchmark demonstrate remarkable improvements. Compared to the base model, our tool-free Teacher significantly boosts Multiple Choice Quality (MCQ) from 55.54% to a state-of-the-art 76.54%. Crucially, our distilled Student preserves competitive reasoning depth while drastically minimizing generation length to an average of merely 28 tokens. This slashes inference latency by 88% (from 3482 ms to 416 ms), paving a highly robust pathway for low-latency autonomous driving.Our source code is available at https://github.com/MICLAB-BUPT/CritiqueDriveVLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CritiqueDriveVLM，一种无需外部工具、内化推理能力的三阶段端到端视觉语言模型框架，通过批判驱动多轮强化学习与潜在思维蒸馏，在保持高推理质量的同时大幅降低延迟，显著提升自动驾驶场景下的可靠性与实时性。
AI.motivation: 标准监督微调易导致推理幻觉与保守偏差；传统工具增强与链式思维方法虽缓解问题，但开销大、延迟高，难以实时部署。
AI.method: 提出三阶段框架：1）批判驱动的多轮强化学习（Critique-Driven Multi-Turn RL），利用多维验证器提供细粒度标量反馈与多轮惩罚，训练鲁棒的System-2教师模型；2）潜在思维蒸馏（Latent Thought Distillation），将教师模型收敛后的推理状态对齐至学生模型隐空间，压缩为快速、无CoT的System-1学生模型。
AI.result: 在DriveLMM-01基准上，教师模型MCQ准确率从55.54%提升至76.54%；学生模型平均生成长度仅28词元，推理延迟从3482ms降至416ms（降幅88%），同时保持竞争力的推理深度。
AI.conclusion: CritiqueDriveVLM成功解决了VLM在自动驾驶中可靠性与效率的权衡问题，为低延迟、高鲁棒的端到端驾驶理解提供了新范式。

title: CollabEval: Statistically Efficient Collaborative Model Evaluation via Matrix Completion
summary: Evaluating generative AI models is a routine, but resource-intensive, process that is conducted over and over again during the course of model development. In this work, we propose Collaborative Evaluation (CollabEval), a simple, effective, and principled method for exploiting dependencies between historical runs of different models on the same tasks to improve statistical efficiency. Specifically, our approach treats model evaluation as a matrix completion problem over an $M \times N$ matrix of evaluation scores, where $M$ is the total number of models and $N$ is the total number of evaluation prompts. We assume that a subset of these $M$ models are targeted for evaluation. For these target models only a small fraction, $p$, of prompts has been annotated with evaluation scores. Leveraging recent results in prediction-powered inference, we build a low-rank approximation of the score matrix, and use the reconstructed values as control variates in a manner that guarantees unbiased estimates of the true evaluation metric mean, in addition to statistically valid confidence intervals. Empirically, across a wide range of datasets, models, and sparsity levels $p$, we find that CollabEval substantially reduces the mean confidence interval size, and the mean squared error of the point estimate, compared to baseline methods at the same annotation budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CollabEval方法，通过将模型评估建模为评分矩阵的低秩补全问题，并利用历史评估数据作为控制变量，显著提升统计效率，在相同标注预算下减小置信区间和估计误差。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI模型评估过程重复且资源消耗大，亟需提高统计效率以减少标注成本。
AI.method: 将模型评估视为M×N评分矩阵的补全问题，利用预测驱动推断构建低秩近似，并将其作为控制变量实现无偏估计和有效置信区间。
AI.result: 在多种数据集、模型和稀疏度下，CollabEval显著减小了置信区间宽度和点估计均方误差，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CollabEval是一种简单、有效且原理严谨的方法，能充分利用历史评估数据提升当前评估的统计效率。

title: Topology-Driven Transferability Estimation for 3D Medical Vision Foundation Models
summary: The growing number of medical vision foundation models highlights the need for effective model selection. However, mainstream selection methods rely on exhaustive fine-tuning, which is computationally expensive. Most of the existing Transferability Estimation (TE) metrics are primarily designed for image-level classification. They fail to preserve spatial relationships and fine-grained boundary details, which are crucial for the segmentation task. Additionally, while image-level tasks typically process a single feature vector per input, dense prediction tasks in 3D medical imaging require voxel-wise evaluation against dense annotations. To bridge these gaps, we propose a \textit{non-parametric, topology-driven} framework that estimates transferability directly from the alignment between the sparse 1-skeleton graph of dense features and semantic labels via Minimum Spanning Trees (MST). We decouple the alignment into two complementary geometric scales: Local Boundary-Aware Topological Consistency (LBTC) to assess boundary separability, where we prove that the MST leakage rate serves as a finite-sample lower bound on the Bayes error; and Global Representation Topology Divergence (GRTD) to evaluate the overall anatomical layout. Crucially, we formally justify a counterintuitive mechanism: Although without fine-tuning, the randomly initialized segmentation decoder acts as a topology-preserving spatial projector, reducing the variance of pairwise distance estimates and stabilizing global alignment evaluation. Fused via a task-adaptive gating mechanism, these dual metrics adapt to diverse clinical complexities. Evaluated on a large-scale benchmark of 114,000 3D medical volumes across diverse anatomical tasks, our topological framework achieves state-of-the-art transferability estimation with an average weighted Kendall (outperforming by 0.36) while accelerating evaluation by 56 times.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需微调、基于拓扑的非参数方法，用于评估医学3D分割任务中视觉基础模型的可迁移性，通过最小生成树对齐特征图与语义标签的1-骨架图，分解为局部边界感知一致性和全局表征拓扑差异两个指标，并在大规模数据上实现SOTA性能和56倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移性估计方法主要面向图像级分类，难以保留空间关系和细粒度边界信息，且不适用于需要体素级预测的3D医学分割任务；同时主流模型选择依赖计算昂贵的全量微调。
AI.method: 提出一种非参数、拓扑驱动的框架：利用最小生成树（MST）对齐密集特征的稀疏1-骨架图与语义标签；分解为两个互补几何尺度指标——局部边界感知拓扑一致性（LBTC，以MST泄漏率作为贝叶斯误差下界）和全局表征拓扑差异（GRTD）；引入随机初始化分割解码头作为拓扑保持的空间投影器；通过任务自适应门控机制融合双指标。
AI.result: 在涵盖114,000个3D医学影像的大规模基准上，该方法达到SOTA迁移性估计性能（平均加权Kendall提升0.36），评估速度提升56倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提拓扑驱动框架有效解决了3D医学分割中迁移性估计的关键挑战，在精度与效率间取得显著平衡，为医学视觉基础模型的选择提供了可靠、高效的新范式。

title: KVpop -- Key-Value Cache Compression with Predictive Online Pruning
summary: Key-value (KV) cache growth is a major bottleneck in autoregressive decoding, as memory and bandwidth scale linearly with context length. Existing KV eviction methods often rely on static heuristics or proxy scores, which poorly track future token utility and cause brittle eviction as relevance shifts. To address this, we introduce KVpop, which learns a fixed-budget KV eviction policy by directly supervising the keep-or-drop decision. The scorer is trained against a novel future-attention target, computed efficiently without materializing dense attention maps. We further introduce a delayed memory-based scorer that, uniquely among learned eviction methods, defers scoring for a fixed number of steps to exploit near-future context. On AIME and HMMT mathematical reasoning, KVpop retains 98% of full-attention performance on Qwen3-4B at 75% KV cache compression and 97% at 88% compression, consistently outperforming established eviction baselines. Qwen3-8B shows even stronger results, reaching near-full teacher performance. These results show that supervising eviction with future-attention signals cuts memory costs while maintaining quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KVpop，一种基于未来注意力信号监督的键值缓存淘汰方法，通过学习固定预算下的保留/丢弃决策，在大幅压缩KV缓存（最高88%）的同时几乎不损失生成质量，尤其在数学推理任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存淘汰方法依赖静态启发式或代理分数，难以准确预测token未来效用，导致淘汰策略脆弱、性能下降。
AI.method: 提出KVpop：1）设计基于未来注意力的新型监督目标，无需显式构建稠密注意力图即可高效计算；2）引入延迟记忆型打分器，在固定步数后才进行淘汰打分，以利用近未来上下文信息；3）端到端学习固定预算下的二元淘汰策略。
AI.result: 在AIME和HMMT数学推理任务上，Qwen3-4B在75%和88% KV缓存压缩率下分别保持98%和97%全注意力性能；Qwen3-8B更接近教师模型性能，显著优于各类基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 直接利用未来注意力信号监督KV淘汰决策，可有效降低内存开销而不牺牲生成质量，为长上下文自回归解码提供了高效可靠的新范式。

title: Hierarchical Multi-to-Single-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Disruption Prediction in EAST
summary: Plasma disruption is a critical threat to tokamak safety. Existing data-driven predictors mainly rely on time-series diagnostic signals, while visible images provide complementary spatial cues including plasma deformation, local brightening, and radiation-structure evolution. Although the image modality improves the model's discriminative capability, it also substantially increases the computational cost during inference. To address this issue, we propose a hierarchical multi-to-single-modal knowledge distillation framework for disruption prediction on a synchronized EAST multimodal dataset. During training, visible images and time-series signals are used to train a multimodal teacher, which learns disruption precursor representations through Transformer-based encoders and a prototype-guided spatiotemporal hypergraph module. During inference, only the time-series student is retained, with multimodal knowledge transferred through graph-structure-level, representation-level, and decision-level distillation. On the 640-discharge EAST dataset, the results demonstrate that the proposed framework can preserve the discriminative advantages of multimodal learning while substantially reducing inference cost, and providing an effective route for efficient disruption prediction in EAST. The source code of this paper will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenFusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层多模态到单模态知识蒸馏框架，利用EAST装置的同步多模态数据（可见光图像+时序信号）训练多模态教师模型，并将知识蒸馏至仅依赖时序信号的学生模型，兼顾预测性能与推理效率。
AI.motivation: 等离子体破裂严重威胁托卡马克运行安全；现有数据驱动预测器主要依赖时序诊断信号，而可见光图像虽能提供有益空间信息（如形变、局部亮化、辐射结构演化），却显著增加推理计算开销。
AI.method: 构建基于Transformer编码器和原型引导时空超图模块的多模态教师模型；设计图结构级、表征级和决策级三层知识蒸馏机制，将教师模型从可见光图像与时序信号中学习的破坏前兆表征迁移至仅使用时序信号的学生模型。
AI.result: 在640次EAST放电数据集上验证，该框架在保持多模态判别优势的同时大幅降低推理成本，实现了高效可靠的破裂预测。
AI.conclusion: 所提分层知识蒸馏框架为在资源受限环境下部署高性能破裂预测模型提供了有效可行的技术路径。

title: Computing Monetary Risk Measures in Linear Time
summary: Monetary risk measures have gained popularity for expressing decision-makers' risk aversion. Value-at-Risk (VaR) and Conditional-Value-at-Risk (CVaR), in particular, are used commonly for this purpose. This paper proposes new efficient algorithms to compute these risk measures for a discrete random variable in expected linear time with respect to the size of its domain. First, we propose a QuickVaR algorithm that computes the VaR of a discrete random variable. Then, we leverage QuickVaR to propose QuickDivergence, an algorithm for computing a class of $\varphi$-divergence risk measures, including the popular CVaR risk measure. The QuickVaR algorithm adapts the well-known Quickselect algorithm, while QuickDivergence builds on polymatroid optimization algorithms. Numerical results show that our new algorithms offer an order-of-magnitude speedup for large domains, and a library implementation of the algorithms is available at https://github.com/RiskAverseRL/RiskMeasures.jl.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新算法QuickVaR和QuickDivergence，可在期望线性时间内高效计算离散随机变量的VaR和φ-散度类风险度量（如CVaR），显著提升计算速度。
AI.motivation: 现有VaR和CVaR等货币风险度量的计算效率不足，尤其在大规模定义域下亟需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 基于Quickselect算法设计QuickVaR计算VaR；结合多项式优化算法，利用QuickVaR构建QuickDivergence以计算φ-散度类风险度量（含CVaR）。
AI.result: 所提算法在大规模定义域上实现数量级加速；开源库RiskMeasures.jl已提供实现。
AI.conclusion: QuickVaR与QuickDivergence为离散风险度量提供了理论最优时间复杂度与实际高效性的统一解决方案。

title: HeartVolMesh: Cardiac Volumetric Mesh Reconstruction via Covariance-Guided Graph Deformation
summary: Accurate patient-specific tetrahedral cardiac meshes are essential for in-silico trials, yet common segmentation-then-modelling pipelines can blur thin-wall anatomy and offer limited cross-case correspondence. We propose HeartVolMesh, which lifts each template vertex to an anisotropic Gaussian kernel and uses a 3D CNN-GNN to predict per-vertex displacements and Cholesky-parameterized covariances from volumetric images. Training is guided by a covariance-aware negative log-likelihood loss with lightweight mesh regularization. For volumetric meshing, we warp a fixed tetrahedral template to the reconstructed surface via staged alignment, non-rigid registration, and deformation propagation, preserving connectivity and correspondence by construction, with resolution controlled by template density. Experiments show consistent gains over deformation-based baselines in surface mesh accuracy and volumetric mesh fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HeartVolMesh方法，通过将模板顶点提升为各向异性高斯核，并利用3D CNN-GNN预测每顶点位移与Cholesky参数化协方差，实现从体数据图像生成高保真、患者特异的四面体心脏网格。
AI.motivation: 现有分割后建模流程易模糊心壁薄结构，且跨病例对应性差，难以满足虚拟临床试验对精确患者特异性心脏网格的需求。
AI.method: HeartVolMesh采用模板顶点升维至各向异性高斯核，结合3D CNN-GNN预测顶点位移与协方差；训练使用协方差感知的负对数似然损失与轻量网格正则化；体网格生成通过分阶段配准（对齐、非刚性配准、形变传播）将固定四面体模板映射到重建表面，保证拓扑一致性与分辨率可控。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在表面网格精度与体网格保真度上均持续优于基于形变的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HeartVolMesh实现了高精度、高对应性、可扩展的心脏体网格重建，为个体化心脏建模和虚拟临床试验提供了可靠新范式。

title: FAST: A Holistic Framework for Optimizing Memory-I/O, Computation, and Sampling in Temporal GNN Training
summary: Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNNs) are widely used for learning from dynamic graphs in applications such as recommendation, social network analysis, and traffic forecasting. However, scaling TGNN training to large dynamic graphs remains challenging due to three intertwined bottlenecks: memory I/O, irregular computation, and temporal neighbor sampling. Existing systems often optimize these stages in isolation, leaving substantial performance headroom on the table. We present FAST, a holistic framework that accelerates end-to-end TGNN training by jointly optimizing sampling, memory I/O, and computation. FAST introduces SlimCache, which exploits within-batch compression and cross-batch caching to reduce host-device data movement under limited GPU memory budgets. It further designs thread-efficient graph operators tailored to sparse temporal subgraphs, improving GPU cache locality and reducing the latency of aggregation and edge softmax. In addition, FAST employs a topology-aware sampling strategy that improves CPU cache locality and accelerates temporal neighbor sampling. Extensive experiments on real-world large dynamic graphs show that FAST achieves an average of 2.1x (up to 4.7x) speedup over state-of-the-art systems without sacrificing model accuracy.

AI.tldr: FAST is a holistic framework that accelerates end-to-end Temporal Graph Neural Network (TGNN) training by jointly optimizing temporal neighbor sampling, memory I/O, and computation—achieving up to 4.7× speedup on large dynamic graphs without accuracy loss.
AI.motivation: Scaling TGNN training to large dynamic graphs is hindered by three intertwined bottlenecks: memory I/O, irregular computation, and temporal neighbor sampling; existing systems optimize them in isolation, leaving performance untapped.
AI.method: FAST introduces three key techniques: (1) SlimCache for within-batch compression and cross-batch caching to reduce GPU host-device data movement; (2) thread-efficient graph operators tailored to sparse temporal subgraphs to improve GPU cache locality and reduce aggregation/edge softmax latency; (3) a topology-aware sampling strategy to enhance CPU cache locality and accelerate temporal neighbor sampling.
AI.result: FAST achieves an average 2.1× (up to 4.7×) speedup over state-of-the-art TGNN systems on real-world large dynamic graphs, with no model accuracy degradation.
AI.conclusion: Joint optimization of sampling, memory I/O, and computation is essential for efficient TGNN training; FAST demonstrates significant acceleration while preserving accuracy, establishing a new system-level baseline for scalable temporal GNNs.

title: Beyond Random Sampling: Distribution-Aware Alignment for Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Precise medical image segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis and treatment planning, yet relies heavily on expensive expert annotations. Semi-supervised medical image segmentation (SSMIS) offers a cost-effective solution but typically operates under the assumption of independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) data, defaulting to random sampling. While statistically valid at scale, this strategy suffers from severe representation bias in low-data regimes, failing to capture the heterogeneous medical data manifold. To address this, we propose a highly data-efficient framework driven by distribution alignment. First, we introduce an offline Distribution-Aware Sample Selection strategy. By leveraging Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) and our designed Density-K-Center algorithm, we explicitly identify representative structural anchors, establishing a more representative labeled domain. Second, to bridge the remaining distribution gap, we propose the Memory-guided Copy-Paste (MCP) module. Tailored for the inherent class imbalance in medical scans, MCP leverages a semantic memory mechanism to retrieve historically consistent priors for cross-domain alignment, encouraging semantic consistency. Coupled with an easy-to-hard progressive schedule, this framework effectively mitigates early-stage pseudo-label noise. Extensive experiments on six diverse 2D and 3D datasets demonstrate strong segmentation performance, particularly in extremely low-labeled scenarios (\eg, 1/16 ratio).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向半监督医学图像分割的高效数据利用框架，通过分布感知采样和记忆引导的复制粘贴模块，缓解低标注数据下的表征偏差与伪标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督医学图像分割方法假设数据独立同分布，采用随机采样，在小样本场景下难以刻画医学数据的异质流形结构，导致表征偏差。
AI.method: 提出两阶段策略：1）离线分布感知样本选择，结合视觉基础模型与Density-K-Center算法选取代表性结构锚点；2）内存引导的Copy-Paste（MCP）模块，利用语义记忆机制实现跨域对齐，并辅以易到难渐进训练策略抑制伪标签噪声。
AI.result: 在六个2D/3D医学图像数据集上验证了方法有效性，尤其在极低标注比（如1/16）下显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 分布对齐驱动的框架可大幅提升半监督医学图像分割在低资源场景下的性能与鲁棒性，为临床落地提供更实用的解决方案。

title: Functional Bilevel Optimization for Predictive Fairness
summary: When sensitive attributes are continuous and high-dimensional $-$ demographic score vectors, posteriors over attributes, age or income profiles $-$ enforcing full statistical independence is often too restrictive, and existing relaxations rely on indirect dependence penalties or adversarial schemes that do not directly target the fairness-accuracy trade-off. We instead consider mean demographic parity through DPVar, the variance of the conditional-mean prediction given the sensitive attribute, and show that optimizing it yields a functional bilevel problem. We propose two algorithms for this problem: FBO, which uses a closed-form adjoint we derive for the squared-loss case to obtain an exact hypergradient, and ITD, which differentiates through unrolled inner steps and extends beyond squared loss. On synthetic data and a new semi-synthetic benchmark built from 60 tabular regression datasets, both methods achieve the lowest or near-lowest aggregate fairness-accuracy regret, and consistently match or outperform strong HSIC, adversarial, linear-dependence, and generalized-DP baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对连续高维敏感属性的新型公平性约束方法DPVar（条件均值预测关于敏感属性的方差），通过优化DPVar实现均值人口统计学公平，并设计了两种求解该双层优化问题的算法FBO和ITD，在多个基准上展现出优越的公平-精度权衡性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对连续高维敏感属性（如人口统计得分、后验分布、年龄或收入曲线）施加完全统计独立性过于严格，而间接依赖惩罚或对抗方法未能直接建模公平性与准确性的权衡。
AI.method: 提出DPVar作为均值人口统计学公平的新度量，将其优化建模为函数型双层优化问题；设计两种求解算法：FBO（基于平方损失推导闭式伴随方程以获得精确超梯度）和ITD（通过展开内层迭代进行微分，适用于更广义损失）。
AI.result: 在合成数据及基于60个表格回归数据集构建的新半合成基准上，FBO和ITD均取得最低或次低的公平-精度综合遗憾，持续优于HSIC、对抗法、线性依赖及广义DP等强基线。
AI.conclusion: DPVar提供了一种更灵活、可优化且理论清晰的连续敏感属性公平性建模范式，所提算法在实践中实现了更优的公平性与预测精度平衡。

title: AdaptiveSplat:Texture Aware Controllable 3D Gaussian Allocation for Feed-Forward Reconstruction
summary: Current feed-forward 3D reconstruction methods predict pixel aligned Gaussian primitives, resulting in highly redundant representations. A natural solution is to prune the redundant Gaussians, but naive pruning introduces severe artifacts and often requires inference time fine-tuning, breaking the feed-forward paradigm. Based on previous works, high frequency regions require more Gaussian primitives, while low frequency regions can be represented with significantly fewer primitives. Motivated by this, we propose a novel approach to explicitly control the number of Gaussians by leveraging local texture information. Our approach achieves this through three key components: (1) texture estimation to capture spatial variation in scene detail, (2) texture-aware pruning that removes redundant Gaussians from low frequency regions, and (3) an adaptive Gaussian head that predicts the modified attributes of the retained primitives without breaking the feed-forward paradigm. Experiments on RE10K, ACID, DL3DV, Tanks and Temples, and DTU demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, while ablation studies validate the contributions of its key components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部纹理信息显式控制高斯 primitives 数量的3D重建方法，通过纹理估计、纹理感知剪枝和自适应高斯头，在保持前馈范式的同时减少冗余表示并提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3D重建方法生成像素对齐的高斯基元，导致高度冗余；而简单剪枝会引入严重伪影且常需推理时微调，破坏前馈特性。高频区域需更多高斯元，低频区域可大幅减少，因此需依据局部纹理信息进行智能剪枝。
AI.method: 提出三组件方法：(1) 纹理估计模块捕捉场景细节的空间变化；(2) 纹理感知剪枝模块在低频区域移除冗余高斯元；(3) 自适应高斯头模块动态预测保留高斯元的属性更新，维持纯前馈流程。
AI.result: 在RE10K、ACID、DL3DV、Tanks and Temples及DTU数据集上验证了方法有效性；消融实验确认各组件贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不牺牲前馈特性的前提下，显著提升了高斯表示的紧凑性与重建质量，为高效3D重建提供了新思路。

title: Counterfactual Methods for Detecting Unfairness in Anti-Money Laundering Algorithms
summary: The application of machine learning-based predictive algorithms to Anti-Money Laundering (AML) has grown rapidly, driven by the vast volume of financial transaction data available to banks. These algorithms are typically trained not only on transactional data but also on sensitive client information, which may raise fairness concerns. Despite this, AML detection systems remain largely underexplored from a fairness perspective, even though deeper analytical methods based on counterfactuals are now available. Such techniques enable the decomposition of the direct and indirect effects of potentially sensitive features on model predictions, thereby supporting the evaluation of whether their influence is acceptable from a fairness perspective. Closing this gap, we consider the synthetic IBM AMLSim transaction dataset and construct additional features of the country of an account and its average behaviour. This improves the predictive performance of diverse machine learning models, ranging from baseline decision trees to state-of-the-art graph neural networks. We assess the potential unfairness associated with these features through a counterfactual, path-specific effect analysis. This reveals that fairness violations tend to be more pronounced for models whose predictive performance benefits the most from the extended features. Such a finding highlights a concrete instance of the trade-off between predictive accuracy and fairness in AML applications, thus underscoring the urgency of a systematic fairness analysis in such critical domains.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了反洗钱（AML）检测系统中机器学习模型的公平性问题，利用反事实路径分析方法评估敏感特征（如账户所属国家）对预测结果的直接影响与间接影响，发现模型准确率提升常伴随更显著的公平性风险，揭示了准确性与公平性的权衡。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于机器学习的AML检测系统广泛应用，但其公平性问题长期被忽视；敏感特征（如客户国籍）可能引发歧视，而现有系统缺乏系统性公平评估。
AI.method: 基于IBM AMLSim合成交易数据集，构建国家及行为统计等新特征；采用多种机器学习模型（决策树至图神经网络）；运用反事实路径特定效应分析量化敏感特征的直接与间接影响。
AI.result: 引入新特征提升了各类模型的预测性能；但性能提升越大的模型，其由敏感特征导致的公平性违规也越明显；证实了AML场景中准确性与公平性存在显著权衡。
AI.conclusion: AML系统亟需纳入系统性公平性分析框架；反事实路径分析是评估和缓解敏感特征偏见的有效工具；未来工作应兼顾预测效能与算法公平。

title: EMPURPLE: A Free Lunch for Diffusion Distillation based on the Information Bottleneck
summary: Diffusion models achieve impressive image-generation quality but remain expensive at inference time. Diffusion distillation reduces sampling steps, yet many distilled models, including SDXL-Lightning and distribution matching distillation methods, suffer from degraded Fréchet Inception Distance (FID). We analyze this phenomenon through a PAC-style generalization bound. Our analysis suggests that aggressive early-step redirection of the velocity field makes the distillation target harder to learn, enlarging the train-test gap. As a result, early-step output distributions differ between training and inference, causing distribution mismatch in the intermediate noisy latent used as next-step inputs. We empirically validate this mechanism by showing reduced diversity in both intermediate features and final outputs. To address this issue, we propose EMPURPLE, a simple training-free method that recycles intermediate latents sampled from the original model. EMPURPLE is model-agnostic and improves FID by 7\% to 20\% across DMD2, Hyper-SD, FlashSD, and SDXL-Lightning. The repo is: https://github.com/TheLovesOfLadyPurple/Empurple-Training-Free-Algorithm-To-enhance-Diversity-of-The-Diffusion-Distillation-Model

AI.tldr: 本文分析了扩散模型蒸馏中FID退化的问题，提出了一种无需训练的改进方法EMPURPLE，通过重用原始模型的中间隐变量来提升生成多样性与FID性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型蒸馏虽能加速采样，但常导致FID下降；作者旨在揭示其根本原因并提出无需训练的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于PAC风格泛化界分析早期速度场重定向对学习难度的影响，并提出EMPURPLE方法——在蒸馏过程中复用原模型采样的中间隐变量，无需额外训练。
AI.result: EMPURPLE在DMD2、Hyper-SD、FlashSD和SDXL-Lightning上将FID提升7%–20%，显著改善中间特征与最终输出的多样性。
AI.conclusion: 早期步骤的分布不匹配是FID退化的关键原因；EMPURPLE作为一种简单、模型无关、训练免费的方法，有效缓解该问题并提升生成质量。

title: Choosing a parallel heterogeneous ensemble method for tabular classification
summary:
Parallel ensemble methods were compared on $56$ small-to-medium tabular classification tasks drawn from OpenML CC18. A set of ``best practice'' recommendations on the use of ensemble methods was derived from these observations. It was later validated on 28 additional tasks using TabArena's precomputed data, where the recommendation set significantly outperformed Single Best and matched or exceeded individual ensemble methods.
  Two key observations were made. First, Blending and Stacking are inconsistent, but their inconsistencies are independent and happen on different tasks. Second, while Hard Voting's probabilistic classification is rather weak, a consequence of using vote proportions as posterior estimates, Robust Soft Voting's probabilistic classification is particularly successful, especially in the multiclass case.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在56个中小规模表格分类任务上比较并行集成方法，提出了最佳实践建议，并在28个额外任务上验证了其有效性；发现Blending和Stacking的不一致性相互独立，而Robust Soft Voting在多类概率预测上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 为提升并行集成方法在中小规模表格分类任务上的性能与可靠性，需系统评估不同方法的表现并提炼可推广的最佳实践。
AI.method: 在OpenML CC18的56个任务上实证比较Blending、Stacking、Hard Voting与Robust Soft Voting等并行集成方法；基于观察形成推荐策略，并利用TabArena预计算结果在28个新任务上进行验证。
AI.result: Blending与Stacking表现不稳定但错误模式互补；Robust Soft Voting在多类概率校准上显著优于Hard Voting；所提推荐策略整体性能超越单模型最优（Single Best），并媲美或超越各单一集成方法。
AI.conclusion: 应避免单独依赖Blending或Stacking，而优先采用Robust Soft Voting作为核心集成策略，并结合其互补性设计混合方案，以提升鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: AquaStereo: Enabling Underwater Stereo Matching via Depth-Conditioned Diffusion and Geometry Self-Distillation
summary: Learning-based stereo matching models struggle in underwater environments due to scarce in-domain data and the difficulty of extracting discriminative correspondences from degraded imagery. In this work, we present $\textbf{AquaStereo}$, a perception-enhanced framework with a data simulation pipeline and a self-distillation strategy that jointly address data scarcity and feature degradation in underwater stereo matching. First, a depth-conditioned diffusion pipeline renders underwater stereo pairs while preserving binocular geometry, with a lightweight left-right consistency module ensuring geometric alignment. Training on this synthetic corpus effectively narrows the terrestrial-underwater gap and improves zero-shot robustness. Second, a frozen binocular teacher trained on clean terrestrial pairs guides a student exposed to rendered underwater pairs with perturbations. A stage-weighted sequence loss is performed to align the student's disparities with the teacher's geometry, while a clean-branch supervision with shared pseudo targets prevents scale drift. To further enhance feature stability under turbidity and low texture, we introduce learnable perception frames, a perception-enhanced feature formulation that constructs robust matching descriptors by fusing temporal cues from two auxiliary views encoded by a video backbone with semantic features extracted by a strong image encoder. Extensive experiments demonstrate that $\textbf{AquaStereo}$ substantially improves robustness and zero-shot generalization in challenging underwater scenarios. The code is available at https://github.com/qz-wei/AquaStereo.

AI.tldr: AquaStereo提出一种感知增强的水下立体匹配框架，通过深度条件扩散模型生成几何一致的合成水下立体图像，并采用自蒸馏策略结合可学习感知帧提升特征鲁棒性，显著改善零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 基于学习的立体匹配模型在水下环境中因领域内数据稀缺和退化图像中难以提取判别性对应关系而性能受限。
AI.method: 1）构建深度条件扩散模型生成保持双目几何结构的水下立体图像对，并加入轻量级左右一致性模块；2）设计自蒸馏策略：冻结在干净陆地数据上训练的双目教师模型，指导学生模型学习渲染的水下图像；引入阶段加权序列损失和干净分支监督；3）提出可学习感知帧，融合视频骨干网络提取的时序线索与强图像编码器提取的语义特征，构建鲁棒匹配描述符。
AI.result: AquaStereo在多种挑战性水下场景中显著提升了模型鲁棒性和零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作有效缓解了水下立体匹配中的数据稀缺与特征退化问题，为 underwater perception 提供了一种新颖且实用的解决方案。

title: Grokking Is Conditional and Fragile: A Fully-Tractable, Multi-Seed Study at 12K Parameters
summary: Grokking -- the delayed onset of generalization long after a network has fit its training set - -is usually studied in models too large to read completely and reported from single training runs. We instead study a publicly released ~11,856-parameter Llama-style transformer (Glimmer-1-Base) on modular arithmetic, small enough to enumerate its weights, attention, and full input-output map, and we measure grokking as a multi-seed rate rather than a single outcome. In this fully-tractable regime grokking is a conditional, fragile phase transition. It is gated by training-set coverage, whose threshold tracks output cardinality (the modulus) more than task structure, an ordering that holds above the transition and across a ten-fold change in domain size. Weight decay reproduces the Omnigrok inverted-U at 12K parameters, a positive control on the rate measurement. Grokking also sits on a numerical knife-edge: two perturbations of the floating-point environment -- CPU thread count (reduction order) and CPU-versus-GPU execution -- each flip a minority of same-seed outcomes without a detectable shift in the aggregate rate. Decomposition into sub-task specialists helps chiefly by making coverage cheap rather than by adding supervision. Methodologically, multi-seed control under a fixed numerical environment overturns three dramatic single-run narratives in our own data, each a seed confound. The unit of evidence for grokking must therefore be a multi-seed rate under a pinned numerical environment, checked where possible against a direct reading of the model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一个约11856参数的可完全解析的Llama式小模型（Glimmer-1-Base）在模运算任务上的泛化延迟现象（grokking），发现grokking是一种依赖训练集覆盖度的脆弱相变，受输出空间大小（模数）调控，并对浮点计算环境高度敏感；强调需以多随机种子+固定数值环境为基本证据单元。
AI.motivation: 以往grokking研究多基于难以解析的大模型和单次训练，缺乏可复现性和机制洞察；本文旨在构建一个完全可枚举、可读、可控制的小规模模型系统，以定量、稳健地揭示grokking的本质机制。
AI.method: 采用公开的~11,856参数Glimmer-1-Base模型，在模运算任务上进行多随机种子训练；系统测量grokking发生率；枚举并分析权重、注意力与全输入输出映射；控制CPU线程数、硬件平台（CPU/GPU）等浮点环境变量；对比不同正则化（如weight decay）的影响；分解子任务以检验专业化作用。
AI.result: grokking表现为一种条件性、脆弱的相变，由训练集覆盖度触发，其阈值主要取决于模数（输出基数）而非任务结构；weight decay成功复现Omnigrok倒U型曲线；浮点环境微小变化（如线程数、CPU/GPU切换）可翻转部分相同种子的结果，但不改变整体率；子任务专业化主要通过降低覆盖成本起作用，而非增强监督。
AI.conclusion: grokking不是确定性现象，而是在特定覆盖条件下出现的统计性相变；其观测必须基于多种子实验与严格固定的数值环境；单一训练结果易受种子和浮点不确定性干扰，不能作为可靠证据；直接解读模型结构是验证grokking机制的关键补充手段。

title: Road-Aware Anomaly Segmentation with Query-Guided Polygons and CLIP in Autonomous Driving
comment: Accepted to IEEE IV26. Code is available at https://github.com/chrisyan/RAAS
summary: Traditional semantic segmentation models operate under a closed-set assumption and struggle to recognize unknown or unexpected objects-an essential capability for autonomous driving. As a result, such models often misclassify or overlook out-of-distribution (OOD) road anomalies, posing safety risks in open-world environments. We present a lightweight, postprocessing, road-aware anomaly segmentation framework that requires no retraining, no OOD data, and no auxiliary supervision. Our approach builds on a mask transformer-based segmentation network by exploiting query-level mask confidence and deriving a polygonal road prior to detect gap regions that may correspond to anomalies. To further suppress false positives, we introduce a CLIP-based zero-shot semantic filtering module using in-distribution prompts, with optional generalized OOD prompts. By jointly leveraging spatial priors and semantic verification, our framework produces robust and interpretable anomaly predictions. Evaluation on three public benchmarks-Fishyscapes, SMIYC, and RoadAnomaly-shows consistently strong performance. In particular, our method outperforms the training-free baseline Maskomaly on most metrics and achieves the highest AP on Fishyscapes LostAndFound. These results demonstrate the practicality and deployability of our approach for real-world autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需重训练、无需OOD数据、无需额外监督的轻量级后处理道路感知异常分割框架，利用掩码Transformer的查询级置信度与多边形道路先验检测异常区域，并结合CLIP零样本语义过滤抑制误报，在多个基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割模型在开放世界（如自动驾驶）中难以识别未知或意外物体，易误分类或遗漏分布外（OOD）的道路异常，带来安全隐患。
AI.method: 基于掩码Transformer分割网络，利用查询级掩码置信度和构建的多边形道路先验检测潜在异常空隙区域；引入CLIP零样本语义过滤模块，使用分布内提示词（可选泛化OOD提示词）抑制假阳性。
AI.result: 在Fishyscapes、SMIYC和RoadAnomaly三个公开基准上持续取得优异性能，多数指标超越无训练基线Maskomaly，在Fishyscapes LostAndFound上达到最高AP。
AI.conclusion: 该框架兼具鲁棒性、可解释性与实用性，无需模型修改或额外数据，适合真实自动驾驶系统快速部署。

title: Aura: Consistent Multi-Subject Video Generation via VLM-Grounded Semantic Alignment
summary: Subject-driven and multi-element video generation are central to controllable video synthesis, but existing methods still struggle to preserve identity consistency and model complex relationships among multiple subjects. In this paper, we propose Aura, a unified framework for high-fidelity and identity-consistent video generation. To better capture scene dynamics and subject interactions, we introduce AI director-level captions that provide dense and structured descriptions of video content. We further leverage a vision-language model (VLM) with learnable queries to extract multimodal semantic features from textual and visual references, covering both global semantics and fine-grained visual cues. To bridge the representational gap between the VLM and the Diffusion Transformer (DiT), we design a two-stage alignment strategy that progressively maps VLM features into the DiT feature space. For visual conditioning, we adopt token concatenation to inject reference information directly into the generation process. To distinguish heterogeneous subject types and reduce common copy-paste artifacts, we develop a subject-aware RoPE-Shift mechanism. To further differentiate reference images of different categories, we introduce subject-aware learnable tokens. In addition, we introduce Memory Tokens to balance the training signal across examples with different numbers of reference subjects. During inference, Progressive-APG (Adaptive Prompt Guidance) further alleviates oversaturation and improves semantic alignment with user prompts. Finally, we build a high-quality video-subject image dataset through a dedicated data construction pipeline. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both single-subject generation and more challenging multi-element scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Aura框架，通过AI导演级字幕、视觉语言模型特征提取、两阶段对齐策略、主体感知RoPE-Shift机制、主体感知可学习token及Memory Tokens等技术，实现高保真、身份一致的单/多主体视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在主体身份一致性保持和多主体复杂关系建模方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出Aura统一框架：引入AI导演级字幕；利用带可学习查询的VLM提取多模态语义特征；设计两阶段对齐策略桥接VLM与DiT；采用token拼接进行视觉条件注入；提出主体感知RoPE-Shift机制和主体感知可学习token；引入Memory Tokens平衡训练信号；推理阶段使用Progressive-APG提升语义对齐。
AI.result: 在单主体和多元素视频生成任务上均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: Aura通过多层次主体感知建模与跨模态对齐，显著提升了可控视频合成中身份一致性与多主体交互建模能力。

title: PDEFlow: Autonomous Agentic PDE Pipelines for Neural Operator Learning and Solver-Free Inference
summary: We present PDEFlow, an autonomous agentic framework that turns user-level ODE and PDE descriptions into solver-backed neural-operator pipelines. The workflow links problem specification, data generation, operator training, and checkpoint-based inference. A stateful input graph converts multi-turn natural-language input and user edits into validated problem specifications. The data-generation module then samples parameters, solves the configured governing-equation with FEniCSx finite-element backend, and stores the solutions as operator-ready tensors. The training and inference stages use a registry-based interface, allowing different neural operators to be trained and deployed without changing the surrounding pipeline. In the current implementation, we instantiate this interface with a multi-branch Bayesian DeepONet. Experiments on benchmark ODE and PDE tasks show that PDEFlow can construct valid specifications, generate solver-backed datasets, train neural operators across steady and transient problem classes, and provide solver-free predictions from saved checkpoints. The framework is designed for repeatable scientific and engineering workflows where many related physics configurations must be specified, simulated, learned, and queried with minimal manual intervention.

AI.tldr: PDEFlow是一个自主智能体框架，将用户提供的常微分方程（ODE）和偏微分方程（PDE）描述自动转化为基于求解器的神经算子流水线，涵盖问题建模、数据生成、训练与推理全流程。
AI.motivation: 为支持可重复的科学与工程工作流，减少人工干预，实现对大量相关物理配置的自动建模、仿真、学习与查询。
AI.method: 构建状态化输入图以解析多轮自然语言输入与用户编辑；利用FEniCSx有限元后端求解控制方程并生成张量数据；采用注册制接口支持多种神经算子（当前实例化为多分支贝叶斯DeepONet）的灵活训练与部署。
AI.result: 在基准ODE/PDE任务上验证了PDEFlow能自动生成有效问题描述、构建求解器支撑的数据集、跨稳态与瞬态问题训练神经算子，并提供免求解器的检查点预测能力。
AI.conclusion: PDEFlow实现了从用户级微分方程描述到神经算子部署的端到端自动化，提升了物理信息机器学习工作流的可复现性与可扩展性。

title: Framework and Multi-modal Dataset for Roadwork Zone Detection and Geo-localization
comment: Accepted to IEEE IV25. The RZDG dataset and code can be found at: https://github.com/chrisyan/RZDG
summary: Autonomous vehicles often rely on high-definition (HD) maps for navigation; however, these maps are not frequently updated and often lack semi-static information, such as temporary roadwork zones, which can significantly alter the road network. This limitation underscores the urgent need for an accurate global position of roadwork zones. However, the absence of publicly available datasets for evaluating roadwork zone detection and geo-localization models has hindered the development of reliable autonomous driving systems. To address this challenge, we propose the Roadwork Zone Detection and Geo-localization (RZDG) dataset, which includes both simulated and real-world data, providing multimodal sensor inputs along with comprehensive annotations. The dataset supports multiple perception tasks, including image semantic segmentation, 3D object detection, and object geo-localization. In addition, we introduce a tracker-based roadwork zone detection and geo-localization (RZDG) pipeline, an extension of AB3DMOT, for accurate object geo-localization in roadwork zones. We benchmark our approach on the RZDG dataset, demonstrating its effectiveness in detecting roadwork zones and transforming object positions from the local coordinate system to the global coordinate system. A prediction is considered a true positive (TP) if its estimated position falls within one meter of the ground truth. Our experimental results show that our approach achieves high accuracy on both real and simulated data. Specifically, we report: Precision: 0.565 (real) / 0.615 (simulated) Recall: 0.898 (real) / 0.809 (simulated) F1-score: 0.597 (real) / 0.665 (simulated).

AI.tldr: 本文提出RZDG数据集和基于AB3DMOT改进的路工作业区检测与地理定位方法，支持多模态感知任务，并在真实与仿真数据上验证了其高精度性能。
AI.motivation: 现有高精度地图更新不及时，缺乏临时路工作业区等半静态信息，且缺少公开数据集评估相关模型，制约自动驾驶系统可靠性提升。
AI.method: 构建包含仿真与真实数据的RZDG多模态数据集，并提出基于AB3DMOT改进的跟踪式路工作业区检测与地理定位（RZDG）流水线，实现局部坐标系到全局坐标系的精准转换。
AI.result: 在RZDG数据集上，方法在真实数据中达到Precision 0.565、Recall 0.898、F1-score 0.597；在仿真数据中达到Precision 0.615、Recall 0.809、F1-score 0.665；定位误差控制在1米内视为真阳性。
AI.conclusion: RZDG数据集填补了路工作业区检测与地理定位领域公开基准缺失的空白，所提方法在真实与仿真场景下均展现出良好鲁棒性与实用性，为自动驾驶系统应对动态道路变化提供了有效支撑。

title: Physiological Noise Augmentation Improves Non-Invasive Brain-to-Speech
summary: Non-invasive brain-to-speech decoding aims to restore communication to patients suffering from neurodegenerative disease, without the risks of neurosurgery. Existing MEG- and EEG-based methods, while scalable, continue to suffer from high word error rates driven by relatively low signal-to-noise ratios compared to invasive recordings. We propose physiological noise augmentation (PNA), a data augmentation method that explicitly trains decoders to become invariant to task-agnostic artifacts (e.g. ocular and cardiac activity). PNA draws inspiration from automatic speech recognition systems, where environmental noise (e.g. dogs barking, city traffic) is added to clean speech to improve robustness. Analogously, we decompose brain recordings into clean data and noise artifacts using independent component analysis (ICA), before scaling and remixing to generate biophysically realistic, label-preserving training examples. We show that PNA approximates anisotropic regularization, penalizing decoder sensitivity along artifact-dominated directions. On MegNIST, a 12k-trial imagined-digit MEG dataset, PNA with 10-trial averaging improves EEGNet decoding accuracy by 4.7 percentage points (absolute) over training on real data alone. Our results suggest that artifact-aware augmentation and trial averaging are complementary tools for improving robustness in non-invasive speech BCIs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为生理噪声增强（PNA）的数据增强方法，用于提升非侵入式脑机接口（如MEG/EEG）在脑-语解码任务中的鲁棒性与准确率，通过模拟真实生理噪声（如眼动、心电干扰）并结合试次平均，显著降低了词错误率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MEG/EEG的非侵入式脑-语解码方法因信噪比低，导致词错误率高；亟需提升模型对生理噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出生理噪声增强（PNA）：利用独立成分分析（ICA）分离脑信号中的干净成分与噪声成分，再缩放混合生成生物物理合理的、标签保持的增强样本；理论分析表明PNA等价于各向异性正则化。
AI.result: 在MegNIST数据集上，结合10次试次平均，PNA使EEGNet解码准确率绝对提升4.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: PNA与试次平均是互补的有效策略，可显著提升非侵入式语音BCI的鲁棒性与性能。

title: IRIS: An Intelligent Vision-Language System for Ocular Surface Diseases via Topic Tree and Scene-Driven VQA Generation
summary: While Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate remarkable generic capabilities, their clinical reasoning in specialized domains like ocular surface diseases (OSDs) is severely hindered by a paucity of high-fidelity, multimodal instruction-tuning data. To dismantle this data bottleneck, we introduce IRIS, an Intelligent Recognition and Interaction System tailored for fine-grained OSD understanding via external eye photography. First, we curate IRIS-120K, the largest and most comprehensive OSD visual question-answering (VQA) dataset to date. Crucially, to overcome the semantic shallowness of conventional image-caption pairs, we propose a synergistic data generation paradigm to explicitly inject clinical priors. Our data engine operates via a dual-branch framework: 1) a Topic Finding Tree (TFT) that hierarchically anchors visual features to precise anatomical and pathological concepts, enforcing rigorous medical deduction logic; and 2) a Scene-driven strategy that synthesizes role-adaptive clinical dialogues to ensure pragmatic generalization. By explicitly aligning a compact 4B-parameter VLM on this structurally enriched corpus, IRIS achieves state-of-the-art performance, comprehensively outperforming both generalist and specialized medical VLMs with up to 34B parameters. Our findings underscore that structured knowledge injection profoundly prevails over sheer parameter scaling, unlocking the potential for resource-efficient, expert-level AI deployment on mobile edge devices for scalable OSD screening. Code, datasets, and model weights will be publicly released by this repo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IRIS系统，通过构建高质量、结构化的眼表疾病（OSD）多模态VQA数据集IRIS-120K，并设计融合解剖病理逻辑与临床对话的双分支数据生成范式，显著提升小参数量（4B）视觉语言模型在OSD诊断任务上的性能，证明结构化知识注入优于单纯扩大模型规模。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）在眼表疾病（OSD）等专业临床领域推理能力受限，主因是缺乏高保真、多模态的指令微调数据。
AI.method: 1）构建迄今最大最全面的OSD视觉问答数据集IRIS-120K；2）提出双分支数据生成范式：Topic Finding Tree（TFT）将视觉特征分层锚定至解剖与病理概念，确保医学推理严谨性；Scene-driven策略生成角色自适应临床对话，提升实用泛化能力；3）在该结构化数据上微调4B参数VLM。
AI.result: IRIS在OSD任务上达到SOTA性能，全面超越参数高达34B的通用及专用医疗VLM；验证了结构化知识注入比单纯增大参数更有效，支持轻量级模型在移动端边缘设备部署。
AI.conclusion: 结构化临床先验知识的显式注入，而非模型规模扩张，是提升VLM在专业医疗领域推理能力的关键路径，为资源受限场景下的AI辅助筛查提供可行方案。

title: MeGA-MP: Metric Graph Advection Message Passing -- A Physics-Informed Message Passing Operator for Advection-Dominated Metric Graphs
summary: Many real-world systems are organized as networks where spatio-temporal dynamics unfold along connections and not discretely between nodes. Examples include utility networks such as water distribution systems or gas networks, electrical grids, and traffic flow networks. Such systems are naturally modeled as metric graphs, where edges correspond to one-dimensional Euclidean subspaces connected at vertices. Metric graphs are independent of an underlying global Euclidean space, limiting direct application of typical PINNs and operator-learning methods. Especially transport dynamics like advection require a methodology able to capture antisymmetric and long-range dependencies on graphs, which is itself a challenge. We propose a novel physics-informed message passing operator that encodes linear advection on metric graphs as an inductive bias. In the purely advective setting, the operator provably recovers the exact dynamics up to a theoretically derived discretization error without any training. Combined with trainable components like MLPs, our message passing operator extends to realistic advection-reaction dynamics in water distribution systems, where we achieve superior performance compared to baselines and zero-shot generalization across different graph topologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向度量图（metric graphs）上输运动力学（特别是线性对流）的新型物理信息消息传递算子，该算子将对流过程作为归纳偏置嵌入，理论上可无训练精确恢复纯对流动力学，并在水分配系统等真实场景中实现优于基线的性能及跨拓扑零样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 现实中的许多系统（如水电管网、电网、交通网）天然建模为度量图，其动力学沿边连续演化；而现有PINNs和算子学习方法依赖全局欧氏空间，难以直接适用，尤其难以捕捉图上反称性与长程依赖的对流过程。
AI.method: 设计一种新型物理信息消息传递算子，将线性对vection编码为归纳偏置；在纯对流情形下具备理论保证的无训练精确性；结合可训练MLP扩展至对流-反应耦合系统。
AI.result: 在纯对流设定下，算子可无训练精确恢复动力学（仅存在理论推导的离散误差）；在水分配系统中显著优于基线方法，并展现出跨不同图拓扑的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提消息传递算子为度量图上的物理建模提供了新范式，兼顾理论严谨性与实际可扩展性，特别适用于具有连续边动力学的基础设施网络。

title: Last-Meter Precision Navigation for UAVs: A Diffusion-Refined Aerial Visual Servoing Approach
summary: In this work, we study the last-meter precision navigation for UAVs, e.g., autonomously reaching a target within the final 10 meters using monocular vision. This task is challenging due to scale ambiguity, rotation discontinuities, and the need for fine-grained spatial reasoning. Existing methods often fail under large viewpoint changes or lack generalization to unseen environments. To this end, we propose DreamNav, a coarse-to-fine diffusion-refined aerial visual servoing framework. In the first coarse-estimation stage, a robust regression policy employs a trigonometric parameterization to predict rotation by jointly modeling sine and cosine components, effectively mitigating optimization instabilities caused by angular periodicity. Given this coarse estimate, the second diffusion-refined stage utilizes a pre-trained world model to simulate future visual observations for candidate actions, selecting the trajectory that minimizes visual discrepancy with the target through a process of visual imagination. To support rigorous evaluation, we contribute PairUAV, a large-scale benchmark comprising 4.8 million image pairs across 72 scenes, curated from the University-1652 dataset. Extensive experiments show DreamNav outperforms strong visual servoing and foundation model baselines in accuracy and generalization, with zero-shot transfer to unseen scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DreamNav，一种用于无人机最后10米精确导航的粗到细扩散精化视觉伺服框架，通过三角函数参数化旋转预测和基于预训练世界模型的视觉想象优化轨迹，在PairUAV新基准上验证了其优越性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 解决无人机在最后10米内基于单目视觉自主精准导航的挑战，包括尺度模糊、旋转不连续性和细粒度空间推理需求，以及现有方法在大视角变化和未见环境下的泛化不足问题。
AI.method: 提出DreamNav框架：第一阶段采用三角函数参数化（联合建模sin/cos）的鲁棒回归策略进行粗略姿态估计；第二阶段利用预训练世界模型对候选动作生成未来视觉观测，通过视觉想象选择最小化与目标图像差异的轨迹。同时构建PairUAV大规模图像对基准（4.8M对，72场景）。
AI.result: DreamNav在精度和泛化性上显著优于现有视觉伺服和基础模型基线，在PairUAV基准上实现零样本迁移到未见场景。
AI.conclusion: DreamNav通过融合鲁棒几何建模与生成式视觉想象，为无人机最后一米视觉导航提供了高精度、强泛化的新范式，所构建的PairUAV基准推动该领域标准化评估。

title: Platonic Projection Structures: Operator-Induced Observability in Representation Learning
summary: We characterize observability in representation learning through Platonic Projection Structures (PPS), an operator-theoretic framework for analyzing representation accessibility under partial observation. Rather than treating observable outputs as direct reflections of latent representations, PPS models observation through a self-adjoint positive semidefinite operator acting on a latent representation space. A system is represented as a triple $(H, Π, O)$, where $H$ is a latent representation space, $Π\succeq 0$ is an observation operator, and $O(v)=\langle v,Πv\rangle$ defines an induced scalar observable. Observability is characterized by the quotient geometry $H/\ker(Π)$, representing equivalence classes of latent states indistinguishable under observation. We show that quantum measurement and representation inference under linear observation models share this operator-theoretic structure while differing in the algebraic properties of their observation operators; the correspondence is structural rather than physical. Representation transfer and knowledge distillation can likewise be interpreted as approximate preservation of observable geometry through $ΦΠ_T \approx Π_S Φ$. PPS also reveals a structural limitation of output-based interpretability: latent components in $\ker(Π)$ are inaccessible from induced observables, imposing intrinsic constraints on attribution and explanation methods. Controlled empirical validations demonstrate kernel-invariant observability, projection-induced attribution gaps, and rank-controlled observable geometry in latent representation spaces. PPS thus provides an explicit characterization of observability through operator-induced quotient geometry and a unified perspective on representation accessibility, interpretability, and projection-mediated inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Platonic Projection Structures (PPS)框架，从算子理论角度刻画表征学习中的可观测性，将观测建模为作用于潜在表征空间的自伴半正定算子，并通过商几何H/ker(Π)刻画可观测性；揭示了量子测量、线性表征推断、知识蒸馏等任务共享该结构，同时指出输出型可解释性的内在局限。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将可观测输出视为潜在表征的直接反映，忽视了观测过程本身的结构性约束；本文旨在建立一个统一、严格的算子理论框架来刻画表征在部分观测下的可访问性与可解释性边界。
AI.method: 构建Platonic Projection Structures (PPS)，定义系统为三元组(H, Π, O)，其中Π是自伴半正定观测算子，O(v)=⟨v,Πv⟩为诱导标量可观测量；以商空间H/ker(Π)刻画可观测性，并分析其在量子测量、表示迁移、知识蒸馏等场景下的结构对应关系。
AI.result: 证明量子测量与线性表征推断具有相同PPS结构但Π代数性质不同；揭示ker(Π)中潜在分量不可观测，导致归因方法存在固有缺陷；实验证实核不变可观测性、投影引起的归因缺口及秩可控的可观测几何。
AI.conclusion: PPS为表征学习中的可观测性提供了基于算子诱导商几何的显式刻画，统一理解表征可访问性、可解释性与投影驱动推理，并揭示了输出驱动解释方法的根本局限。

title: HASSL: Hierarchy-Aware Self-Supervised Learning Framework for Single Cell Microscopy
summary: Hierarchical structure is common in image data, where fine-grained clusters often merge into larger, coarser semantic groups. In biological cell images, current self-supervised learning models often suppress this hierarchy, as coarse factors such as imaging modality can obscure finer morphological attributes in the latent space. We propose a hierarchy-aware self-supervised training framework to address this problem. Our method combines two components: a distillation framework with a segmentation teacher to improve morphological awareness in the latent space, and a hierarchy-aware contrastive loss based on HDBSCAN to improve decision boundaries between closely related subtypes at different hierarchical levels. Together, these components reduce the tendency of self-supervised learning to overemphasize coarse factors and instead align embeddings with semantic and morphological cues. This yields biologically meaningful sub-clusters driven by fine morphological detail. We train and evaluate our method on a curated corpus of 2.3 million single cells aggregated from 20 microscopy datasets, both labeled and unlabeled, covering 208 cell classes. Our method improves over baseline and counterpart methods, increasing average top-K accuracy by 2.8%, top-9 retrieval on the dataset with the deepest hierarchy by 6.3%, and downstream F1-score for biologically relevant drug classification from perturbed cell morphology by 7.8%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种层次感知的自监督学习框架，通过分割教师蒸馏和基于HDBSCAN的层次对比损失，提升细胞图像中细粒度形态特征的学习能力，从而在单细胞数据上实现更符合生物学意义的聚类与下游任务性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习模型在生物细胞图像中常忽略层次结构，粗粒度因素（如成像方式）掩盖了细粒度形态特征，导致潜在空间缺乏生物学可解释性。
AI.method: 结合分割教师蒸馏以增强形态感知，并设计基于HDBSCAN的层次感知对比损失，优化不同层级子类型间的决策边界。
AI.result: 在208类、230万单细胞图像数据集上验证，平均top-K准确率提升2.8%，最深层级数据集top-9检索提升6.3%，药物扰动下的下游F1分数提升7.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效缓解粗粒度偏差，使嵌入空间对语义与形态线索对齐，生成由细粒度形态驱动的生物学有意义子簇。

title: Event Detection in Videos: A Framework for the Development of New Methods
summary:
Event detection tasks in videos, the most important aspect of video surveillance, aim to detect events either at the pixel-level, frame-level, or clip-level. Plenty of methods intended for event detection in different environments, for various applications, and within different acquisition techniques were introduced. Naturally, the attempts were made as well to classify these algorithms in terms of detection of performance or in terms of real-time abilities. Nevertheless, the lack of a large-scale dataset as well as rigorous performance evaluation methods have biased such comparisons as well as the development of the methods.
  Given the diversity of existing approaches, we believe it is essential for researchers to position their work within such a rich landscape. Thus, we propose a rigorous framework for developing new methods in event detection for videos. Specifically, this framework is based on three main pillars: datasets, performance evaluation, and scenarios for deploying methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于视频事件检测的严格框架，基于数据集、性能评估和部署场景三大支柱，旨在解决现有方法因缺乏大规模数据集和严谨评估方法而导致的比较偏差和发展受限问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频事件检测方法因缺乏大规模数据集和严谨的性能评估方法，导致方法比较存在偏差，阻碍了该领域的发展。
AI.method: 提出一个基于数据集、性能评估和部署场景三大支柱的严格框架，用于指导视频事件检测新方法的研发。
AI.result: 构建了一个系统性的视频事件检测研究框架，为研究人员提供清晰的方法定位和开发指导。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于统一视频事件检测领域的评估标准，促进更公平、更有效的算法比较与技术进步。

title: SMART: A Machine Learning and Monte Carlo Framework for Rapid Analysis of Stochastic Transistor Aging and Process Variation in Digital Circuits
comment: Submitted to Engineering Reports, Under Review
summary: As CMOS technology scales into the deep nanometer regime, digital circuit reliability is increasingly threatened by the combined stochastic effects of Bias Temperature Instability (BTI) and Process Variation (PV). Traditional reliability analysis methods, which rely on computationally intensive simulations or extensive lookup tables, fail to scale efficiently for large designs, creating a critical bottleneck in design space exploration. To address this, we propose SMART, a novel framework that integrates Machine Learning (ML) with Monte Carlo simulation to enable rapid, high-fidelity reliability analysis. SMART employs Random Forest regression to predict gate delay distributions directly, bypassing time-consuming atomic model parameter extractions. Crucially, the model utilizes Bayesian Optimization for automated hyperparameter tuning, ensuring maximum predictive robustness across diverse libraries. Experimental validation on ISCAS85 benchmark circuits demonstrates that SMART achieves a 94.54% reduction in analysis time compared to state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining a remarkable average accuracy error of just 1.63%. By shifting computational complexity to an offline training phase, the proposed framework offers a scalable, accurate solution for designing resilient, reliability-aware digital systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMART框架，结合机器学习与蒙特卡洛仿真，实现快速高保真数字电路可靠性分析，大幅缩短分析时间并保持高精度。
AI.motivation: CMOS工艺进入深纳米尺度后，偏置温度不稳定性（BTI）和工艺变异（PV）的随机耦合效应严重威胁数字电路可靠性；传统分析方法计算开销大、难以扩展，制约设计空间探索。
AI.method: 提出SMART框架：采用随机森林回归直接预测门延迟分布，跳过耗时的原子模型参数提取；引入贝叶斯优化实现超参数自动调优，提升模型在不同工艺库下的鲁棒性；将主要计算负担移至离线训练阶段。
AI.result: 在ISCAS85基准电路上验证，相比当前最优方法，分析时间减少94.54%，平均误差仅1.63%。
AI.conclusion: SMART为大规模、可靠性感知的数字系统设计提供了可扩展且高精度的解决方案。

title: The Good, the Bad, and the Brittle: Benchmarking Robustness and Generalisation of Histopathology Foundation Models
summary: How robust and generalisable are pathology foundation models and have their scaling limites been reached? We benchmarked twelve pathology foundation models (PFMs) and ResNet baselines using our Robustness Evaluation and Enhancement Toolbox (REET) across eleven clinically realistic perturbations and a dissimilarity-driven Non-Redundant K-fold validation (NR-Kfold) protocol. We introduce a Perturbation Performance Index (PPI) to summarise accuracy trends under controlled perturbation sweeps and analyse robustness scaling with parameter count. We show that PFMs consistently outperform CNNs in both robustness and domain generalisation, yet model scaling shows diminishing returns: mid-sized models such (UNI2/Virchow-2 etc.) achieve comparable or greater resilience than larger systems. NR-Kfold analysis further reveals systematic accuracy loss and increased variability when training-test similarity is broken, underscoring the need for explicit distribution-shift evaluation. These findings suggest that the next generation of pathology foundation models must prioritise data quality, multimodality information and domain alignment over parameter count to achieve genuine clinical reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了12种病理学基础模型（PFMs）在多种临床现实扰动下的鲁棒性与泛化能力，提出PPI指标和NR-Kfold验证协议，发现中等规模PFMs已接近性能上限，参数量增加带来收益递减；强调未来需聚焦数据质量、多模态信息与领域对齐，而非单纯扩大模型规模。
AI.motivation: 探究病理学基础模型（PFMs）的鲁棒性、泛化能力及其扩展极限，以评估其临床可靠性。
AI.method: 使用自研Robustness Evaluation and Enhancement Toolbox（REET）对12个PFMs及ResNet基线进行基准测试；引入Perturbation Performance Index（PPI）量化扰动下性能趋势；采用基于差异性的Non-Redundant K-fold（NR-Kfold）验证协议评估分布偏移影响。
AI.result: PFMs在鲁棒性和领域泛化上持续优于CNN；但模型规模扩大带来边际收益递减，中等规模模型（如UNI2/Virchow-2）表现媲美或超越更大模型；NR-Kfold揭示训练-测试分布不匹配时系统性精度下降与方差增大。
AI.conclusion: 当前PFMs已接近参数规模驱动的性能瓶颈；提升临床可靠性需转向高质量数据、多模态融合与领域对齐，而非继续扩大参数量。

title: Latent Programming Horizons in Coding Agents
summary: A coding agent solving a software-engineering task spends dozens of steps reasoning, editing code, and running tests, yet little is known about what the underlying language model internally represents about the program it is working on. We show that the residual streams of language models under coding agents linearly encode properties of the evolving program: a logistic-regression probe on hidden states is able to decode whether the current code parses, passes its test suite, reduces the number of failing tests, and introduces regressions, reaching AUC up to 0.83 for correctness across two models and two benchmarks. Our second finding is more surprising: these representations run ahead of the agent's own edits. Probes trained to predict the outcome of future edits (before they are materialized and written on disk) achieve performance above chance up to roughly 25 steps in advance. We call this the agent's latent programming horizon. As a proof of external validity, we show that the probes transfer across benchmarks without retraining. Our positive results open calls for more research in mechanistic interpretability of coding agents.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了编码智能体在软件工程任务中语言模型内部表征的性质，发现残差流线性编码了程序演化过程中的关键属性，并且这些表征能超前预测未来编辑结果，提出‘潜在编程视野’概念。
AI.motivation: 目前尚不清楚编码智能体在多步推理、代码编辑和测试执行过程中，其底层语言模型内部如何表征正在处理的程序。
AI.method: 通过在语言模型残差流上训练逻辑回归探针，解码程序是否可解析、是否通过测试、是否减少失败测试数、是否引入回归等问题；并评估探针对未发生编辑结果的超前预测能力。
AI.result: 探针在代码正确性判断上AUC高达0.83；能提前约25步预测未来编辑结果；且跨基准迁移无需重训练。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型残差流中存在对程序状态及其未来变化的线性可解码表征，揭示了编码智能体具备‘潜在编程视野’，为机制可解释性研究提供了新方向。

title: Transferability Between Understanding and Generation in Unified Multimodal Models
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. Project Page: this https URL
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) integrate image understanding and generation within a single architecture, yet how the two tasks interact remains understudied. We investigate $\boldsymbol{\mathsf{transferability}}$ in UMMs: whether training a capability on one task improves the same capability on the other without explicit supervision. Through controlled experiments, we empirically find that transferability depends on architecture-models with fully shared transformer backbone and a unified visual encoder exhibit consistent cross-task transfer, while loosely coupled designs show little or none. Leveraging this transferability, we propose a practical training strategy. The most straightforward way to improve a target generative capability (e.g., counting) is to fine-tune generation directly, but this can degrade visual quality due to distribution shift. Instead, we train the corresponding understanding task and let it transfer into generation, which improves capability-specific generative performance while minimizing distribution shift. We validate this across three capabilities-counting, spatial relation, and text recognition/generation-showing that cross-task transferability can be systematically exploited in UMMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了统一多模态模型（UMMs）中图像理解与生成任务之间的可迁移性，发现架构设计（如共享Transformer主干和统一视觉编码器）显著影响跨任务迁移效果，并提出利用理解任务训练来提升生成任务性能的新训练策略，避免分布偏移。
AI.motivation: 统一多模态模型（UMMs）同时支持图像理解和生成，但二者如何相互影响尚不明确；本文旨在探究跨任务的可迁移性及其机制。
AI.method: 通过控制实验分析不同UMM架构下的跨任务迁移能力，并提出一种利用理解任务训练间接提升生成任务性能的训练策略。
AI.result: 发现完全共享主干和统一视觉编码器的架构具备一致的跨任务迁移能力；在计数、空间关系、文本识别/生成三个能力上验证了该策略可提升生成性能且减少分布偏移。
AI.conclusion: UMM中理解与生成任务存在可被系统性利用的跨任务迁移性，其强弱取决于架构设计；基于此可设计更鲁棒、高效的训练范式。

title: FlatManifold: Robust Continual Learning under Severe Label Noise and Domain Shifts via Intrinsic Manifold Flattening
summary:
In non-stationary streaming environments, simultaneously adapting to complex, non-linear domain shifts via continual learning while mitigating the catastrophic effects of severe, uncalibrated label noise poses a fundamental mathematical challenge. In this paper, we propose \FlatManifold{}, a novel, streamlined robust continual learning framework that utilizes a Nyström manifold flattening map based on the kernel trick and projection onto an orthogonalized Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS).
  Unlike traditional methods that rely on complex, error-prone sample-filtering pipelines, the proposed approach exploits the intrinsic mathematical robustness of the flattened space itself. By mapping feature distributions onto a fixed orthogonal target topology with a ridge regularizer, the framework naturally smoothes and counteracts the influence of extreme label noise during the optimization process. Concurrently, catastrophic forgetting is prevented via a continual topology brake term that leverages the covariance matrix of past experiences.
  Extensive evaluation on real-world multi-session robotics datasets demonstrates that even under severe conditions featuring 40\% symmetric label noise, \FlatManifold{} successfully mitigates gradient corruption. Under extreme cross-session domain shifts spanning various seasons and lighting conditions, the proposed framework establishes high generalization capabilities, significantly outperforming standard sequential optimization baselines and proving that structural linearization itself serves as a powerful mathematical barrier against distributed label corruption.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlatManifold框架，通过Nystrom流形展平映射和正交RKHS投影，在非稳态流环境中同时应对非线性域偏移和严重标签噪声，无需复杂样本过滤，利用展平空间内在鲁棒性抑制噪声并防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 在非稳态流环境中，持续学习需同时适应复杂的非线性域偏移，并缓解严重且未校准的标签噪声带来的灾难性影响，这构成根本性数学挑战。
AI.method: 提出FlatManifold框架：基于核技巧的Nystrom流形展平映射，将特征分布投影到带岭正则化的正交再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）；引入持续拓扑制动项，利用历史经验协方差矩阵防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在真实多会话机器人数据集上验证：即使在40%对称标签噪声下仍有效缓解梯度污染；在跨季节、跨光照等极端域偏移下展现强泛化能力，显著优于标准序贯优化基线。
AI.conclusion: 结构线性化本身可作为抵御分布式标签污染的强大数学屏障，FlatManifold通过内在几何鲁棒性实现噪声鲁棒持续学习。

title: Video-based detection of cessation of breathing in pre-term infants using machine learning
comment: Paper submitted to Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine (CMPB)
summary:
